props.acid-etched-altar:
name: Acid-Etched Altar
category: Religious
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.0
placement: center
room_types: slime-pit, ritual-chamber-dark, ooze-shrine, dungeon, cave
typical_count: single
clusters_with: ooze-pool, ooze-puddle, dissolved-skeleton, slime-trail
notes: Stone altar being eaten away by acid — irregular pits dissolved into the slab with sickly green slime residue dripping off every edge
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.18,0.14 1.64,1.72 z 0-1.0

# Outer slime halo — thin green wet ring where acid has pooled around the base
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.94,0.94 fill #4a7020 0.18
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.88,0.88 fill #8ab030 0.12

# Main stone slab (irregular — edges eaten away)
poly 0.22,0.18 0.56,0.14 1.10,0.12 1.54,0.16 1.82,0.26 1.86,0.62 1.84,1.06 1.88,1.48 1.78,1.80 1.42,1.88 0.96,1.86 0.54,1.84 0.22,1.76 0.14,1.42 0.16,0.94 0.12,0.56 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
poly 0.22,0.18 0.56,0.14 1.10,0.12 1.54,0.16 1.82,0.26 1.86,0.62 1.84,1.06 1.88,1.48 1.78,1.80 1.42,1.88 0.96,1.86 0.54,1.84 0.22,1.76 0.14,1.42 0.16,0.94 0.12,0.56 stroke #2a2420 width 2

# Inner recessed panel
rect 0.34,0.30 1.32,1.40 stroke #3a3028 width 1

# Acid-eaten pits (dark cutouts where the stone has been dissolved through)
cutout ellipse 0.62,0.58 0.14,0.10
cutout ellipse 1.38,0.82 0.12,0.16
cutout ellipse 0.86,1.32 0.18,0.12
cutout circle 1.54,1.44 0.08

# Slime residue ringing each eaten pit (sickly yellow-green)
ellipse 0.62,0.58 0.18,0.13 stroke #8ab030 width 2
ellipse 1.38,0.82 0.16,0.20 stroke #8ab030 width 2
ellipse 0.86,1.32 0.22,0.15 stroke #8ab030 width 2
circle 1.54,1.44 0.11 stroke #8ab030 width 2

# Pool of pale slime collected in the largest pit
ellipse 0.86,1.32 0.12,0.07 fill #a8c060 0.7

# Surface pitting (small shallow bite marks not all the way through)
circle 0.48,0.30 0.03 fill #4a5020 0.6
circle 1.22,0.38 0.028 fill #4a5020 0.55
circle 0.42,1.04 0.026 fill #4a5020 0.5
circle 1.10,1.62 0.03 fill #4a5020 0.55
circle 1.66,0.46 0.024 fill #4a5020 0.5

# Slime drip running off south edge
poly 0.72,1.82 0.80,1.92 0.78,1.98 0.70,1.96 0.68,1.88 fill #8ab030 0.85
poly 0.72,1.82 0.80,1.92 0.78,1.98 0.70,1.96 0.68,1.88 stroke #4a7020

# Slime drip running off east edge
poly 1.84,1.10 1.94,1.16 1.98,1.24 1.92,1.28 1.86,1.22 fill #a8c060 0.85
poly 1.84,1.10 1.94,1.16 1.98,1.24 1.92,1.28 1.86,1.22 stroke #4a7020

# Slime drip running off west edge
poly 0.16,0.70 0.06,0.76 0.02,0.84 0.08,0.88 0.14,0.82 fill #8ab030 0.85
poly 0.16,0.70 0.06,0.76 0.02,0.84 0.08,0.88 0.14,0.82 stroke #4a7020

# Wet highlight on slime residue
arc 0.62,0.58 0.16 200 300 stroke #c8e080 0.6 width 1
arc 1.38,0.82 0.18 160 260 stroke #c8e080 0.6 width 1
props.adze:
name: Adze
category: Workshop
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: cooperage, carpenter, workshop, lumberyard
typical_count: single
clusters_with: stave-horse, cooper-mallet, stave-pile, chopping-block
notes: Cooper's adze tool (curved blade on a short handle) lying on a workbench or floor; used for shaping barrel staves
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: adze lying flat, handle running SW-NE, curved blade at NE end

# Handle shaft (short, thick)
line 0.22,0.72 0.58,0.40 stroke #6b4e2e width 4
# Handle wood grain
line 0.22,0.72 0.58,0.40 stroke #5c3a1e 0.4 width 1

# Handle grip end (slight flare at SW)
ellipse 0.20,0.74 0.04,0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.8
ellipse 0.20,0.74 0.04,0.03 stroke #3a1f00

# Socket — where handle meets blade (iron ferrule)
ellipse 0.58,0.40 0.05,0.04 fill #555555 0.8
ellipse 0.58,0.40 0.05,0.04 stroke #333333

# Blade — curved cutting edge (adze blade is perpendicular to handle)
# From above: a short curved wedge shape
poly 0.56,0.28 0.74,0.24 0.78,0.30 0.76,0.40 0.60,0.42 fill #888888 0.85
poly 0.56,0.28 0.74,0.24 0.78,0.30 0.76,0.40 0.60,0.42 stroke #333333
# Blade bevel highlight
line 0.58,0.30 0.76,0.28 stroke #8899aa 0.4 width 1

# Cutting edge (bright steel line along the curved front)
qbezier 0.74,0.24 0.82,0.32 0.76,0.40 stroke #aabbcc width 2

# Iron patina on blade
ellipse 0.68,0.34 0.06,0.05 fill #555555 0.15

# Wood shaving near the tool
poly 0.38,0.56 0.42,0.52 0.46,0.56 0.44,0.60 fill #c8b898 0.3
poly 0.38,0.56 0.42,0.52 0.46,0.56 0.44,0.60 stroke #8b7355 0.2
props.air-node-vortex:
name: Air Node Vortex
category: Magical
footprint: 3x3
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: elemental-air-node, elemental-node, storm-spire
typical_count: single
clusters_with: cloud-pillar, djinn-pavilion, feather-drift, wind-chime-giant
notes: Primal vortex of wind — place as centerpiece of an air node. Swirling silver/white wisps funnel inward toward a bright core.
lights: [{"preset":"arcane-blue","x":1.5,"y":1.5,"radius":12,"intensity":0.8,"color":"#d0e0ff"}]
---
# Outer luminous halo
circle 1.5,1.5 1.4 gradient-radial #8090b0 #0a0814 0.35
# Soft mid-glow
circle 1.5,1.5 1.0 fill #a0b0d0 0.18
circle 1.5,1.5 0.7 fill #c0d0f0 0.22

# Spiral arms — bezier wisps curling inward clockwise
bezier 0.3,0.6 1.2,0.2 1.8,1.0 1.5,1.5 stroke #d0e0ff width 3
bezier 2.7,0.6 2.4,1.6 1.4,1.4 1.5,1.5 stroke #d0e0ff width 3
bezier 2.7,2.4 1.8,2.8 1.2,2.0 1.5,1.5 stroke #d0e0ff width 3
bezier 0.3,2.4 0.6,1.4 1.6,1.6 1.5,1.5 stroke #d0e0ff width 3

# Thinner inner spiral wisps
bezier 0.9,0.8 1.5,0.7 1.7,1.2 1.5,1.5 stroke #e0e0f0 width 2
bezier 2.1,0.8 2.0,1.3 1.3,1.3 1.5,1.5 stroke #e0e0f0 width 2
bezier 2.1,2.2 1.5,2.3 1.3,1.7 1.5,1.5 stroke #e0e0f0 width 2
bezier 0.9,2.2 1.0,1.7 1.7,1.7 1.5,1.5 stroke #e0e0f0 width 2

# Bright inner ring
circle 1.5,1.5 0.35 fill #e0e8ff 0.35
circle 1.5,1.5 0.35 stroke #ffffff 0.5

# Hot white core
circle 1.5,1.5 0.15 fill #ffffff 0.75
circle 1.5,1.5 0.08 fill #ffffff 0.95

# Floating sparkles
circle 0.6,1.2 0.03 fill #ffffff 0.8
circle 2.3,0.8 0.025 fill #ffffff 0.75
circle 2.4,2.2 0.03 fill #ffffff 0.8
circle 0.7,2.3 0.025 fill #ffffff 0.7

---

# Secondary tendril

# Inner bright wisp
bezier 0.35,0.55 0.45,0.4 0.6,0.45 0.65,0.4 stroke #ffffff width 2

# Tiny core highlights
circle 0.55,0.45 0.04 fill #ffffff 0.85
circle 0.4,0.6 0.025 fill #ffffff 0.7

# Stray sparkle
circle 0.72,0.55 0.02 fill #e0e8ff 0.7
circle 0.28,0.38 0.018 fill #e0e8ff 0.6

props.animal-pen-partition:

category: Architecture

facing: yes
shadow: yes

notes: Rough wooden fence partition for livestock area — horizontal rails between stout posts. Low enough to corral but not a perimeter wall. Rural, rough-hewn.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.08,0.36 1.84,0.28

# footprint 1x2: x 0-2, y 0-1. Wall-mounted partition running east-west.

# === Ground shadow beneath partition ===
rect 0.14,0.64 1.72,0.06 fill #000000 0.2

# === Three stout end/middle posts (vertical, rough hewn) ===
# Post 1 (west end)
rect 0.08,0.30 0.18,0.40 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
rect 0.08,0.30 0.18,0.40 stroke #1a0a00 width 1
# Post grain
line 0.17,0.34 0.17,0.68 stroke #2a1400 0.6
# Post top end grain (knot circle)
circle 0.17,0.36 0.025 stroke #2a1400 width 1
circle 0.17,0.36 0.015 fill #3a1f00 0.6

# Post 2 (center)
rect 0.92,0.30 0.16,0.40 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
rect 0.92,0.30 0.16,0.40 stroke #1a0a00 width 1
line 1.00,0.34 1.00,0.68 stroke #2a1400 0.6
circle 1.00,0.36 0.025 stroke #2a1400 width 1
circle 1.00,0.36 0.015 fill #3a1f00 0.6

# Post 3 (east end)
rect 1.74,0.30 0.18,0.40 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
rect 1.74,0.30 0.18,0.40 stroke #1a0a00 width 1
line 1.83,0.34 1.83,0.68 stroke #2a1400 0.6
circle 1.83,0.36 0.025 stroke #2a1400 width 1
circle 1.83,0.36 0.015 fill #3a1f00 0.6

# === Top horizontal rail (runs east-west across all posts) ===
rect 0.08,0.40 1.84,0.08 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.08,0.40 1.84,0.08 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
# Rail grain
line 0.10,0.44 1.90,0.44 stroke #2a1400 0.5

# === Middle horizontal rail ===
rect 0.08,0.50 1.84,0.06 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.82
rect 0.08,0.50 1.84,0.06 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
line 0.10,0.53 1.90,0.53 stroke #2a1400 0.4

# === Lower horizontal rail ===
rect 0.08,0.58 1.84,0.06 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.82
rect 0.08,0.58 1.84,0.06 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
line 0.10,0.61 1.90,0.61 stroke #2a1400 0.4

# === Rough tied cord / lashings at post joints (rural fencing detail) ===
# West post lashings
line 0.22,0.42 0.28,0.42 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 0.22,0.52 0.28,0.52 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 0.22,0.60 0.28,0.60 stroke #8b7355 width 2
# Center post lashings
line 0.98,0.42 1.04,0.42 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 0.98,0.52 1.04,0.52 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 0.98,0.60 1.04,0.60 stroke #8b7355 width 2
# East post lashings
line 1.80,0.42 1.86,0.42 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 1.80,0.52 1.86,0.52 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 1.80,0.60 1.86,0.60 stroke #8b7355 width 2

# === Iron nails/spikes at post-rail joints ===
circle 0.17,0.44 0.018 fill #333333 0.85
circle 0.17,0.53 0.016 fill #333333 0.85
circle 0.17,0.61 0.016 fill #333333 0.85
circle 1.00,0.44 0.018 fill #333333 0.85
circle 1.00,0.53 0.016 fill #333333 0.85
circle 1.00,0.61 0.016 fill #333333 0.85
circle 1.83,0.44 0.018 fill #333333 0.85
circle 1.83,0.53 0.016 fill #333333 0.85
circle 1.83,0.61 0.016 fill #333333 0.85

# === Rough wear/scratches (livestock rubbed against rails) ===

line 1.20,0.50 1.40,0.52 stroke #1a0800 0.5 width 1
line 0.50,0.60 0.70,0.62 stroke #1a0800 0.4 width 1
line 1.30,0.60 1.50,0.62 stroke #1a0800 0.4 width 1

props.animal-skull:
name: Animal Skull
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.3
placement: floor
room_types: alchemy-lab, cabin-witch, bog-witch-hut, demiplane-laboratory
typical_count: few
clusters_with: skull-small, animal-skull-small, specimen-jar, reagent-jar
notes: Larger animal skull (wolf/deer) used as alchemy ingredient display. Snout faces south (high Y). Bigger and more detailed than skull-small.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection ellipse 0.50,0.48 0.30,0.36

# Cranium (rounded dome — back of skull north)
ellipse 0.50,0.36 0.30,0.26 fill #e8dcc8 0.95
ellipse 0.50,0.36 0.30,0.26 stroke #8a7040
# Cranium bone texture wash
ellipse 0.50,0.36 0.30,0.26 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.25
# Aged yellowing wash (uneven staining across cranium)
ellipse 0.60,0.30 0.14,0.10 fill #d4c4a8 0.55
ellipse 0.38,0.42 0.10,0.08 fill #d4c4a8 0.45
# Cranial suture (zig-zag seam along top)
line 0.38,0.24 0.44,0.30 stroke #8a7040 width 1
line 0.44,0.30 0.50,0.24 stroke #8a7040 width 1
line 0.50,0.24 0.56,0.30 stroke #8a7040 width 1
line 0.56,0.30 0.62,0.24 stroke #8a7040 width 1
# Hairline cracks across cranium (age)
bezier 0.30,0.40 0.38,0.36 0.46,0.40 0.54,0.36 stroke #8a7040 0.7 width 1
line 0.58,0.48 0.66,0.42 stroke #8a7040 0.65 width 1
# Eye sockets (deep dark hollows)
ellipse 0.38,0.44 0.08,0.09 fill #0a0604 0.95
ellipse 0.38,0.44 0.08,0.09 stroke #5a4028
ellipse 0.62,0.44 0.08,0.09 fill #0a0604 0.95
ellipse 0.62,0.44 0.08,0.09 stroke #5a4028
# Socket rim highlights
arc 0.38,0.44 0.08 200 340 stroke #d4c4a8 0.55 width 1
arc 0.62,0.44 0.08 200 340 stroke #d4c4a8 0.55 width 1
# Cheekbone / zygomatic arches (side ridges)
arc 0.28,0.54 0.08 270 90 stroke #8a7040 0.75 width 2
arc 0.72,0.54 0.08 90 270 stroke #8a7040 0.75 width 2
# Elongated snout/muzzle (south — tapered, long for wolf/deer)
poly 0.38,0.60 0.62,0.60 0.60,0.82 0.54,0.92 0.46,0.92 0.40,0.82 fill #e8dcc8 0.95
poly 0.38,0.60 0.62,0.60 0.60,0.82 0.54,0.92 0.46,0.92 0.40,0.82 stroke #8a7040
# Snout suture / central seam
line 0.50,0.60 0.50,0.90 stroke #8a7040 0.7 width 1
# Nasal cavity (dark opening at snout tip)
poly 0.46,0.68 0.54,0.68 0.52,0.84 0.50,0.88 0.48,0.84 fill #0a0604 0.95
poly 0.46,0.68 0.54,0.68 0.52,0.84 0.50,0.88 0.48,0.84 stroke #5a4028
# Fangs/teeth along lower snout edges (visible pair)
poly 0.42,0.86 0.44,0.84 0.46,0.92 fill #e8dcc8 0.95
poly 0.42,0.86 0.44,0.84 0.46,0.92 stroke #8a7040
poly 0.58,0.86 0.56,0.84 0.54,0.92 fill #e8dcc8 0.95
poly 0.58,0.86 0.56,0.84 0.54,0.92 stroke #8a7040
# Small teeth row along snout edge
line 0.42,0.78 0.44,0.80 stroke #8a7040 width 1
line 0.46,0.80 0.48,0.82 stroke #8a7040 width 1
line 0.52,0.82 0.54,0.80 stroke #8a7040 width 1
line 0.56,0.80 0.58,0.78 stroke #8a7040 width 1
# Bright highlight on crown of skull
ellipse 0.46,0.30 0.08,0.04 fill #f4e8d4 0.5

props.annealing-oven:
name: Annealing Oven
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: wall
room_types: glassworks, workshop
typical_count: single
clusters_with: gaffer-bench, sand-bin, color-rod-bundle, forge
notes: Large brick annealing oven for slow-cooling glass. Place against a wall with front (south) facing into the workshop.
lights: [{"preset":"ember","x":1,"y":1.6,"radius":4,"intensity":0.15,"color":"#ffaa00"}]
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.1,0.1 1.8,1.55 z 0-2.5

# footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2. Wall at north, mouth at south.

# === Brick body (rectangular industrial oven) ===
rect 0.1,0.1 1.8,1.6 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.85
rect 0.1,0.1 1.8,1.6 stroke #2a1400

# === Iron strapping bands running across top of oven ===
rect 0.1,0.35 1.8,0.07 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
rect 0.1,0.35 1.8,0.07 stroke #222222
rect 0.1,0.95 1.8,0.07 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
rect 0.1,0.95 1.8,0.07 stroke #222222

# === Iron corner plates (riveted hardware) ===
rect 0.12,0.12 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.75
rect 0.12,0.12 0.18,0.18 stroke #222222
rect 1.70,0.12 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.75
rect 1.70,0.12 0.18,0.18 stroke #222222

# === Rivets on straps ===
circle 0.22,0.385 0.018 fill #555555 0.9
circle 0.95,0.385 0.018 fill #555555 0.9
circle 1.78,0.385 0.018 fill #555555 0.9
circle 0.22,0.985 0.018 fill #555555 0.9
circle 0.95,0.985 0.018 fill #555555 0.9
circle 1.78,0.985 0.018 fill #555555 0.9

# === Brick joint lines (mortar texture hint) ===
line 0.1,0.65 1.9,0.65 stroke #1a0a00 0.4
line 0.1,1.35 1.9,1.35 stroke #1a0a00 0.4

# === Oven mouth — dark elliptical opening at south, residual heat (NOT flame) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.52 0.42,0.18 fill #1a0800 0.85

notes: Sunken circular fighting pit in the floor — dark central void surrounded by stone rim with chained anchor points and sand-strewn floor visible below.
---
# footprint 3x3: x 0-3, y 0-3. Center (1.5, 1.5). Pit is sunken so no blocks_light and no floor shadow.

# === Outer stone rim (wide, heavy ring) ===

# Outer rim scuffs/cracks

circle 1.5,1.5 1.14 stroke #1a1a1a 0.7 width 1

# === Deep pit shadow (dark gradient receding into depth) ===
circle 1.5,1.5 1.12 gradient-radial #3a2418 #000000 0.95

# === Sand floor at the bottom of the pit (lighter, partially visible) ===
circle 1.5,1.5 0.78 fill #6b5028 0.55

circle 1.50,0.16 0.025 fill #daa520 0.6

category: Features
footprint: 2x2

# === Faint inner glow (pale sanctified light from the water) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.48 gradient-radial #d0e8f4 #4a7a9a 0.35

# === Rim facet lines (octagon segments) ===
line 0.72,0.32 0.46,0.78 stroke #4a4a4a 0.4
line 1.28,0.32 1.54,0.78 stroke #4a4a4a 0.4
line 1.68,0.72 1.54,1.22 stroke #4a4a4a 0.4
line 1.68,1.28 1.22,1.54 stroke #4a4a4a 0.4
line 1.28,1.68 0.78,1.54 stroke #4a4a4a 0.4

# === Central cross or light-point (where the sanctified light emanates) ===

line 0.92,1.0 1.08,1.0 stroke #e8f4ff 0.85 width 2
circle 1.0,1.0 0.04 fill #ffffff 0.9

category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.2
placement: corner
room_types: elemental-fire-node, elemental-node, volcano-caldera, fire-plane
typical_count: few
clusters_with: ember-pit, flame-pillar, ember-drift, fire-node-core
notes: Hexagonal basalt column seen from above — dark volcanic rock with glowing magma cracks radiating from the center
lights: [{"preset":"ember","x":0.5,"y":0.5,"radius":6,"intensity":0.5,"color":"#ff4400"}]
---

hitbox poly 0.22,0.32 0.22,0.68 0.50,0.88 0.78,0.68 0.78,0.32 0.50,0.12 z 0-2.2

# Darker basalt core

poly 0.32,0.40 0.32,0.60 0.50,0.72 0.68,0.60 0.68,0.40 0.50,0.28 stroke #0a0400 width 1
# Glowing magma cracks radiating from the core
line 0.50,0.50 0.22,0.36 stroke #ff6020 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.22,0.64 stroke #ff6020 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.78,0.36 stroke #ff4020 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.78,0.64 stroke #ff6020 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.50,0.15 stroke #ff4020 width 2

line 0.64,0.56 0.72,0.58 stroke #ffaa30 width 1
line 0.44,0.62 0.40,0.74 stroke #ffaa30 width 1
line 0.56,0.38 0.60,0.26 stroke #ffaa30 width 1
# Glowing crack junction — the hottest spot
circle 0.50,0.50 0.08 fill #ff6020 0.75
circle 0.50,0.50 0.05 fill #ffaa30 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.025 fill #ffcc60 0.95
# Basalt edge highlights
line 0.22,0.32 0.50,0.12 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.50,0.12 0.78,0.32 stroke #555555 width 1
props.basket:
name: Basket
category: Containers
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1
placement: floor
room_types: textile-loomhouse, kitchen, pantry, peasant-hovel, house-medium-family, market-square
typical_count: few
clusters_with: basket-wool, bobbin, sack, loom, spinning-wheel
notes: Wicker storage basket with woven lattice lid — generic domestic container. Place along walls, in corners, or clustered in workshops.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection circle 0.5,0.5 0.38

# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1
# Top-down: round wicker basket with woven lattice lid

# === Outer wicker rim ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.40 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.8
circle 0.50,0.50 0.40 stroke #3a1f00

# === Inner rim band (wicker weave concentric) ===

circle 0.50,0.50 0.32 stroke #5c3a1e 0.45

# === Lattice lid — crossed wicker weave ===

line 0.50,0.15 0.50,0.85 stroke #5c3a1e 0.7 width 2
line 0.64,0.18 0.64,0.82 stroke #5c3a1e 0.7 width 2

# Weft strips (horizontal)

line 0.15,0.50 0.85,0.50 stroke #4a2800 0.65 width 2
line 0.18,0.64 0.82,0.64 stroke #4a2800 0.65 width 2

# === Dark shadow between weave (suggests depth) ===
circle 0.42,0.42 0.02 fill #2a1400 0.5
circle 0.58,0.42 0.02 fill #2a1400 0.5
circle 0.42,0.58 0.02 fill #2a1400 0.5
circle 0.58,0.58 0.02 fill #2a1400 0.5

# === Outer rim highlight ===
arc 0.50,0.50 0.40 200 340 stroke #8b7355 0.5 width 1

props.beam-pump:
name: Beam Pump
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x3
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 3.5
placement: center
room_types: tunnel-mine-worked, mine-shaft-entrance, foundry-great
typical_count: single
clusters_with: mine-shaft, mine-shaft-opening, timber-brace, coal-bin, pipe, winch-large
notes: Cornish beam pump — the industrial heart of a deep mine's dewatering system. A massive iron rocker-beam pivots on a central masonry fulcrum; at one end a pump rod drops into a shaft in the floor, at the other a counterweight or crank link. Canonical orientation — beam runs east-west (along x); pump shaft at the EAST end (high x, around x=2.8), counterweight at the WEST end (low x, around x=0.2). Place centered in a pump room with the rod-end over a shaft or grate.
---
# === HITBOX ===
# Fulcrum pier (central masonry block)
hitbox rect 1.15,0.55 0.70,0.90 z 0-3.5
# Rocker beam (long horizontal iron-bound timber)
hitbox rect 0.08,0.85 2.84,0.30 z 2.0-3.5

# === GREASE / SOOT STAIN around fulcrum base (drawn first, under everything) ===
ellipse 1.50,1.00 0.95,0.50 fill #120a04 0.35
ellipse 1.50,1.00 0.70,0.35 fill #080400 0.45

# === RUST STREAK below the pump rod (east end, descending south from the shaft opening) ===
poly 2.68,1.25 2.82,1.25 2.80,1.85 2.70,1.85 fill #5a2a10 0.35
poly 2.70,1.30 2.78,1.30 2.76,1.75 2.72,1.75 fill #7a3818 0.30

# === FLOOR SHAFT OPENING (east end — dark pit the pump rod descends into) ===
rect 2.55,0.75 0.35,0.50 fill #000000 0.95
rect 2.55,0.75 0.35,0.50 stroke #1a1208 width 2
# Inner shaft shadow gradient
rect 2.60,0.80 0.25,0.40 fill #0a0604 0.85

# === FULCRUM PIER (central masonry block) ===
rect 1.15,0.55 0.70,0.90 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.9
rect 1.15,0.55 0.70,0.90 stroke #1f1a14 width 2
# Pier mortar courses (horizontal masonry lines)
line 1.17,0.78 1.83,0.78 stroke #1a1510 width 1
line 1.17,1.00 1.83,1.00 stroke #1a1510 width 1
line 1.17,1.22 1.83,1.22 stroke #1a1510 width 1
# Decorative iron anchor bolts at pier corners
circle 1.22,0.62 0.05 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.78,0.62 0.05 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.22,1.38 0.05 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.78,1.38 0.05 fill #333333 0.95

# === ROCKER BEAM (long iron-bound timber, full width) ===
rect 0.10,0.85 2.80,0.30 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.10,0.85 2.80,0.30 stroke #1a1208 width 2
# Iron straps (banded at regular intervals along the beam)
rect 0.40,0.83 0.06,0.34 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.95
rect 0.40,0.83 0.06,0.34 stroke #222222
rect 0.85,0.83 0.06,0.34 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.95
rect 0.85,0.83 0.06,0.34 stroke #222222
rect 2.09,0.83 0.06,0.34 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.95
rect 2.09,0.83 0.06,0.34 stroke #222222
rect 2.54,0.83 0.06,0.34 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.95
rect 2.54,0.83 0.06,0.34 stroke #222222
# Rivets along the beam edges (small dark circles)
circle 0.30,0.90 0.03 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.30,1.10 0.03 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.70,0.90 0.03 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.70,1.10 0.03 fill #333333 0.95
circle 2.30,0.90 0.03 fill #333333 0.95
circle 2.30,1.10 0.03 fill #333333 0.95
circle 2.70,0.90 0.03 fill #333333 0.95
circle 2.70,1.10 0.03 fill #333333 0.95

# === PIVOT CAP (thick iron disc with bolts, atop the fulcrum — centered) ===
circle 1.50,1.00 0.26 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.95
circle 1.50,1.00 0.26 stroke #1a1a1a width 2
circle 1.50,1.00 0.18 stroke #444444 width 1
# Bolts on the pivot cap (four cardinal points)
circle 1.50,0.80 0.04 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.50,1.20 0.04 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.30,1.00 0.04 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.70,1.00 0.04 fill #222222 0.95
# Center pivot pin
circle 1.50,1.00 0.06 fill #1a1a1a 0.95
circle 1.50,1.00 0.06 stroke #000000

# === EAST END — PUMP ROD YOKE & SHAFT ===
# Yoke/flange where rod connects to beam (iron bracket)
rect 2.58,0.78 0.26,0.44 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.95
rect 2.58,0.78 0.26,0.44 stroke #1a1a1a width 2
# Yoke bolts
circle 2.63,0.84 0.03 fill #222222 0.95
circle 2.79,0.84 0.03 fill #222222 0.95
circle 2.63,1.16 0.03 fill #222222 0.95
circle 2.79,1.16 0.03 fill #222222 0.95
# Pump rod itself (thick iron shaft descending into the floor opening)
rect 2.66,0.95 0.10,0.30 fill #555555 0.95
rect 2.66,0.95 0.10,0.30 stroke #222222 width 1
# Rod highlight
line 2.69,0.97 2.69,1.22 stroke #888888 width 1

# === WEST END — COUNTERWEIGHT BLOCK ===
# Counterweight yoke connecting beam to weight
rect 0.16,0.78 0.22,0.44 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.95
rect 0.16,0.78 0.22,0.44 stroke #1a1a1a width 2
# Counterweight bolts
circle 0.21,0.84 0.03 fill #222222 0.95
circle 0.33,0.84 0.03 fill #222222 0.95
circle 0.21,1.16 0.03 fill #222222 0.95
circle 0.33,1.16 0.03 fill #222222 0.95
# Heavy counterweight block hanging off the west end
rect 0.12,0.62 0.32,0.76 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.9
rect 0.12,0.62 0.32,0.76 stroke #1a0f08 width 2
# Counterweight banding (iron reinforcement straps)
line 0.12,0.82 0.44,0.82 stroke #1a0f08 width 2
line 0.12,1.18 0.44,1.18 stroke #1a0f08 width 2
# Counterweight center rivet (the mass anchor)
circle 0.28,1.00 0.06 fill #2a2218 0.95
circle 0.28,1.00 0.06 stroke #000000

circle 0.50,0.96 0.028 fill #8b6914 0.8

circle 0.50,1.20 0.062 stroke #1a0f00

---
# === HITBOX ===
selection circle 0.50,0.50 0.28

# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1.
# Top-down: small post with a brass bell hanging on a crossbar; view shows bell dome + rope.

# Crossbar end caps

circle 0.72,0.25 0.025 fill #2a1400 0.9

circle 0.50,0.40 0.19 stroke #5a3a00 width 2

circle 0.50,0.40 0.11 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

circle 0.50,0.40 0.05 stroke #3a2000 width 1

# Highlight on bell
arc 0.50,0.40 0.17 200 250 stroke #ffd860 0.55 width 1

# === Striking rope hanging south ===
line 0.50,0.58 0.50,0.88 stroke #8b7355 width 2

circle 0.50,0.90 0.035 stroke #3a2a1a
# Small tassel wisps
line 0.48,0.92 0.46,0.96 stroke #8b7355 0.8 width 1
line 0.52,0.92 0.54,0.96 stroke #8b7355 0.8 width 1
line 0.50,0.93 0.50,0.97 stroke #8b7355 0.8 width 1

# === Clapper hint (small dark dot at very center of bell) ===
circle 0.50,0.40 0.018 fill #222222 0.95

notes: Towering industrial blast furnace — outer brick ring, iron band, molten fire core looking straight down the stack. Tuyère on one side, slag runnel opposite. Cluster with ladle-iron, casting-pit and overhead-crane.

circle 0.50,1.50 0.028 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.50,1.50 0.028 fill #222222 0.95

# === Inner refractory lining ring (dark heat-scarred stone) ===

circle 1.0,1.0 0.58 stroke #0a0400 width 2

poly 1.00,0.56 1.14,0.62 1.28,0.66 1.36,0.78 1.44,1.00 1.36,1.22 1.28,1.34 1.14,1.38 1.00,1.44 0.86,1.38 0.72,1.34 0.64,1.22 0.56,1.00 0.64,0.78 0.72,0.66 0.86,0.62 fill #ff6020 0.85

circle 1.22,0.78 0.015 fill #ffcc60 0.9

# === Tuyère (air-blast pipe) jutting out west side ===

ellipse 0.42,0.42 0.04,0.025 fill #ff4433 0.6

circle 0.5,0.5 0.20 stroke #2a0000 0.6 width 1

circle 0.58,0.48 0.006 fill #ff6644 0.7

category: Library & Study

placement: floor
room_types: library, shop-bookseller, study

notes: Small ribbon bookmark — scatter on desks, near book piles, or on reading surfaces. Burgundy or navy fabric with gold thread edge and a tasseled end.
---
# === HITBOX === (very small, flat — negligible occluder)
selection rect 0.30,0.25 0.42,0.10

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# A thin strip of ribbon with a tassel at the south end.

# Faint scuff/rumple shadow under the ribbon for depth
rect 0.32,0.28 0.40,0.40 fill #1a1208 0.12

line 0.36,0.30 0.36,0.70 stroke #b0324a 0.55 width 1

line 0.34,0.80 0.33,0.90 stroke #8b2233 width 1
line 0.36,0.80 0.36,0.91 stroke #8b2233 width 1
line 0.38,0.80 0.39,0.90 stroke #8b2233 width 1

# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,0.80

# footprint 1x2: x 0-2, y 0-1. Spans east-west across a gap running N-S? No — spans a channel running east-west, with dark gap visible at north and south beyond the planks.

rect 0.0,0.0 2.0,0.08 fill #0a0a0a 0.85

# === Dark gap visible beyond bridge south edge ===
rect 0.0,0.92 2.0,0.08 fill #0a0a0a 0.85

rect 0.0,0.08 0.10,0.84 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85

rect 1.90,0.08 0.10,0.84 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85

rect 0.10,0.59 1.80,0.15 stroke #2a1400 width 1

rect 0.10,0.75 1.80,0.16 stroke #2a1400 width 1

# === Cross-support beams (under planks, visible at ends as dark bands) ===

rect 1.84,0.10 0.06,0.82 fill #3a1f00 0.55

line 0.10,0.74 1.90,0.74 stroke #1a0800 0.85 width 1

# === Iron nails at plank ends ===

circle 1.82,0.18 0.02 fill #555555 0.85
circle 0.18,0.34 0.018 fill #555555 0.85
circle 1.82,0.34 0.018 fill #555555 0.85
circle 0.18,0.50 0.018 fill #555555 0.85
circle 1.82,0.50 0.018 fill #555555 0.85

props.bunting-line:
name: Bunting Line
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x3
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 2.5
placement: center
room_types: fairground-seasonal, festival-grounds, village-green, tavern
typical_count: few
clusters_with: maypole, stage-performance, game-booth, bonfire-large, lantern-paper
notes: Strung festival bunting hanging overhead — top-down view shows the rope line with the top edges of the flags peeking out and a faint drape shadow beneath
---
# footprint 1x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-1. Rope runs east-west with a slight sag.
# Faint drape shadow below the line (bunting hanging above the floor)
bezier 0.10,0.60 0.80,0.72 2.20,0.72 2.90,0.60 stroke #1a1a1a 0.18 width 14
# === Main rope — thin line across the footprint, sagging in the middle ===
bezier 0.10,0.42 0.80,0.52 2.20,0.52 2.90,0.42 stroke #5c3a1e width 2
bezier 0.10,0.42 0.80,0.52 2.20,0.52 2.90,0.42 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1
# === Top edges of the flags peeking south of the rope (small angled bars) ===
# Each flag: a short slanted stroke with a bright color tip
# Flag 1 (red)
line 0.18,0.44 0.30,0.46 stroke #c82020 0.9 width 3
circle 0.24,0.48 0.018 fill #c82020 0.85
# Flag 2 (yellow)
line 0.36,0.46 0.48,0.48 stroke #ffcc20 0.9 width 3
circle 0.42,0.50 0.018 fill #ffcc20 0.85
# Flag 3 (blue)
line 0.54,0.48 0.66,0.50 stroke #3080c0 0.9 width 3
circle 0.60,0.52 0.018 fill #3080c0 0.85
# Flag 4 (red)
line 0.72,0.50 0.84,0.52 stroke #c82020 0.9 width 3
circle 0.78,0.54 0.018 fill #c82020 0.85
# Flag 5 (green)
line 0.90,0.50 1.02,0.52 stroke #40a040 0.9 width 3
circle 0.96,0.54 0.018 fill #40a040 0.85
# Flag 6 (yellow)
line 1.08,0.52 1.20,0.54 stroke #ffcc20 0.9 width 3
circle 1.14,0.56 0.018 fill #ffcc20 0.85
# Flag 7 (red, center — rope is lowest here)
line 1.26,0.52 1.38,0.54 stroke #c82020 0.9 width 3
circle 1.32,0.56 0.018 fill #c82020 0.85
# Flag 8 (blue, center)
line 1.44,0.52 1.56,0.54 stroke #3080c0 0.9 width 3
circle 1.50,0.56 0.018 fill #3080c0 0.85
# Flag 9 (yellow)
line 1.62,0.52 1.74,0.54 stroke #ffcc20 0.9 width 3
circle 1.68,0.56 0.018 fill #ffcc20 0.85
# Flag 10 (green)
line 1.80,0.52 1.92,0.50 stroke #40a040 0.9 width 3
circle 1.86,0.54 0.018 fill #40a040 0.85
# Flag 11 (red)
line 1.98,0.50 2.10,0.48 stroke #c82020 0.9 width 3
circle 2.04,0.52 0.018 fill #c82020 0.85
# Flag 12 (blue)
line 2.16,0.48 2.28,0.46 stroke #3080c0 0.9 width 3
circle 2.22,0.50 0.018 fill #3080c0 0.85
# Flag 13 (yellow)
line 2.34,0.46 2.46,0.44 stroke #ffcc20 0.9 width 3
circle 2.40,0.48 0.018 fill #ffcc20 0.85
# Flag 14 (red)
line 2.52,0.44 2.64,0.42 stroke #c82020 0.9 width 3
circle 2.58,0.46 0.018 fill #c82020 0.85
# Flag 15 (green)
line 2.70,0.42 2.82,0.40 stroke #40a040 0.9 width 3
circle 2.76,0.44 0.018 fill #40a040 0.85

props.burial-urn:

circle 0.50,0.54 0.32 stroke #444444

circle 0.50,0.28 0.18 stroke #444444

props.burner-shelter:
name: Burner Shelter
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 4
placement: floor
room_types: charcoal-burner-camp, ranger-camp, scouts-blind
typical_count: single
clusters_with: charcoal-kiln, bedroll, campfire-stone, wood-pile
notes: Crude lean-to of bark slabs and brush over a pole frame — dark opening on the south side
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: triangular slanted roof of bark plates meeting at ridge, dark opening south

# hitbox for the solid structure
hitbox rect 0.15,0.15 1.70,1.50

# Ground shadow / disturbed earth around shelter
ellipse 1.00,1.10 0.85,0.75 fill #2a1a0a 0.12

# Bark slab roof — west panel (slanting from ridge down to west)
poly 0.20,0.20 1.00,0.20 1.00,1.55 0.20,1.55 fill #5c4020 0.9
poly 0.20,0.20 1.00,0.20 1.00,1.55 0.20,1.55 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.7
poly 0.20,0.20 1.00,0.20 1.00,1.55 0.20,1.55 stroke #2a1400

# Bark slab roof — east panel (slanting from ridge down to east)
poly 1.00,0.20 1.80,0.20 1.80,1.55 1.00,1.55 fill #6a4a28 0.88
poly 1.00,0.20 1.80,0.20 1.80,1.55 1.00,1.55 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.65
poly 1.00,0.20 1.80,0.20 1.80,1.55 1.00,1.55 stroke #2a1400

# Ridge pole (center line running N-S)
line 1.00,0.18 1.00,1.58 stroke #3a1f00 width 3
line 1.00,0.18 1.00,1.58 stroke #5c3a1e width 1

# Bark slab gaps / joints (showing through as dark lines)
line 0.20,0.55 1.00,0.55 stroke #1a0800 0.5 width 1
line 0.20,0.95 1.00,0.95 stroke #1a0800 0.45 width 1
line 0.20,1.30 1.00,1.30 stroke #1a0800 0.4 width 1
line 1.00,0.60 1.80,0.60 stroke #1a0800 0.45 width 1
line 1.00,1.00 1.80,1.00 stroke #1a0800 0.4 width 1
line 1.00,1.35 1.80,1.35 stroke #1a0800 0.4 width 1

# Brush/leaf debris on roof surface
ellipse 0.50,0.70 0.12,0.06 fill #3a5020 0.25
ellipse 1.40,0.85 0.10,0.05 fill #3a5020 0.2
ellipse 0.70,1.20 0.08,0.05 fill #2a4018 0.2

# Support poles visible at the edges (cross-pieces)
line 0.20,0.20 0.20,1.55 stroke #3a1f00 0.7 width 2
line 1.80,0.20 1.80,1.55 stroke #3a1f00 0.7 width 2
# North back wall edge (closed)
line 0.20,0.20 1.80,0.20 stroke #3a1f00 0.6 width 2

# Dark opening at south (the entrance, facing south)
poly 0.35,1.55 1.65,1.55 1.55,1.85 0.45,1.85 fill #0a0604 0.7
poly 0.35,1.55 1.65,1.55 1.55,1.85 0.45,1.85 stroke #2a1400 0.5
# Interior darkness visible through opening
rect 0.50,1.55 1.00,0.15 fill #0a0604 0.4

# Ground litter around entrance
circle 0.55,1.90 0.02 fill #3a1f00 0.35
circle 1.20,1.92 0.025 fill #3a1f00 0.3
circle 0.85,1.95 0.02 fill #2a4018 0.25

props.bust-on-pedestal:
name: Bust on Pedestal
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 3.5
placement: corner
room_types: mansion-grand-hall, mansion-library, throne-room, gallery

notes: Marble bust atop a stone pedestal — noble ancestor or hero
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.28 z 0-3.5

# Pedestal base (square stone, widest at bottom)
rect 0.18,0.62 0.64,0.22 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.9
rect 0.18,0.62 0.64,0.22 fill #8a8078 0.4
rect 0.18,0.62 0.64,0.22 stroke #333333

rect 0.30,0.38 0.40,0.22 stroke #555555

line 0.44,0.38 0.44,0.60 stroke #888888 0.6
line 0.52,0.38 0.52,0.60 stroke #888888 0.6
line 0.60,0.38 0.60,0.60 stroke #888888 0.6
# Pedestal top (capital)

rect 0.26,0.34 0.48,0.08 stroke #555555
# === Marble bust ===
# Shoulders/chest base (wider south)

poly 0.26,0.32 0.74,0.32 0.72,0.22 0.28,0.22 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.6

line 0.50,0.22 0.50,0.32 stroke #aaaaaa 0.7
line 0.60,0.22 0.62,0.32 stroke #aaaaaa 0.7

name: Cabin Window Glow
category: Effects
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.01
placement: wall
room_types: ferry-house, cabin-hunters, tavern-common, inn-common-room

notes: Floor decal of warm yellow light spilling out from an unseen window — place at the south edge of a wall to fake a lit interior beyond.
lights: [{"preset":"dim","x":1,"y":0.2,"radius":4,"intensity":0.5,"color":"#ffcc66"}]

# footprint 1x2: x 0-2, y 0-1
# Flat decal — trapezoidal light spill widening away from the window (south).

# Mid spill (warmer, narrower)

# Inner spill (bright near window)

# Hot center spill (just below sill)

# Window pane reflection on the spill (very bright sliver)
rect 0.72,0.06 0.56,0.03 fill #ffffcc 0.5

line 0.40,0.20 1.60,0.20 stroke #5c3a1e 0.25 width 1

# Warm edge bloom

# Soft falloff at far edge
poly 0.0,0.92 2.0,0.92 2.0,1.00 0.0,1.00 fill #ffaa44 0.04

height: 7
placement: center
room_types: dungeon, arena, prison, menagerie
typical_count: few
clusters_with: shackles, torture-rack
notes: Iron cage for prisoners or beasts; place as room feature
---
# === HITBOX — bars let light through; only solid frame/posts block ===
# Corner posts (4 solid squares)
hitbox rect 0.04,0.04 0.18,0.18 z 0-7
hitbox rect 2.78,0.04 0.18,0.18 z 0-7
hitbox rect 0.04,2.78 0.18,0.18 z 0-7
hitbox rect 2.78,2.78 0.18,0.18 z 0-7

hitbox rect 0.22,2.82 2.56,0.1 z 0-7
hitbox rect 0.08,0.22 0.1,2.56 z 0-7
hitbox rect 2.82,0.22 0.1,2.56 z 0-7

# footprint 3x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-3
# Top-down: solid iron bars with open gaps — floor visible through gaps
# Draw order: bars first, then frame on top

# Roof bars — horizontal (evenly spaced)
rect 0.18,0.71 2.64,0.05 fill #666666 0.9
rect 0.18,0.71 2.64,0.05 stroke #444444
rect 0.18,1.24 2.64,0.05 fill #666666 0.9
rect 0.18,1.24 2.64,0.05 stroke #444444

rect 0.18,2.29 2.64,0.05 fill #666666 0.9
rect 0.18,2.29 2.64,0.05 stroke #444444

# Roof bars — vertical (evenly spaced)
rect 0.71,0.18 0.05,2.64 fill #666666 0.9
rect 0.71,0.18 0.05,2.64 stroke #444444
rect 1.24,0.18 0.05,2.64 fill #666666 0.9
rect 1.24,0.18 0.05,2.64 stroke #444444
rect 1.76,0.18 0.05,2.64 fill #666666 0.9
rect 1.76,0.18 0.05,2.64 stroke #444444
rect 2.29,0.18 0.05,2.64 fill #666666 0.9
rect 2.29,0.18 0.05,2.64 stroke #444444

# Frame rails (solid iron perimeter — drawn on top of bars)
# North
rect 0.08,0.08 2.84,0.1 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 0.08,0.08 2.84,0.1 stroke #333333
# South
rect 0.08,2.82 2.84,0.1 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 0.08,2.82 2.84,0.1 stroke #333333
# West
rect 0.08,0.08 0.1,2.84 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 0.08,0.08 0.1,2.84 stroke #333333
# East
rect 2.82,0.08 0.1,2.84 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 2.82,0.08 0.1,2.84 stroke #333333

# Corner posts (thick, solid — on top of everything)
rect 0.04,0.04 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.9
rect 0.04,0.04 0.18,0.18 stroke #333333
circle 0.13,0.13 0.03 fill #888888 0.6
rect 2.78,0.04 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.9
rect 2.78,0.04 0.18,0.18 stroke #333333
circle 2.87,0.13 0.03 fill #888888 0.6
rect 0.04,2.78 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.9
rect 0.04,2.78 0.18,0.18 stroke #333333
circle 0.13,2.87 0.03 fill #888888 0.6
rect 2.78,2.78 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.9
rect 2.78,2.78 0.18,0.18 stroke #333333
circle 2.87,2.87 0.03 fill #888888 0.6

# Door latch (south side center)
rect 1.38,2.82 0.24,0.1 fill #888888 0.8
rect 1.38,2.82 0.24,0.1 stroke #555555
circle 1.5,2.87 0.03 fill #aaaaaa 0.7
props.cage-wicker:
name: Wicker Cage
category: Prison
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 2
placement: center
room_types: cave-goblin-warren, goblin-warren-entrance, swamp-witch-hut, cabin-witch, cave-bandit-camp
typical_count: few
clusters_with: goblin-totem, trash-heap, shackles, cage-wicker
notes: Crude woven wicker cage — lattice-work dome holding prisoners or captured beasts
---
# === HITBOX (ring of cage, passable through gaps — only rim blocks) ===
selection circle 1.0,1.0 0.72

# Ground shadow
circle 1.02,1.04 0.78 fill #1a0a00 0.28
circle 1.02,1.04 0.68 fill #1a0a00 0.22

# Outer wicker rim (thick braided edge)
ring 1.0,1.0 0.78 0.70 fill #4a2800 0.92
ring 1.0,1.0 0.78 0.70 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.4
ring 1.0,1.0 0.78 0.70 stroke #1a0f00 width 2

# Braiding texture on the outer rim (small interlocking arcs)
arc 1.0,1.0 0.74 0 30 stroke #2a1400 0.8 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.74 45 75 stroke #2a1400 0.8 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.74 90 120 stroke #2a1400 0.8 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.74 135 165 stroke #2a1400 0.8 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.74 180 210 stroke #2a1400 0.8 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.74 225 255 stroke #2a1400 0.8 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.74 270 300 stroke #2a1400 0.8 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.74 315 345 stroke #2a1400 0.8 width 1

# Vertical ribs (main upright staves of the cage — radial spokes from above)
line 1.00,0.22 1.00,0.30 stroke #3a1f00 width 3
line 1.00,1.70 1.00,1.78 stroke #3a1f00 width 3
line 0.22,1.00 0.30,1.00 stroke #3a1f00 width 3
line 1.70,1.00 1.78,1.00 stroke #3a1f00 width 3
line 0.44,0.44 0.50,0.50 stroke #3a1f00 width 3
line 1.56,0.44 1.50,0.50 stroke #3a1f00 width 3
line 0.44,1.56 0.50,1.50 stroke #3a1f00 width 3
line 1.56,1.56 1.50,1.50 stroke #3a1f00 width 3
line 0.68,0.30 0.74,0.42 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 1.32,0.30 1.26,0.42 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 0.68,1.70 0.74,1.58 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 1.32,1.70 1.26,1.58 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 0.30,0.68 0.42,0.74 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 0.30,1.32 0.42,1.26 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 1.70,0.68 1.58,0.74 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 1.70,1.32 1.58,1.26 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

# Concentric horizontal wicker rings (layered above, visible as rings from above)
arc 1.0,1.0 0.64 0 360 stroke #4a2800 0.85 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.54 0 360 stroke #5c3a1e 0.85 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.44 0 360 stroke #4a2800 0.80 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.32 0 360 stroke #5c3a1e 0.80 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.22 0 360 stroke #4a2800 0.75 width 2

# Weave detail dashes (interlocking rattan)
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 20 40 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 80 100 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 140 160 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 200 220 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 260 280 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 320 340 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1

arc 1.0,1.0 0.48 50 70 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.48 110 130 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.48 170 190 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.48 230 250 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.48 290 310 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1
arc 1.0,1.0 0.48 350 10 stroke #6a4018 0.7 width 1

# Apex / top where staves converge
circle 1.0,1.0 0.14 fill #3a1f00 0.92
circle 1.0,1.0 0.14 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.5
circle 1.0,1.0 0.14 stroke #1a0f00 width 2
# Binding knot at top
circle 1.0,1.0 0.08 fill #6a4018 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.08 stroke #3a2010 width 1
circle 1.0,1.0 0.04 fill #8a6040 0.85

# Rope lashings at cardinal ribs
arc 1.0,1.0 0.30 80 100 stroke #8a6040 0.85 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.30 260 280 stroke #8a6040 0.85 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.42 170 190 stroke #8a6040 0.85 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.42 350 10 stroke #8a6040 0.85 width 2

# Door latch (south side) — leather tie
rect 0.88,1.70 0.24,0.08 fill #5a3018 0.9
rect 0.88,1.70 0.24,0.08 stroke #2a1008 width 1
circle 1.00,1.74 0.02 fill #8a6040 0.9

# Small bits of straw / debris spilling out
line 0.20,0.80 0.28,0.78 stroke #8a7038 0.75 width 1
line 1.80,0.80 1.72,0.78 stroke #8a7038 0.75 width 1
line 0.22,1.20 0.30,1.22 stroke #8a7038 0.75 width 1
line 1.78,1.20 1.70,1.22 stroke #8a7038 0.75 width 1

# Small shadow gaps visible between ribs (dark slivers)
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 10 20 stroke #1a0800 0.8 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 70 80 stroke #1a0800 0.8 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 130 140 stroke #1a0800 0.8 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 190 200 stroke #1a0800 0.8 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 250 260 stroke #1a0800 0.8 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 310 320 stroke #1a0800 0.8 width 2
props.cairn-sacred:
name: Sacred Cairn
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.2
placement: floor
room_types: burial-mound, druid-grove, shrine-roadside, standing-stones-circle, wilderness
typical_count: few
clusters_with: standing-stone, bone-marker, offering-bowl, prayer-stone, feather-bundle
notes: Stacked stone pile marking a sacred or mournful site
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.34 z 0-1.2

# Ground shadow base
ellipse 0.5,0.82 0.32,0.06 fill #1a1008 0.4
# Bottom stone (largest, foundation)
ellipse 0.5,0.72 0.34,0.14 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
ellipse 0.5,0.72 0.34,0.14 fill #5a5048 0.4
ellipse 0.5,0.72 0.34,0.14 stroke #2a2420
# Second stone (rough rectangle, offset slightly)
poly 0.26,0.58 0.72,0.54 0.76,0.66 0.28,0.70 fill #6a6058 0.9
poly 0.26,0.58 0.72,0.54 0.76,0.66 0.28,0.70 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.6
poly 0.26,0.58 0.72,0.54 0.76,0.66 0.28,0.70 stroke #2a2420
# Third stone (angular boulder, center-high)
poly 0.30,0.44 0.68,0.42 0.72,0.54 0.32,0.56 fill #5a5048 0.9
poly 0.30,0.44 0.68,0.42 0.72,0.54 0.32,0.56 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.55
poly 0.30,0.44 0.68,0.42 0.72,0.54 0.32,0.56 stroke #2a2420
# Fourth stone (smaller, upper)
poly 0.38,0.32 0.60,0.30 0.62,0.42 0.40,0.44 fill #6a6058 0.9
poly 0.38,0.32 0.60,0.30 0.62,0.42 0.40,0.44 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.6
poly 0.38,0.32 0.60,0.30 0.62,0.42 0.40,0.44 stroke #2a2420
# Capstone (smallest, top)
poly 0.44,0.22 0.56,0.22 0.58,0.32 0.42,0.32 fill #5a5048 0.95
poly 0.44,0.22 0.56,0.22 0.58,0.32 0.42,0.32 stroke #2a2420
# Stone seams/cracks
line 0.40,0.50 0.60,0.52 stroke #1a1410 0.6
line 0.42,0.62 0.60,0.64 stroke #1a1410 0.6
line 0.46,0.34 0.54,0.38 stroke #1a1410 0.5
# Moss patches (green lichen on old stones)
ellipse 0.36,0.68 0.08,0.03 fill #3a5028 0.7
ellipse 0.64,0.62 0.06,0.03 fill #3a5028 0.7
ellipse 0.48,0.50 0.05,0.02 fill #4a6030 0.6
# Carved rune on capstone (sacred mark)
line 0.47,0.25 0.53,0.29 stroke #2a1800 0.85 width 1
line 0.47,0.29 0.53,0.25 stroke #2a1800 0.85 width 1
circle 0.50,0.27 0.015 fill #2a1800 0.85
# Offering items at base — small feather/flower
poly 0.22,0.78 0.26,0.76 0.28,0.80 0.24,0.82 fill #aa4040 0.8
poly 0.22,0.78 0.26,0.76 0.28,0.80 0.24,0.82 stroke #5a1808
# Small coin
circle 0.74,0.80 0.025 fill #daa520 0.85
circle 0.74,0.80 0.025 stroke #5a3a00
# Highlights (weathered light side)
arc 0.50,0.50 0.30 210 270 stroke #8a8078 0.4 width 1
props.calling-card-tray:
name: Calling Card Tray
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.3
placement: floor
room_types: house-noble-townhouse, mansion-grand-hall, mansion-dining, noble-solar
typical_count: single
clusters_with: sideboard, small-table, tea-service, fresh-flowers
notes: Silver tray holding gentlemen's calling cards — upper class entryway decor
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection ellipse 0.5,0.5 0.32,0.22

# Silver tray (oval, polished)
ellipse 0.5,0.5 0.32,0.22 fill #cccccc 0.95
ellipse 0.5,0.5 0.32,0.22 stroke #444444
# Tray inner ring (raised edge)
ellipse 0.5,0.5 0.28,0.18 stroke #888888 0.7 width 1
# Tray interior (polished darker)
ellipse 0.5,0.5 0.26,0.16 fill #aaaaaa 0.92
ellipse 0.5,0.5 0.26,0.16 stroke #666666
# Engraved pattern (scroll design)
arc 0.5,0.5 0.24 30 70 stroke #444444 0.7 width 1
arc 0.5,0.5 0.24 110 150 stroke #444444 0.7 width 1
arc 0.5,0.5 0.24 210 250 stroke #444444 0.7 width 1
arc 0.5,0.5 0.24 290 330 stroke #444444 0.7 width 1
# Central monogram
poly 0.48,0.48 0.52,0.48 0.52,0.52 0.48,0.52 stroke #444444 0.7 width 1
# === Cards stacked ===
# Card 1 (slightly angled)
rect 0.30,0.44 0.20,0.14 fill #f0e4d0 0.95 rotate -10
rect 0.30,0.44 0.20,0.14 stroke #8b7355 rotate -10
# Card 1 text
line 0.34,0.48 0.46,0.48 stroke #2a1400 0.7 rotate -10
line 0.34,0.52 0.44,0.52 stroke #2a1400 0.5 rotate -10
# Card 2 (underneath, peeking)
rect 0.44,0.42 0.20,0.14 fill #e8dcc8 0.95 rotate 5
rect 0.44,0.42 0.20,0.14 stroke #8b7355 rotate 5
# Card 2 text
line 0.48,0.48 0.60,0.48 stroke #2a1400 0.7 rotate 5
line 0.48,0.52 0.58,0.52 stroke #2a1400 0.5 rotate 5
# Card 3 (bottom, askew)
rect 0.52,0.50 0.22,0.14 fill #f0e4d0 0.95 rotate 15
rect 0.52,0.50 0.22,0.14 stroke #8b7355 rotate 15
# Ornate calligraphy on top visible card
poly 0.38,0.48 0.40,0.46 0.42,0.48 0.40,0.50 fill #2a1400 0.7 rotate -10
# Small engraved corner decorations on cards
circle 0.32,0.46 0.01 fill #2a1400 0.6 rotate -10
# Silver sheen highlights
arc 0.5,0.5 0.28 210 260 stroke #ffffff 0.7 width 1
arc 0.5,0.5 0.20 220 260 stroke #ffffff 0.5 width 1
# Tarnish patches
circle 0.28,0.58 0.018 fill #555555 0.3
circle 0.72,0.42 0.015 fill #555555 0.3
# Small decorative handle ends (ornate)
poly 0.16,0.50 0.20,0.46 0.20,0.54 fill #daa520 0.85
poly 0.16,0.50 0.20,0.46 0.20,0.54 stroke #5a3a00
poly 0.84,0.50 0.80,0.46 0.80,0.54 fill #daa520 0.85
poly 0.84,0.50 0.80,0.46 0.80,0.54 stroke #5a3a00
props.campaign-ledger:
name: Campaign Ledger
category: Combat
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: command-room, war-room, office, guard-room, barracks
typical_count: single
clusters_with: desk, pen-and-inkwell, dispatch-pouch, map-scroll
notes: Large leather-bound open ledger with military tally columns; place on desks or command tables
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: large open ledger, two pages spread, with tally columns

# Leather cover edges (peeking out behind pages)
rect 0.08,0.14 0.84,0.72 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.6
rect 0.08,0.14 0.84,0.72 stroke #3a1f00

# Left page
rect 0.10,0.16 0.38,0.68 fill #e8e0d0 0.9
rect 0.10,0.16 0.38,0.68 stroke #b0a090

# Right page
rect 0.52,0.16 0.38,0.68 fill #e8e0d0 0.9
rect 0.52,0.16 0.38,0.68 stroke #b0a090

# Spine crease
line 0.50,0.16 0.50,0.84 stroke #8a7a6a 0.6

# === Left page: tally columns ===
# Column dividers
line 0.26,0.22 0.26,0.78 stroke #888888 0.3
line 0.38,0.22 0.38,0.78 stroke #888888 0.3
# Header line
line 0.14,0.26 0.44,0.26 stroke #444444 0.5 width 2
# Tally rows
line 0.14,0.32 0.44,0.32 stroke #888888 0.2
line 0.14,0.38 0.44,0.38 stroke #888888 0.2
line 0.14,0.44 0.44,0.44 stroke #888888 0.2
line 0.14,0.50 0.44,0.50 stroke #888888 0.2
line 0.14,0.56 0.44,0.56 stroke #888888 0.2
line 0.14,0.62 0.44,0.62 stroke #888888 0.2
line 0.14,0.68 0.44,0.68 stroke #888888 0.2
# Tally mark clusters (short vertical dashes in cells)
line 0.28,0.28 0.28,0.31 stroke #3a1f00 0.5 width 1
line 0.30,0.28 0.30,0.31 stroke #3a1f00 0.5 width 1
line 0.32,0.28 0.32,0.31 stroke #3a1f00 0.5 width 1
line 0.40,0.28 0.40,0.31 stroke #3a1f00 0.5 width 1
line 0.42,0.28 0.42,0.31 stroke #3a1f00 0.5 width 1

# === Right page: text entries ===
line 0.56,0.24 0.84,0.24 stroke #888888 0.3
line 0.56,0.30 0.80,0.30 stroke #888888 0.25
line 0.56,0.36 0.82,0.36 stroke #888888 0.3
line 0.56,0.42 0.76,0.42 stroke #888888 0.25
line 0.56,0.48 0.84,0.48 stroke #888888 0.3
line 0.56,0.54 0.78,0.54 stroke #888888 0.25
line 0.56,0.60 0.82,0.60 stroke #888888 0.3

# Ink blot (hasty writing)

# Bookmark ribbon
line 0.88,0.16 0.86,0.10 stroke #8b2020 0.7
props.campfire:
name: Campfire
category: Terrain
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.5
lights: [{"preset":"campfire","x":1.0,"y":1.0}]
placement: center
room_types: cave, wilderness, camp

clusters_with: stool, log-pile
notes: Central gathering point; leave space for seating around it
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 1.0,1.0 0.6 z 0-1.5

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2

# Charred ground / ash circle
circle 1.0,1.0 0.6 fill #1a1208 0.3

# Log 1 — SW to NE (thick, with bark texture)
poly 0.45,1.45 0.52,1.38 1.48,0.62 1.55,0.69 1.48,0.76 0.52,1.52 fill #3a2000 0.8
poly 0.45,1.45 0.52,1.38 1.48,0.62 1.55,0.69 1.48,0.76 0.52,1.52 stroke #2a1400
# Bark detail
line 0.6,1.38 0.7,1.28 stroke #2a1400 0.4
line 0.9,1.1 1.0,1.0 stroke #2a1400 0.4
line 1.2,0.85 1.3,0.75 stroke #2a1400 0.4
# Cut end (circle visible at SW end)
ellipse 0.48,1.48 0.06,0.08 fill #8b7355 0.6
ellipse 0.48,1.48 0.06,0.08 stroke #5c3a1e

# Log 2 — NW to SE (thick)
poly 0.45,0.55 0.52,0.48 1.48,1.24 1.55,1.31 1.48,1.38 0.52,0.62 fill #4a2800 0.75
poly 0.45,0.55 0.52,0.48 1.48,1.24 1.55,1.31 1.48,1.38 0.52,0.62 stroke #2a1400
# Bark detail
line 0.65,0.58 0.75,0.68 stroke #2a1400 0.4
line 0.95,0.82 1.05,0.92 stroke #2a1400 0.4
line 1.25,1.08 1.35,1.18 stroke #2a1400 0.4
# Cut end
ellipse 0.48,0.55 0.06,0.08 fill #8b7355 0.6
ellipse 0.48,0.55 0.06,0.08 stroke #5c3a1e

# Log 3 — horizontal (thick)
poly 0.4,0.92 0.4,1.08 1.6,1.08 1.6,0.92 fill #3a2000 0.7
poly 0.4,0.92 0.4,1.08 1.6,1.08 1.6,0.92 stroke #2a1400
# Bark rings
line 0.55,0.93 0.55,1.07 stroke #2a1400 0.35
line 0.8,0.93 0.8,1.07 stroke #2a1400 0.35
line 1.1,0.93 1.1,1.07 stroke #2a1400 0.35
line 1.4,0.93 1.4,1.07 stroke #2a1400 0.35
# Cut end
ellipse 0.42,1.0 0.04,0.08 fill #8b7355 0.6
ellipse 0.42,1.0 0.04,0.08 stroke #5c3a1e

# Charred blackening on logs near center
circle 1.0,1.0 0.33 fill #1a0800 0.4

# === Fire — layered from base glow to flame tips ===
# Base ember glow (wide, dark red)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.45 fill #8b1a00 0.3

# Flame shapes — deep orange base layer (wide, irregular)
poly 0.73,1.23 0.82,0.78 1.0,0.55 1.18,0.73 1.27,1.18 1.08,1.38 fill #cc3300 0.5
poly 0.67,1.0 0.78,0.67 0.93,0.52 1.12,0.63 1.0,1.12 0.82,1.23 fill #cc3300 0.45

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.2,0.28 1.6,2.5 z 0-3

# footprint 3x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-3
# Top-down: two wooden carriage rails, barrel on top, wheels at rear

# Right rail

ellipse 0.2,0.7 0.07,0.12 fill #3a2000 0.5

ellipse 1.8,0.7 0.1,0.16 stroke #2a1400

ellipse 0.2,2.6 0.07,0.16 fill #3a2000 0.5

ellipse 1.8,2.6 0.1,0.2 stroke #2a1400
ellipse 1.8,2.6 0.07,0.16 fill #3a2000 0.5

circle 1.77,1.77 0.02 fill #222222 0.95

line 1.50,0.14 1.50,0.26 stroke #5a3a00 0.8

circle 0.42,0.20 0.04 stroke #5a3a00
circle 1.58,0.20 0.04 fill #daa520 0.95
circle 1.58,0.20 0.04 stroke #5a3a00

circle 1.00,0.30 0.025 fill #aa2020 0.95

# Hanging counter-weight on west end

category: Misc

placement: floor

notes: Transport; place near walls or doorways
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.8,0.35 1.8,1.3 z 0-3

# footprint 2x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-2
# Top-down: wooden cart bed, two wheels at rear, handle shafts at front

# === Handle shafts (north/front, extending forward) ===
# Left shaft
poly 0.0,0.65 0.05,0.6 0.9,0.55 0.9,0.6 0.05,0.68 fill #4a2800 0.75
poly 0.0,0.65 0.05,0.6 0.9,0.55 0.9,0.6 0.05,0.68 stroke #2a1400
# Right shaft

poly 0.0,1.35 0.05,1.32 0.9,1.4 0.9,1.45 0.05,1.4 stroke #2a1400

rect 0.0,0.58 0.12,0.12 fill #3a2000 0.8
rect 0.0,0.58 0.12,0.12 stroke #2a1400
rect 0.0,1.3 0.12,0.12 fill #3a2000 0.8
rect 0.0,1.3 0.12,0.12 stroke #2a1400

# === Cart bed ===
rect 0.8,0.35 1.8,1.3 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.8,0.35 1.8,1.3 stroke #3a1f00

line 0.85,1.0 2.55,1.0 stroke #4a2800 0.4
line 0.85,1.35 2.55,1.35 stroke #4a2800 0.4

rect 0.8,1.57 1.8,0.08 fill #3a1f00 0.5
rect 0.8,0.35 0.08,1.3 fill #3a1f00 0.45
rect 2.52,0.35 0.08,1.3 fill #3a1f00 0.45

# === Wheels (top-down: thin ovals at rear) ===
# Left wheel (aligned with travel direction)
ellipse 2.45,0.25 0.18,0.08 fill #4a2800 0.8
ellipse 2.45,0.25 0.18,0.08 stroke #2a1400
ellipse 2.45,0.25 0.13,0.05 fill #3a2000 0.5
# Right wheel
ellipse 2.45,1.75 0.18,0.08 fill #4a2800 0.8
ellipse 2.45,1.75 0.18,0.08 stroke #2a1400
ellipse 2.45,1.75 0.13,0.05 fill #3a2000 0.5

rect 2.42,0.25 0.06,1.5 fill #444444 0.5
rect 2.42,0.25 0.06,1.5 stroke #333333

name: Mine Cart Track (Broken)
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.15
placement: floor

notes: A broken mine-cart track section — rails torn up, sleepers splintered, iron twisted. At facing 0 the track enters from the west and breaks off before the east edge. Place at the end of a haulage drift that ends in collapse, derailment, or sabotage. Rotate to orient the break direction.
---
# === West zone: intact track remnant ===
# Two wooden sleepers (ties) in the west half
rect 0.08,0.18 0.10,0.64 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.08,0.18 0.10,0.64 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.40,0.18 0.10,0.64 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.40,0.18 0.10,0.64 stroke #3a1f00
# North iron rail — intact from west edge, ends jagged around x=0.58

rect 0.00,0.34 0.56,0.06 stroke #333333
line 0.00,0.36 0.56,0.36 stroke #8899aa 0.7 width 1
# Jagged broken end of north rail (zigzag splinter)
poly 0.56,0.34 0.60,0.33 0.58,0.37 0.62,0.36 0.59,0.40 0.56,0.40 fill #2a2a2a 0.95
poly 0.56,0.34 0.60,0.33 0.58,0.37 0.62,0.36 0.59,0.40 0.56,0.40 stroke #111111
# South iron rail — intact from west edge, ends sooner and bends sideways
rect 0.00,0.60 0.48,0.06 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.9
rect 0.00,0.60 0.48,0.06 stroke #333333
line 0.00,0.62 0.48,0.62 stroke #8899aa 0.7 width 1
# South rail torn and bent down-south (twisted iron fragment curling away)
poly 0.48,0.60 0.56,0.66 0.62,0.74 0.60,0.78 0.54,0.74 0.50,0.68 0.48,0.66 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.9
poly 0.48,0.60 0.56,0.66 0.62,0.74 0.60,0.78 0.54,0.74 0.50,0.68 0.48,0.66 stroke #333333
# Rail spikes in the intact sleepers
circle 0.13,0.37 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.13,0.63 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.45,0.37 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.45,0.63 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
# A little rust on the intact rails
circle 0.28,0.37 0.020 fill #8b4000 0.65
circle 0.34,0.63 0.018 fill #8b4000 0.6
# === Break zone: destroyed track ===
# Shattered sleeper fragment (splintered, rotated) east of the last intact tie
poly 0.62,0.22 0.74,0.20 0.78,0.26 0.76,0.34 0.70,0.36 0.64,0.32 0.60,0.28 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.8
poly 0.62,0.22 0.74,0.20 0.78,0.26 0.76,0.34 0.70,0.36 0.64,0.32 0.60,0.28 stroke #3a1f00
# Second broken plank fragment, knocked aside to the south
poly 0.70,0.70 0.84,0.66 0.90,0.72 0.86,0.80 0.76,0.82 0.68,0.78 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.8
poly 0.70,0.70 0.84,0.66 0.90,0.72 0.86,0.80 0.76,0.82 0.68,0.78 stroke #3a1f00
# Small third splinter
poly 0.82,0.42 0.90,0.40 0.92,0.48 0.86,0.50 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.75
poly 0.82,0.42 0.90,0.40 0.92,0.48 0.86,0.50 stroke #3a1f00
# Rail stub torn upward (foreshortened — rail top cap pointing toward viewer)
poly 0.66,0.44 0.70,0.42 0.72,0.52 0.68,0.54 fill #444444 0.95
poly 0.66,0.44 0.70,0.42 0.72,0.52 0.68,0.54 stroke #1a1a1a
circle 0.69,0.43 0.025 fill #555555 0.9
# Loose chunk of broken rail lying across the gap

rect 0.74,0.52 0.18,0.04 stroke #333333 rotate 20
# Coal-dust smear where carts came off

circle 0.72,0.38 0.018 fill #0a0a0a 0.85
circle 0.80,0.30 0.020 fill #0a0a0a 0.85
circle 0.88,0.58 0.022 fill #0a0a0a 0.9
circle 0.82,0.72 0.018 fill #0a0a0a 0.85
circle 0.94,0.44 0.016 fill #0a0a0a 0.8
# Loose free rail spikes with tiny drop-shadow offsets

circle 0.66,0.65 0.020 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.89,0.30 0.020 fill #000000 0.4
circle 0.88,0.29 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.78,0.78 0.019 fill #333333 0.9

poly 0.58,0.60 0.62,0.62 0.64,0.68 0.61,0.70 0.58,0.66 stroke #111111

circle 0.13,0.37 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.13,0.63 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.45,0.37 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.45,0.63 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
# Small rust on west rails
circle 0.28,0.37 0.020 fill #8b4000 0.65
circle 0.34,0.63 0.018 fill #8b4000 0.6

props.cart-track-end:
name: Mine Cart Track End
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: mine-shaft-entrance, mining-camp, deep-mine, tunnel
typical_count: few

notes: End-cap / buffer stop for the mine cart rail — at facing 0 the track enters from the west and terminates at a heavy timber buffer. Rotate to orient the stop.
---
# Wooden ties under the rails (only west portion)
rect 0.08,0.18 0.10,0.64 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.08,0.18 0.10,0.64 stroke #3a1f00

rect 0.00,0.34 0.68,0.06 stroke #333333
line 0.00,0.36 0.68,0.36 stroke #8899aa 0.7 width 1
# South iron rail (terminates at buffer)
rect 0.00,0.60 0.68,0.06 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.9
rect 0.00,0.60 0.68,0.06 stroke #333333
line 0.00,0.62 0.68,0.62 stroke #8899aa 0.7 width 1

circle 0.20,0.37 0.020 fill #8b4000 0.7
circle 0.52,0.63 0.018 fill #8b4000 0.65
# Rail spikes
circle 0.13,0.37 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.13,0.63 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.45,0.37 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.45,0.63 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
# === Buffer stop — heavy timber beam spanning both rails ===
# Main buffer beam (thick cross-timber)

rect 0.68,0.28 0.14,0.44 stroke #1a0800 width 2

rect 0.68,0.30 0.14,0.05 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 0.68,0.65 0.14,0.05 fill #555555 0.9
rect 0.68,0.65 0.14,0.05 stroke #222222 width 1
# Buffer contact plates (the face that stops the cart — pointing west toward oncoming carts)
rect 0.66,0.32 0.04,0.12 fill #555555 0.95
rect 0.66,0.32 0.04,0.12 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 0.66,0.56 0.04,0.12 fill #555555 0.95
rect 0.66,0.56 0.04,0.12 stroke #222222 width 1

circle 0.86,0.30 0.06 stroke #3a3228
circle 0.92,0.46 0.07 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.85
circle 0.92,0.46 0.07 stroke #3a3228
circle 0.88,0.64 0.065 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.85
circle 0.88,0.64 0.065 stroke #3a3228
circle 0.96,0.80 0.055 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.85
circle 0.96,0.80 0.055 stroke #3a3228
circle 0.86,0.78 0.045 fill #3a3228 0.85

circle 0.90,0.22 0.020 fill #2a2820 0.8
circle 0.82,0.70 0.020 fill #2a2820 0.8

category: Decorative
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.15
placement: floor

notes: Decorated walking stick with spiral carvings and a bound grip. Lying horizontally on the floor.
---
# footprint 1x2: x 0-2, y 0-1
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.14,0.40 1.72,0.20

# Shadow beneath stick
ellipse 1.00,0.66 0.82,0.06 fill #1a0a00 0.3

line 0.18,0.52 1.82,0.52 stroke #6a4828 0.3 width 1

# === Western head — rounded knob ===

circle 0.16,0.50 0.12 fill #5c3a1e 0.4
circle 0.16,0.50 0.12 stroke #2a1400 width 2
# Knob carving (spiral)
arc 0.16,0.50 0.08 0 300 stroke #2a1400 width 1
arc 0.16,0.50 0.05 0 200 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
circle 0.16,0.50 0.022 fill #2a1400 0.9

# === Spiral carvings along the shaft ===
# Spiral 1 (near knob)

bezier 0.32,0.42 0.37,0.50 0.37,0.50 0.32,0.58 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1

bezier 0.54,0.42 0.59,0.50 0.59,0.50 0.54,0.58 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1

bezier 0.80,0.42 0.85,0.50 0.85,0.50 0.80,0.58 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1

# === Bound leather grip (center-east section) ===
rect 1.00,0.40 0.40,0.20 fill #5c3a1e 0.95
rect 1.00,0.40 0.40,0.20 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.5
rect 1.00,0.40 0.40,0.20 stroke #2a1400 width 2

line 1.10,0.40 1.05,0.60 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 1.15,0.40 1.10,0.60 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 1.20,0.40 1.15,0.60 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 1.25,0.40 1.20,0.60 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 1.30,0.40 1.25,0.60 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 1.35,0.40 1.30,0.60 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1

rect 0.98,0.40 0.04,0.20 stroke #5a3a00
rect 1.40,0.40 0.04,0.20 fill #8b6914 0.85
rect 1.40,0.40 0.04,0.20 stroke #5a3a00

# === Runic carvings on eastern end ===
line 1.56,0.48 1.60,0.52 stroke #2a1400 width 1
line 1.60,0.48 1.56,0.52 stroke #2a1400 width 1
line 1.66,0.46 1.66,0.54 stroke #2a1400 width 1
line 1.62,0.50 1.70,0.50 stroke #2a1400 width 1
line 1.76,0.48 1.80,0.52 stroke #2a1400 width 1

props.casting-pit:
name: Casting Pit
category: Features
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0
placement: center
room_types: foundry-great, infernal-forge, smithy-large
typical_count: single
clusters_with: blast-furnace, ladle-iron, sand-mold, ingot-stack, overhead-crane
lights: [{"preset":"forge","x":1,"y":1,"radius":7,"intensity":0.6,"color":"#ff7030","falloff":"linear"}]
notes: Sunken rectangular casting pit filled with molten iron. Sand-moulded rim, gate runner channel leading off one edge. Ground-level feature — no shadow, doesn't block light. Pair with blast-furnace and ladle-iron.
---
# === Outer dark rim (packed earth / sand mound around the pit) ===
rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,1.80 fill #3a2818 0.95
rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,1.80 texfill polyhaven/brown_mud 0.55
rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,1.80 stroke #1a1008 width 2

# === Sand-moulded inner lip (lighter sand color) ===
rect 0.22,0.22 1.56,1.56 fill #8a6a3a 0.9
rect 0.22,0.22 1.56,1.56 stroke #4a3218

# === Inner molten iron pool — layered gradient from outer cool to inner hot ===
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.40 fill #2a0800 0.95
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.40 stroke #1a0400

# Outer cooling crust
rect 0.34,0.34 1.32,1.32 fill #aa3300 0.9
# Mid heat
rect 0.40,0.40 1.20,1.20 fill #ff6600 0.85
# Inner bright
rect 0.48,0.48 1.04,1.04 fill #ffaa30 0.8
# Hottest molten surface
rect 0.58,0.58 0.84,0.84 fill #ffdd66 0.85
# Near-white spots (hottest)
ellipse 0.86,0.92 0.12,0.08 fill #ffeecc 0.9
ellipse 1.20,1.12 0.10,0.07 fill #ffeecc 0.85

# === Wavy ripple highlights across the molten surface ===
bezier 0.40,0.70 0.70,0.62 1.00,0.78 1.60,0.70 stroke #ffe890 0.55 width 2
bezier 0.40,1.10 0.70,1.18 1.00,1.02 1.60,1.10 stroke #ffcc60 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.40,1.40 0.80,1.32 1.20,1.44 1.60,1.38 stroke #ffaa30 0.45 width 1

# === Solidifying slag crust patches floating on surface ===
poly 0.54,0.52 0.62,0.48 0.70,0.54 0.66,0.62 0.56,0.62 fill #4a2410 0.85
poly 0.54,0.52 0.62,0.48 0.70,0.54 0.66,0.62 0.56,0.62 stroke #1a0a04
poly 1.30,0.58 1.38,0.54 1.46,0.60 1.42,0.68 1.32,0.66 fill #4a2410 0.8
poly 0.58,1.40 0.66,1.36 0.74,1.42 0.70,1.50 0.60,1.48 fill #3a1808 0.85
poly 1.26,1.32 1.34,1.28 1.44,1.34 1.40,1.42 1.28,1.42 fill #4a2410 0.8

# === Bright spark/spot hot points (scattered brighter ember spots) ===
circle 0.74,0.84 0.025 fill #ffffcc 0.95
circle 1.30,0.76 0.022 fill #ffeecc 0.9
circle 0.68,1.22 0.020 fill #ffcc60 0.85
circle 1.18,1.26 0.022 fill #ffeecc 0.9
circle 0.94,0.68 0.018 fill #ffff88 0.85

# === Gate runner channel leading south off one edge ===
# Channel carved into the rim (the "sprue" carrying flow out)
rect 0.88,1.78 0.24,0.22 fill #3a1808 0.95
rect 0.88,1.78 0.24,0.22 stroke #1a0400
# Molten flow inside the runner
rect 0.92,1.78 0.16,0.22 fill #ff6600 0.9
rect 0.96,1.78 0.08,0.22 fill #ffaa30 0.85
line 1.00,1.78 1.00,2.00 stroke #ffdd66 0.95 width 2

# === Heat shimmer wisps over the surface (bezier curls) ===
bezier 0.60,0.40 0.62,0.32 0.58,0.26 0.62,0.18 stroke #ff8800 0.35 width 1
bezier 1.40,0.40 1.38,0.32 1.42,0.26 1.38,0.18 stroke #ffaa00 0.35 width 1

circle 0.50,0.48 0.26 stroke #333355

circle 0.38,0.50 0.015 fill #ffd700 0.6

circle 0.48,0.62 0.015 fill #ffd700 0.5

line 0.44,0.42 0.40,0.36 stroke #6666aa 0.2

props.celestial-pillar-of-light:
name: Celestial Pillar of Light
category: Magical
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: celestial-vault, temple, cathedral, solar-sanctum, divine-sanctum
typical_count: single
clusters_with: pillar-marble, banner-celestial, sun-disc-altar
notes: Radiant column of pure divine light from ceiling to floor — concentric rings, not a flame silhouette
lights: [{"preset":"divine-radiance","x":1,"y":1,"radius":8,"intensity":0.9,"color":"#fff0d0"}]
---
# Footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2
# Top-down: looking straight down a column of light — concentric rings
# Per "Fire & Flame Columns" rule: halo -> bright -> core

# === Outermost halo — very faint warm gold ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.95 fill #fff0c0 0.08
circle 1.0,1.0 0.80 fill #fff0c0 0.10

# === Outer pale gold ring ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.70 fill #ffe8a0 0.20
circle 1.0,1.0 0.60 fill #ffdd88 0.25

# === Mid bright ring — white-gold ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.50 fill #fff0cc 0.45
circle 1.0,1.0 0.42 fill #fff8dd 0.55

# === Inner bright white ring ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.34 fill #fffcee 0.70
circle 1.0,1.0 0.26 fill #fffff0 0.80

# === Core — near-white, brightest ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.18 fill #ffffff 0.90
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 fill #ffffff 0.95

# === Radial ray lines — light beams radiating outward ===
line 1.0,0.15 1.0,0.35 stroke #fff8dd 0.25
line 1.0,1.65 1.0,1.85 stroke #fff8dd 0.25
line 0.15,1.0 0.35,1.0 stroke #fff8dd 0.25
line 1.65,1.0 1.85,1.0 stroke #fff8dd 0.25
line 0.40,0.40 0.55,0.55 stroke #fff8dd 0.20
line 1.60,0.40 1.45,0.55 stroke #fff8dd 0.20
line 0.40,1.60 0.55,1.45 stroke #fff8dd 0.20
line 1.60,1.60 1.45,1.45 stroke #fff8dd 0.20

# === Floating mote sparkles caught in the light ===
circle 0.70,0.55 0.02 fill #ffffff 0.6
circle 1.30,0.65 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.55

ellipse 0.98,0.50 0.10,0.06 stroke #222222

name: Chalk Circle (Floor)
category: Magical
footprint: 2x2
facing: no

---
# Flat floor chalk — no shadow, no blocking

# Faint chalk smudge halo
circle 1.0,1.0 0.92 fill #d8d0b8 0.06

# === Main chalk circle (outer — rough hand-drawn with double stroke) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.88 stroke #e8dcc8 width 3

# === Inner circle ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.66 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
circle 1.0,1.0 0.66 stroke #ffffff 0.5 width 1

# === Rune marks around the perimeter (between outer and inner circles) ===
# North — triangle
poly 0.96,0.20 1.04,0.20 1.00,0.28 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
# NE — cross
line 1.48,0.36 1.58,0.46 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
line 1.58,0.36 1.48,0.46 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
# East — circle
circle 1.76,1.00 0.05 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
# SE — star/asterisk
line 1.54,1.54 1.64,1.64 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
line 1.64,1.54 1.54,1.64 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
line 1.59,1.52 1.59,1.66 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
# South — wavy line

# SW — backward-E (rune)
line 0.36,1.46 0.36,1.62 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
line 0.36,1.46 0.46,1.46 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
line 0.36,1.54 0.44,1.54 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
line 0.36,1.62 0.46,1.62 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
# West — spiral (simplified)
circle 0.24,1.00 0.06 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
line 0.18,1.00 0.30,1.00 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
# NW — Y shape
line 0.40,0.36 0.40,0.52 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
line 0.40,0.36 0.30,0.28 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2
line 0.40,0.36 0.50,0.28 stroke #e8dcc8 width 2

# === Inside the inner circle — simple five-pointed star ===

poly 1.00,0.50 1.19,1.10 0.68,0.74 1.32,0.74 0.81,1.10 stroke #ffffff 0.5 width 1

# === Chalk dust flecks scattered around ===

circle 1.80,0.32 0.016 fill #ffffff 0.75
circle 0.24,1.78 0.015 fill #ffffff 0.75
circle 1.78,1.72 0.014 fill #ffffff 0.7
circle 0.40,0.80 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.7
circle 1.62,1.20 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.7
circle 1.00,0.14 0.014 fill #ffffff 0.7
circle 0.14,1.10 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.65

# Smudge / partially erased patch (incomplete ritual feel)

ellipse 0.68,0.54 0.10,0.05 fill #d8d0b8 0.2

props.charcoal-kiln:
name: Charcoal Kiln
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 3
placement: center
room_types: charcoal-burner-camp
typical_count: few
clusters_with: log-pile, chopping-block, wood-pile, charcoal-lump, axe-stuck
notes: Earth-covered charcoal mound (domed soil kiln smoldering) — the centerpiece of a charcoal burner's camp

---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: domed earth mound with concentric rings, smoking vent at center

# hitbox for the solid dome
hitbox circle 1.0,1.0 0.8

# Scorched earth ring (ground around the kiln)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.95 fill #1a1208 0.2

# Outer soil/turf ring (the earth covering of the kiln)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.82 texfill polyhaven/brown_mud 0.7
circle 1.0,1.0 0.82 stroke #2a1a0a

# Middle ring — darker cracked earth (heat-baked)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.65 fill #3a2818 0.7
circle 1.0,1.0 0.65 stroke #1a1208 0.5

# Inner dark earth ring (hottest zone before the vent)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.45 fill #1a1208 0.6
circle 1.0,1.0 0.45 stroke #0a0604 0.5

# Crack lines radiating from center (heat fissures)
line 1.0,1.0 1.0,0.22 stroke #0a0604 0.5 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 1.68,0.52 stroke #0a0604 0.45 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 1.78,1.0 stroke #0a0604 0.4 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 1.55,1.62 stroke #0a0604 0.4 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 0.35,1.55 stroke #0a0604 0.45 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 0.22,0.70 stroke #0a0604 0.45 width 1

# Orange glow through cracks (heat seeping through)
line 1.0,0.90 1.0,0.40 stroke #e85500 0.15 width 2
line 1.05,0.95 1.50,0.60 stroke #e85500 0.12 width 2
line 0.95,0.95 0.45,1.40 stroke #e85500 0.12 width 2

# Central vent hole
circle 1.0,1.0 0.15 fill #0a0604 0.85
circle 1.0,1.0 0.15 stroke #1a0800

# Vent glow (faint orange from within)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.12 fill #e85500 0.35
circle 1.0,1.0 0.08 fill #ff8800 0.3
circle 1.0,1.0 0.04 fill #ffaa00 0.4

# Smoke wisp indicators (small grey puffs drifting from vent)
ellipse 1.08,0.85 0.06,0.04 fill #888888 0.2
ellipse 0.92,0.78 0.05,0.03 fill #999999 0.15
ellipse 1.0,0.70 0.04,0.03 fill #aaaaaa 0.12

# Soot staining on outer ring (dark patches)

ellipse 1.45,1.35 0.10,0.06 fill #1a0800 0.18
ellipse 0.60,1.40 0.08,0.06 fill #1a0800 0.15

ellipse 1.55,0.75 0.06,0.04 fill #3a5020 0.18

props.cobweb-alcove-dense:
name: Cobweb (Dense Alcove)
category: Terrain
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.05
placement: corner
room_types: crypt, tomb, dungeon, mausoleum, abandoned-room, tunnel-mine-worked, spider-lair
typical_count: few
clusters_with: cobweb-heavy, cobweb-cluster, bone-pile, skeleton-slumped, sarcophagus, spider-husk, silk-wrapped-victim
notes: A 2x2 corner alcove thickly choked with old silk — layered, matted, heavy. Anchor is the NW corner (0.05,0.05); webbing radiates and sags toward the SE. Rotate to anchor any other corner.
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Dense alcove cobweb — multiple layered masses + multi-generation radial strands
# Anchor is the NW corner (0.05, 0.05); webbing radiates and sags toward SE

# === Layered dense masses (the key differentiator — 4 overlapping polys) ===
# Near-anchor mass (tightest, most opaque silk near the spider's home)
poly 0.05,0.05 0.35,0.08 0.45,0.20 0.42,0.35 0.30,0.42 0.15,0.40 0.08,0.28 fill #aaaaaa 0.16
# Second layer fanning out from anchor
poly 0.05,0.05 0.40,0.12 0.55,0.28 0.50,0.45 0.35,0.50 0.18,0.42 fill #999999 0.14
# Mid-reach mass
poly 0.20,0.15 0.60,0.25 0.85,0.45 0.90,0.70 0.70,0.80 0.45,0.70 0.30,0.50 fill #aaaaaa 0.13
# Far drift mass sagging toward SE
poly 0.55,0.35 0.95,0.55 1.25,0.85 1.40,1.20 1.15,1.35 0.80,1.20 0.60,0.90 fill #999999 0.12

# === Primary radial strands from NW corner ===
line 0.05,0.05 1.70,0.40 stroke #888888 0.4 width 2
line 0.05,0.05 1.90,0.80 stroke #888888 0.35 width 2
line 0.05,0.05 1.40,1.20 stroke #888888 0.35 width 2
line 0.05,0.05 0.80,1.90 stroke #888888 0.35 width 2
line 0.05,0.05 1.20,1.60 stroke #888888 0.3 width 1
line 0.05,0.05 1.60,1.00 stroke #888888 0.3 width 1
line 0.05,0.05 0.40,1.70 stroke #888888 0.3 width 1
line 0.05,0.05 1.80,0.60 stroke #999999 0.25 width 1

# === Cross-strands between radials (first generation) ===
qbezier 0.60,0.15 0.55,0.40 0.25,0.75 stroke #999999 0.3 width 1
qbezier 1.00,0.25 0.85,0.60 0.40,1.00 stroke #999999 0.28 width 1
qbezier 1.40,0.35 1.10,0.75 0.60,1.30 stroke #999999 0.28 width 1
qbezier 1.70,0.50 1.35,0.95 0.85,1.50 stroke #999999 0.25 width 1

# === Cross-strands (second generation — shorter, closer to anchor) ===
qbezier 0.45,0.12 0.38,0.30 0.18,0.50 stroke #aaaaaa 0.25 width 1
qbezier 0.75,0.20 0.58,0.45 0.30,0.70 stroke #aaaaaa 0.22 width 1
qbezier 1.10,0.40 0.90,0.70 0.55,1.05 stroke #aaaaaa 0.2 width 1

# === Fine wispy overlays (age + visual noise) ===
qbezier 0.85,0.30 0.70,0.55 0.45,0.85 stroke #999999 0.15 width 1
qbezier 1.30,0.60 1.00,0.95 0.70,1.25 stroke #999999 0.15 width 1
qbezier 1.55,0.90 1.20,1.20 0.90,1.50 stroke #999999 0.15 width 1
qbezier 0.50,0.55 0.75,0.90 1.10,1.20 stroke #999999 0.15 width 1

# === Sag drapes in the far corners (weight of accumulated silk) ===
qbezier 1.60,0.70 1.55,1.00 1.35,1.40 stroke #888888 0.22 width 1
qbezier 1.30,1.10 1.45,1.35 1.50,1.70 stroke #888888 0.2 width 1
qbezier 0.95,1.40 1.15,1.55 1.25,1.85 stroke #888888 0.2 width 1

# === Trapped prey specks (husks caught in silk) ===
circle 0.75,0.55 0.02 fill #222222 0.75
circle 1.15,0.95 0.02 fill #222222 0.7
circle 1.35,1.30 0.02 fill #222222 0.65

# === Spider speck (home, near anchor) ===
circle 0.28,0.25 0.025 fill #222222 0.85
circle 0.28,0.25 0.015 fill #333333 0.5
props.cobweb-between-posts:
name: Cobweb (Between Posts)
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.05
placement: floor
room_types: crypt, tomb, dungeon, mausoleum, abandoned-room, tunnel-mine-worked, cave-living
typical_count: few
clusters_with: cobweb-heavy, cobweb-cluster, timber-brace, pillar, stone-column
notes: Cobweb stretched between two anchor points — ideal for spanning between timber-braces or pillars across a tunnel/alcove. Anchors at west (0.10, 0.50) and east (1.90, 0.50). Rotate for other orientations.
---
# footprint 1x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-1
# Spanning cobweb — silk stretched taut between WEST anchor (0.10, 0.50) and EAST anchor (1.90, 0.50)

# === Anchor masses (where web attaches to posts) ===
poly 0.06,0.42 0.18,0.40 0.20,0.50 0.18,0.60 0.06,0.58 fill #aaaaaa 0.12
poly 1.82,0.42 1.94,0.40 1.96,0.50 1.94,0.60 1.82,0.58 fill #aaaaaa 0.12

# === Main spanning strands (east-west structural threads) ===
line 0.10,0.35 1.90,0.35 stroke #888888 0.35 width 2
line 0.10,0.50 1.90,0.50 stroke #888888 0.35 width 2
line 0.10,0.65 1.90,0.65 stroke #888888 0.3 width 1
line 0.10,0.42 1.90,0.58 stroke #999999 0.25 width 1

# === Sagging droop (gravity-pulled curves) ===
qbezier 0.10,0.50 1.00,0.75 1.90,0.50 stroke #888888 0.3 width 2
qbezier 0.10,0.45 1.00,0.68 1.90,0.55 stroke #999999 0.2 width 1

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Huge overhead sheet of webbing, seen from below — a silk canopy anchored

line 1.0,1.0 0.08,1.92 stroke #888888 0.35 width 2
line 1.0,1.0 1.92,1.92 stroke #888888 0.35 width 2

line 1.0,1.0 1.0,1.95 stroke #999999 0.28 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 0.05,1.0 stroke #999999 0.28 width 1

qbezier 1.45,0.35 1.30,0.55 1.12,0.72 stroke #999999 0.25 width 1

line 0.12,0.12 1.88,1.88 stroke #999999 0.2 width 1
line 1.88,0.12 0.12,1.88 stroke #999999 0.2 width 1

props.coffin:
name: Coffin
category: Prison
footprint: 3x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 2
placement: wall
room_types: crypt, funeral-parlor, vampire-lair
typical_count: few

notes: Place against walls or in alcoves; leave space to open
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox poly 0.7,0.15 1.3,0.15 1.55,0.65 1.55,2.2 1.2,2.85 0.8,2.85 0.45,2.2 0.45,0.65 z 0-2

# footprint 3x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-3
# Classic hexagonal coffin — wide at shoulders, narrow at head and feet

# Coffin body (hexagonal shape)
poly 0.7,0.15 1.3,0.15 1.55,0.65 1.55,2.2 1.2,2.85 0.8,2.85 0.45,2.2 0.45,0.65 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
poly 0.7,0.15 1.3,0.15 1.55,0.65 1.55,2.2 1.2,2.85 0.8,2.85 0.45,2.2 0.45,0.65 stroke #2a1400

# Inner lid panel (recessed border)
poly 0.75,0.25 1.25,0.25 1.47,0.7 1.47,2.15 1.15,2.75 0.85,2.75 0.53,2.15 0.53,0.7 stroke #3a1f00 0.5

# Lid seam (center line)
line 1.0,0.2 1.0,2.8 stroke #2a1400 0.4

# Plank lines
line 0.5,1.0 1.5,1.0 stroke #2a1400 0.25
line 0.48,1.5 1.52,1.5 stroke #2a1400 0.25
line 0.5,2.0 1.5,2.0 stroke #2a1400 0.25

# Cross carving (on the upper/head portion)
rect 0.93,0.5 0.14,0.7 fill #1a1208 0.3
rect 0.93,0.5 0.14,0.7 stroke #2a1400 0.3
rect 0.75,0.75 0.5,0.14 fill #1a1208 0.3
rect 0.75,0.75 0.5,0.14 stroke #2a1400 0.3

# Metal hinges (east side)
rect 1.45,0.9 0.12,0.1 fill #555555 0.7
rect 1.45,0.9 0.12,0.1 stroke #333333
rect 1.45,1.8 0.12,0.1 fill #555555 0.7
rect 1.45,1.8 0.12,0.1 stroke #333333

# Nails/rivets along edges
circle 0.7,0.18 0.02 fill #555555 0.5
circle 1.3,0.18 0.02 fill #555555 0.5
circle 1.53,1.0 0.02 fill #555555 0.5
circle 1.53,1.5 0.02 fill #555555 0.5
circle 0.47,1.0 0.02 fill #555555 0.5
circle 0.47,1.5 0.02 fill #555555 0.5
circle 1.0,2.83 0.02 fill #555555 0.5
