props.collapsed-stair:
name: Collapsed Stair
category: Terrain
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 0.8
placement: corner
room_types: ruined-watchtower, cabin-abandoned, crypt, ancient-ruin-overgrown
typical_count: single
clusters_with: stair-remnant, rubble-pile, fallen-beam, skeleton-slumped
notes: Broken stone staircase — partial treads intact with gaps showing dark void below. Rubble piled at broken ends, bent iron handrail fragments. Place against a wall.
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: remnant of ascending stair. Ascend direction = north (low Y). Some treads missing; void shows through.
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,1.80 z 0-0.8

# Dark void base (floor-level gap where treads are missing)
rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,1.80 fill #0a0a0a 0.95

# Intact stair tread 1 (northmost — top step still there)
rect 0.20,0.14 1.60,0.26 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
rect 0.20,0.14 1.60,0.26 stroke #2a2420
line 0.22,0.40 1.78,0.40 stroke #1a1410 width 1
# Intact stair tread 2 (second from top, slightly broken edge)
poly 0.22,0.46 1.72,0.46 1.78,0.70 0.68,0.72 0.54,0.68 0.28,0.70 0.22,0.66 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
poly 0.22,0.46 1.72,0.46 1.78,0.70 0.68,0.72 0.54,0.68 0.28,0.70 0.22,0.66 stroke #2a2420
# Missing tread (3rd) — void gap here (already shown by base fill)
# Crack/edge dust at void edge
line 0.28,0.74 1.72,0.74 stroke #4a4238 0.6 width 1

# Intact stair tread 4 (partial — only west half survives)
poly 0.24,0.98 0.94,0.96 0.98,1.22 0.24,1.24 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
poly 0.24,0.98 0.94,0.96 0.98,1.22 0.24,1.24 stroke #2a2420
# Jagged broken edge on tread 4
line 0.94,0.96 1.00,1.10 stroke #1a1410 width 2
line 1.00,1.10 0.98,1.22 stroke #1a1410 width 2

# Intact stair tread 5 (eastern fragment, south side)
poly 1.16,1.30 1.78,1.32 1.80,1.56 1.20,1.58 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
poly 1.16,1.30 1.78,1.32 1.80,1.56 1.20,1.58 stroke #2a2420

# Rubble pile at the broken center (chunks fallen into the gap)
poly 0.96,1.08 1.14,1.04 1.24,1.16 1.20,1.28 1.06,1.32 0.92,1.24 fill #6a6058 0.95
poly 0.96,1.08 1.14,1.04 1.24,1.16 1.20,1.28 1.06,1.32 0.92,1.24 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.55
poly 0.96,1.08 1.14,1.04 1.24,1.16 1.20,1.28 1.06,1.32 0.92,1.24 stroke #2a2420
# Rubble chunk south
poly 0.56,1.42 0.74,1.40 0.82,1.50 0.76,1.62 0.62,1.66 0.50,1.58 fill #5a5048 0.9
poly 0.56,1.42 0.74,1.40 0.82,1.50 0.76,1.62 0.62,1.66 0.50,1.58 stroke #2a2420
# Small pebbles scattered
circle 0.38,1.14 0.04 fill #6a6058 0.85
circle 0.38,1.14 0.04 stroke #2a2420
circle 1.06,1.48 0.035 fill #5a5048 0.85
circle 1.06,1.48 0.035 stroke #2a2420
circle 1.48,1.72 0.03 fill #6a6058 0.85

# Bent iron handrail fragment (left side, broken)
line 0.14,0.18 0.14,0.84 stroke #3a2820 width 3
line 0.14,0.84 0.22,1.00 stroke #3a2820 width 3
# Rust on handrail
line 0.14,0.40 0.14,0.60 stroke #5a2810 width 1

circle 0.5,0.5 0.28 fill #cc3300 0.35

poly 0.48,0.50 0.52,0.50 0.53,0.08 0.47,0.08 stroke #2a1400

poly 0.48,0.50 0.52,0.50 0.16,0.78 0.12,0.72 stroke #2a1400

poly 0.48,0.50 0.52,0.50 0.88,0.72 0.84,0.78 stroke #2a1400

circle 0.50,0.50 0.26 fill #333333 0.5
circle 0.50,0.50 0.26 stroke #1a1a1a

---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.10,0.10 0.80,0.80

# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1. Crate is smashed open — plank fragments and scattered contents visible.

# === Ground stain around burst crate (spilled dust / shadow) ===
ellipse 0.50,0.58 0.44,0.36 fill #2a1810 0.2

# === Base of crate (what's left of the bottom — partial square) ===

# === Interior dark (void inside broken crate) ===

# === Broken plank fragment (busted out — protruding east) ===

rect 0.70,0.36 0.26,0.10 stroke #1a0800 rotate 15

# Splintered end of plank fragment
poly 0.92,0.42 0.98,0.38 0.96,0.48 0.92,0.46 fill #1a0800 0.9

rect 0.02,0.54 0.22,0.08 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85 rotate -20
rect 0.02,0.54 0.22,0.08 stroke #1a0800 rotate -20

# Splintered end
poly 0.00,0.56 -0.02,0.60 0.04,0.66 0.06,0.62 fill #1a0800 0.85

# === Third fractured slat (lying south, broken in half) ===
rect 0.34,0.82 0.28,0.06 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85 rotate 10
rect 0.34,0.82 0.28,0.06 stroke #1a0800 rotate 10

# === Metal corner band (bent, partially ripped free) ===
rect 0.12,0.26 0.06,0.10 fill #555555 0.85 rotate -10
rect 0.12,0.26 0.06,0.10 stroke #222222 width 1 rotate -10
# Bent nail heads from the band
circle 0.16,0.30 0.016 fill #444444 0.9
circle 0.14,0.36 0.016 fill #444444 0.9

# === Spilled contents — loose straw packing material (pale wisps) ===
line 0.38,0.28 0.44,0.22 stroke #c8b870 0.85 width 2
line 0.48,0.24 0.56,0.18 stroke #c8b870 0.85 width 2
line 0.60,0.22 0.66,0.16 stroke #c8b870 0.8 width 2
line 0.32,0.82 0.26,0.88 stroke #c8b870 0.8 width 2
line 0.68,0.80 0.76,0.86 stroke #c8b870 0.8 width 2
line 0.16,0.70 0.10,0.74 stroke #c8b870 0.75 width 1
line 0.82,0.60 0.90,0.64 stroke #c8b870 0.75 width 1

# === Spilled small goods (bottles or ceramic fragments) ===
# Small clay shard
poly 0.54,0.84 0.62,0.82 0.60,0.88 0.54,0.88 fill #8a5028 0.85
poly 0.54,0.84 0.62,0.82 0.60,0.88 0.54,0.88 stroke #4a2810
# Another shard
poly 0.22,0.18 0.30,0.16 0.28,0.22 0.22,0.22 fill #6a4020 0.85
# Small sphere (spilled marble/bead)
circle 0.74,0.84 0.025 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 0.74,0.84 0.025 stroke #2a1400

# === Scattered splinters ===
line 0.90,0.70 0.94,0.66 stroke #5c3a1e width 1
line 0.08,0.84 0.12,0.80 stroke #5c3a1e width 1
line 0.92,0.30 0.96,0.28 stroke #5c3a1e width 1
circle 0.04,0.40 0.015 fill #3a1f00 0.8
circle 0.96,0.52 0.015 fill #3a1f00 0.8

# === Dark crack running through the lid ===
line 0.30,0.40 0.62,0.58 stroke #000000 0.85 width 2
line 0.28,0.44 0.64,0.62 stroke #1a0800 0.7 width 1

notes: Stone mausoleum scenery prop viewed from directly above. Solid peaked-slab roof with central north-south ridge, ornamental cornice trim, four corner finial pillars capped with small spires, a carved cross relief on the roof, and a protruding arched porch (visible as a half-disc) on the south face. NOT enterable — purely decorative centerpiece for graveyards and cemeteries. Surround with tombstones, statues, and iron fencing.

# === Ornamental cornice trim (stone molding inset from roof edge) ===

rect 1.10,0.90 5.80,4.40 stroke #5a5a5a width 1

# Corner rosette accents on the cornice (small embossed medallions)

circle 1.15,0.95 0.08 stroke #2a2a2a
circle 6.85,0.95 0.08 fill #5a5a5a 0.9
circle 6.85,0.95 0.08 stroke #2a2a2a
circle 1.15,5.25 0.08 fill #5a5a5a 0.9
circle 1.15,5.25 0.08 stroke #2a2a2a
circle 6.85,5.25 0.08 fill #5a5a5a 0.9
circle 6.85,5.25 0.08 stroke #2a2a2a

# === Slab courses running east-west (perpendicular to ridge) ===
line 0.80,1.30 7.20,1.30 stroke #333333 0.65
line 0.80,2.00 7.20,2.00 stroke #333333 0.60
line 0.80,2.70 7.20,2.70 stroke #333333 0.60
line 0.80,3.40 7.20,3.40 stroke #333333 0.60
line 0.80,4.10 7.20,4.10 stroke #333333 0.60
line 0.80,4.80 7.20,4.80 stroke #333333 0.65

# === Central north-south ridge beam (apex of peaked roof) ===
rect 3.85,0.60 0.30,5.00 fill #444444 0.90
rect 3.85,0.60 0.30,5.00 stroke #222222 width 1
# Highlight on the west face of the ridge
line 3.90,0.65 3.90,5.55 stroke #8a8a8a 0.55 width 1
# Shadow on the east face of the ridge
line 4.12,0.65 4.12,5.55 stroke #1a1a1a 0.60 width 1

# === Corner finial pillars (square columns with capitals + spire tops) ===
# NW
rect 0.40,0.20 0.80,0.80 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.90
rect 0.40,0.20 0.80,0.80 stroke #222222 width 2
rect 0.52,0.32 0.56,0.56 stroke #555555 width 1
circle 0.80,0.60 0.14 fill #666666 0.95
circle 0.80,0.60 0.14 stroke #2a2a2a width 1
circle 0.80,0.60 0.06 fill #8a8a8a 0.9
# NE
rect 6.80,0.20 0.80,0.80 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.90
rect 6.80,0.20 0.80,0.80 stroke #222222 width 2
rect 6.92,0.32 0.56,0.56 stroke #555555 width 1
circle 7.20,0.60 0.14 fill #666666 0.95
circle 7.20,0.60 0.14 stroke #2a2a2a width 1
circle 7.20,0.60 0.06 fill #8a8a8a 0.9
# SW

rect 0.40,5.00 0.80,0.80 stroke #222222 width 2
rect 0.52,5.12 0.56,0.56 stroke #555555 width 1
circle 0.80,5.40 0.14 fill #666666 0.95
circle 0.80,5.40 0.14 stroke #2a2a2a width 1
circle 0.80,5.40 0.06 fill #8a8a8a 0.9
# SE
rect 6.80,5.00 0.80,0.80 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.90
rect 6.80,5.00 0.80,0.80 stroke #222222 width 2
rect 6.92,5.12 0.56,0.56 stroke #555555 width 1
circle 7.20,5.40 0.14 fill #666666 0.95
circle 7.20,5.40 0.14 stroke #2a2a2a width 1
circle 7.20,5.40 0.06 fill #8a8a8a 0.9

# === Large carved cross relief on the north half of the roof ===
rect 3.90,1.40 0.20,1.50 fill #5a5a5a 0.95
rect 3.90,1.40 0.20,1.50 stroke #2a2a2a width 1
rect 3.35,1.95 1.30,0.30 fill #5a5a5a 0.95
rect 3.35,1.95 1.30,0.30 stroke #2a2a2a width 1

# === Secondary engraved emblem on the south half (cross-in-circle) ===
circle 4.00,4.15 0.30 stroke #5a5a5a width 2
line 4.00,3.85 4.00,4.45 stroke #5a5a5a width 2
line 3.70,4.15 4.30,4.15 stroke #5a5a5a width 2

# === Arched porch protruding south from the main building ===
# Porch rectangular body (north half, tucked against the building)
rect 3.00,5.60 2.00,0.50 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.92
rect 3.00,5.60 2.00,0.50 stroke #222222 width 2

# Arched porch roof (south-pointing half-disc — THIS is the "arch of the door" seen from above)
arc 4.00,6.10 1.00 0 180 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.92
arc 4.00,6.10 1.00 0 180 stroke #222222 width 2

# Porch roof ornamental trim (concentric arcs = moulding bands)

arc 4.00,6.10 0.70 0 180 stroke #555555 width 1
arc 4.00,6.10 0.50 0 180 stroke #444444 0.7 width 1

# Radial slab lines on the porch (rays from center to perimeter)
line 4.00,6.10 3.00,6.10 stroke #333333 0.6 width 1
line 4.00,6.10 5.00,6.10 stroke #333333 0.6 width 1
line 4.00,6.10 4.00,7.10 stroke #333333 0.6 width 1
line 4.00,6.10 3.30,6.81 stroke #333333 0.55 width 1
line 4.00,6.10 4.70,6.81 stroke #333333 0.55 width 1

circle 4.00,6.30 0.10 stroke #2a2a2a width 1
line 4.00,6.22 4.00,6.38 stroke #2a2a2a 0.85 width 1
line 3.92,6.30 4.08,6.30 stroke #2a2a2a 0.85 width 1

# Ornamental columns flanking the porch body (where it meets the main wall)
rect 2.85,5.55 0.35,0.60 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.90
rect 2.85,5.55 0.35,0.60 stroke #222222 width 2
circle 3.03,5.85 0.09 fill #666666 0.95
circle 3.03,5.85 0.09 stroke #2a2a2a
rect 4.80,5.55 0.35,0.60 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.90
rect 4.80,5.55 0.35,0.60 stroke #222222 width 2
circle 4.97,5.85 0.09 fill #666666 0.95
circle 4.97,5.85 0.09 stroke #2a2a2a

# === Moss and weathering patches on the roof slabs ===
ellipse 1.60,1.70 0.35,0.25 fill #3a4028 0.40
ellipse 6.35,2.50 0.32,0.22 fill #3a4028 0.35
ellipse 1.40,3.60 0.30,0.20 fill #3a4028 0.35
ellipse 6.50,4.20 0.30,0.22 fill #3a4028 0.35
ellipse 2.40,2.80 0.18,0.14 fill #3a4028 0.30
ellipse 5.40,3.30 0.22,0.16 fill #3a4028 0.30
# Moss on porch
ellipse 3.50,6.40 0.20,0.12 fill #3a4028 0.40
ellipse 4.50,6.50 0.18,0.12 fill #3a4028 0.35

# === Hairline cracks across slabs ===
line 2.00,0.90 2.05,2.40 stroke #1a1a1a 0.50 width 1
line 5.80,1.30 5.85,3.20 stroke #1a1a1a 0.45 width 1
line 1.50,3.80 1.55,4.90 stroke #1a1a1a 0.45 width 1
line 6.40,3.90 6.45,4.95 stroke #1a1a1a 0.50 width 1

# === Stone urns flanking the porch (scenery accent) ===
circle 2.40,6.80 0.18 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
circle 2.40,6.80 0.18 stroke #222222 width 2
circle 2.40,6.80 0.10 fill #0a0604 0.90
circle 5.60,6.80 0.18 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
circle 5.60,6.80 0.18 stroke #222222 width 2
circle 5.60,6.80 0.10 fill #0a0604 0.90

props.dart-board:

notes: Round dart target mounted on wall. Top-down view shows concentric rings with bullseye and wedge divisions.
---
# === HITBOX — thin wall hang ===
selection circle 0.5,0.22 0.18

# Board sits hugging north wall (low Y). Center at y ≈ 0.22.

line 0.37,0.09 0.63,0.35 stroke #1a1008 0.7 width 1
line 0.63,0.09 0.37,0.35 stroke #1a1008 0.7 width 1

circle 0.50,0.22 0.08 stroke #2d6b3a 0.7 width 1

# Outer bullseye (green)
circle 0.50,0.22 0.04 fill #2d6b3a 0.95
circle 0.50,0.22 0.04 stroke #1a1008 width 1

# Inner bullseye (red)
circle 0.50,0.22 0.02 fill #8b0000 0.95
circle 0.50,0.22 0.02 stroke #1a1008 width 1

circle 0.50,0.50 0.22 fill #daa520 0.55
circle 0.50,0.50 0.22 stroke #5a3a00

bezier 0.82,0.60 0.85,0.64 0.84,0.68 0.80,0.70 stroke #5a4a3a 0.6 width 1

line 0.56,0.52 0.60,0.58 stroke #4a3a2a 0.55 width 1

line 0.44,0.50 0.56,0.50 stroke #3a2a1a 0.35 width 1

name: Fallen Antler
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: no

placement: floor

notes: Shed deer antler lying on the ground — decorative wilderness scatter
---
# A single antler lying flat on the ground, seen from above
# Main beam curves from lower-left toward upper-right

# === Main beam ===
bezier 0.18,0.72 0.30,0.55 0.55,0.40 0.78,0.30 stroke #d4c4a8 width 4
bezier 0.18,0.72 0.30,0.55 0.55,0.40 0.78,0.30 stroke #c8b898 width 2

# === Tines branching off the main beam ===

# First tine — branches upward-left from near base
bezier 0.30,0.62 0.26,0.52 0.20,0.42 0.18,0.34 stroke #d4c4a8 width 3
bezier 0.30,0.62 0.26,0.52 0.20,0.42 0.18,0.34 stroke #c8b898 width 1

# Second tine — branches upward from mid-beam
bezier 0.45,0.50 0.42,0.38 0.38,0.28 0.35,0.22 stroke #d4c4a8 width 3
bezier 0.45,0.50 0.42,0.38 0.38,0.28 0.35,0.22 stroke #c8b898 width 1

# Third tine — branches upward-right near tip
bezier 0.62,0.38 0.60,0.28 0.58,0.22 0.56,0.18 stroke #d4c4a8 width 2
bezier 0.62,0.38 0.60,0.28 0.58,0.22 0.56,0.18 stroke #c8b898 width 1

# Fourth tine — small fork at the very tip
bezier 0.75,0.32 0.80,0.24 0.84,0.20 0.86,0.18 stroke #d4c4a8 width 2

# === Base/burr (wide knob where antler was attached to skull) ===
circle 0.18,0.72 0.06 fill #c8b898 0.7
circle 0.18,0.72 0.06 stroke #a09878

# === Tine tips — slightly lighter ===
circle 0.18,0.34 0.02 fill #e8dcc8 0.5
circle 0.35,0.22 0.02 fill #e8dcc8 0.5
circle 0.56,0.18 0.02 fill #e8dcc8 0.5
circle 0.86,0.18 0.02 fill #e8dcc8 0.45
circle 0.78,0.30 0.02 fill #e8dcc8 0.45

lights: [{"preset":"divine-radiance","x":0.5,"y":0.45,"radius":2,"intensity":0.15,"color":"#ffffff"}]
---
# Top-down: a large feather lying flat on the ground, quill running diagonally

# === Faint glow halo beneath feather ===
ellipse 0.48,0.45 0.35,0.22 fill #ffffff 0.06

# === Feather vane — left side (wider) ===
poly 0.22,0.72 0.32,0.58 0.40,0.44 0.46,0.30 0.48,0.20 0.50,0.35 0.48,0.50 0.42,0.62 0.34,0.74 fill #f0ece8 0.8

# === Feather vane — right side (narrower) ===
poly 0.48,0.20 0.52,0.30 0.58,0.44 0.62,0.56 0.68,0.68 0.50,0.60 0.50,0.44 0.50,0.30 fill #e8e4e0 0.75
poly 0.48,0.20 0.52,0.30 0.58,0.44 0.62,0.56 0.68,0.68 0.50,0.60 0.50,0.44 0.50,0.30 stroke #c8c0b0

# === Central rachis (quill shaft) ===
bezier 0.48,0.18 0.49,0.35 0.48,0.55 0.44,0.76 stroke #d4ccc0 width 2
bezier 0.48,0.18 0.49,0.35 0.48,0.55 0.44,0.76 stroke #e8e0d8 width 1

# === Barb lines (fine texture across vane) ===
line 0.30,0.65 0.48,0.55 stroke #d8d0c8 0.3
line 0.35,0.58 0.49,0.48 stroke #d8d0c8 0.3
line 0.40,0.48 0.49,0.40 stroke #d8d0c8 0.3
line 0.44,0.38 0.49,0.32 stroke #d8d0c8 0.3
line 0.55,0.40 0.50,0.35 stroke #d0c8c0 0.3
line 0.58,0.50 0.50,0.45 stroke #d0c8c0 0.3
line 0.62,0.60 0.50,0.52 stroke #d0c8c0 0.3

# === Calamus (bare quill end at base) ===
line 0.44,0.76 0.42,0.82 stroke #c8c0b0 width 2
circle 0.42,0.82 0.015 fill #b8b0a0 0.6

# === Subtle shimmer highlight along rachis ===
line 0.48,0.22 0.49,0.40 stroke #ffffff 0.2

props.fence-wood-corner:
name: Low Wooden Fence (Corner)
category: Architecture
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1
placement: floor
room_types: roadside-gallows, graveyard-village, village-green, garden, farmhouse-yard, market
typical_count: few
clusters_with: fence-wood-low, fence-wood-end, tombstone, grave-mound
notes: 90° L-corner for the low wooden fence. At facing 0 the rail enters from the west edge (y=0.40–0.58) and exits south at x=0.40–0.60. Single corner post at the bend; edge geometry matches fence-wood-low so sections tile cleanly.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.00,0.40 0.60,0.22
selection rect 0.40,0.40 0.22,0.60

# Ground shadow beneath both rail legs
rect 0.00,0.58 0.60,0.06 fill #000000 0.15
rect 0.40,0.40 0.22,0.60 fill #000000 0.08

# === West leg rails (enter from west edge, stop at the corner post) ===
rect 0.00,0.40 0.40,0.10 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.82
rect 0.00,0.40 0.40,0.10 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.00,0.52 0.40,0.06 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.78
rect 0.00,0.52 0.40,0.06 stroke #3a1f00
line 0.00,0.44 0.40,0.44 stroke #2a1400 0.5
line 0.00,0.47 0.40,0.47 stroke #2a1400 0.4

# === South leg rails (exit south edge, start at the corner post) ===
# Rotated 90° CW: top rail (wider) maps to east side; lower rail (thinner) to west side.
rect 0.42,0.60 0.06,0.40 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.78
rect 0.42,0.60 0.06,0.40 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.50,0.60 0.10,0.40 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.82
rect 0.50,0.60 0.10,0.40 stroke #3a1f00
line 0.53,0.60 0.53,1.00 stroke #2a1400 0.5
line 0.56,0.60 0.56,1.00 stroke #2a1400 0.4

# === Corner post at the bend ===
rect 0.40,0.40 0.20,0.20 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.94
rect 0.40,0.40 0.20,0.20 stroke #1a0a00
# Top-down pyramidion cap: inner square
rect 0.43,0.43 0.14,0.14 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
rect 0.43,0.43 0.14,0.14 stroke #1a0a00 0.6
# 4-way facet lines from inner-cap corners to the apex dot (imply the pyramid's slopes)
line 0.43,0.43 0.50,0.50 stroke #3a2010 0.7
line 0.57,0.43 0.50,0.50 stroke #3a2010 0.7
line 0.43,0.57 0.50,0.50 stroke #3a2010 0.7
line 0.57,0.57 0.50,0.50 stroke #3a2010 0.7
# Apex highlight
circle 0.50,0.50 0.025 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 0.50,0.50 0.012 fill #c8a060 0.85

# === Pickets along the west leg (above the west rail) ===
poly 0.06,0.34 0.14,0.34 0.14,0.40 0.10,0.32 0.06,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.06,0.34 0.14,0.34 0.14,0.40 0.10,0.32 0.06,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
poly 0.26,0.34 0.34,0.34 0.34,0.40 0.30,0.32 0.26,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.26,0.34 0.34,0.34 0.34,0.40 0.30,0.32 0.26,0.40 stroke #1a0a00

# === Pickets along the south leg (east of the east rail, pointing east) ===
# Pentagons rotated 90° CW from the horizontal picket shape.
poly 0.60,0.66 0.60,0.74 0.66,0.74 0.68,0.70 0.66,0.66 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.60,0.66 0.60,0.74 0.66,0.74 0.68,0.70 0.66,0.66 stroke #1a0a00
poly 0.60,0.86 0.60,0.94 0.66,0.94 0.68,0.90 0.66,0.86 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.60,0.86 0.60,0.94 0.66,0.94 0.68,0.90 0.66,0.86 stroke #1a0a00
props.fence-wood-end:
name: Low Wooden Fence (End Post)
category: Architecture
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1.2
placement: floor
room_types: roadside-gallows, graveyard-village, village-green, garden, farmhouse-yard, market
typical_count: few
clusters_with: fence-wood-low, fence-wood-corner, tombstone, grave-mound, gate-gallows
notes: Terminating post for the low wooden fence. At facing 0 the rail enters from the west edge (y=0.40–0.58) and ends at a single large end-post on the east side. The post cap is drawn top-down (concentric squares + 4-way facet lines for the pyramidion apex) so it reads correctly from above. Edge geometry matches fence-wood-low so sections tile cleanly.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.00,0.40 1.00,0.22
selection rect 0.66,0.28 0.24,0.44

# Ground shadow under the rail and the end post
rect 0.00,0.58 0.66,0.06 fill #000000 0.15
rect 0.66,0.56 0.24,0.12 fill #000000 0.20

# === Rail segments (enter from west, stop at the end post) ===
rect 0.00,0.40 0.66,0.10 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.82
rect 0.00,0.40 0.66,0.10 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.00,0.52 0.66,0.06 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.78
rect 0.00,0.52 0.66,0.06 stroke #3a1f00
# Rail grain
line 0.00,0.44 0.66,0.44 stroke #2a1400 0.5
line 0.00,0.47 0.66,0.47 stroke #2a1400 0.4

# === Terminal end post — a single prominent block ===
rect 0.66,0.28 0.24,0.44 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.94
rect 0.66,0.28 0.24,0.44 stroke #1a0a00

# === Top-down pyramidion cap ===
# Concentric inner square (the chamfered cap below the apex)
rect 0.70,0.32 0.16,0.36 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
rect 0.70,0.32 0.16,0.36 stroke #1a0a00 0.7

# 4-way facet lines from cap corners to the apex — each stroke implies one
# slope of the pyramidion, read top-down as four triangles meeting at center.
line 0.70,0.32 0.78,0.50 stroke #3a2010 0.8
line 0.86,0.32 0.78,0.50 stroke #3a2010 0.8
line 0.70,0.68 0.78,0.50 stroke #3a2010 0.8
line 0.86,0.68 0.78,0.50 stroke #3a2010 0.8

# Apex highlight (the tip of the pyramidion catching light)
circle 0.78,0.50 0.028 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 0.78,0.50 0.014 fill #c8a060 0.9

# Bolt accents on the post face (showing the cap is nailed on)
circle 0.72,0.36 0.014 fill #333333 0.85
circle 0.84,0.36 0.014 fill #333333 0.85
circle 0.72,0.64 0.014 fill #333333 0.85
circle 0.84,0.64 0.014 fill #333333 0.85

# === Pickets along the rail (west of the end post) ===
poly 0.06,0.34 0.14,0.34 0.14,0.40 0.10,0.32 0.06,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.06,0.34 0.14,0.34 0.14,0.40 0.10,0.32 0.06,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
poly 0.26,0.34 0.34,0.34 0.34,0.40 0.30,0.32 0.26,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.26,0.34 0.34,0.34 0.34,0.40 0.30,0.32 0.26,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
poly 0.46,0.34 0.54,0.34 0.54,0.40 0.50,0.32 0.46,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.46,0.34 0.54,0.34 0.54,0.40 0.50,0.32 0.46,0.40 stroke #1a0a00

clusters_with: fence-wood-low, fence-wood-corner, fence-wood-end, gate-gallows, tombstone, grave-mound
notes: Short stretch of low wooden picket fence. Top-down view — horizontal rails span the full cell width (no gap at seams) with three internal posts and picket tops rising above the rail. Tiles seamlessly with fence-wood-low, fence-wood-corner, and fence-wood-end.
---
# footprint 1x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-1.
# Rails span full width x=0..3 — seams join cleanly with neighbors.
# Posts are internal only (x=0.50, 1.50, 2.50). No post at x=0 or x=3 so tiling
# doesn't produce double-posts at the seams.

# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.00,0.40 3.00,0.22

# Ground shadow beneath the rails
rect 0.00,0.58 3.00,0.06 fill #000000 0.15

# Top horizontal rail — full width
rect 0.00,0.40 3.00,0.10 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.82
rect 0.00,0.40 3.00,0.10 stroke #3a1f00
# Grain lines
line 0.00,0.44 3.00,0.44 stroke #2a1400 0.5
line 0.00,0.47 3.00,0.47 stroke #2a1400 0.4

# Lower horizontal rail — full width, thinner
rect 0.00,0.52 3.00,0.06 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.78
rect 0.00,0.52 3.00,0.06 stroke #3a1f00

# === Internal posts (3 evenly spaced) ===
# Post 1 (x=0.50)
rect 0.43,0.32 0.14,0.30 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
rect 0.43,0.32 0.14,0.30 stroke #1a0a00
rect 0.45,0.34 0.10,0.06 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
rect 0.45,0.34 0.10,0.06 stroke #1a0a00 0.6
circle 0.50,0.37 0.016 fill #333333 0.85

# Post 2 (x=1.50)
rect 1.43,0.32 0.14,0.30 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
rect 1.43,0.32 0.14,0.30 stroke #1a0a00
rect 1.45,0.34 0.10,0.06 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
rect 1.45,0.34 0.10,0.06 stroke #1a0a00 0.6
circle 1.50,0.37 0.016 fill #333333 0.85

# Post 3 (x=2.50)
rect 2.43,0.32 0.14,0.30 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
rect 2.43,0.32 0.14,0.30 stroke #1a0a00
rect 2.45,0.34 0.10,0.06 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
rect 2.45,0.34 0.10,0.06 stroke #1a0a00 0.6
circle 2.50,0.37 0.016 fill #333333 0.85

# === Picket tops (pentagons just above the top rail) ===
# Regular 0.20 spacing; pickets that would collide with posts are skipped.
# West of post 1: x=0.10, 0.30
poly 0.06,0.34 0.14,0.34 0.14,0.40 0.10,0.32 0.06,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.06,0.34 0.14,0.34 0.14,0.40 0.10,0.32 0.06,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
poly 0.26,0.34 0.34,0.34 0.34,0.40 0.30,0.32 0.26,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.26,0.34 0.34,0.34 0.34,0.40 0.30,0.32 0.26,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
# Between post 1 and post 2: x=0.70, 0.90, 1.10, 1.30
poly 0.66,0.34 0.74,0.34 0.74,0.40 0.70,0.32 0.66,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.66,0.34 0.74,0.34 0.74,0.40 0.70,0.32 0.66,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
poly 0.86,0.34 0.94,0.34 0.94,0.40 0.90,0.32 0.86,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 0.86,0.34 0.94,0.34 0.94,0.40 0.90,0.32 0.86,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
poly 1.06,0.34 1.14,0.34 1.14,0.40 1.10,0.32 1.06,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 1.06,0.34 1.14,0.34 1.14,0.40 1.10,0.32 1.06,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
poly 1.26,0.34 1.34,0.34 1.34,0.40 1.30,0.32 1.26,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 1.26,0.34 1.34,0.34 1.34,0.40 1.30,0.32 1.26,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
# Between post 2 and post 3: x=1.70, 1.90, 2.10, 2.30
poly 1.66,0.34 1.74,0.34 1.74,0.40 1.70,0.32 1.66,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 1.66,0.34 1.74,0.34 1.74,0.40 1.70,0.32 1.66,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
poly 1.86,0.34 1.94,0.34 1.94,0.40 1.90,0.32 1.86,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 1.86,0.34 1.94,0.34 1.94,0.40 1.90,0.32 1.86,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
poly 2.06,0.34 2.14,0.34 2.14,0.40 2.10,0.32 2.06,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 2.06,0.34 2.14,0.34 2.14,0.40 2.10,0.32 2.06,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
poly 2.26,0.34 2.34,0.34 2.34,0.40 2.30,0.32 2.26,0.40 fill #4a2800 0.9
poly 2.26,0.34 2.34,0.34 2.34,0.40 2.30,0.32 2.26,0.40 stroke #1a0a00
# East of post 3: x=2.70, 2.90

poly 2.66,0.34 2.74,0.34 2.74,0.40 2.70,0.32 2.66,0.40 stroke #1a0a00

circle 0.44,0.54 0.015 fill #0a0a0a 0.9
circle 0.56,0.46 0.015 fill #0a0a0a 0.9

circle 0.60,0.44 0.013 fill #0a0a0a 0.85
circle 0.62,0.56 0.013 fill #0a0a0a 0.85
circle 0.38,0.58 0.013 fill #0a0a0a 0.85
circle 0.42,0.60 0.013 fill #0a0a0a 0.8
circle 0.58,0.60 0.013 fill #0a0a0a 0.8

circle 0.64,0.40 0.013 fill #0a0a0a 0.8

circle 0.70,0.50 0.012 fill #0a0a0a 0.75

circle 0.72,0.38 0.012 fill #0a0a0a 0.65

line 0.68,0.56 0.64,0.58 stroke #1a1a1a 0.5
line 0.46,0.36 0.48,0.32 stroke #1a1a1a 0.5
line 0.54,0.64 0.52,0.68 stroke #1a1a1a 0.5

props.focused-lamp:
name: Focused Lamp
category: Lighting
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 5
lights: [{"preset":"lantern","x":0.5,"y":0.6,"radius":6,"color":"#ffe8c0","intensity":0.6}]
placement: floor
room_types: interrogation-room, office, study, torture-chamber
typical_count: single
clusters_with: desk, chair, confession-paper, pen-and-inkwell
notes: Angled hooded lamp on a tall adjustable brass arm; the harsh interrogation light. Place near the prisoner's chair. Top-down: hood disk + arm + base.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.6 0.25 z 0-5

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: small metal hood disk at south + angled arm line back to upright post at north + base

# === Base plate (north edge, on the floor) ===
circle 0.50,0.22 0.12 fill #666666 0.7
circle 0.50,0.22 0.12 stroke #444444

# Base plate center bolt
circle 0.50,0.22 0.04 fill #888888 0.6

# === Upright post (small circle — cross-section of vertical pole) ===
circle 0.50,0.28 0.04 fill #8b6914 0.8
circle 0.50,0.28 0.04 stroke #5a3a00

# === Angled arm (line from post to hood) ===
line 0.50,0.30 0.50,0.56 stroke #8b6914 0.7 width 3
# Arm joint pivot
circle 0.50,0.38 0.025 fill #daa520 0.7

# === Hood (metal disk, the main visible element from above) ===
# The hood is a conical reflector — top-down it's a circle/ellipse
ellipse 0.50,0.64 0.14,0.12 fill #666666 0.85
ellipse 0.50,0.64 0.14,0.12 stroke #444444
# Hood highlight (convex metal surface)
ellipse 0.48,0.62 0.08,0.05 fill #8899aa 0.3
# Rim detail
ellipse 0.50,0.64 0.14,0.12 stroke #555555 0.5

# === Light spill south of hood (warm glow on floor) ===
ellipse 0.50,0.78 0.18,0.14 fill #ffe8c0 0.2
ellipse 0.50,0.76 0.12,0.10 fill #ffe8c0 0.3
circle 0.50,0.74 0.06 fill #fff0d0 0.35
props.folded-cloak:
name: Folded Cloak
category: Clutter
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.2
placement: floor
room_types: barracks, noble-bedchamber, mansion-bedroom-master, cabin-hunters, ranger-camp
typical_count: few
clusters_with: chest, bed, wardrobe, chair
notes: Folded travelers cloak on a surface — neat square of heavy fabric
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.18,0.22 0.64,0.56

# Main folded cloak (dark forest green, stacked square)
rect 0.18,0.22 0.64,0.56 texfill polyhaven/velour_velvet 0.85
rect 0.18,0.22 0.64,0.56 fill #2a4828 0.55
rect 0.18,0.22 0.64,0.56 stroke #0f2010
# Top layer highlight (catches light)
rect 0.22,0.26 0.56,0.08 fill #4a6838 0.5
# Fold ridges (visible where fabric bends)
line 0.18,0.36 0.82,0.36 stroke #0f2010 0.8
line 0.18,0.50 0.82,0.50 stroke #0f2010 0.8
line 0.18,0.64 0.82,0.64 stroke #0f2010 0.7
# Vertical fold
line 0.50,0.22 0.50,0.78 stroke #1a3018 0.6
# Brass clasp/brooch on top fold (small gold circle)
circle 0.50,0.30 0.04 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.50,0.30 0.04 stroke #5a3a00
circle 0.50,0.30 0.02 fill #881818 0.8
# Fabric texture (stitched edge details)
line 0.20,0.24 0.80,0.24 stroke #4a6838 0.5
line 0.20,0.76 0.80,0.76 stroke #4a6838 0.5
# Hem trim (gold thread)
line 0.20,0.76 0.80,0.76 stroke #8b6914 0.5
# Fabric wrinkle highlights
bezier 0.22,0.42 0.34,0.44 0.50,0.42 0.60,0.44 stroke #4a6838 0.4 width 1
bezier 0.22,0.56 0.36,0.58 0.54,0.56 0.64,0.58 stroke #4a6838 0.4 width 1
# Edge shadow
rect 0.18,0.76 0.64,0.04 fill #0f2010 0.4
# Small tassel peeking from fold
line 0.78,0.50 0.84,0.54 stroke #8b6914 0.7 width 1
line 0.80,0.50 0.82,0.58 stroke #8b6914 0.7 width 1
line 0.82,0.50 0.86,0.56 stroke #8b6914 0.7 width 1
props.folded-gown:
name: Folded Gown
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: mansion-bedroom-master, bedchamber, noble-suite, dressing-room
typical_count: single
clusters_with: bench, bed, dressing-screen, wardrobe
notes: Neatly folded silk evening gown, ribbon sash laid across the top. Place on a bench, chair seat, or the foot of a bed.
---
# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1
# Outer fold — soft silk gown, rectangular stack
rect 0.14,0.26 0.72,0.52 texfill polyhaven/velour_velvet 0.82
rect 0.14,0.26 0.72,0.52 fill #f4c8c8 0.45
rect 0.14,0.26 0.72,0.52 stroke #a07878
# Fold crease lines (horizontal bands where fabric has been folded)
line 0.14,0.44 0.86,0.44 stroke #b08888 0.55 width 1
line 0.14,0.60 0.86,0.60 stroke #b08888 0.45 width 1
# Soft rounded fold corners (suggest tucked edges)
arc 0.18,0.30 0.05 90 180 stroke #a07878 0.5 width 1
arc 0.82,0.30 0.05 0 90 stroke #a07878 0.5 width 1
# Subtle silk sheen highlight
ellipse 0.50,0.38 0.28,0.04 fill #f8dcdc 0.35
# Ribbon sash draped diagonally across top
poly 0.12,0.38 0.18,0.34 0.88,0.56 0.82,0.60 fill #daa520 0.88
poly 0.12,0.38 0.18,0.34 0.88,0.56 0.82,0.60 stroke #8b6914
# Ribbon knot center-ish
circle 0.50,0.48 0.05 fill #daa520 0.95
circle 0.50,0.48 0.05 stroke #5a3a00
# Trailing ribbon ends
line 0.50,0.50 0.42,0.72 stroke #daa520 width 3
line 0.50,0.50 0.58,0.74 stroke #daa520 width 3
# Lace trim peeking at one corner
arc 0.18,0.74 0.06 180 360 stroke #f0e8d0 0.7 width 1
props.footlocker:
name: Footlocker
category: Containers
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.4
placement: wall
room_types: barracks, guard-room, garrison, quarters, armory
typical_count: many
clusters_with: bed-small, weapon-rack, footlocker, shield-rack, personal-chest
notes: Soldier's footlocker — rectangular iron-banded wooden chest with heavy metal corners. Placed at the foot of barracks bunks. Militaristic, utilitarian.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.10,0.16 1.80,0.68 z 0-1.4

# footprint 1x2: x 0-2, y 0-1
# Top-down: heavy wooden footlocker with broad iron bands and thick metal corner plates

# === Body ===
rect 0.10,0.16 1.80,0.68 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.10,0.16 1.80,0.68 stroke #1a0800 width 2

# === Plank seams (east-west) ===
line 0.12,0.32 1.88,0.32 stroke #2a1400 0.5 width 1
line 0.12,0.50 1.88,0.50 stroke #2a1400 0.55 width 1
line 0.12,0.68 1.88,0.68 stroke #2a1400 0.5 width 1

# === Thick iron bands (north-south, broad) ===
rect 0.40,0.16 0.10,0.68 fill #3a3a3a 0.85
rect 0.40,0.16 0.10,0.68 stroke #1a1a1a
rect 0.94,0.16 0.10,0.68 fill #3a3a3a 0.85
rect 0.94,0.16 0.10,0.68 stroke #1a1a1a
rect 1.48,0.16 0.10,0.68 fill #3a3a3a 0.85
rect 1.48,0.16 0.10,0.68 stroke #1a1a1a

# === Heavy metal corner plates (large, militaristic) ===
# NW
rect 0.10,0.16 0.14,0.06 fill #555555 0.9
rect 0.10,0.16 0.14,0.06 stroke #222222
rect 0.10,0.16 0.06,0.14 fill #555555 0.9
rect 0.10,0.16 0.06,0.14 stroke #222222
# NE
rect 1.76,0.16 0.14,0.06 fill #555555 0.9
rect 1.76,0.16 0.14,0.06 stroke #222222
rect 1.84,0.16 0.06,0.14 fill #555555 0.9
rect 1.84,0.16 0.06,0.14 stroke #222222
# SW
rect 0.10,0.78 0.14,0.06 fill #555555 0.9
rect 0.10,0.78 0.14,0.06 stroke #222222
rect 0.10,0.70 0.06,0.14 fill #555555 0.9
rect 0.10,0.70 0.06,0.14 stroke #222222
# SE
rect 1.76,0.78 0.14,0.06 fill #555555 0.9
rect 1.76,0.78 0.14,0.06 stroke #222222
rect 1.84,0.70 0.06,0.14 fill #555555 0.9
rect 1.84,0.70 0.06,0.14 stroke #222222

# === Rivets on iron bands (bold, militaristic) ===
circle 0.45,0.22 0.020 fill #666666 0.85
circle 0.45,0.22 0.020 stroke #222222
circle 0.45,0.50 0.020 fill #666666 0.85
circle 0.45,0.50 0.020 stroke #222222
circle 0.45,0.78 0.020 fill #666666 0.85
circle 0.45,0.78 0.020 stroke #222222

circle 0.99,0.22 0.020 fill #666666 0.85
circle 0.99,0.22 0.020 stroke #222222
circle 0.99,0.50 0.020 fill #666666 0.85
circle 0.99,0.50 0.020 stroke #222222
circle 0.99,0.78 0.020 fill #666666 0.85
circle 0.99,0.78 0.020 stroke #222222

circle 1.53,0.22 0.020 fill #666666 0.85
circle 1.53,0.22 0.020 stroke #222222
circle 1.53,0.50 0.020 fill #666666 0.85
circle 1.53,0.50 0.020 stroke #222222
circle 1.53,0.78 0.020 fill #666666 0.85
circle 1.53,0.78 0.020 stroke #222222

# === Hinges (north edge) ===
rect 0.26,0.12 0.14,0.08 fill #444444 0.85
rect 0.26,0.12 0.14,0.08 stroke #1a1a1a
rect 1.60,0.12 0.14,0.08 fill #444444 0.85
rect 1.60,0.12 0.14,0.08 stroke #1a1a1a

# === Heavy iron padlock hasp (south front) ===
rect 0.86,0.80 0.28,0.08 fill #444444 0.9
rect 0.86,0.80 0.28,0.08 stroke #1a1a1a
# Padlock body
rect 0.94,0.86 0.12,0.06 fill #333333 0.95
rect 0.94,0.86 0.12,0.06 stroke #1a1a1a
# Lock shackle
arc 1.00,0.84 0.04 180 360 stroke #666666 width 2
# Keyhole on lock
circle 1.00,0.89 0.015 fill #1a0800 0.95

# === Stencilled unit number on lid ===
rect 0.24,0.40 0.12,0.14 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1
line 0.26,0.44 0.26,0.50 stroke #8b7355 0.5 width 1
line 0.30,0.44 0.30,0.50 stroke #8b7355 0.5 width 1
line 0.26,0.46 0.30,0.46 stroke #8b7355 0.5 width 1
props.forge:
name: Forge
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 3
placement: wall
room_types: forge, smithy
typical_count: single
clusters_with: anvil, bellows, trough, workbench
lights: [{"preset":"forge","x":1.0,"y":1.0}]
notes: Domed brick forge; open at south. Pair with anvil, bellows, trough.
---
# Hitbox: dome blocks light, not the open mouth area
hitbox circle 1.0,0.9 0.85 z 0-3

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: circular domed brick forge, open mouth at south, chimney hole on top

# === Fire glow spilling out the front opening (drawn first, behind everything) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.8 0.35,0.2 fill #ff8800 0.15
ellipse 1.0,1.7 0.25,0.15 fill #ffaa00 0.1

# === Circular dome — each ring uses a different texture for depth ===

# Outermost ring (base of dome, darkest, rough stone)
circle 1.0,0.9 0.85 texfill polyhaven/cobblestone_floor_01 0.8
circle 1.0,0.9 0.85 stroke #1a1a1a
# Darken the outer edge
circle 1.0,0.9 0.85 fill #1a0a05 0.2

# Ring 2 — dark brick
circle 1.0,0.9 0.72 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.85
circle 1.0,0.9 0.72 stroke #1a1a1a

# Ring 3 — stone wall (lighter, higher on dome)
circle 1.0,0.9 0.58 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.75
circle 1.0,0.9 0.58 stroke #1a1a1a

# Ring 4 — granite (smoother, near the top)
circle 1.0,0.9 0.44 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.7
circle 1.0,0.9 0.44 stroke #1a1a1a
# Slight warm glow from fire inside
circle 1.0,0.9 0.44 fill #cc5500 0.04

# Ring 5 — cracked rock (closest to chimney, heat-worn)
circle 1.0,0.9 0.3 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.7
circle 1.0,0.9 0.3 stroke #1a1a1a
# Warm glow bleeding through near chimney
circle 1.0,0.9 0.3 fill #cc5500 0.08

# Radial brick joint lines (spokes, visible across all rings)
line 1.0,0.05 1.0,0.6 stroke #1a1a1a
line 0.35,0.4 0.65,0.7 stroke #1a1a1a
line 1.65,0.4 1.35,0.7 stroke #1a1a1a
line 0.2,0.75 0.55,0.85 stroke #1a1a1a
line 1.8,0.75 1.45,0.85 stroke #1a1a1a
line 0.18,1.1 0.55,1.0 stroke #1a1a1a
line 1.82,1.1 1.45,1.0 stroke #1a1a1a

# === Chimney opening (centered on dome at 1.0, 0.9) ===
# Smoke/heat haze
circle 1.0,0.9 0.28 fill #333333 0.12
# Chimney opening
circle 1.0,0.9 0.18 fill #0a0500 0.75
circle 1.0,0.9 0.18 stroke #222222
# Inner soot ring
circle 1.0,0.9 0.14 stroke #1a1a1a
# Heat shimmer from chimney
circle 1.0,0.9 0.08 fill #cc3300 0.15

# === Front opening (south) — integrated into the dome shape ===
# The opening is part of the circle — thick brick arch curves around the mouth
# Dark interior visible through the opening (wedge shape from dome edge inward)
poly 0.65,1.5 0.7,1.72 1.3,1.72 1.35,1.5 fill #1a0800 0.75

# Arch — two thick curved brick pillars forming the mouth sides
# Left arch pillar (follows dome curve)
poly 0.55,1.25 0.62,1.2 0.68,1.55 0.62,1.72 0.55,1.72 0.48,1.45 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.88
poly 0.55,1.25 0.62,1.2 0.68,1.55 0.62,1.72 0.55,1.72 0.48,1.45 stroke #1a1a1a
# Right arch pillar
poly 1.38,1.2 1.45,1.25 1.52,1.45 1.45,1.72 1.38,1.72 1.32,1.55 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.88
poly 1.38,1.2 1.45,1.25 1.52,1.45 1.45,1.72 1.38,1.72 1.32,1.55 stroke #1a1a1a

# Arch mantle (curved brick piece spanning across top of opening)
# Connects the two pillars and blends into the dome
poly 0.52,1.22 0.62,1.18 0.75,1.4 0.85,1.48 1.0,1.5 1.15,1.48 1.25,1.4 1.38,1.18 1.48,1.22 1.42,1.3 1.28,1.48 1.15,1.55 1.0,1.58 0.85,1.55 0.72,1.48 0.58,1.3 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.9

props.fume-hood:
name: Fume Hood
category: Workshop
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 3
placement: wall
room_types: alchemy-lab, laboratory, workshop-artificer
typical_count: single
clusters_with: alchemy-bench, alembic, brewing-kettle, crucible, bellows
notes: Stone/metal ventilation hood suspended over an alchemy workbench — catches vapors and draws them up a chimney. Wall-mounted along north. From above: overhang skirt visible, chimney flue in the back, faint vapor glow beneath.
lights: [{"preset":"eldritch-glow","x":1.0,"y":0.5,"radius":2,"intensity":0.2}]
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.08,0.06 1.84,0.60 z 0-3

# footprint 1x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-1
# Top-down: wide trapezoidal hood that widens toward the south (overhanging the bench), chimney flue exits the top at north, faint colored glow of vapors beneath

# === Faint vapor glow spreading south below the hood skirt ===
ellipse 1.00,0.74 0.70,0.12 fill #44aa66 0.2
ellipse 1.00,0.70 0.58,0.10 fill #66cc88 0.15
ellipse 1.00,0.66 0.45,0.08 fill #88ee99 0.12

# === Chimney flue (circular pipe where hood vents up through ceiling) ===
# Flue base plate
rect 0.78,0.06 0.44,0.18 fill #555555 0.95
rect 0.78,0.06 0.44,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.55
rect 0.78,0.06 0.44,0.18 stroke #222222 width 2
# Flue collar
circle 1.00,0.16 0.14 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.00,0.16 0.14 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.5
circle 1.00,0.16 0.14 stroke #111111 width 2
# Inner flue opening (dark)
circle 1.00,0.16 0.09 fill #0a0404 0.95
circle 1.00,0.16 0.09 stroke #1a0a06 width 2
# Soot staining inner rim
circle 1.00,0.16 0.07 stroke #2a1400 0.8 width 1
# Rising smoke puff (seen from above as small gray halo)
circle 1.00,0.16 0.06 fill #666666 0.35
circle 1.00,0.16 0.04 fill #888888 0.3

# === Rivets securing flue to back plate ===
circle 0.83,0.10 0.018 fill #0a0a0a 0.95
circle 1.17,0.10 0.018 fill #0a0a0a 0.95
circle 0.83,0.20 0.018 fill #0a0a0a 0.95
circle 1.17,0.20 0.018 fill #0a0a0a 0.95

# === Hood body (stone/metal trapezoid, widens toward the south) ===
# The hood's wider lower skirt extends past the footprint of the flue
poly 0.20,0.22 1.80,0.22 1.88,0.58 0.12,0.58 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.65
poly 0.20,0.22 1.80,0.22 1.88,0.58 0.12,0.58 fill #3a342c 0.5
poly 0.20,0.22 1.80,0.22 1.88,0.58 0.12,0.58 stroke #1a1a1a width 2

# Inner shadow (depth of hood cavity)
poly 0.26,0.26 1.74,0.26 1.82,0.54 0.18,0.54 fill #1a1008 0.55

# === Structural ribs on the hood face (visible from above) ===
line 0.40,0.22 0.35,0.58 stroke #1a1a1a 0.75 width 2
line 0.70,0.22 0.68,0.58 stroke #1a1a1a 0.7 width 2
line 1.00,0.22 1.00,0.58 stroke #1a1a1a 0.75 width 2
line 1.30,0.22 1.32,0.58 stroke #1a1a1a 0.7 width 2
line 1.60,0.22 1.65,0.58 stroke #1a1a1a 0.75 width 2

# === Lip / reinforcement band along the south skirt edge ===
poly 0.12,0.58 1.88,0.58 1.86,0.64 0.14,0.64 fill #1a1a1a 0.9
poly 0.12,0.58 1.88,0.58 1.86,0.64 0.14,0.64 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.4
poly 0.12,0.58 1.88,0.58 1.86,0.64 0.14,0.64 stroke #0a0a0a

# Corner brace plates
rect 0.12,0.58 0.08,0.06 fill #0a0a0a 0.95
rect 1.80,0.58 0.08,0.06 fill #0a0a0a 0.95

# === Sooty stains on the inner face ===
ellipse 0.48,0.44 0.18,0.06 fill #0a0604 0.55
ellipse 1.00,0.46 0.20,0.06 fill #0a0604 0.6
ellipse 1.52,0.44 0.18,0.06 fill #0a0604 0.55

# === Condensed droplets / greasy streaks (running south from the soot patches) ===
line 0.48,0.48 0.50,0.58 stroke #1a1008 0.6 width 1
line 1.00,0.50 1.00,0.60 stroke #1a1008 0.65 width 1
line 1.52,0.48 1.54,0.58 stroke #1a1008 0.6 width 1

# === Vapor wisps curling out from under the skirt (alchemical green glow) ===
bezier 0.40,0.66 0.36,0.72 0.44,0.78 0.40,0.84 stroke #66dd88 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.80,0.66 0.84,0.74 0.78,0.80 0.82,0.86 stroke #88ee99 0.55 width 2
bezier 1.20,0.66 1.16,0.74 1.22,0.80 1.18,0.86 stroke #66dd88 0.5 width 2
bezier 1.60,0.66 1.64,0.72 1.58,0.78 1.62,0.84 stroke #88ee99 0.55 width 2

# === Chain suspension (thin chains from ceiling — visible as small circles at the corners of the skirt) ===
circle 0.14,0.58 0.022 fill #555555 0.9
circle 0.14,0.58 0.022 stroke #222222
circle 1.86,0.58 0.022 fill #555555 0.9
circle 1.86,0.58 0.022 stroke #222222

ellipse 0.14,0.38 0.014,0.02 stroke #555555 width 1
ellipse 0.14,0.30 0.014,0.02 stroke #555555 width 1
ellipse 1.86,0.46 0.014,0.02 stroke #555555 width 1
ellipse 1.86,0.38 0.014,0.02 stroke #555555 width 1
ellipse 1.86,0.30 0.014,0.02 stroke #555555 width 1

# === Hood sheen highlight ===
line 0.24,0.26 1.76,0.26 stroke #888888 0.45 width 1

ellipse 1.50,1.82 0.08,0.06 fill #3a2000 0.85

ellipse 1.12,0.34 0.06,0.04 fill #6a4020 0.6

circle 1.085,0.398 0.006 fill #ffeecc 0.8

props.gaffer-bench:
name: Gaffer Bench
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.9
placement: center
room_types: glassworks, workshop
typical_count: single
clusters_with: annealing-oven, bucket-water, color-rod-bundle, jack-tool
notes: Glassblower's bench — wood plank seat with two long iron rails for rolling the blowpipe, marver plate at one end. Front faces south.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.15,0.2 1.7,1.5

# footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2. Rails run north-south along the bench length.

# === Wood plank surface ===
rect 0.15,0.2 1.7,1.5 texfill polyhaven/wood_table 0.88
rect 0.15,0.2 1.7,1.5 stroke #3a1f00

# Plank seams (lengthwise)
line 0.15,0.65 1.85,0.65 stroke #2a1400 0.5
line 0.15,1.25 1.85,1.25 stroke #2a1400 0.5

# === Leg shadow corners (implying bench legs beneath) ===
circle 0.24,0.28 0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.45
circle 1.76,0.28 0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.45
circle 0.24,1.62 0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.45
circle 1.76,1.62 0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.45

# === Two iron rails running the length (north-south) for rolling the pipe ===
rect 0.42,0.28 0.08,1.35 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 0.42,0.28 0.08,1.35 stroke #222222
rect 1.50,0.28 0.08,1.35 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 1.50,0.28 0.08,1.35 stroke #222222

# Rail highlights
line 0.46,0.30 0.46,1.61 stroke #8899aa 0.5
line 1.54,0.30 1.54,1.61 stroke #8899aa 0.5

# Rail mounting brackets (north ends)
rect 0.38,0.25 0.16,0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
rect 0.38,0.25 0.16,0.08 stroke #222222
rect 1.46,0.25 0.16,0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
rect 1.46,0.25 0.16,0.08 stroke #222222
# South ends
rect 0.38,1.58 0.16,0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
rect 0.38,1.58 0.16,0.08 stroke #222222
rect 1.46,1.58 0.16,0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
rect 1.46,1.58 0.16,0.08 stroke #222222

# === Marver plate (dark flat metal slab at south end, between rails) ===
rect 0.70,1.35 0.60,0.30 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 0.70,1.35 0.60,0.30 stroke #222222
rect 0.72,1.37 0.56,0.26 fill #333333 0.35
props.gallows:
name: Gallows
category: Prison
footprint: 4x4
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 8
placement: center
room_types: prison, courtyard, execution-ground
typical_count: single
clusters_with: execution-block, pillory, stocks
notes: Execution structure; place prominently with viewing space. Steps face south.
---
# === HITBOX ===
# Raised platform + steps (wide, low)
hitbox rect 0.2,0.2 3.6,3.7 z 0-3
# Left upright post
hitbox rect 0.6,0.45 0.32,0.32 z 3-8
# Right upright post
hitbox rect 3.08,0.45 0.32,0.32 z 3-8
# Crossbeam connecting posts at top
hitbox rect 0.76,0.52 2.48,0.18 z 6-8

# Platform base (raised wooden stage)
rect 0.2,0.2 3.6,3.1 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.78
rect 0.2,0.2 3.6,3.1 stroke #4a2800

# Platform edge shadow (subtle depth on east/south)
rect 0.2,3.2 3.6,0.1 fill #000000 0.12
rect 3.7,0.2 0.1,3.1 fill #000000 0.1

# Plank line details on platform surface
line 0.2,0.65 3.8,0.65 stroke #3a1f00
line 0.2,1.15 3.8,1.15 stroke #3a1f00
line 0.2,1.65 3.8,1.65 stroke #3a1f00
line 0.2,2.15 3.8,2.15 stroke #3a1f00
line 0.2,2.65 3.8,2.65 stroke #3a1f00

# Railing — north edge
rect 0.2,0.2 3.6,0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.2,0.2 3.6,0.08 stroke #2a1400

# Railing — west edge
rect 0.2,0.2 0.08,3.1 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.2,0.2 0.08,3.1 stroke #2a1400

# Railing — east edge
rect 3.72,0.2 0.08,3.1 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 3.72,0.2 0.08,3.1 stroke #2a1400

# Railing post — NW corner
rect 0.15,0.15 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.15,0.15 0.18,0.18 stroke #2a1400

# Railing post — NE corner
rect 3.67,0.15 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 3.67,0.15 0.18,0.18 stroke #2a1400

# Railing post — SW corner (flanking steps)
rect 0.15,3.12 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.15,3.12 0.18,0.18 stroke #2a1400

# Railing post — SE corner (flanking steps)
rect 3.67,3.12 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 3.67,3.12 0.18,0.18 stroke #2a1400

# Gallows upright post — left (west side, from above: square cross-section)
rect 0.6,0.45 0.32,0.32 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.6,0.45 0.32,0.32 stroke #2a1400

# Gallows upright post — right (east side)
rect 3.08,0.45 0.32,0.32 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 3.08,0.45 0.32,0.32 stroke #2a1400

# Crossbeam connecting the two posts (seen from above as a thick bar)
rect 0.76,0.52 2.48,0.18 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.76,0.52 2.48,0.18 stroke #2a1400

# Diagonal brace — left post to beam (top-down: angled line)
line 0.68,0.77 1.1,0.58 stroke #3a1f00
line 0.7,0.79 1.12,0.6 stroke #2a1400

# Diagonal brace — right post to beam
line 3.32,0.77 2.9,0.58 stroke #3a1f00
line 3.34,0.79 2.92,0.6 stroke #2a1400

# Rope line from crossbeam down to noose
line 2.0,0.61 2.0,1.0 stroke #8b7355

# Noose loop (small rope circle hanging below crossbeam)
circle 2.0,1.14 0.14 stroke #8b7355
# Noose knot (thicker bit at top of loop)
circle 2.0,1.0 0.05 fill #6b4e2e 0.9

# Trapdoor panel (different wood tone, slightly inset)
rect 1.1,0.9 1.8,1.4 texfill polyhaven/worn_planks 0.82
rect 1.1,0.9 1.8,1.4 stroke #3a1f00

# Trapdoor plank lines (perpendicular to platform planks for contrast)
line 1.5,0.9 1.5,2.3 stroke #4a2800
line 1.9,0.9 1.9,2.3 stroke #4a2800
line 2.3,0.9 2.3,2.3 stroke #4a2800

# Trapdoor hinge — left (metal strips along west edge)
rect 1.1,1.15 0.06,0.22 fill #666666 0.8
rect 1.1,1.15 0.06,0.22 stroke #444444
rect 1.1,1.65 0.06,0.22 fill #666666 0.8
rect 1.1,1.65 0.06,0.22 stroke #444444

# Trapdoor hinge pins
circle 1.13,1.26 0.025 fill #888888 0.9
circle 1.13,1.76 0.025 fill #888888 0.9

# Trapdoor latch (east edge, metal bolt)
rect 2.84,1.45 0.12,0.06 fill #555555 0.85
rect 2.84,1.45 0.12,0.06 stroke #333333
rect 2.78,1.42 0.08,0.12 fill #555555 0.85
rect 2.78,1.42 0.08,0.12 stroke #333333

# Lever mechanism (next to trapdoor, east side)
rect 3.2,1.2 0.12,0.8 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 3.2,1.2 0.12,0.8 stroke #2a1400
# Lever handle knob
circle 3.26,1.2 0.07 fill #444444 0.8
circle 3.26,1.2 0.07 stroke #333333
# Lever pivot bolt
circle 3.26,2.0 0.04 fill #666666 0.9

# Steps — south side (three steps getting wider, ascending north)
# Bottom step (widest, southernmost)
rect 1.0,3.55 2.0,0.35 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.72
rect 1.0,3.55 2.0,0.35 stroke #4a2800
line 1.0,3.72 3.0,3.72 stroke #3a1f00

# Middle step
rect 1.15,3.3 1.7,0.28 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.75
rect 1.15,3.3 1.7,0.28 stroke #4a2800
line 1.15,3.44 2.85,3.44 stroke #3a1f00

# Top step (narrowest, meets platform)
rect 1.3,3.08 1.4,0.24 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.78
rect 1.3,3.08 1.4,0.24 stroke #4a2800

# Step side rail — left
line 1.0,3.9 1.3,3.08 stroke #3a1f00
# Step side rail — right
line 3.0,3.9 2.7,3.08 stroke #3a1f00

# Nail heads on platform (scattered dark dots for texture)
circle 0.55,1.4 0.02 fill #333333 0.7
circle 1.8,0.42 0.02 fill #333333 0.7
circle 3.4,1.9 0.02 fill #333333 0.7
circle 0.9,2.5 0.02 fill #333333 0.7
circle 2.6,2.7 0.02 fill #333333 0.7
circle 3.1,0.95 0.02 fill #333333 0.7
props.gallows-triple:
name: Triple Gallows
category: Prison
footprint: 2x3
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 8
placement: center
room_types: roadside-gallows, gibbet-square, courtyard, execution-ground
typical_count: single
clusters_with: gallows, gibbet, crow-perched, tombstone, crypt-entrance
notes: Long crossbeam mounted between two upright posts with three nooses dangling. Top-down: two post squares, thick beam, three rope circles + drape shadow beneath each noose. shadow: no (tall structure — floor shadow is wrong).
---
# footprint 2x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-2

# === HITBOX (tall verticals block light) ===
hitbox rect 0.30,0.30 0.36,0.36 z 3-8
hitbox rect 2.34,0.30 0.36,0.36 z 3-8
hitbox rect 0.66,0.40 1.68,0.18 z 6-8

# === Drape shadow — diffuse area below each noose (mass hanging below) ===
ellipse 0.80,1.30 0.20,0.50 fill #1a1008 0.14
ellipse 1.50,1.30 0.20,0.50 fill #1a1008 0.14
ellipse 2.20,1.30 0.20,0.50 fill #1a1008 0.14

# === Left upright post (square cross-section from above) ===
rect 0.30,0.30 0.36,0.36 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
rect 0.30,0.30 0.36,0.36 stroke #1a0a00
# Post grain
line 0.42,0.32 0.42,0.64 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 0.54,0.32 0.54,0.64 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
# Post base (ground plate shadow)
rect 0.22,0.24 0.52,0.48 stroke #3a1f00 0.4

# === Right upright post ===
rect 2.34,0.30 0.36,0.36 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
rect 2.34,0.30 0.36,0.36 stroke #1a0a00
line 2.46,0.32 2.46,0.64 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 2.58,0.32 2.58,0.64 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
rect 2.26,0.24 0.52,0.48 stroke #3a1f00 0.4

# === Crossbeam (thick horizontal bar connecting posts) ===
rect 0.66,0.40 1.68,0.18 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.66,0.40 1.68,0.18 stroke #1a0a00
# Beam grain lines
line 0.68,0.46 2.32,0.46 stroke #2a1400 0.6
line 0.68,0.52 2.32,0.52 stroke #2a1400 0.6
# Iron bracket where beam meets left post
rect 0.62,0.36 0.10,0.26 fill #555555 0.8
rect 0.62,0.36 0.10,0.26 stroke #333333
circle 0.67,0.42 0.02 fill #888888 0.8
circle 0.67,0.56 0.02 fill #888888 0.8
# Iron bracket where beam meets right post
rect 2.28,0.36 0.10,0.26 fill #555555 0.8
rect 2.28,0.36 0.10,0.26 stroke #333333
circle 2.33,0.42 0.02 fill #888888 0.8
circle 2.33,0.56 0.02 fill #888888 0.8

# === Diagonal braces (post to beam) ===
line 0.64,0.64 0.78,0.52 stroke #2a1400 width 2
line 2.36,0.64 2.22,0.52 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# === Noose 1 (above left — left of beam center) ===
# Rope from beam to loop
line 0.80,0.58 0.80,1.10 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 0.80,0.58 0.80,1.10 stroke #5c3a1e width 1
# Noose loop (seen from above as small circle)
circle 0.80,1.22 0.12 stroke #8b7355 width 3
circle 0.80,1.22 0.12 stroke #5c3a1e width 1
# Knot (thicker bit at top of loop)
circle 0.80,1.10 0.05 fill #6b4e2e 0.95
circle 0.80,1.10 0.05 stroke #3a2410

# === Noose 2 (center) ===
line 1.50,0.58 1.50,1.10 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 1.50,0.58 1.50,1.10 stroke #5c3a1e width 1
circle 1.50,1.22 0.12 stroke #8b7355 width 3
circle 1.50,1.22 0.12 stroke #5c3a1e width 1
circle 1.50,1.10 0.05 fill #6b4e2e 0.95
circle 1.50,1.10 0.05 stroke #3a2410

# === Noose 3 (right) ===
line 2.20,0.58 2.20,1.10 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 2.20,0.58 2.20,1.10 stroke #5c3a1e width 1
circle 2.20,1.22 0.12 stroke #8b7355 width 3
circle 2.20,1.22 0.12 stroke #5c3a1e width 1
circle 2.20,1.10 0.05 fill #6b4e2e 0.95
circle 2.20,1.10 0.05 stroke #3a2410

# === Crow perched on beam (small detail) ===
ellipse 1.80,0.38 0.05,0.04 fill #0a0608 0.9
circle 1.83,0.36 0.008 fill #ffcc00 0.8
props.game-booth:
name: Game Booth
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: wall
room_types: fairground-seasonal, festival-grounds, village-green, marketplace
typical_count: few
clusters_with: bunting-line, prize-ring, pie-stand, bonfire-large, lantern-paper
notes: Striped red-and-white carnival booth with counter, prize shelf, and awning; place against wall with counter facing south (toward fairgoers)
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: booth with awning visible — back wall north, counter south

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.15,0.10 1.70,1.30 z 0-2.5

# === Awning roof (covers most of booth, red/white striped) ===
# Main awning base
rect 0.05,0.05 1.90,1.00 fill #f8f0e0 0.92
rect 0.05,0.05 1.90,1.00 stroke #2a1400

# Red stripes on awning
rect 0.05,0.05 1.90,0.12 fill #c82020 0.95
rect 0.05,0.29 1.90,0.12 fill #c82020 0.95
rect 0.05,0.53 1.90,0.12 fill #c82020 0.95
rect 0.05,0.77 1.90,0.12 fill #c82020 0.95

# Awning stripe strokes
line 0.05,0.17 1.95,0.17 stroke #5a1010 width 1
line 0.05,0.41 1.95,0.41 stroke #5a1010 width 1
line 0.05,0.65 1.95,0.65 stroke #5a1010 width 1
line 0.05,0.89 1.95,0.89 stroke #5a1010 width 1

# Awning scalloped south edge
arc 0.18,1.05 0.08 0 180 fill #c82020 0.9
arc 0.18,1.05 0.08 0 180 stroke #5a1010
arc 0.40,1.05 0.08 0 180 fill #f8f0e0 0.9
arc 0.40,1.05 0.08 0 180 stroke #2a1400
arc 0.62,1.05 0.08 0 180 fill #c82020 0.9
arc 0.62,1.05 0.08 0 180 stroke #5a1010
arc 0.84,1.05 0.08 0 180 fill #f8f0e0 0.9
arc 0.84,1.05 0.08 0 180 stroke #2a1400
arc 1.06,1.05 0.08 0 180 fill #c82020 0.9
arc 1.06,1.05 0.08 0 180 stroke #5a1010
arc 1.28,1.05 0.08 0 180 fill #f8f0e0 0.9
arc 1.28,1.05 0.08 0 180 stroke #2a1400
arc 1.50,1.05 0.08 0 180 fill #c82020 0.9
arc 1.50,1.05 0.08 0 180 stroke #5a1010
arc 1.72,1.05 0.08 0 180 fill #f8f0e0 0.9
arc 1.72,1.05 0.08 0 180 stroke #2a1400

# === Counter (south edge, visible as wood beam in front of booth) ===
rect 0.15,1.20 1.70,0.22 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.15,1.20 1.70,0.22 stroke #2a1400

# Prizes / stuffed animals on counter (peek visible)
circle 0.35,1.30 0.06 fill #ffcc20 0.9
circle 0.35,1.30 0.06 stroke #8b6914
circle 0.70,1.30 0.055 fill #c82020 0.9
circle 0.70,1.30 0.055 stroke #5a1010
circle 1.00,1.30 0.06 fill #3080c0 0.9
circle 1.00,1.30 0.06 stroke #1a4080
circle 1.30,1.30 0.055 fill #40a040 0.9
circle 1.30,1.30 0.055 stroke #1a4a1a
circle 1.60,1.30 0.06 fill #ffcc20 0.9
circle 1.60,1.30 0.06 stroke #8b6914

# === Corner support posts (visible as circles where awning meets counter) ===
circle 0.15,1.20 0.06 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
circle 0.15,1.20 0.06 stroke #2a1400
circle 1.85,1.20 0.06 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
circle 1.85,1.20 0.06 stroke #2a1400

# === Signage / banner on top of awning ===
rect 0.40,0.00 1.20,0.12 fill #daa520 0.9
rect 0.40,0.00 1.20,0.12 stroke #5a3a00
# Sign text (stylized stripes suggesting lettering)
line 0.50,0.06 0.56,0.06 stroke #1a1408 width 2
line 0.60,0.04 0.66,0.08 stroke #1a1408 width 2
line 0.70,0.06 0.76,0.06 stroke #1a1408 width 2
line 0.80,0.04 0.86,0.08 stroke #1a1408 width 2
line 0.90,0.06 0.98,0.06 stroke #1a1408 width 2
line 1.02,0.04 1.08,0.08 stroke #1a1408 width 2
line 1.12,0.06 1.18,0.06 stroke #1a1408 width 2
line 1.22,0.04 1.30,0.08 stroke #1a1408 width 2
line 1.36,0.06 1.44,0.06 stroke #1a1408 width 2
line 1.48,0.04 1.54,0.08 stroke #1a1408 width 2

# Small pennant flags on corners
poly 0.05,0.05 0.18,0.00 0.05,0.00 fill #3080c0 0.95
poly 0.05,0.05 0.18,0.00 0.05,0.00 stroke #1a4080

props.game-piece:
name: Game Pieces
category: Combat
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: command-room, war-room, tavern, barracks, study
typical_count: few
clusters_with: sand-table, map-scroll, dagger-through-map, desk
notes: Scatter of small wooden strategy tokens (circles and squares); place on tables or sand-tables for war-room feel
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: 4-6 small game pieces (mix of round and square tokens) scattered

# === Round tokens (officer/cavalry pieces) ===
# Red token 1
circle 0.30,0.36 0.06 fill #8b2020 0.85
circle 0.30,0.36 0.06 stroke #5a1010
circle 0.30,0.36 0.03 fill #aa3030 0.5

# Red token 2
circle 0.62,0.28 0.05 fill #8b2020 0.8
circle 0.62,0.28 0.05 stroke #5a1010

# Blue token (enemy marker)
circle 0.74,0.62 0.06 fill #2a488a 0.85
circle 0.74,0.62 0.06 stroke #1a2a5a
circle 0.74,0.62 0.03 fill #3a5aaa 0.5

# === Square tokens (infantry/fortress pieces) ===
# Dark wood square 1
rect 0.40,0.52 0.10,0.10 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.40,0.52 0.10,0.10 stroke #2a1400

# Dark wood square 2
rect 0.22,0.64 0.08,0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.8

line 1.0,0.86 1.60,1.46 stroke #4a2010 0.5

line 1.0,0.86 1.70,0.56 stroke #4a2010 0.4

line 1.0,0.86 1.70,1.16 stroke #4a2010 0.4

circle 1.40,1.00 0.05 stroke #8a7060

circle 1.50,0.80 0.04 fill #e8dcc8 0.85

circle 1.60,1.10 0.025 fill #d4c4a8 0.8
circle 0.80,1.30 0.025 fill #d4c4a8 0.8

props.gibbet:

notes: Hanging cage on wooden post; place against walls.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.18,0.72 0.50,0.56 z 0-7
hitbox rect 0.55,0.88 0.90,0.24 z 5-7

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: post at left, arm extending right, cage directly under arm tip
# From above, the cage overlaps the arm end (it hangs below it)

# === Cage (drawn first — it's below the arm) ===
# Cage outer ring
circle 1.35,1.0 0.5 fill #444444 0.15
circle 1.35,1.0 0.5 stroke #555555
# Cage inner ring
circle 1.35,1.0 0.42 stroke #555555

line 0.98,0.63 1.72,1.37 stroke #555555
line 1.72,0.63 0.98,1.37 stroke #555555

circle 1.35,1.5 0.025 fill #777777 0.6
circle 0.85,1.0 0.025 fill #777777 0.6
circle 1.85,1.0 0.025 fill #777777 0.6

rect 0.55,0.88 0.9,0.24 stroke #2a1400

line 0.58,1.04 1.42,1.04 stroke #2a1400

# Chain attachment point (where arm meets cage top)

line 0.52,0.74 0.52,1.26 stroke #2a1400

# Iron bracket at junction
rect 0.55,0.82 0.15,0.36 fill #555555 0.7
rect 0.55,0.82 0.15,0.36 stroke #444444

circle 1.0,0.95 0.26 stroke #0a0400 width 2

# Soot-stained inner ring
circle 1.0,0.95 0.22 stroke #2a1000 width 1

# Brighter middle

rect 1.24,0.88 0.06,0.14 fill #daa520 0.9

circle 0.73,0.98 0.018 fill #5a3a00 0.9

circle 1.27,0.98 0.018 fill #5a3a00 0.9

ellipse 0.55,1.72 0.10,0.05 stroke #0a0400

ellipse 1.45,1.72 0.10,0.05 fill #2a1800 0.85
ellipse 1.45,1.72 0.10,0.05 stroke #0a0400

props.grain-hopper:
name: Grain Hopper
category: Industrial
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: center
room_types: brewery, mill-grain
typical_count: single
clusters_with: drive-shaft, millstone, flour-sack, grain-spill
notes: Inverted wooden funnel that feeds grain into the millstone; square rim with a narrowing throat and some spillage at the corners
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.12,0.12 1.76,1.76 z 0-2.5

# Outer wooden rim (the wide top opening of the hopper)
rect 0.12,0.12 1.76,1.76 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.12,0.12 1.76,1.76 stroke #1a1208 width 2
# Outer rim plank seams
line 0.12,0.60 1.88,0.60 stroke #2a1400 0.55
line 0.12,1.00 1.88,1.00 stroke #2a1400 0.55
line 0.12,1.40 1.88,1.40 stroke #2a1400 0.55
line 0.60,0.12 0.60,1.88 stroke #2a1400 0.45
line 1.00,0.12 1.00,1.88 stroke #2a1400 0.45
line 1.40,0.12 1.40,1.88 stroke #2a1400 0.45

# Iron corner brackets (reinforcing the frame)
rect 0.12,0.12 0.22,0.10 fill #555555 0.85
rect 0.12,0.12 0.22,0.10 stroke #222222
rect 1.66,0.12 0.22,0.10 fill #555555 0.85
rect 1.66,0.12 0.22,0.10 stroke #222222
rect 0.12,1.78 0.22,0.10 fill #555555 0.85
rect 0.12,1.78 0.22,0.10 stroke #222222
rect 1.66,1.78 0.22,0.10 fill #555555 0.85
rect 1.66,1.78 0.22,0.10 stroke #222222

# Inner funnel rim — second tier going down
rect 0.34,0.34 1.32,1.32 texfill polyhaven/worn_planks 0.85
rect 0.34,0.34 1.32,1.32 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# Funnel shadow (angled sides of the cone narrowing inward)
poly 0.34,0.34 1.66,0.34 1.30,0.78 0.70,0.78 fill #1a1208 0.35
poly 1.66,0.34 1.66,1.66 1.30,1.22 1.30,0.78 fill #1a1208 0.45
poly 1.66,1.66 0.34,1.66 0.70,1.22 1.30,1.22 fill #1a1208 0.55
poly 0.34,1.66 0.34,0.34 0.70,0.78 0.70,1.22 fill #1a1208 0.40

# Inner throat (narrow square opening where grain falls through)
rect 0.78,0.78 0.44,0.44 fill #0a0604 0.95
rect 0.78,0.78 0.44,0.44 stroke #1a1208 width 2
# A few grain kernels caught visible in the throat
circle 0.88,0.92 0.025 fill #d4b890 0.85
circle 1.08,0.88 0.022 fill #c8a878 0.80
circle 0.96,1.08 0.024 fill #d4b890 0.80
circle 1.12,1.12 0.020 fill #b89868 0.75

# Grain spillage at the rim corners

circle 0.26,0.18 0.022 fill #c8a878 0.80
circle 0.18,0.30 0.020 fill #d4b890 0.75
circle 1.78,0.24 0.025 fill #c8a878 0.80
circle 1.82,0.18 0.020 fill #d4b890 0.75
circle 0.22,1.80 0.024 fill #d4b890 0.80
circle 1.80,1.78 0.026 fill #c8a878 0.85
circle 1.76,1.82 0.020 fill #d4b890 0.75
props.grain-sack:
name: Grain Sack
category: Containers
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.0
placement: floor
room_types: pantry, mill-workshop, dock-warehouse, farmhouse-kitchen, peasant-hovel
typical_count: few
clusters_with: sack, sack-stack, crate, barrel, pantry-shelf
notes: Full linen sack of grain — fuller and rounder than generic sack, with a small spill of yellow grain at the base
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox ellipse 0.5,0.52 0.34,0.32 z 0-1.0

# Main sack body — fuller, rounder than generic sack
ellipse 0.5,0.52 0.34,0.32 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.9
ellipse 0.5,0.52 0.34,0.32 fill #c8b088 0.3
ellipse 0.5,0.52 0.34,0.32 stroke #4a3018
# Rounded content bulges (grain filling evenly)
ellipse 0.40,0.46 0.12,0.10 fill #d8c398 0.45
ellipse 0.60,0.50 0.12,0.10 fill #d8c398 0.45
ellipse 0.48,0.64 0.14,0.08 fill #d8c398 0.45
# Soft center crease
line 0.50,0.28 0.50,0.78 stroke #5c4028 0.5
# Drawstring gather at top
ellipse 0.50,0.28 0.10,0.04 fill #4a3018 0.9
ellipse 0.50,0.28 0.10,0.04 stroke #2a1810
# Drawstring tails poking up
bezier 0.46,0.26 0.42,0.22 0.40,0.18 0.38,0.14 stroke #5c4028 width 2
bezier 0.54,0.26 0.58,0.22 0.60,0.18 0.62,0.14 stroke #5c4028 width 2
# Knot
circle 0.50,0.24 0.025 fill #2a1810 0.9
# Burlap weave cross-hatching
line 0.32,0.44 0.34,0.46 stroke #4a3018 0.4
line 0.64,0.50 0.66,0.52 stroke #4a3018 0.4
line 0.40,0.66 0.42,0.68 stroke #4a3018 0.4
# Highlight on upper curve
arc 0.5,0.52 0.32 210 320 stroke #e8d0a0 0.35 width 1
# Small grain spill at base (3 yellow specks scattered at SE)
circle 0.78,0.78 0.022 fill #e8c868 0.9
circle 0.80,0.82 0.018 fill #e8c868 0.85
circle 0.74,0.82 0.020 fill #d8b858 0.85
# Faint spill shadow
ellipse 0.78,0.82 0.08,0.04 fill #3a2810 0.2

props.grand-staircase:
name: Grand Staircase
category: Structure
footprint: 3x3
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 4
placement: wall
room_types: mansion-grand-hall, manor-foyer, noble-villa, reception-hall, estate, great-hall
typical_count: single
clusters_with: banner-heraldic, tapestry-large, statue-noble, coat-rack-ornate
notes: Base landing of a grand staircase ascending north. Marble steps with ornate balustrades on each side and a central carpet runner.
---
# footprint 3x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-3

# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.40,0.10 2.20,2.80

# Base landing platform (full footprint marble)
rect 0.10,0.10 2.80,2.80 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.88
rect 0.10,0.10 2.80,2.80 stroke #777777 width 2

# Left balustrade solid rail (west side, continuous strip)
rect 0.10,0.10 0.30,2.70 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.92
rect 0.10,0.10 0.30,2.70 stroke #666666 width 2

# Right balustrade solid rail (east side)
rect 2.60,0.10 0.30,2.70 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.92
rect 2.60,0.10 0.30,2.70 stroke #666666 width 2

# Left balustrade top-cap line (highlight)
line 0.40,0.10 0.40,2.80 stroke #aaaaaa width 2

# Right balustrade top-cap line
line 2.60,0.10 2.60,2.80 stroke #aaaaaa width 2

# Balustrade posts/spindles visible as small circles along the rails (west)
circle 0.25,0.40 0.08 fill #aaaaaa 0.85
circle 0.25,0.40 0.08 stroke #555555
circle 0.25,0.90 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 0.25,1.40 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 0.25,1.90 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 0.25,2.40 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8

# Balustrade posts (east)
circle 2.75,0.40 0.08 fill #aaaaaa 0.85
circle 2.75,0.40 0.08 stroke #555555
circle 2.75,0.90 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 2.75,1.40 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 2.75,1.90 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 2.75,2.40 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8

# Newel posts at south end (ornate large knobs at base of rail)
circle 0.25,2.70 0.14 fill #f8f0e0 0.95
circle 0.25,2.70 0.14 stroke #555555 width 2
circle 0.25,2.70 0.08 fill #daa520 0.85
circle 0.25,2.70 0.08 stroke #5a3a00

circle 2.75,2.70 0.14 fill #f8f0e0 0.95
circle 2.75,2.70 0.14 stroke #555555 width 2
circle 2.75,2.70 0.08 fill #daa520 0.85
circle 2.75,2.70 0.08 stroke #5a3a00

# Central stair steps ascending north — a series of horizontal lines (each is a step edge)
# Step edges drawn as shadow lines (strong at south end, fade up)
rect 0.40,0.20 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.90
rect 0.40,0.50 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.88
rect 0.40,0.80 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.86
rect 0.40,1.10 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.84
rect 0.40,1.40 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.82
rect 0.40,1.70 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.80
rect 0.40,2.00 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.78
rect 0.40,2.30 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.76

# Step edge shadow lines (the line between each tread/riser)
line 0.40,0.50 2.60,0.50 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,0.80 2.60,0.80 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,1.10 2.60,1.10 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,1.40 2.60,1.40 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,1.70 2.60,1.70 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,2.00 2.60,2.00 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,2.30 2.60,2.30 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,2.60 2.60,2.60 stroke #444444 width 2

# Carpet runner down center of staircase (deep red with gold trim)
rect 0.80,0.15 1.40,2.70 texfill polyhaven/floral_jacquard 0.8
rect 0.80,0.15 1.40,2.70 fill #5a1a1a 0.55
rect 0.80,0.15 1.40,2.70 stroke #2a0810 width 2

# Carpet gold trim stripes
line 0.86,0.15 0.86,2.85 stroke #daa520 width 2
line 2.14,0.15 2.14,2.85 stroke #daa520 width 2

# Carpet tassel/fringe at south base
line 0.82,2.86 0.82,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 0.92,2.86 0.92,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.02,2.86 1.02,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.12,2.86 1.12,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.22,2.86 1.22,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.32,2.86 1.32,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.42,2.86 1.42,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.52,2.86 1.52,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.62,2.86 1.62,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.72,2.86 1.72,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.82,2.86 1.82,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.92,2.86 1.92,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 2.02,2.86 2.02,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 2.12,2.86 2.12,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
props.grandfather-clock:
name: Grandfather Clock
category: Furniture
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 6
placement: wall
room_types: house-merchant, mansion-grand-hall, mansion-library, noble-solar
typical_count: single
clusters_with: tapestry, wall-sconce, bust-on-pedestal, carpet
notes: Tall narrow long-case clock — from top-down only the decorative crown cap is visible (face, pendulum, case body are on the south front)
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.30,0.06 0.40,0.70 z 0-6

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1. Wall at north, face on south.
# Top-down: narrow rectangle of the clock crown + case top.

# Shadow gap at wall (north edge)
rect 0.26,0.02 0.48,0.04 fill #000000 0.2

# Crown pediment (widest ornamental top — broken arch shape)
poly 0.24,0.06 0.76,0.06 0.72,0.16 0.58,0.14 0.50,0.10 0.42,0.14 0.28,0.16 fill #3a1f00 0.95
poly 0.24,0.06 0.76,0.06 0.72,0.16 0.58,0.14 0.50,0.10 0.42,0.14 0.28,0.16 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.55
poly 0.24,0.06 0.76,0.06 0.72,0.16 0.58,0.14 0.50,0.10 0.42,0.14 0.28,0.16 stroke #1a0f00

# Central finial (decorative spire/urn on top — visible from above)
poly 0.46,0.10 0.54,0.10 0.52,0.04 0.50,0.02 0.48,0.04 fill #daa520 0.9
poly 0.46,0.10 0.54,0.10 0.52,0.04 0.50,0.02 0.48,0.04 stroke #5a3a00

# Side finial caps (small brass ornaments on each end of pediment)
circle 0.26,0.10 0.028 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.26,0.10 0.028 stroke #5a3a00
circle 0.74,0.10 0.028 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.74,0.10 0.028 stroke #5a3a00

# Main clock case top (narrow rectangle body)
rect 0.30,0.16 0.40,0.60 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.30,0.16 0.40,0.60 fill #1a0f00 0.3
rect 0.30,0.16 0.40,0.60 stroke #2a1400

# Case top bevel edge
rect 0.32,0.18 0.36,0.56 stroke #5c3a1e 0.55 width 1

# Wood grain lines (along length of case)
line 0.32,0.30 0.68,0.30 stroke #5c3a1e 0.3
line 0.32,0.46 0.68,0.46 stroke #5c3a1e 0.3
line 0.32,0.62 0.68,0.62 stroke #5c3a1e 0.3

# Subtle dust shadow at back (near wall)
rect 0.30,0.18 0.40,0.06 fill #000000 0.1

# Front trim lip (south edge — where clock face panel sits below)
rect 0.30,0.72 0.40,0.06 fill #3a1f00 0.6
rect 0.30,0.72 0.40,0.06 stroke #2a1400

# Glass-panel hint on the front (very faint reflection visible only at edge)
rect 0.34,0.74 0.32,0.02 fill #aaaaaa 0.3

# Carved decorative inlay on top (diamond motif)
poly 0.46,0.40 0.50,0.36 0.54,0.40 0.50,0.44 stroke #5a3a00 0.6 width 1
circle 0.50,0.40 0.012 fill #5a3a00 0.7

# Wood knot detail
circle 0.60,0.56 0.012 fill #2a1400 0.6
circle 0.40,0.34 0.01 fill #2a1400 0.5

# Edge highlight (light catching top edge)
line 0.32,0.18 0.68,0.18 stroke #8b6914 0.35

rect 0.72,0.30 0.10,0.24 fill #ddeeff 0.12

clusters_with: anvil, anvil-devil, forge, forge-great, ingot-stack
notes: Oversized two-handed smithing sledgehammer — iron head at north, long wooden haft running south. Used by fire giants or devil-smiths. Place leaning against an anvil or laid across a workbench.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.18,0.10 0.64,1.80

# footprint 2x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-2 (tall)

# === Subtle ground smudge ===
ellipse 0.50,1.00 0.30,0.90 fill #1a1008 0.14

# === Wooden haft (long shaft running north-south) ===
rect 0.40,0.32 0.20,1.50 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.40,0.32 0.20,1.50 stroke #1a0800 width 2

# Haft grain
line 0.44,0.36 0.44,1.78 stroke #5c3a1e 0.55
line 0.48,0.36 0.48,1.78 stroke #5c3a1e 0.45
line 0.52,0.36 0.52,1.78 stroke #5c3a1e 0.5
line 0.56,0.36 0.56,1.78 stroke #5c3a1e 0.45

# === Leather grip wrap (middle section) ===
rect 0.38,1.00 0.24,0.40 fill #3a2010 0.92
rect 0.38,1.00 0.24,0.40 stroke #1a0800
line 0.38,1.08 0.62,1.08 stroke #1a0800 0.8
line 0.38,1.18 0.62,1.18 stroke #1a0800 0.8
line 0.38,1.28 0.62,1.28 stroke #1a0800 0.8
line 0.38,1.36 0.62,1.36 stroke #1a0800 0.8

# === Iron butt-cap with ring (south end) ===
rect 0.36,1.78 0.28,0.14 fill #333333 0.95
rect 0.36,1.78 0.28,0.14 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.55
rect 0.36,1.78 0.28,0.14 stroke #111111 width 2
circle 0.50,1.86 0.04 fill #444444 0.9
circle 0.50,1.86 0.04 stroke #111111

# === Massive iron head (north end, much wider than haft) ===
rect 0.10,0.12 0.80,0.32 fill #444444 0.95
rect 0.10,0.12 0.80,0.32 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.65
rect 0.10,0.12 0.80,0.32 stroke #111111 width 2

# West striking face (flat, polished)
rect 0.10,0.14 0.10,0.28 fill #777777 0.95
rect 0.10,0.14 0.10,0.28 stroke #111111

# East striking face
rect 0.80,0.14 0.10,0.28 fill #777777 0.95
rect 0.80,0.14 0.10,0.28 stroke #111111

# Eye (where haft enters head)
rect 0.42,0.30 0.16,0.12 fill #1a1008 0.95
rect 0.42,0.30 0.16,0.12 stroke #0a0a0a
# Iron wedge in eye
rect 0.44,0.30 0.04,0.04 fill #222222 0.9
rect 0.52,0.30 0.04,0.04 fill #222222 0.9

# Head bevel strokes (top & bottom long edges)
line 0.12,0.18 0.88,0.18 stroke #8899aa 0.5 width 1
line 0.12,0.40 0.88,0.40 stroke #333333 0.55 width 1

# Reinforcement bands (iron collars wrapping the head)
line 0.24,0.12 0.24,0.44 stroke #111111 width 2
line 0.76,0.12 0.76,0.44 stroke #111111 width 2

# Strike marks on west face
line 0.12,0.20 0.17,0.24 stroke #0a0a0a 0.7
line 0.12,0.30 0.17,0.34 stroke #0a0a0a 0.6
line 0.12,0.38 0.17,0.36 stroke #0a0a0a 0.7

# Metal sheen highlights
line 0.26,0.18 0.74,0.18 stroke #aaaaaa 0.45 width 1
line 0.26,0.26 0.74,0.26 stroke #888888 0.35

# Maker's stamp (small circle with rune)
circle 0.50,0.28 0.024 fill #111111 0.95
line 0.48,0.28 0.52,0.28 stroke #8899aa 0.6

# Rust spot near head
ellipse 0.30,0.38 0.04,0.02 fill #6a3818 0.4

---
# Overhead prop — no floor shadow, just the ceiling anchor and top of ham
# === Faint drape shadow beneath (hinting at ham hanging below out of view) ===
ellipse 0.5,0.62 0.18,0.12 fill #1a1a1a 0.18
ellipse 0.5,0.62 0.14,0.08 fill #1a1a1a 0.15

ellipse 0.5,0.60 0.20,0.14 stroke #4a1a10

# String tied around the ham (knot visible where rope meets)
circle 0.46,0.50 0.025 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 0.46,0.50 0.025 stroke #2a1408
# Meat striation highlights
line 0.42,0.58 0.56,0.58 stroke #6a2818 0.5 width 1
line 0.40,0.62 0.58,0.62 stroke #6a2818 0.4 width 1
# Glossy cured sheen

# Tiny salt-crust fleck highlights
circle 0.44,0.56 0.012 fill #e8d0a0 0.7
circle 0.56,0.62 0.010 fill #e8d0a0 0.6

props.harp:
name: Harp
category: Furniture
footprint: 2x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1.8
placement: corner
room_types: bardic-hall, music-hall, theater, bards-college, mansion-grand-hall, noble-solar
typical_count: single
clusters_with: music-stand, sheet-music, lute-stand, drum-stand, stage-large
notes: Concert harp seen edge-on (a harp is a thin planar instrument — from above you see only its profile). Soundbox base at the south end, pillar post rising north, scroll crown at the top.
---
# footprint 2x1: x 0-1, y 0-2. Harp stands vertically, viewed edge-on from above.
# === HITBOX — narrow profile along the spine ===
selection rect 0.40,0.15 0.20,1.75
# Soundbox base — widest element, sits on the floor at south
ellipse 0.50,1.82 0.22,0.12 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
ellipse 0.50,1.82 0.22,0.12 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
# Gilt trim ring around soundbox rim
ellipse 0.50,1.82 0.22,0.12 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 1
# Sound hole at the top of the soundbox
ellipse 0.50,1.78 0.07,0.03 fill #1a1208 0.9
ellipse 0.50,1.78 0.07,0.03 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
# Pillar post — narrow vertical spine from soundbox up to the neck/crown
rect 0.45,0.20 0.10,1.58 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
rect 0.45,0.20 0.10,1.58 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# Gilt trim line along the pillar
line 0.48,0.22 0.48,1.76 stroke #daa520 0.75 width 1
# Neck curve — bezier arcing slightly off the pillar toward the strings
bezier 0.52,1.70 0.58,1.10 0.56,0.55 0.50,0.22 stroke #3a1f00 width 4
bezier 0.52,1.70 0.58,1.10 0.56,0.55 0.50,0.22 stroke #5c3a1e 0.7 width 2
# Strings — thin taut lines running along the spine between neck and soundbox
line 0.52,0.40 0.52,1.72 stroke #e8dcc8 0.85 width 1
line 0.54,0.55 0.54,1.72 stroke #c8b898 0.80 width 1
line 0.56,0.75 0.56,1.72 stroke #e8dcc8 0.80 width 1
line 0.50,0.30 0.50,1.72 stroke #c8b898 0.75 width 1
line 0.48,0.45 0.48,1.72 stroke #e8dcc8 0.80 width 1
line 0.46,0.65 0.46,1.72 stroke #c8b898 0.75 width 1
line 0.44,0.90 0.44,1.72 stroke #e8dcc8 0.75 width 1
# Tuning pegs — small brass dots along the neck
circle 0.53,0.50 0.018 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.54,0.75 0.018 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.55,1.00 0.018 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.55,1.25 0.018 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.54,1.50 0.018 fill #daa520 0.9
# Ornate scroll crown at the top of the pillar (nearest the viewer)
circle 0.50,0.16 0.08 fill #daa520 0.92
circle 0.50,0.16 0.08 stroke #5a3a00 width 2
circle 0.50,0.16 0.04 fill #8b6914 0.85
# Scroll spiral hint
arc 0.50,0.16 0.06 0 270 stroke #5a3a00 0.8 width 1
# Soundbox foot/leg shadow specks
circle 0.32,1.92 0.03 fill #1a0804 0.55
circle 0.68,1.92 0.03 fill #1a0804 0.55

hitbox poly 0.20,0.24 1.80,0.22 1.86,1.70 1.00,1.82 0.18,1.60 z 0-1.8

circle 0.22,0.24 0.04 fill #1a0a00 0.8

circle 1.00,1.72 0.035 fill #1a0a00 0.8

# Secondary hide patch (different colored hide stitched on — roughness)

poly 0.80,0.36 1.30,0.30 1.60,0.70 1.30,1.10 0.80,0.90 stroke #3a1f08 0.9

# Small patch-repair hide (contrasting shade)
poly 0.36,0.90 0.68,0.84 0.74,1.16 0.42,1.28 fill #5a3820 0.85
poly 0.36,0.90 0.68,0.84 0.74,1.16 0.42,1.28 stroke #2a1404

# Sag lines showing tarp droops toward front pole (directional folds)
bezier 0.24,0.36 0.60,0.60 0.90,1.20 1.00,1.70 stroke #3a1f08 0.55 width 1
bezier 1.76,0.34 1.40,0.60 1.20,1.20 1.04,1.70 stroke #3a1f08 0.55 width 1
bezier 1.00,0.22 1.02,0.80 1.04,1.30 1.04,1.70 stroke #3a1f08 0.5 width 1

# Stitching/lacing along the hide edges (visible seams between hides)

bezier 1.30,0.30 1.50,0.48 1.58,0.58 1.60,0.70 stroke #c8b898 0.7 width 1
bezier 1.60,0.70 1.50,0.90 1.42,1.00 1.30,1.10 stroke #c8b898 0.7 width 1
bezier 0.80,0.90 1.00,1.00 1.14,1.08 1.30,1.10 stroke #c8b898 0.7 width 1
bezier 0.80,0.36 0.80,0.60 0.80,0.78 0.80,0.90 stroke #c8b898 0.65 width 1

# Lacing holes (tiny dark dots along stitches)
circle 0.88,0.34 0.012 fill #1a0a00 0.9
circle 1.06,0.30 0.012 fill #1a0a00 0.9
circle 1.22,0.30 0.012 fill #1a0a00 0.9
circle 1.54,0.60 0.012 fill #1a0a00 0.9
