circle 1.20,1.08 0.012 fill #1a0a00 0.9
circle 0.90,0.98 0.012 fill #1a0a00 0.9

# Sinew ties from hide corners to poles (lashings)

line 1.74,0.28 1.78,0.22 stroke #8a6040 width 2
line 1.04,1.70 1.00,1.72 stroke #8a6040 width 2

line 0.22,1.50 0.10,1.72 stroke #8a6040 width 2

# Ground stone holding down southeast corner

line 1.82,0.80 1.90,0.80 stroke #6a4a28 0.8 width 1
line 1.50,0.24 1.52,0.16 stroke #6a4a28 0.8 width 1

---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.42 z 0-2.2

# Vat footprint is 2x1 — x 0-2, y 0-1. The vat itself is the round left half; feed tube/pipe runs east.

# Greenish fluid interior

circle 0.5,0.5 0.34 fill #6a9880 0.4

props.infernal-furnace:
name: Infernal Furnace
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 4
placement: wall
room_types: infernal-forge, infernal-court, hell-smithy
typical_count: single

lights: [{"preset":"infernal-flame","x":1,"y":1,"radius":18,"intensity":1.5,"color":"#ff6600"}]
notes: Demon-mouthed furnace — twisted iron skull with roaring fire in its maw. Concentric-ring fire pattern. Faces south (mouth toward players).
---
# Hitbox: bulk of the furnace body
hitbox rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.55 z 0-4

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: iron demon-skull furnace, open mouth at south, chimney in the skull's crown

# === Heat halo on the floor around the opening ===
ellipse 1.00,1.85 0.85,0.10 fill #ff6600 0.18
ellipse 1.00,1.80 0.70,0.08 fill #ffaa00 0.12
ellipse 1.00,1.72 0.55,0.06 fill #ffcc00 0.08

# === Outer iron skull mass (black, slightly bulbous) ===

poly 0.10,0.50 0.18,0.25 0.35,0.10 0.60,0.06 1.00,0.04 1.40,0.06 1.65,0.10 1.82,0.25 1.90,0.50 1.92,0.90 1.88,1.25 1.80,1.50 1.60,1.60 1.30,1.60 0.70,1.60 0.40,1.60 0.20,1.50 0.12,1.25 0.08,0.90 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.4
poly 0.10,0.50 0.18,0.25 0.35,0.10 0.60,0.06 1.00,0.04 1.40,0.06 1.65,0.10 1.82,0.25 1.90,0.50 1.92,0.90 1.88,1.25 1.80,1.50 1.60,1.60 1.30,1.60 0.70,1.60 0.40,1.60 0.20,1.50 0.12,1.25 0.08,0.90 stroke #0a0a0a width 2

# === Horns (curving outward from the crown) ===
poly 0.35,0.10 0.18,0.02 0.10,0.16 0.28,0.22 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
poly 0.35,0.10 0.18,0.02 0.10,0.16 0.28,0.22 stroke #000000
poly 1.65,0.10 1.82,0.02 1.90,0.16 1.72,0.22 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
poly 1.65,0.10 1.82,0.02 1.90,0.16 1.72,0.22 stroke #000000

# === Glowing cracks radiating across the iron ===
bezier 0.30,0.30 0.45,0.40 0.55,0.35 0.70,0.50 stroke #cc2200 0.9 width 2
bezier 1.30,0.30 1.45,0.40 1.55,0.40 1.70,0.55 stroke #ff4400 0.85 width 2

line 0.40,0.55 0.50,0.70 stroke #ff4400 0.8 width 1
line 1.50,0.50 1.60,0.70 stroke #cc2200 0.8 width 1
line 1.00,0.40 1.10,0.60 stroke #ff4400 0.7 width 1

# === Chimney hole in the crown (central, top of the skull) ===
circle 1.00,0.38 0.18 fill #0a0400 0.95
circle 1.00,0.38 0.18 stroke #0a0a0a width 2
# Heat bleed from chimney
circle 1.00,0.38 0.14 stroke #3a1808 width 2
circle 1.00,0.38 0.10 fill #cc3300 0.55
circle 1.00,0.38 0.06 fill #ff6600 0.75
circle 1.00,0.38 0.03 fill #ffcc00 0.9

# === Demonic eye vents (glowing eyes above the mouth) ===
# Left eye
ellipse 0.68,0.78 0.09,0.06 fill #0a0400 0.95
ellipse 0.68,0.78 0.09,0.06 stroke #0a0a0a
ellipse 0.68,0.78 0.06,0.04 fill #ff4400 0.85
ellipse 0.68,0.78 0.03,0.02 fill #ffcc00 0.95
# Right eye
ellipse 1.32,0.78 0.09,0.06 fill #0a0400 0.95
ellipse 1.32,0.78 0.09,0.06 stroke #0a0a0a
ellipse 1.32,0.78 0.06,0.04 fill #ff4400 0.85
ellipse 1.32,0.78 0.03,0.02 fill #ffcc00 0.95

# === Gaping mouth opening (south — the furnace maw) ===
# Dark cavernous interior
poly 0.40,1.05 0.35,1.55 0.50,1.58 1.00,1.58 1.50,1.58 1.65,1.55 1.60,1.05 fill #0a0400 0.95
poly 0.40,1.05 0.35,1.55 0.50,1.58 1.00,1.58 1.50,1.58 1.65,1.55 1.60,1.05 stroke #0a0a0a width 2

# === Fang-like iron teeth along the mouth opening (upper row) ===
poly 0.45,1.05 0.50,1.20 0.55,1.05 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
poly 0.45,1.05 0.50,1.20 0.55,1.05 stroke #000000
poly 0.60,1.05 0.65,1.22 0.70,1.05 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
poly 0.60,1.05 0.65,1.22 0.70,1.05 stroke #000000
poly 0.78,1.05 0.84,1.20 0.90,1.05 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
poly 0.78,1.05 0.84,1.20 0.90,1.05 stroke #000000
poly 0.95,1.05 1.00,1.22 1.05,1.05 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
poly 0.95,1.05 1.00,1.22 1.05,1.05 stroke #000000
poly 1.10,1.05 1.16,1.20 1.22,1.05 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
poly 1.10,1.05 1.16,1.20 1.22,1.05 stroke #000000
poly 1.30,1.05 1.35,1.22 1.40,1.05 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
poly 1.30,1.05 1.35,1.22 1.40,1.05 stroke #000000
poly 1.45,1.05 1.50,1.20 1.55,1.05 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
poly 1.45,1.05 1.50,1.20 1.55,1.05 stroke #000000

# === CONCENTRIC-RING FIRE inside the mouth (top-down fire pattern) ===
# Outer heat halo
ellipse 1.00,1.35 0.55,0.18 fill #e85500 0.4
# Outer flame ring
ellipse 1.00,1.35 0.45,0.15 fill #ff6600 0.7
# Flame tongues radiating outward (small poly tongues)
poly 0.55,1.32 0.50,1.28 0.60,1.30 fill #ff6600 0.7
poly 1.42,1.32 1.48,1.28 1.50,1.32 fill #ff6600 0.7
poly 0.70,1.22 0.65,1.18 0.75,1.20 fill #ff8800 0.75
poly 1.28,1.22 1.35,1.18 1.30,1.22 fill #ff8800 0.75
# Mid flame ring (yellow-orange)
ellipse 1.00,1.35 0.35,0.12 fill #ff8800 0.85
# Inner core (yellow)
ellipse 1.00,1.35 0.25,0.08 fill #ffaa00 0.9
# Hot center (yellow-white)
ellipse 1.00,1.35 0.14,0.05 fill #ffcc00 0.95
# Hottest white-hot spot
ellipse 1.00,1.33 0.07,0.03 fill #ffee88 0.98

# === Glowing embers rising ===
circle 0.72,1.10 0.02 fill #ffcc00 0.9
circle 1.25,1.12 0.018 fill #ff8800 0.9
circle 0.88,1.00 0.015 fill #ff6600 0.85
circle 1.15,1.00 0.015 fill #ffaa00 0.85

# === Iron rivets around the mouth (structural) ===
circle 0.22,0.75 0.025 fill #0a0a0a 0.95
circle 0.22,1.00 0.025 fill #0a0a0a 0.95
circle 1.78,0.75 0.025 fill #0a0a0a 0.95
circle 1.78,1.00 0.025 fill #0a0a0a 0.95

# === Soot staining around the mouth ===
ellipse 1.00,1.02 0.55,0.04 fill #0a0400 0.7

rect 0.34,0.30 0.24,0.02 fill #daa520 0.55

# Small bronze ingot, angled

line 0.24,0.56 0.64,0.56 stroke #444444 0.55 width 1

line 0.42,0.50 0.46,0.50 stroke #8899aa 0.5 width 1

line 0.26,0.48 0.62,0.48 stroke #ddddee 0.45 width 1

selection circle 0.5,0.5 0.14

# Small ceramic pot body (squat, earthenware brown)

props.iron-cage-cell:

notes: Small iron-barred cell box. Square frame, barred gate faces south (high Y), dark interior. Smaller than cage-large (2x2 vs 3x3) — a solitary cell.
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2

# === HITBOX — solid corner posts + frame rails cast shadow; bars pass light ===

hitbox rect 1.82,0.24 0.10,1.52 z 0-7

# === Dark dirty interior (stone/wood floor visible through bars) ===
rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 texfill polyhaven/worn_planks 0.65
rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 fill #1a0a00 0.45
rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 stroke #0a0400

# === Iron bars — vertical (running north-south) ===

line 0.40,0.18 0.40,1.82 stroke #555555 0.6 width 1
line 0.70,0.18 0.70,1.82 stroke #333333 width 2
line 0.70,0.18 0.70,1.82 stroke #555555 0.6 width 1
line 1.00,0.18 1.00,1.82 stroke #333333 width 2
line 1.00,0.18 1.00,1.82 stroke #555555 0.6 width 1
line 1.30,0.18 1.30,1.82 stroke #333333 width 2
line 1.30,0.18 1.30,1.82 stroke #555555 0.6 width 1
line 1.60,0.18 1.60,1.82 stroke #333333 width 2
line 1.60,0.18 1.60,1.82 stroke #555555 0.6 width 1

# === Iron bars — horizontal (running east-west) ===

line 0.18,1.50 1.82,1.50 stroke #666666 0.6 width 1

# === Frame rails (solid iron perimeter) ===
# North
rect 0.24,0.08 1.52,0.10 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 0.24,0.08 1.52,0.10 stroke #222222
# South
rect 0.24,1.82 1.52,0.10 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 0.24,1.82 1.52,0.10 stroke #222222
# West
rect 0.08,0.24 0.10,1.52 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 0.08,0.24 0.10,1.52 stroke #222222
# East
rect 1.82,0.24 0.10,1.52 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 1.82,0.24 0.10,1.52 stroke #222222

# === Corner posts (thick, solid) ===

rect 0.06,0.06 0.18,0.18 fill #1a1008 0.3
rect 0.06,0.06 0.18,0.18 stroke #111111
circle 0.15,0.15 0.03 fill #666666 0.7

rect 1.76,0.06 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.9
rect 1.76,0.06 0.18,0.18 fill #1a1008 0.3
rect 1.76,0.06 0.18,0.18 stroke #111111
circle 1.85,0.15 0.03 fill #666666 0.7

rect 0.06,1.76 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.9
rect 0.06,1.76 0.18,0.18 fill #1a1008 0.3
rect 0.06,1.76 0.18,0.18 stroke #111111
circle 0.15,1.85 0.03 fill #666666 0.7

rect 1.76,1.76 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.9

rect 1.76,1.76 0.18,0.18 stroke #111111

# === Door gate (south face — cell opening) ===

rect 1.52,1.80 0.08,0.06 stroke #111111
# Lock plate at west side of door

circle 1.00,1.18 0.010 fill #6a3818 0.7

props.judge-bench:

category: Furniture
footprint: 2x3

---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.10,0.10 2.80,1.80 z 0-5

# footprint 2x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-2
# Top-down: a large elevated paneled dais with the judge's seating area on the north (back), the writing bench in the middle, and the paneled front wall facing south (toward the room)

rect 0.10,0.10 2.80,1.80 stroke #1a0e00 width 2

line 1.50,0.20 1.50,0.50 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1

ellipse 1.50,0.36 0.16,0.12 stroke #5a3a00 width 2

line 1.50,0.30 1.50,0.42 stroke #3a2400 width 2
circle 1.44,0.38 0.02 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 1.56,0.38 0.02 fill #daa520 0.9

circle 0.32,0.20 0.04 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.32,0.20 0.04 stroke #5a3a00
circle 2.68,0.20 0.04 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 2.68,0.20 0.04 stroke #5a3a00

# === Seat cushion area (middle strip) ===

rect 0.40,0.56 2.20,0.30 stroke #2a0810 width 2

circle 1.50,0.70 0.020 fill #2a0810 0.8

line 1.84,1.30 2.36,1.30 stroke #2a1400 0.5

circle 2.30,1.42 0.04 stroke #4a0808

circle 1.00,1.00 0.66 stroke #1a0a04
# Ring 3

circle 1.00,1.00 0.34 stroke #1a0a04

circle 1.00,1.00 0.05 fill #ff8800 0.7
circle 1.00,1.00 0.025 fill #ffcc00 0.9

# === Radial brick seams crossing the dome (spokes) ===
line 1.00,0.18 1.00,0.82 stroke #1a0a04 0.7
line 1.00,1.18 1.00,1.82 stroke #1a0a04 0.7
line 0.18,1.00 0.82,1.00 stroke #1a0a04 0.7
line 1.18,1.00 1.82,1.00 stroke #1a0a04 0.7

line 1.58,0.42 1.24,0.76 stroke #1a0a04 0.6
line 0.42,1.58 0.76,1.24 stroke #1a0a04 0.6

ellipse 1.00,1.74 0.30,0.14 stroke #0a0400 width 2

ellipse 1.00,1.77 0.10,0.05 fill #ff8800 0.7

circle 1.00,1.58 0.025 fill #555555 0.9

# === Bolster / guard (brass band between blade and handle, visible from above) ===

rect 0.43,0.32 0.14,0.07 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.3
rect 0.43,0.32 0.14,0.07 stroke #4a3800

props.ladder:
name: Ladder
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 8
placement: wall
room_types: any
typical_count: single
clusters_with: trapdoor
notes: Access between levels; place against wall or over a trapdoor
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox poly 0.18,0.88 0.82,0.88 0.57,0.15 0.43,0.15 z 0-8

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: ladder leaning against north wall, heavily foreshortened
# The ladder goes mostly UP, so from above it's compressed into a short depth
# Floor feet are at south (wide apart), top rests against wall at north (close together)

# === Shadow on ground beneath the ladder ===
poly 0.2,0.85 0.8,0.85 0.55,0.25 0.45,0.25 fill #1a1208 0.15

# === Left rail (foreshortened — wide at floor, narrow at wall) ===
# Thick at south (floor foot), tapers dramatically to north (wall top)
poly 0.18,0.88 0.28,0.88 0.47,0.15 0.43,0.15 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
poly 0.18,0.88 0.28,0.88 0.47,0.15 0.43,0.15 stroke #3a1f00

# === Right rail ===
poly 0.72,0.88 0.82,0.88 0.57,0.15 0.53,0.15 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
poly 0.72,0.88 0.82,0.88 0.57,0.15 0.53,0.15 stroke #3a1f00

# === Rungs (get shorter and closer together toward the wall due to perspective) ===
# Bottom rung (widest, closest to us at floor level)
rect 0.28,0.78 0.44,0.05 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.8
rect 0.28,0.78 0.44,0.05 stroke #2a1400
# Middle rung
rect 0.35,0.58 0.30,0.04 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.75
rect 0.35,0.58 0.30,0.04 stroke #2a1400
# Upper rung (shorter, compressed)
rect 0.40,0.42 0.20,0.04 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.7
rect 0.40,0.42 0.20,0.04 stroke #2a1400
# Top rung (barely visible, very short near wall)
rect 0.43,0.28 0.14,0.03 fill #4a2800 0.6

# === Rail tips resting on wall (north edge) ===
rect 0.42,0.12 0.06,0.05 fill #3a2000 0.8
rect 0.52,0.12 0.06,0.05 fill #3a2000 0.8

# === Floor feet (rubber/iron caps at south end) ===
rect 0.19,0.86 0.08,0.04 fill #555555 0.6
rect 0.73,0.86 0.08,0.04 fill #555555 0.6

category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.0
placement: floor

notes: Simple wooden lean-to shelter. Single slanted roof of logs slanting from high ridge at north down to low edge at south. Open facing south.
---
# footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2
# === HITBOX — the solid shelter structure ===
hitbox rect 0.16,0.14 1.68,1.30 z 0-2.0

# Ground shadow around shelter
ellipse 1.00,1.20 0.92,0.82 fill #2a1a0a 0.15

# === Ridge pole (horizontal log at the top — north) ===
rect 0.12,0.14 1.76,0.14 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.85
rect 0.12,0.14 1.76,0.14 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# === Roof surface — slanted logs/planks running north-to-south ===
# Base roof panel

poly 0.16,0.28 1.84,0.28 1.84,1.44 0.16,1.44 fill #5c3a1e 0.35
poly 0.16,0.28 1.84,0.28 1.84,1.44 0.16,1.44 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# === Individual log / plank lines running from ridge down ===
line 0.30,0.28 0.30,1.44 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 0.50,0.28 0.50,1.44 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 0.70,0.28 0.70,1.44 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 0.90,0.28 0.90,1.44 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 1.10,0.28 1.10,1.44 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 1.30,0.28 1.30,1.44 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 1.50,0.28 1.50,1.44 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 1.70,0.28 1.70,1.44 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1

# === Horizontal lashing ropes binding the logs ===
line 0.16,0.60 1.84,0.60 stroke #8b7355 0.7 width 1
line 0.16,0.60 1.84,0.60 stroke #5c3a1e 0.5 width 1
line 0.16,1.00 1.84,1.00 stroke #8b7355 0.7 width 1
line 0.16,1.00 1.84,1.00 stroke #5c3a1e 0.5 width 1
line 0.16,1.36 1.84,1.36 stroke #8b7355 0.7 width 1
line 0.16,1.36 1.84,1.36 stroke #5c3a1e 0.5 width 1

# === Support posts (west and east corner uprights) ===
rect 0.12,1.36 0.10,0.12 fill #3a1f00 0.9
rect 0.12,1.36 0.10,0.12 stroke #1a0a00
rect 1.78,1.36 0.10,0.12 fill #3a1f00 0.9
rect 1.78,1.36 0.10,0.12 stroke #1a0a00

# === Brush/leaves piled on roof for weatherproofing ===

ellipse 1.20,0.60 0.14,0.07 fill #2a4018 0.35
ellipse 0.80,1.10 0.11,0.06 fill #3a5020 0.3
ellipse 1.50,1.20 0.10,0.06 fill #2a4018 0.3
ellipse 1.00,0.40 0.08,0.04 fill #3a5020 0.35

# === Dark interior visible under the shelter edge at south ===

name: Leather Strap
category: Workshop
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.04
placement: floor
room_types: shop-weaponsmith, shop-leatherworker, tannery, general-workshop, armory
typical_count: few
clusters_with: scabbard-empty, polish-rag, workbench, leather-stack, leather-apron
notes: Coiled brown leather strap — a finished length of hide strap ready for use. Coiled at one end, loose tail at the other.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.14,0.14 0.72,0.72

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: a looped/coiled leather strap, rolled up with a tail left hanging

# === Ground shadow beneath ===
ellipse 0.42,0.46 0.30,0.22 fill #1a1008 0.18

# === Coiled portion (concentric oval loops) ===
# Outer loop
ering 0.42,0.46 0.28,0.22 0.22,0.16 fill #5c3a1e 0.92
ering 0.42,0.46 0.28,0.22 0.22,0.16 stroke #2a1400 width 1

# Middle loop
ering 0.42,0.46 0.22,0.16 0.16,0.10 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
ering 0.42,0.46 0.22,0.16 0.16,0.10 stroke #3a1f00 width 1

# Inner loop
ering 0.42,0.46 0.16,0.10 0.10,0.06 fill #5c3a1e 0.92
ering 0.42,0.46 0.16,0.10 0.10,0.06 stroke #2a1400 width 1

# Inner core (tight wrap)
ellipse 0.42,0.46 0.10,0.06 fill #3a2010 0.95
ellipse 0.42,0.46 0.10,0.06 stroke #1a0800

# === Leather grain texture on coils (subtle crease lines) ===
arc 0.42,0.46 0.25 0 180 stroke #3a1f00 0.55 width 1
arc 0.42,0.46 0.20 180 360 stroke #3a1f00 0.55 width 1
arc 0.42,0.46 0.15 30 160 stroke #2a1400 0.5 width 1

# === Loose trailing end (strap extending from outer coil, running SE) ===
poly 0.66,0.42 0.72,0.44 0.86,0.58 0.92,0.66 0.90,0.72 0.82,0.66 0.68,0.52 0.62,0.48 fill #6b4e2e 0.92
poly 0.66,0.42 0.72,0.44 0.86,0.58 0.92,0.66 0.90,0.72 0.82,0.66 0.68,0.52 0.62,0.48 stroke #3a1f00

# Strap crease line along its length
bezier 0.68,0.46 0.76,0.52 0.84,0.60 0.89,0.68 stroke #3a1f00 0.6 width 1

# === Strap tip (tapered/cut edge at the south-east end) ===
poly 0.86,0.66 0.92,0.66 0.90,0.72 0.84,0.70 fill #4a2800 0.95
poly 0.86,0.66 0.92,0.66 0.90,0.72 0.84,0.70 stroke #1a0800

# === Tiny highlights along the coil ===
arc 0.42,0.44 0.25 220 260 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1
arc 0.42,0.44 0.18 200 240 stroke #8b7355 0.55 width 1

# === Iron buckle at outer edge (optional detail) ===
rect 0.60,0.38 0.08,0.06 fill #555555 0.9
rect 0.60,0.38 0.08,0.06 stroke #222222
line 0.64,0.38 0.64,0.44 stroke #333333 width 1

# === Stitching holes punched in the tail ===
circle 0.76,0.54 0.008 fill #1a0800 0.8
circle 0.80,0.58 0.008 fill #1a0800 0.8
circle 0.84,0.62 0.008 fill #1a0800 0.8

# === Faint oil/grease spot on leather ===
ellipse 0.46,0.42 0.05,0.03 fill #3a2010 0.55

props.log-seat:
name: Log Seat
category: Furniture
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.5
placement: floor
room_types: campsite-traveler, cabin-hunters, orc-war-camp, fairground-seasonal

notes: Short log-round used as a stool around a fire; arrange several in a ring around campfires
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: circular log end. Dark bark ring on the outside, flat sanded-smooth seat with visible concentric growth rings. Shorter than a chopping-block log-round — this is a stool.

# Bark ring (outer edge)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.40 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.40 fill #3a1f00 0.5
circle 0.50,0.50 0.40 stroke #1a0f00
# Bark ridge detail (chunky outer texture strokes)
arc 0.50,0.50 0.40 20 70 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.40 130 180 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.40 220 270 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.40 310 350 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2

# Sapwood transition (lighter ring just inside bark)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.36 fill #a88050 0.7
circle 0.50,0.50 0.36 stroke #5c3a1e

# Flat worn seat surface (sanded smooth from use — warmer mid-tone)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 texfill polyhaven/brown_planks_09 0.80
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 fill #b08860 0.45
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 stroke #5c3a1e

# Concentric growth rings (visible on the seat top)

circle 0.50,0.50 0.24 stroke #8a6830 0.55 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.18 stroke #8a6830 0.55 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.12 stroke #8a6830 0.55 width 1

# Heart/pith center (darker core)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.05 fill #6a4020 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.05 stroke #3a1f00

# Sit-polish highlight (smoother, slightly offset patch where people actually sit)
ellipse 0.48,0.46 0.14,0.10 fill #d4a878 0.25

# One small seasoning crack radiating from center
line 0.50,0.50 0.50,0.18 stroke #3a1f00 0.75 width 1
# A tiny knot
circle 0.38,0.56 0.022 fill #3a1f00 0.85
circle 0.38,0.56 0.022 stroke #1a0f00

# South cradle arm (mirror)

# Cradle posts / feet where arms meet the deck (iron-capped)
rect 0.26,0.30 0.10,0.18 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 0.26,0.30 0.10,0.18 stroke #1a0f00
rect 1.64,0.30 0.10,0.18 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 1.64,0.30 0.10,0.18 stroke #1a0f00
rect 0.26,1.52 0.10,0.18 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 0.26,1.52 0.10,0.18 stroke #1a0f00
rect 1.64,1.52 0.10,0.18 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 1.64,1.52 0.10,0.18 stroke #1a0f00

# === Inverted longboat hull on top of cradle ===
# Overturned hull silhouette — pointed bow south, pointed stern north (both ends tapered because we see the bottom of the hull)
poly 1.00,0.10 0.82,0.22 0.60,0.46 0.52,0.90 0.52,1.10 0.60,1.54 0.82,1.78 1.00,1.90 1.18,1.78 1.40,1.54 1.48,1.10 1.48,0.90 1.40,0.46 1.18,0.22 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.88

# === Keel stripe running down the spine of the inverted hull ===
# Dark keel plank (the bottom of the boat, now topmost)

rect 0.92,0.14 0.16,1.72 stroke #0a0400

# Keel plank seam highlights

# === Hull plank seams running fore-aft along the curved bottom ===
bezier 0.70,0.34 0.64,0.80 0.64,1.20 0.70,1.66 stroke #3a1f00 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.80,0.22 0.76,0.78 0.76,1.22 0.80,1.78 stroke #3a1f00 0.4 width 1

bezier 1.20,0.22 1.24,0.78 1.24,1.22 1.20,1.78 stroke #3a1f00 0.4 width 1

# Lashing ropes holding the boat to the cradle

line 0.52,0.40 1.48,0.40 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1
line 0.52,1.60 1.48,1.60 stroke #5c3a1e width 3
line 0.52,1.60 1.48,1.60 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1

# Bow/stern tip highlights (pointed ends visible)

circle 1.00,1.86 0.04 fill #3a1f00 0.85

category: Religious

facing: yes

notes: Ceremonial loom with sacred woven cloth in mid-production — floor loom shown top-down, warp threads stretched between beams, weft cloth emerging on one side. Centerpiece of a weaver's shrine.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,1.80 z 0-3

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: rectangular wooden loom frame with crossbeams, warp threads taut between, sacred cloth partly woven, offerings at corners

# North beam (top)

rect 0.24,0.24 1.52,0.14 stroke #1a0800 width 2
# South beam (bottom) — the "breast beam" where finished cloth rolls

rect 0.24,1.62 1.52,0.14 stroke #1a0800 width 2
# West upright
rect 0.24,0.24 0.14,1.52 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.24,0.24 0.14,1.52 stroke #1a0800 width 2

# Body ribbing / grain lines (subtle)

bezier 0.70,0.50 0.74,0.64 0.76,0.78 0.72,0.86 stroke #5c3a1e 0.45 width 1

arc 0.62,0.70 0.05 0 360 stroke #daa520 0.6 width 1
circle 0.62,0.70 0.025 fill #3a1f00 0.8

# Bridge at south edge of body

# Strings running across body to bridge
line 0.30,0.22 0.60,0.82 stroke #c8b898 0.7 width 1
line 0.28,0.26 0.62,0.82 stroke #e8dcc8 0.7 width 1
line 0.26,0.30 0.64,0.82 stroke #c8b898 0.65 width 1
line 0.24,0.34 0.66,0.82 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 1
line 0.22,0.38 0.68,0.82 stroke #c8b898 0.6 width 1

# Neck angling up to NW (long thin rect)
poly 0.22,0.10 0.32,0.08 0.56,0.52 0.46,0.56 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
poly 0.22,0.10 0.32,0.08 0.56,0.52 0.46,0.56 stroke #2a1400 width 1

# Frets across the neck

line 0.34,0.30 0.44,0.28 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 1
line 0.38,0.38 0.48,0.36 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 1
line 0.42,0.46 0.52,0.44 stroke #c8b898 0.7 width 1

# Pegbox at top of neck (small angled head)

poly 0.16,0.08 0.28,0.04 0.32,0.12 0.22,0.14 stroke #2a1400

# Tuning pegs
circle 0.19,0.06 0.014 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.24,0.04 0.014 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.28,0.08 0.014 fill #daa520 0.9

props.magic-sigil-floor:
name: Magic Sigil (Floor)
category: Magical
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.01
lights: [{"preset":"ember","x":1.0,"y":1.0,"color":"#cc3322","intensity":0.4,"radius":4}]
placement: center
room_types: throne-room, ritual-chamber, dark-temple, wizard-sanctum, cultist-shrine, boss-chamber
typical_count: single
clusters_with: magic-circle, ritual-circle, magic-sigil, altar, candle-cluster
notes: Glowing rune sigil etched into the floor — complex runic geometry with gold and red glow. Flat floor art. Place at room center or before a throne.
---
# Flat floor sigil — no shadow, no blocking

# === Subtle outer halo (dim red glow) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.92 fill #8b0000 0.08
circle 1.0,1.0 0.76 fill #aa2200 0.1

# === Outer containment ring ===
ring 1.0,1.0 0.90 0.86 fill #cc3322 0.75
ring 1.0,1.0 0.90 0.86 stroke #6a1000 width 1
# Gold trim inside outer ring
circle 1.0,1.0 0.84 stroke #daa520 0.85 width 1

# === Cardinal rune notches on outer ring ===
line 1.0,0.08 1.0,0.22 stroke #daa520 0.85 width 2
line 0.08,1.0 0.22,1.0 stroke #daa520 0.85 width 2
line 1.0,1.78 1.0,1.92 stroke #daa520 0.85 width 2
line 1.78,1.0 1.92,1.0 stroke #daa520 0.85 width 2

# === Diagonal rune notches (shorter) ===
line 0.35,0.35 0.45,0.45 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 2
line 1.65,0.35 1.55,0.45 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 2
line 0.35,1.65 0.45,1.55 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 2
line 1.65,1.65 1.55,1.55 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 2

# === Mid ring (ornate) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.68 stroke #cc3322 width 2
circle 1.0,1.0 0.68 stroke #daa520 0.6 width 1

# === Hexagram / six-pointed star inside mid ring ===
# Upward triangle
poly 1.00,0.42 1.50,1.28 0.50,1.28 stroke #cc3322 width 2
poly 1.00,0.42 1.50,1.28 0.50,1.28 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 1
# Downward triangle
poly 1.00,1.58 0.50,0.72 1.50,0.72 stroke #cc3322 width 2
poly 1.00,1.58 0.50,0.72 1.50,0.72 stroke #daa520 0.65 width 1

# === Inner ring ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.38 stroke #daa520 width 2
circle 1.0,1.0 0.38 stroke #ff4422 0.5 width 1

# === Complex runic glyphs between rings (cardinals) ===
# North glyph
line 0.95,0.40 1.05,0.40 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 1
line 1.00,0.36 1.00,0.46 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 1
poly 0.97,0.48 1.03,0.48 1.00,0.54 stroke #daa520 0.75 width 1
# East glyph
line 1.60,0.95 1.60,1.05 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 1
line 1.56,1.00 1.64,1.00 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 1
line 1.52,0.96 1.52,1.04 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 1
# South glyph
line 0.95,1.60 1.05,1.60 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 1
line 1.00,1.54 1.00,1.64 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 1
line 0.94,1.66 1.06,1.66 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 1
# West glyph
line 0.40,0.95 0.40,1.05 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 1
line 0.36,1.00 0.44,1.00 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 1
line 0.48,0.96 0.48,1.04 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 1

# === Center focal sigil — upward-pointing pentagram inside inner ring ===
line 1.00,0.66 1.32,1.26 stroke #cc3322 width 2
line 1.00,0.66 0.68,1.26 stroke #cc3322 width 2
line 0.66,0.88 1.34,0.88 stroke #cc3322 width 2
line 0.66,0.88 1.32,1.26 stroke #cc3322 width 2
line 1.34,0.88 0.68,1.26 stroke #cc3322 width 2

# Gold overlay on pentagram
line 1.00,0.66 1.32,1.26 stroke #daa520 0.5 width 1
line 1.00,0.66 0.68,1.26 stroke #daa520 0.5 width 1
line 0.66,0.88 1.34,0.88 stroke #daa520 0.5 width 1

# === Center focal point — hot glow ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.14 fill #cc3322 0.4
circle 1.0,1.0 0.09 fill #ff4422 0.55
circle 1.0,1.0 0.05 fill #ffaa44 0.7
circle 1.0,1.0 0.025 fill #ffddaa 0.85

circle 0.32,0.72 0.015 fill #ffffff 0.8
circle 0.70,0.68 0.017 fill #ffffff 0.85
circle 0.50,0.22 0.014 fill #ccf4ff 0.8

circle 0.22,0.52 0.013 fill #ccf4ff 0.75

# Prismatic glint

props.magnifier:
name: Magnifier
category: Library & Study
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.1
placement: floor
room_types: shop-jeweler, alchemy-lab, mansion-study, library, scriptorium-mundane, investigator-office
typical_count: few
clusters_with: desk, tweezers, gemstone-scatter, ledger-stack
notes: Round magnifying glass with a brass frame and short wooden handle; lies on the desk at rest
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.12,0.38 0.76,0.26

# Wooden handle (to the east of the lens — lying horizontal)
rect 0.62,0.46 0.30,0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.62,0.46 0.30,0.08 stroke #1a0e00 width 2
# Handle wood grain
line 0.62,0.50 0.92,0.50 stroke #5c3a1e 0.5 width 1
# Handle end-cap
circle 0.92,0.50 0.03 fill #3a1f00 0.9
circle 0.92,0.50 0.03 stroke #1a0e00

# Brass ferrule connecting handle to lens frame
rect 0.58,0.44 0.06,0.12 fill #daa520 0.92
rect 0.58,0.44 0.06,0.12 stroke #5a3a00 width 2

# Brass lens frame (ring around the glass)
circle 0.38,0.50 0.24 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.38,0.50 0.24 stroke #5a3a00 width 2
# Inner frame bevel
circle 0.38,0.50 0.21 stroke #5a3a00 0.6 width 1

# Glass lens (clear — mostly just a faint tint with highlights)
circle 0.38,0.50 0.20 fill #aaccdd 0.25
circle 0.38,0.50 0.20 stroke #5a8aaa 0.6 width 1

# Lens reflection highlight (crescent curve — glass catches light)
arc 0.38,0.50 0.17 200 260 stroke #eeffff 0.75 width 2
arc 0.38,0.50 0.14 220 250 stroke #ffffff 0.55 width 1

# Faint magnified detail visible through the lens (tiny suggestion of an enlarged pattern)
line 0.32,0.44 0.44,0.44 stroke #8b7355 0.35 width 1
line 0.32,0.50 0.44,0.50 stroke #8b7355 0.3 width 1
line 0.32,0.56 0.44,0.56 stroke #8b7355 0.3 width 1

# Brass shine on frame
arc 0.38,0.50 0.225 210 260 stroke #ffd700 0.6 width 1

facing: no
shadow: no

placement: floor

notes: Stout wooden mallet lying on the ground — big cylinder head and short handle, dropped by a worker
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: mallet lying flat, handle running NE-SW, cylinder head at NE end

line 0.22,0.72 0.55,0.42 stroke #6b4e2e width 3

ellipse 0.20,0.74 0.04,0.03 stroke #3a1f00

ellipse 0.62,0.38 0.16,0.10 stroke #3a1f00

ellipse 0.76,0.36 0.06,0.10 stroke #5c3a1e
# Tree rings on end face

ellipse 0.66,0.40 0.03,0.02 fill #4a2800 0.15

ellipse 0.52,0.38 0.03,0.08 stroke #555555 0.5 width 1

# Wood chip near mallet

circle 0.78,0.55 0.015 fill #6b4e2e 0.35

props.market-stall-awning:
name: Market Stall Awning
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 2.5
placement: floor
room_types: fairground-seasonal, market-square
typical_count: few
clusters_with: market-stall
notes: Overlay prop designed to be placed at the same position as market-stall. Canvas canopy seen from above; do not add a drop shadow (it is overhead — shadow would be wrong, like a chandelier).
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84

# Canvas canopy base (full square, slight margin so it overhangs the stall edges visually)
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84 fill #b83028 0.92
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.45
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84 stroke #5a0808
# Red/white vertical stripes — three white bands across the 2-cell width
rect 0.36,0.08 0.26,1.84 fill #f0e8dc 0.90
rect 0.36,0.08 0.26,1.84 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.35
rect 0.86,0.08 0.26,1.84 fill #f0e8dc 0.90
rect 0.86,0.08 0.26,1.84 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.35
rect 1.36,0.08 0.26,1.84 fill #f0e8dc 0.90
rect 1.36,0.08 0.26,1.84 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.35
# Seam stitching along stripe boundaries
line 0.36,0.08 0.36,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
line 0.62,0.08 0.62,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
line 0.86,0.08 0.86,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
line 1.12,0.08 1.12,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
line 1.36,0.08 1.36,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
line 1.62,0.08 1.62,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
# Ridge line crossing east-west (subtle sag — canopy sags toward center)
bezier 0.08,1.00 0.60,1.08 1.40,1.08 1.92,1.00 stroke #3a0404 0.5 width 2
# Support pole pass-throughs (small circles where poles rise through canopy)
circle 0.20,0.20 0.07 fill #4a2800 0.95
circle 0.20,0.20 0.07 stroke #1a0a00
circle 1.80,0.20 0.07 fill #4a2800 0.95
circle 1.80,0.20 0.07 stroke #1a0a00
circle 0.20,1.80 0.07 fill #4a2800 0.95
circle 0.20,1.80 0.07 stroke #1a0a00
circle 1.80,1.80 0.07 fill #4a2800 0.95
circle 1.80,1.80 0.07 stroke #1a0a00
# Pole collar rings (reinforcement where pole meets canvas)
circle 0.20,0.20 0.11 stroke #5a0808 width 1
circle 1.80,0.20 0.11 stroke #5a0808 width 1
circle 0.20,1.80 0.11 stroke #5a0808 width 1
circle 1.80,1.80 0.11 stroke #5a0808 width 1
# Subtle fabric ripples / sag highlights (canvas bowing between poles)
bezier 0.20,0.60 0.60,0.66 1.40,0.66 1.80,0.60 stroke #f4e8d8 0.25 width 1
bezier 0.20,1.40 0.60,1.46 1.40,1.46 1.80,1.40 stroke #f4e8d8 0.25 width 1
# Scalloped front valance (south edge — fabric trim hanging down visible as notched line)
bezier 0.08,1.88 0.30,1.96 0.50,1.96 0.72,1.88 stroke #5a0808 0.7 width 2
bezier 0.72,1.88 0.94,1.96 1.14,1.96 1.36,1.88 stroke #5a0808 0.7 width 2
bezier 1.36,1.88 1.58,1.96 1.78,1.96 1.92,1.88 stroke #5a0808 0.7 width 2
# Weathering stains on canvas
ellipse 0.48,0.40 0.08,0.05 fill #3a0808 0.3
ellipse 1.52,1.20 0.10,0.05 fill #3a0808 0.3
# Rope ties at corners (cinched fabric to pole)
line 0.14,0.14 0.26,0.26 stroke #6b4e2e 0.9 width 1
line 1.86,0.14 1.74,0.26 stroke #6b4e2e 0.9 width 1
line 0.14,1.86 0.26,1.74 stroke #6b4e2e 0.9 width 1
line 1.86,1.86 1.74,1.74 stroke #6b4e2e 0.9 width 1

selection rect 0.10,0.15 1.80,0.70

rect 1.70,0.16 0.14,0.14 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9

# Footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1. No facing. Radial cross-section viewed from above.
# NOT a vertical shaft — this is the circle you see looking straight down a tall mast.

circle 0.50,0.50 0.28 stroke #555555 0.7 width 1

rect 0.47,0.79 0.06,0.08 fill #5c3a1e 0.9

circle 0.78,0.50 0.015 fill #222222 0.95

line 0.06,1.60 1.94,1.60 stroke #1a1008 0.5 width 1

# === Outer stone rim (huge circular millstone) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.88 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.9
circle 1.0,1.0 0.88 fill #8a8078 0.35
circle 1.0,1.0 0.88 stroke #333333 width 3

# === Main grinding surface (inner circle, slightly recessed) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.80 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
circle 1.0,1.0 0.80 fill #999088 0.3
circle 1.0,1.0 0.80 stroke #444444 width 2

# === Concentric grinding grooves ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.72 stroke #555555 0.7 width 1
circle 1.0,1.0 0.64 stroke #555555 0.7 width 1
circle 1.0,1.0 0.56 stroke #555555 0.7 width 1
circle 1.0,1.0 0.48 stroke #555555 0.7 width 1
circle 1.0,1.0 0.40 stroke #555555 0.7 width 1
circle 1.0,1.0 0.32 stroke #555555 0.7 width 1
circle 1.0,1.0 0.24 stroke #555555 0.7 width 1

# === Radial dressing grooves (furrows cut into the stone) ===
line 1.0,0.14 1.0,0.88 stroke #444444 0.8 width 1
line 1.0,1.12 1.0,1.86 stroke #444444 0.8 width 1
line 0.14,1.0 0.88,1.0 stroke #444444 0.8 width 1
line 1.12,1.0 1.86,1.0 stroke #444444 0.8 width 1
# Diagonal grooves
line 0.39,0.39 0.92,0.92 stroke #444444 0.6 width 1
line 1.61,0.39 1.08,0.92 stroke #444444 0.6 width 1
line 0.39,1.61 0.92,1.08 stroke #444444 0.6 width 1
line 1.61,1.61 1.08,1.08 stroke #444444 0.6 width 1
# Additional curving dressing furrows
bezier 0.40,0.70 0.60,0.76 0.80,0.84 0.92,0.94 stroke #444444 0.5 width 1
bezier 1.60,0.70 1.40,0.76 1.20,0.84 1.08,0.94 stroke #444444 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.40,1.30 0.60,1.24 0.80,1.16 0.92,1.06 stroke #444444 0.5 width 1
bezier 1.60,1.30 1.40,1.24 1.20,1.16 1.08,1.06 stroke #444444 0.5 width 1

# === Center shaft hole (square hole where the spindle goes) ===
rect 0.88,0.88 0.24,0.24 fill #0a0604 0.95
rect 0.88,0.88 0.24,0.24 stroke #000000 width 2

# Metal shaft collar
rect 0.84,0.84 0.32,0.32 stroke #444444 width 2

# Shaft inside (dark hole)
rect 0.92,0.92 0.16,0.16 fill #000000 0.98

# === Flour dust around the stone (whitish patches) ===
ellipse 0.40,1.60 0.18,0.08 fill #e8e0d0 0.35
ellipse 1.60,1.50 0.16,0.07 fill #e8e0d0 0.30
ellipse 1.10,0.30 0.14,0.06 fill #e8e0d0 0.30
ellipse 0.70,0.30 0.14,0.06 fill #e8e0d0 0.25

# Cracks in the stone (age/wear)
bezier 0.30,0.80 0.50,0.86 0.70,0.82 0.85,0.92 stroke #2a2420 0.6 width 1
bezier 1.70,0.80 1.50,0.86 1.30,0.82 1.15,0.92 stroke #2a2420 0.5 width 1

# Stone sheen highlight (upper left catches light)
arc 1.0,1.0 0.80 200 250 stroke #c0b8a8 0.5 width 2
props.mine-cart:
name: Mine Cart
category: Misc
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.5
placement: floor
room_types: mine-shaft-entrance, mining-camp, deep-mine, tunnel
typical_count: few
clusters_with: cart-track, cart-track-short, cart-track-turn, cart-track-t, cart-track-x, pickaxe, headframe
notes: Iron-bound wooden mine cart sized to straddle cart-track rails (wheels aligned to y=0.37 and y=0.63). Place on a track tile facing along the rail direction. Loaded with coal and ore.
---
# Hitbox — main body blocks light
hitbox rect 0.15,0.20 1.70,0.60 z 0-1.5
# === Wheels — small edge-on ellipses on each rail position ===
# NW wheel (on north rail)
ellipse 0.30,0.37 0.08,0.04 fill #444444 0.95
ellipse 0.30,0.37 0.08,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
line 0.22,0.37 0.38,0.37 stroke #8899aa 0.55 width 1
# NE wheel
ellipse 1.70,0.37 0.08,0.04 fill #444444 0.95
ellipse 1.70,0.37 0.08,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
line 1.62,0.37 1.78,0.37 stroke #8899aa 0.55 width 1
# SW wheel (on south rail)
ellipse 0.30,0.63 0.08,0.04 fill #444444 0.95
ellipse 0.30,0.63 0.08,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
line 0.22,0.63 0.38,0.63 stroke #8899aa 0.55 width 1
# SE wheel
ellipse 1.70,0.63 0.08,0.04 fill #444444 0.95
ellipse 1.70,0.63 0.08,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
line 1.62,0.63 1.78,0.63 stroke #8899aa 0.55 width 1
# === Cart body (wooden box) ===
rect 0.15,0.22 1.70,0.56 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.15,0.22 1.70,0.56 stroke #1a1008 width 2
# Wood grain lines
line 0.40,0.23 0.40,0.77 stroke #2a1400 0.45 width 1
line 0.90,0.23 0.90,0.77 stroke #2a1400 0.45 width 1
line 1.40,0.23 1.40,0.77 stroke #2a1400 0.45 width 1
# === Iron reinforcement bands ===
# Horizontal bands (following the plank lines near the top and bottom)
rect 0.15,0.26 1.70,0.04 fill #555555 0.88
rect 0.15,0.26 1.70,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 0.15,0.70 1.70,0.04 fill #555555 0.88
rect 0.15,0.70 1.70,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
# Vertical iron straps at the corners
rect 0.16,0.22 0.06,0.56 fill #555555 0.88
rect 0.16,0.22 0.06,0.56 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 1.78,0.22 0.06,0.56 fill #555555 0.88
rect 1.78,0.22 0.06,0.56 stroke #222222 width 1
# Mid vertical straps
rect 0.60,0.22 0.04,0.56 fill #555555 0.80
rect 0.60,0.22 0.04,0.56 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 1.36,0.22 0.04,0.56 fill #555555 0.80
rect 1.36,0.22 0.04,0.56 stroke #222222 width 1
# === Cart interior (open top showing the load) ===
# Inner bed (darker — showing we're looking down into the box)
rect 0.24,0.32 1.52,0.36 fill #1a1408 0.95
rect 0.24,0.32 1.52,0.36 stroke #0a0400 width 1
# === Cargo — piled coal and ore chunks ===
circle 0.42,0.42 0.06 fill #2a2a2a 0.95
circle 0.42,0.42 0.06 stroke #0a0a0a
circle 0.66,0.52 0.07 fill #1a1a1a 0.95
circle 0.66,0.52 0.07 stroke #0a0a0a
circle 0.92,0.44 0.055 fill #3a3a3a 0.95
circle 0.92,0.44 0.055 stroke #0a0a0a
circle 1.18,0.56 0.06 fill #2a2a2a 0.95
circle 1.18,0.56 0.06 stroke #0a0a0a
circle 1.44,0.48 0.05 fill #1a1a1a 0.95
circle 1.44,0.48 0.05 stroke #0a0a0a
circle 1.64,0.54 0.045 fill #2a2a2a 0.9
circle 1.64,0.54 0.045 stroke #0a0a0a
# Smaller pebbles in the cracks
circle 0.54,0.60 0.025 fill #4a4040 0.85
circle 0.80,0.38 0.022 fill #4a4a4a 0.85
circle 1.08,0.40 0.020 fill #4a4040 0.85
circle 1.32,0.60 0.022 fill #4a4a4a 0.85
circle 1.54,0.38 0.018 fill #4a4040 0.8
# Bright ore specks (iron, quartz, traces of mineral)
circle 0.58,0.46 0.012 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 0.82,0.56 0.010 fill #a8a8b0 0.85
circle 1.00,0.52 0.012 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 1.26,0.44 0.010 fill #a8a8b0 0.85
circle 1.50,0.58 0.010 fill #8b6914 0.85
# === Coupling hooks (front and back, for linking carts into a train) ===
# Front (east) coupling
rect 1.86,0.48 0.10,0.04 fill #666666 0.95
rect 1.86,0.48 0.10,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
circle 1.96,0.50 0.03 fill #444444 0.95
circle 1.96,0.50 0.03 stroke #222222 width 1
# Back (west) coupling
rect 0.04,0.48 0.10,0.04 fill #666666 0.95
rect 0.04,0.48 0.10,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
circle 0.04,0.50 0.03 fill #444444 0.95
circle 0.04,0.50 0.03 stroke #222222 width 1
# === Rust patches on iron ===
circle 0.20,0.28 0.022 fill #8b4000 0.65
circle 1.75,0.72 0.022 fill #8b4000 0.65
circle 0.80,0.26 0.015 fill #8b4000 0.55
circle 1.30,0.74 0.018 fill #8b4000 0.55
circle 1.82,0.28 0.016 fill #8b4000 0.55
# Coal dust smears on the body edges
ellipse 0.30,0.78 0.08,0.02 fill #0a0a0a 0.5
ellipse 1.60,0.20 0.08,0.02 fill #0a0a0a 0.5

props.mine-plan-pinned:
name: Mine Plan (Pinned)
category: Misc
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.05
placement: wall
room_types: tunnel-mine-worked, mine-shaft-entrance, command-room, guard-post
typical_count: single
clusters_with: tally-board-tokens, desk, chair, ledger-stack, lantern, wall-lantern
notes: A yellowed paper mine-plan pinned to a wall — tunnels, shafts, and pump rooms sketched in faded ink. Some sections scratched out. Place in an office or deputy's station; evocative lore prop.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.12,0.10 0.76,0.70

# footprint 1x1: wall at north (low y), paper visible as flat sheet pinned to wall

# Paper sheet — yellowed parchment with dog-eared fold at bottom-right corner
# Outer shape is a 6-vertex poly: rect with one folded corner at SE
poly 0.12,0.10 0.88,0.10 0.88,0.68 0.80,0.80 0.18,0.80 0.12,0.78 fill #c8b090 0.85
poly 0.12,0.10 0.88,0.10 0.88,0.68 0.80,0.80 0.18,0.80 0.12,0.78 stroke #8b7355 width 1

# Dog-ear fold triangle (the underside of the curled corner, slightly darker)
poly 0.80,0.80 0.88,0.68 0.80,0.72 fill #a89070 0.75
poly 0.80,0.80 0.88,0.68 0.80,0.72 stroke #6b5540 width 1

# Torn/burned bite out of the left edge
poly 0.12,0.40 0.09,0.44 0.14,0.47 0.10,0.50 0.12,0.52 fill #1a1208 0.3

# Stains — brown sepia blobs (water/coal/finger smudges)
ellipse 0.28,0.24 0.09,0.06 fill #6b4e2e 0.35
ellipse 0.62,0.58 0.08,0.05 fill #6b4e2e 0.28
ellipse 0.46,0.70 0.06,0.04 fill #6b4e2e 0.40

# === MAP DRAWING ON THE PAPER ===

# Main horizontal drift running most of the paper width
line 0.18,0.40 0.82,0.40 stroke #3a1f00 width 1

# Branch tunnel — angled up-left (north-west T)
line 0.30,0.40 0.22,0.26 stroke #3a1f00 width 1

# Branch tunnel — angled down-right to a small chamber
line 0.50,0.40 0.58,0.56 stroke #3a1f00 width 1

# Branch tunnel — forking south
line 0.42,0.40 0.40,0.60 stroke #3a1f00 width 1

# Branch tunnel — short stub east
line 0.70,0.40 0.76,0.32 stroke #2a1408 width 1

# Main shaft — square at the west terminus
rect 0.16,0.37 0.06,0.06 stroke #2a1408 width 2

# Pump-room chamber — small circle at SE branch end
circle 0.58,0.56 0.035 stroke #2a1408 width 1

# Secret passage — dashed line segments running SW from the fork
line 0.40,0.60 0.36,0.64 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
line 0.34,0.66 0.30,0.70 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
line 0.28,0.72 0.25,0.75 stroke #3a1f00 width 1

# Tiny X marks — collapses/veins
line 0.65,0.30 0.69,0.34 stroke #2a1408 width 1
line 0.69,0.30 0.65,0.34 stroke #2a1408 width 1
line 0.44,0.62 0.47,0.65 stroke #2a1408 width 1
line 0.47,0.62 0.44,0.65 stroke #2a1408 width 1

# Tiny annotation dots (illegible labels)
circle 0.34,0.36 0.008 fill #2a1408 0.8
circle 0.54,0.44 0.008 fill #2a1408 0.8
circle 0.24,0.28 0.008 fill #2a1408 0.8

# === DELIBERATE SCRATCH-OUT — the narrative hook ===
# A section of the map near the NE has been aggressively crossed out
line 0.62,0.18 0.82,0.34 stroke #1a1208 width 3
line 0.82,0.18 0.62,0.34 stroke #1a1208 width 3
line 0.60,0.26 0.84,0.26 stroke #1a1208 width 3
line 0.72,0.16 0.72,0.36 stroke #1a1208 width 3

# === PINS AT CORNERS ===
circle 0.14,0.12 0.02 fill #444444 0.95
circle 0.14,0.12 0.02 stroke #1a1a1a width 1
circle 0.86,0.12 0.02 fill #444444 0.95
circle 0.86,0.12 0.02 stroke #1a1a1a width 1
circle 0.14,0.78 0.02 fill #444444 0.95
circle 0.14,0.78 0.02 stroke #1a1a1a width 1
circle 0.82,0.76 0.02 fill #444444 0.95
circle 0.82,0.76 0.02 stroke #1a1a1a width 1
props.mine-shaft:
name: Mine Shaft
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: mine-shaft-entrance, mining-camp, deep-mine, cave-living
typical_count: single
clusters_with: headframe, winch-large, cart-track, pickaxe
notes: Vertical shaft opening in the floor — dark pit rimmed with a wooden plank frame; rope descends into darkness
---
# Wooden plank frame around the shaft (square border of heavy timbers)
rect 0.14,0.14 1.72,0.22 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.14,0.14 1.72,0.22 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.14,1.64 1.72,0.22 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.14,1.64 1.72,0.22 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.14,0.14 0.22,1.72 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.14,0.14 0.22,1.72 stroke #3a1f00
rect 1.64,0.14 0.22,1.72 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 1.64,0.14 0.22,1.72 stroke #3a1f00
# Iron corner bolts on the frame
circle 0.25,0.25 0.035 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.75,0.25 0.035 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.25,1.75 0.035 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.75,1.75 0.035 fill #333333 0.95
# Shaft opening — deep black pit
rect 0.36,0.36 1.28,1.28 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
# Inner darkness gradient (giving depth)
rect 0.42,0.42 1.16,1.16 gradient-radial #2a1400 #000000 0.95
# Ladder hooks on the north edge (two iron brackets)
rect 0.72,0.30 0.06,0.10 fill #444444 0.95
rect 0.72,0.30 0.06,0.10 stroke #222222
rect 1.22,0.30 0.06,0.10 fill #444444 0.95
rect 1.22,0.30 0.06,0.10 stroke #222222
# Ladder rungs visible just below the hooks (descending into darkness)
line 0.74,0.42 1.26,0.42 stroke #4a2800 width 2
line 0.74,0.54 1.26,0.54 stroke #4a2800 0.75 width 2
line 0.74,0.66 1.26,0.66 stroke #4a2800 0.5 width 2
line 0.74,0.78 1.26,0.78 stroke #4a2800 0.3 width 2
# Ladder rails (vertical)
line 0.74,0.42 0.74,0.90 stroke #4a2800 0.7 width 2
line 1.26,0.42 1.26,0.90 stroke #4a2800 0.7 width 2
# Rope descending into darkness on the south side
line 1.00,1.20 1.00,1.80 stroke #8b7355 width 3
# Rope fray/knot at the top of descent
circle 1.00,1.20 0.04 fill #8b7355 0.9
circle 1.00,1.20 0.04 stroke #5c3a1e
# Scattered dirt/debris on the frame edges
circle 0.50,0.20 0.02 fill #6a5a4a 0.6
circle 1.40,1.78 0.018 fill #6a5a4a 0.6
circle 0.22,1.20 0.015 fill #6a5a4a 0.6
# Warning chalk marks on the frame
line 0.40,0.20 0.60,0.20 stroke #e8dcc8 0.55 width 1
line 0.50,0.16 0.50,0.24 stroke #e8dcc8 0.55 width 1

# South beam

# East beam

props.mourning-bell:

category: Features
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 5
placement: floor
room_types: crypt, mausoleum, graveyard, chapel, funeral-parlor

notes: Small iron bell on a standalone post, tolled for the dead; place near entrances or altars
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.28 z 0-5

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

circle 0.42,0.48 0.14 stroke #555555

# === Post top (iron disc seen from above) ===

rect 0.46,0.46 0.22,0.04 fill #555555 0.85
rect 0.46,0.46 0.22,0.04 stroke #333333

circle 0.68,0.48 0.12 stroke #333333

circle 0.68,0.48 0.08 fill #1a1a1a 0.7

# === Arm bracket detail ===
circle 0.46,0.48 0.025 fill #666666 0.6

circle 0.68,0.48 0.035 fill #666666 0.5

props.nest-depression:
name: Beast Nest (Depression)
category: Terrain
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.05
placement: center
room_types: cave-bear-lair, monster-lair-small, spider-lair, tunnel-mine-worked, cave-living
typical_count: single
clusters_with: regurgitation-pile, claw-gouge-wall, molted-chitin, bone-pile, rubble, skeleton
notes: A polished bowl-shaped depression worn into the stone floor where a large beast habitually sleeps. Claw-gouged rim, oily center, scattered bone chips and molt fragments. Centerpiece of a beast's lair — signals where the beast rests.
---
# Flat floor decal — no shadow, no light blocking. Reads as a sunken stain.

# === Outermost shadow halo — faint darkening at the edge of the depression ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.95 fill #0a0a0a 0.15
circle 1.0,1.0 0.85 fill #1a1208 0.25

# === Polished bowl interior — main depression ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.7 fill #2a1a0a 0.55
circle 1.0,1.0 0.5 fill #1a0f04 0.7

# Faint wear-polish reflection ring
circle 1.0,1.0 0.55 stroke #4a3a2a 0.2 width 2

# === Radial claw-gouge scars around the rim (irregular, clustered) ===
# Cluster on NW
line 0.72,0.62 0.48,0.38 stroke #0a0604 0.85 width 3
line 0.66,0.70 0.40,0.50 stroke #0a0604 0.8 width 2
line 0.78,0.54 0.60,0.28 stroke #0a0604 0.75 width 2
# NE gap, single gouge
line 1.34,0.66 1.58,0.42 stroke #0a0604 0.8 width 3
# East cluster
line 1.42,0.94 1.72,0.88 stroke #0a0604 0.8 width 2
line 1.38,1.12 1.68,1.18 stroke #0a0604 0.75 width 3
# SE single gouge
line 1.30,1.36 1.52,1.62 stroke #0a0604 0.8 width 2
# SW cluster
line 0.80,1.38 0.60,1.66 stroke #0a0604 0.75 width 2
line 0.68,1.28 0.38,1.44 stroke #0a0604 0.8 width 3
# West single
line 0.60,0.96 0.30,0.94 stroke #0a0604 0.75 width 2

# === Inner parallel belly-drag gouges (beast's underside rub) ===
# Set A — diagonal pair of 3 parallel strokes
line 0.78,0.88 0.92,1.02 stroke #0a0604 0.6 width 1
line 0.82,0.84 0.96,0.98 stroke #0a0604 0.6 width 1
line 0.86,0.80 1.00,0.94 stroke #0a0604 0.6 width 1
# Set B — opposite diagonal, 3 strokes
line 1.10,1.06 1.24,1.20 stroke #0a0604 0.6 width 1
line 1.06,1.10 1.20,1.24 stroke #0a0604 0.6 width 1
line 1.02,1.14 1.16,1.28 stroke #0a0604 0.6 width 1

# === Central oily sweat/musk stain — the hottest spot ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.2 fill #0a0604 0.8
# Tiny glossy highlight — subtle sheen
ellipse 0.96,0.96 0.06,0.03 fill #ffffff 0.15

# === Scattered bone chips ringing the bowl rim ===
poly 0.42,0.82 0.48,0.80 0.50,0.84 0.44,0.86 fill #e8dcc8 0.85
poly 1.58,0.72 1.64,0.74 1.62,0.78 1.56,0.76 fill #d4c4a8 0.8
line 1.50,1.46 1.56,1.52 stroke #e8dcc8 0.85 width 2
poly 0.74,1.50 0.80,1.48 0.82,1.52 0.76,1.54 fill #d4c4a8 0.8
line 0.34,1.18 0.40,1.24 stroke #e8dcc8 0.75 width 2

# === Tiny chitin shards (amber-brown molt fragments) ===
poly 0.56,0.56 0.62,0.54 0.64,0.58 0.60,0.62 fill #3a2008 0.85
poly 1.44,1.22 1.50,1.20 1.52,1.26 1.46,1.28 fill #3a2008 0.8

# === Old blood flecks scattered in the bowl ===
circle 0.88,0.72 0.025 fill #3a0000 0.6
circle 1.18,0.86 0.022 fill #3a0000 0.6
circle 0.94,1.22 0.028 fill #3a0000 0.65

# === Ambient drip stains just outside the depression (beast's arrival trail) ===
circle 0.16,1.02 0.028 fill #1a0808 0.6
circle 1.88,1.12 0.024 fill #1a0808 0.55

# === Stray tooth / splinter outside the bowl (kicked out) ===
poly 1.82,0.44 1.86,0.42 1.88,0.46 1.84,0.48 fill #d4c4a8 0.75

# East facet — medium-light

props.obelisk-astral:

rect 0.45,0.45 1.10,1.10 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# Silver rune marks on each face of the shaft
line 1.0,0.52 1.0,0.62 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.96,0.56 1.04,0.56 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.48,1.0 1.38,1.0 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.44,0.96 1.44,1.04 stroke #c0a0ff width 1

line 0.96,1.44 1.04,1.44 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.52,1.0 0.62,1.0 stroke #c0a0ff width 1

# === Pyramidion — four triangular facets meeting at the apex ===
# North facet (toward viewer, brightest)

# East facet
poly 1.55,0.45 1.55,1.55 1.0,1.0 fill #3a2a68 0.80
# South facet (darkest)
poly 1.55,1.55 0.45,1.55 1.0,1.0 fill #2a1a50 0.75
# West facet
poly 0.45,1.55 0.45,0.45 1.0,1.0 fill #3a2a68 0.80
# Pyramidion outline
poly 0.45,0.45 1.55,0.45 1.55,1.55 0.45,1.55 stroke #4a3a80 width 1

line 1.55,1.55 1.0,1.0 stroke #8060d0 width 1
line 0.45,1.55 1.0,1.0 stroke #8060d0 width 1
# Apex glow — captured starlight
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 fill #e0e0ff 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 stroke #c0a0ff
circle 1.0,1.0 0.06 fill #ffffff 1.0

circle 0.82,0.82 0.018 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 1.18,0.82 0.018 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 1.18,1.18 0.018 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 0.82,1.18 0.018 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
props.obelisk-memorial:

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.55,0.55 0.90,0.90 z 0-12

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Radial cross-section from above — four pyramidion facets meeting at center
# Matches obelisk.prop pattern exactly: pedestal, shaft, pyramidion

# === Base pedestal — dark stone platform ===
rect 0.20,0.20 1.60,1.60 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.7

# Pedestal edge highlights

line 0.20,0.20 0.20,1.80 stroke #555555 width 1

rect 0.40,0.40 1.20,1.20 stroke #333333

# === Carved rune glyphs on shaft surface ===
# NW quadrant runes

line 0.50,0.58 0.62,0.58 stroke #444444 width 1
line 0.52,0.65 0.58,0.72 stroke #444444 width 1

line 1.42,0.60 1.50,0.60 stroke #444444 width 1
line 1.35,0.55 1.45,0.55 stroke #444444 width 1

line 0.50,1.40 0.62,1.40 stroke #444444 width 1

line 1.40,1.35 1.40,1.48 stroke #444444 width 1
line 1.35,1.42 1.48,1.42 stroke #444444 width 1
line 1.42,1.32 1.48,1.38 stroke #444444 width 1

# === Pyramidion — four triangular facets meeting at center ===
# North facet — lightest (catches light)
poly 0.40,0.40 1.60,0.40 1.0,1.0 fill #444444 0.7
# East facet — medium-light
poly 1.60,0.40 1.60,1.60 1.0,1.0 fill #3a3a3a 0.65
# South facet — darkest (shadow side)
poly 1.60,1.60 0.40,1.60 1.0,1.0 fill #2a2a2a 0.6
# West facet — medium
poly 0.40,1.60 0.40,0.40 1.0,1.0 fill #353535 0.6

# Pyramidion outline
poly 0.40,0.40 1.60,0.40 1.60,1.60 0.40,1.60 stroke #222222

# === Edge ridges from corners to center tip ===
line 0.40,0.40 1.0,1.0 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.60,0.40 1.0,1.0 stroke #4a4a4a width 1
line 0.40,1.60 1.0,1.0 stroke #3a3a3a width 1
line 1.60,1.60 1.0,1.0 stroke #333333 width 1

# === Center point — very tip of the pyramidion ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.04 fill #666666 0.6
circle 1.0,1.0 0.04 stroke #555555
props.obelisk-stone-raw:

category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no

placement: center

---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.45,0.45 1.10,1.10 z 0-7

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: radial cross-section from above with four triangular pyramidion facets
# Reference: obelisk.prop style but more weathered/natural

# === Ground shadow (larger, rough) ===
ellipse 1.10,1.10 0.78,0.78 fill #000000 0.12
ellipse 1.15,1.15 0.68,0.68 fill #000000 0.15

# === Base pedestal (irregular natural stone platform, not square) ===
poly 0.22,0.40 0.40,0.20 0.80,0.15 1.25,0.18 1.60,0.22 1.80,0.45 1.85,0.80 1.82,1.25 1.78,1.60 1.60,1.80 1.20,1.85 0.80,1.82 0.40,1.78 0.20,1.55 0.15,1.15 0.18,0.72 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.75

# === Shaft cross-section (rough square, slightly irregular) ===
poly 0.48,0.50 0.52,0.46 1.0,0.42 1.48,0.46 1.52,0.50 1.56,1.0 1.52,1.50 1.48,1.54 1.0,1.58 0.52,1.54 0.48,1.50 0.44,1.0 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.82
poly 0.48,0.50 0.52,0.46 1.0,0.42 1.48,0.46 1.52,0.50 1.56,1.0 1.52,1.50 1.48,1.54 1.0,1.58 0.52,1.54 0.48,1.50 0.44,1.0 stroke #666666

# === Weathering details (cracks, chips in the shaft surface) ===
line 0.60,0.55 0.65,0.75 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.65,0.75 0.58,0.90 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.35,0.55 1.40,0.80 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.60,1.30 0.55,1.48 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.38,1.25 1.42,1.45 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.80,0.50 0.95,0.55 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.05,1.50 1.20,1.45 stroke #555555 width 1

# === Pyramidion (four triangular facets meeting at center, rougher than polished obelisk) ===
# North facet — lightest (catches light)
poly 0.48,0.50 1.52,0.50 1.0,1.0 fill #999999 0.55
# East facet — medium-light
poly 1.52,0.50 1.52,1.50 1.0,1.0 fill #888888 0.50
# South facet — darkest
poly 1.52,1.50 0.48,1.50 1.0,1.0 fill #777777 0.45
# West facet — medium
poly 0.48,1.50 0.48,0.50 1.0,1.0 fill #8a8a8a 0.48

# Pyramidion outline (rough edges)
poly 0.48,0.50 1.52,0.50 1.52,1.50 0.48,1.50 stroke #555555

# Edge ridges (sharp stone ridges from corners to tip — rougher than polished)
line 0.48,0.50 1.0,1.0 stroke #aaaaaa width 1
line 1.52,0.50 1.0,1.0 stroke #999999 width 1
line 0.48,1.50 1.0,1.0 stroke #888888 width 1
line 1.52,1.50 1.0,1.0 stroke #777777 width 1

# Center point (rough apex, not polished)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.05 fill #bbbbbb 0.4
circle 1.0,1.0 0.05 stroke #999999

# Lichen/moss patches (natural weathering)
circle 0.65,0.65 0.04 fill #556644 0.3
circle 1.30,0.70 0.035 fill #556644 0.25
circle 0.70,1.35 0.03 fill #556644 0.25

poly 0.32,0.32 0.42,0.22 0.58,0.22 0.56,0.42 0.44,0.48 0.34,0.44 stroke #1a1a28 width 1
# Secondary facet — right-side cleavage face (darker sheen)

poly 0.58,0.22 0.68,0.34 0.78,0.52 0.66,0.58 0.56,0.42 stroke #05050a width 1

# Central high-sheen streak (light ripple along fracture)
line 0.40,0.28 0.52,0.44 stroke #6a5a8a 0.85 width 2
line 0.52,0.44 0.48,0.60 stroke #4a4a6a 0.75 width 2
# Purple iridescent sheen — edge reflections
line 0.42,0.22 0.58,0.22 stroke #6a5a8a 0.7 width 1
line 0.32,0.32 0.42,0.22 stroke #4a3a6a 0.6 width 1
line 0.58,0.22 0.68,0.34 stroke #5a4a7a 0.6 width 1
# Blue-purple edge along right cleavage
line 0.68,0.34 0.78,0.52 stroke #3a3a58 0.8 width 1
line 0.78,0.52 0.72,0.66 stroke #2a2a48 0.7 width 1
# Bright white highlight point (hot spot catching light)
ellipse 0.46,0.32 0.04,0.02 fill #8a7aaa 0.8
ellipse 0.46,0.32 0.02,0.01 fill #c8b8e8 0.9

poly 0.70,0.62 0.74,0.60 0.72,0.66 fill #000004 0.7

poly 0.84,0.70 0.88,0.68 0.90,0.74 0.86,0.76 stroke #000004
line 0.84,0.70 0.90,0.74 stroke #3a3a58 0.7 width 1
# Faint purple halo sheen (subtle ground reflection)
ellipse 0.50,0.78 0.12,0.02 fill #3a2a5a 0.25

lights: [{"preset":"eldritch-glow","x":1.0,"y":1.0,"color":"#66cc88","intensity":0.4,"radius":4}]
placement: center
room_types: oracle-chamber, divination-room, temple-nave, dark-temple, ritual-chamber
typical_count: single
clusters_with: altar, candle-cluster, ritual-candle, bone-pile, rune-stone
notes: Stone rim around a dark vapor-pit; place at room center. Sibyl/oracle prophesies over the rising green mist.
---
# Flat pit — no shadow, no blocking (the rim itself has minimal height)

# === Stone rim (outer octagonal mass) ===
poly 0.45,0.15 1.55,0.15 1.85,0.45 1.85,1.55 1.55,1.85 0.45,1.85 0.15,1.55 0.15,0.45 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.82
poly 0.45,0.15 1.55,0.15 1.85,0.45 1.85,1.55 1.55,1.85 0.45,1.85 0.15,1.55 0.15,0.45 stroke #444444 width 2

# Cracked weathered stone blocks
line 0.45,0.15 0.45,0.40 stroke #333333 0.6 width 1
line 1.55,0.15 1.55,0.40 stroke #333333 0.6 width 1
line 1.55,1.85 1.55,1.60 stroke #333333 0.6 width 1
line 0.45,1.85 0.45,1.60 stroke #333333 0.6 width 1
line 0.15,0.80 0.40,0.80 stroke #333333 0.5 width 1
line 1.85,0.80 1.60,0.80 stroke #333333 0.5 width 1
line 0.15,1.20 0.40,1.20 stroke #333333 0.5 width 1
line 1.85,1.20 1.60,1.20 stroke #333333 0.5 width 1

# Rim highlights
line 0.45,0.15 1.55,0.15 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1

# === Dark elliptical pit (the mouth) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.62,0.55 fill #0a0a08 0.95
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.62,0.55 stroke #000000 width 2

# Pit depth gradient (dark ring just inside rim)
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.60,0.53 stroke #1a1a18 0.8 width 1
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.54,0.48 fill #050504 0.85

# === Green vapor rising from pit (concentric clouds) ===
# Faint outer mist
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.58,0.50 fill #66cc88 0.15
# Mid mist
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.48,0.40 fill #88dd99 0.18
# Denser inner mist
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.36,0.30 fill #aaee88 0.22
# Brightest at center
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.22,0.18 fill #ccffaa 0.3
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.12,0.10 fill #e8ffc8 0.4

# === Vapor wisps (curling tendrils) ===
bezier 0.70,0.70 0.60,0.50 0.56,0.32 0.52,0.20 stroke #88dd99 0.5 width 2
bezier 1.30,0.70 1.40,0.50 1.44,0.32 1.48,0.22 stroke #88dd99 0.45 width 2
bezier 0.72,1.32 0.60,1.52 0.54,1.68 0.48,1.82 stroke #88dd99 0.45 width 2
bezier 1.28,1.30 1.42,1.48 1.48,1.66 1.54,1.80 stroke #88dd99 0.4 width 2

# Tiny vapor motes
circle 0.56,0.36 0.025 fill #ccffaa 0.7
circle 1.42,0.38 0.022 fill #ccffaa 0.65
circle 0.62,1.60 0.02 fill #ccffaa 0.6
circle 1.46,1.58 0.02 fill #ccffaa 0.6
circle 1.00,0.28 0.018 fill #e8ffc8 0.7
circle 1.00,1.70 0.018 fill #e8ffc8 0.65

# Rim offerings (small dark specks — dried prayers, ash)
circle 0.30,0.50 0.03 fill #3a2818 0.7
circle 1.68,0.50 0.028 fill #3a2818 0.7
circle 0.30,1.50 0.028 fill #3a2818 0.65
circle 1.70,1.48 0.028 fill #3a2818 0.65

---

line 0.14,1.90 1.86,1.90 stroke #5c3a1e 0.5

rect 0.14,2.52 1.72,0.08 fill #444444 0.9

# Side iron bands

rect 1.76,0.40 0.10,2.20 fill #333333 0.85
# Rivets on bands

circle 0.22,1.00 0.015 fill #1a1008 0.95
circle 0.22,1.50 0.015 fill #1a1008 0.95
circle 0.22,2.00 0.015 fill #1a1008 0.95
circle 0.22,2.48 0.015 fill #1a1008 0.95

circle 1.78,1.00 0.015 fill #1a1008 0.95
circle 1.78,1.50 0.015 fill #1a1008 0.95
circle 1.78,2.00 0.015 fill #1a1008 0.95
circle 1.78,2.48 0.015 fill #1a1008 0.95
# Wheel trucks (visible from above as small rectangles at corners)
rect 0.22,0.10 0.22,0.20 fill #1a1008 0.9
rect 0.22,0.10 0.22,0.20 stroke #000000
rect 1.56,0.10 0.22,0.20 fill #1a1008 0.9
rect 1.56,0.10 0.22,0.20 stroke #000000
rect 0.22,2.70 0.22,0.20 fill #1a1008 0.9
rect 0.22,2.70 0.22,0.20 stroke #000000
rect 1.56,2.70 0.22,0.20 fill #1a1008 0.9
rect 1.56,2.70 0.22,0.20 stroke #000000
# Wheel visible bits (iron rim edges)
circle 0.33,0.20 0.06 stroke #555555 width 2
circle 1.67,0.20 0.06 stroke #555555 width 2
circle 0.33,2.80 0.06 stroke #555555 width 2
circle 1.67,2.80 0.06 stroke #555555 width 2
# === Ore chunks inside cart ===
# Big chunks
poly 0.40,0.80 0.70,0.70 0.90,0.90 0.80,1.10 0.60,1.10 0.40,1.00 fill #3a3830 0.95
poly 0.40,0.80 0.70,0.70 0.90,0.90 0.80,1.10 0.60,1.10 0.40,1.00 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.6
poly 0.40,0.80 0.70,0.70 0.90,0.90 0.80,1.10 0.60,1.10 0.40,1.00 stroke #1a1810
# Metal vein
line 0.50,0.90 0.70,0.95 stroke #a07040 0.85 width 2
# More ore chunks
poly 1.10,0.70 1.40,0.80 1.50,1.10 1.30,1.20 1.10,1.10 fill #4a4840 0.95
poly 1.10,0.70 1.40,0.80 1.50,1.10 1.30,1.20 1.10,1.10 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.6
poly 1.10,0.70 1.40,0.80 1.50,1.10 1.30,1.20 1.10,1.10 stroke #1a1810
# Middle chunk
poly 0.60,1.30 0.90,1.40 1.10,1.60 1.00,1.90 0.70,1.90 0.50,1.70 fill #3a3830 0.95
poly 0.60,1.30 0.90,1.40 1.10,1.60 1.00,1.90 0.70,1.90 0.50,1.70 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.55
poly 0.60,1.30 0.90,1.40 1.10,1.60 1.00,1.90 0.70,1.90 0.50,1.70 stroke #1a1810
line 0.70,1.60 0.90,1.70 stroke #a07040 0.8 width 2
# South chunks
poly 1.20,1.60 1.50,1.60 1.60,1.90 1.50,2.20 1.30,2.20 1.20,2.00 fill #4a4840 0.95
poly 1.20,1.60 1.50,1.60 1.60,1.90 1.50,2.20 1.30,2.20 1.20,2.00 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.55
poly 1.20,1.60 1.50,1.60 1.60,1.90 1.50,2.20 1.30,2.20 1.20,2.00 stroke #1a1810
# Small chunks

poly 0.30,2.00 0.50,2.10 0.45,2.40 0.25,2.30 stroke #1a1810

circle 1.30,1.40 0.018 fill #4a4840 0.85
# Iron/copper sparkle glints on ore

circle 1.30,0.95 0.008 fill #e8a860 0.85
circle 0.80,1.60 0.008 fill #8899aa 0.85

# Dust on top of ore

circle 0.74,0.66 0.028 fill #666666 0.8

props.organ:
name: Organ
category: Furniture
footprint: 4x3
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes

placement: wall
room_types: temple, cathedral, chapel, great-hall
typical_count: single

notes: Pipe organ; place against back wall of temples or cathedrals
---
# Hitbox: pipe case and windchest block light, not the open pedalboard area
hitbox rect 0.08,0.08 2.84,1.52 z 0-8

# Footprint 4x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-4. Wall at north (y=0), front at south (y=4).

# === Organ case (dark wood frame enclosing the pipes) ===
rect 0.08,0.08 2.84,3.20 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.08,0.08 2.84,3.20 stroke #2a1400

# === Large display pipes — back row (north), symmetric arch pattern ===
# From top-down these are circles (pipe cross-sections). Largest center, smaller at sides.
# Outer pair (smallest)
circle 0.35,0.45 0.12 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
circle 0.35,0.45 0.12 stroke #555555
circle 2.65,0.45 0.12 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
circle 2.65,0.45 0.12 stroke #555555
# Second pair
circle 0.68,0.42 0.14 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
circle 0.68,0.42 0.14 stroke #555555
circle 2.32,0.42 0.14 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
circle 2.32,0.42 0.14 stroke #555555
# Third pair
circle 1.0,0.40 0.16 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.75
circle 1.0,0.40 0.16 stroke #555555
circle 2.0,0.40 0.16 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.75
circle 2.0,0.40 0.16 stroke #555555
# Center pipe (largest)
circle 1.5,0.38 0.20 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.75

line 1.40,1.70 1.36,1.65 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

circle 1.0,1.0 0.62 stroke #5a3a00 0.5 width 1

# Middle orbital ring
circle 1.0,1.0 0.46 stroke #8b6914 width 2
circle 1.0,1.0 0.46 stroke #5a3a00 0.5 width 1

# Inner orbital ring
circle 1.0,1.0 0.28 stroke #8b6914 width 2
circle 1.0,1.0 0.28 stroke #5a3a00 0.5 width 1

# Radial arm linking all planets to center (brass spoke)
line 1.0,1.0 1.58,0.54 stroke #8b6914 width 2
line 1.0,1.0 1.58,0.54 stroke #5a3a00 0.6 width 1

# Central sun (bright yellow dot)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.09 fill #2a1400 0.8
circle 1.0,1.0 0.075 fill #ffdd66 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.055 fill #fff2a8 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.025 fill #ffffff 0.9

circle 1.22,0.82 0.045 stroke #5a3a00

# Planet bead on middle ring (reddish — mars-like)

circle 0.68,1.34 0.055 stroke #5a1810

# Planet bead on outer ring (green-blue — earth-like)

circle 1.58,0.54 0.065 stroke #1a3048
# Small moon on arm past outer planet
circle 1.68,0.46 0.025 fill #c8c0a8 0.95
circle 1.68,0.46 0.025 stroke #5a5048
# Tiny arm from outer planet to moon
line 1.58,0.54 1.68,0.46 stroke #8b6914 width 1

arc 1.0,1.0 0.80 200 280 stroke #aaaaaa 0.5 width 1

category: Clutter
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes

# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.20,0.14 1.60,0.72

# footprint 2x1: x 0-2, y 0-1. Legs point south (toward high Y) — table has been flopped.

# === Ground shadow beneath tipped table ===
rect 0.24,0.86 1.52,0.06 fill #000000 0.25

# === Tabletop underside (what you see when a table falls on its face — shows unfinished wood, cross-brace) ===

rect 0.20,0.14 1.60,0.72 fill #3a2010 0.35
rect 0.20,0.14 1.60,0.72 stroke #1a0800 width 2

# === Underside plank seams (running east-west) ===

line 0.22,0.48 1.78,0.48 stroke #2a1400 0.6
line 0.22,0.66 1.78,0.66 stroke #2a1400 0.6

# Center junction bolt

circle 1.0,0.50 0.04 stroke #000000

# === Legs — four stubby rectangles poking outward (pointing south since table is flipped) ===
# Leg 1 (NW corner of table, now poking out)
rect 0.14,0.18 0.12,0.22 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.14,0.18 0.12,0.22 stroke #1a0800 width 1
# Leg 2 (NE)
rect 1.74,0.18 0.12,0.22 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 1.74,0.18 0.12,0.22 stroke #1a0800 width 1
# Leg 3 (SW) — splayed south
rect 0.14,0.60 0.12,0.26 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.14,0.60 0.12,0.26 stroke #1a0800 width 1
# Leg 4 (SE)
rect 1.74,0.60 0.12,0.26 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9

# === Leg ends (blunt circle caps — feet) ===

circle 0.20,0.86 0.05 fill #1a0800 0.85

circle 1.74,0.20 0.02 fill #555555 0.85
circle 0.26,0.80 0.02 fill #555555 0.85

line 0.88,0.70 0.98,0.72 stroke #1a0800 0.5 width 1

props.pavise:
name: Pavise
category: Combat
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.5
placement: floor
room_types: battlefield-recent, battlefield, war-camp, ruined-watchtower, fortification
typical_count: few
clusters_with: arrow-stuck, arrow-cluster-ground, corpse-soldier, ballista
notes: Large rectangular siege shield propped upright on the ground; face-out with heraldic emblem, props can hide behind
---
# footprint 1x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-1
# Top-down: shield propped up, facing south (low Y = wall side, high Y = shield face)

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.10,0.30 1.80,0.30 z 0-1.5

# Ground strut / support peg (north side, leaning back)
rect 0.30,0.08 1.40,0.10 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.30,0.08 1.40,0.10 stroke #2a1400

# === Shield face (main body — visible as elongated rect since shield leans slightly) ===
rect 0.10,0.22 1.80,0.52 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.10,0.22 1.80,0.52 stroke #2a1400

# Shield top edge (curved top visible as thin band)
ellipse 1.0,0.22 0.90,0.08 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
ellipse 1.0,0.22 0.90,0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.5
ellipse 1.0,0.22 0.90,0.08 stroke #2a1400

# Metal reinforcement bands (horizontal iron bars)
rect 0.12,0.34 1.76,0.05 fill #555555 0.85
rect 0.12,0.34 1.76,0.05 stroke #333333
rect 0.12,0.58 1.76,0.05 fill #555555 0.85
rect 0.12,0.58 1.76,0.05 stroke #333333

# Rivets on bands
circle 0.22,0.365 0.02 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.60,0.365 0.02 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.00,0.365 0.02 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.40,0.365 0.02 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.78,0.365 0.02 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.22,0.605 0.02 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.60,0.605 0.02 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.00,0.605 0.02 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.40,0.605 0.02 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.78,0.605 0.02 fill #333333 0.95

# === Heraldic emblem (painted shield face) ===
# Heraldic field (red panel)
rect 0.70,0.42 0.60,0.18 fill #aa2020 0.85
rect 0.70,0.42 0.60,0.18 stroke #5a1010
# Gold eagle/cross emblem
poly 0.94,0.46 1.06,0.46 1.08,0.50 1.00,0.54 0.92,0.50 fill #daa520 0.9
poly 0.94,0.46 1.06,0.46 1.08,0.50 1.00,0.54 0.92,0.50 stroke #5a3a00
line 0.86,0.51 1.14,0.51 stroke #daa520 width 2
line 1.00,0.44 1.00,0.58 stroke #daa520 width 2

# Arrow stuck in shield
poly 0.46,0.46 0.50,0.46 0.50,0.58 0.46,0.58 fill #7a5020 0.95
poly 0.46,0.46 0.50,0.46 0.50,0.58 0.46,0.58 stroke #3a1f00
poly 0.44,0.58 0.52,0.58 0.48,0.66 fill #aa3030 0.85
poly 0.44,0.58 0.52,0.58 0.48,0.66 stroke #5a1010

# Battle gouges / scratches
line 0.20,0.50 0.40,0.56 stroke #1a0a04 width 2
line 1.50,0.46 1.70,0.52 stroke #1a0a04 width 2
line 0.30,0.68 0.42,0.72 stroke #1a0a04 width 1

# Drop shadow strip south of shield (indicates shield casts cover on ground)
rect 0.10,0.74 1.80,0.08 fill #1a1208 0.25
props.pearl-cluster:
name: Pearl Cluster
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
placement: floor

lights: [{"preset":"silvery","x":0.5,"y":0.5,"radius":6,"intensity":0.5,"color":"#e0f0ff"}]
---
# Outer soft halo
circle 0.5,0.5 0.44 fill #e0f0ff 0.15
circle 0.5,0.5 0.34 fill #f0f8ff 0.20
# Clam shell base — fan shape (opened)
poly 0.15,0.70 0.25,0.35 0.50,0.22 0.75,0.35 0.85,0.70 0.75,0.78 0.50,0.82 0.25,0.78 fill #d0c0b0 0.9

poly 0.25,0.68 0.32,0.42 0.50,0.32 0.68,0.42 0.75,0.68 0.68,0.74 0.50,0.76 0.32,0.74 stroke #8a7a6a
# Radial ridge lines on shell
line 0.50,0.25 0.20,0.72 stroke #a09080 width 1
line 0.50,0.25 0.35,0.74 stroke #a09080 width 1
line 0.50,0.25 0.50,0.80 stroke #a09080 width 1
line 0.50,0.25 0.65,0.74 stroke #a09080 width 1
line 0.50,0.25 0.80,0.72 stroke #a09080 width 1
# Iridescent sheen (subtle blue-pink gradient overlay)

circle 0.50,0.58 0.11 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 0.50,0.58 0.11 stroke #c0d0e0
circle 0.47,0.54 0.04 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 0.50,0.58 0.06 fill #f8fcff 0.95
# Secondary pearls flanking
circle 0.36,0.64 0.06 fill #f0f8ff 0.95
circle 0.36,0.64 0.06 stroke #c0d0e0
circle 0.35,0.62 0.02 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 0.64,0.64 0.06 fill #f0f8ff 0.95
circle 0.64,0.64 0.06 stroke #c0d0e0
circle 0.63,0.62 0.02 fill #ffffff 0.95
# Tiny seed pearl
circle 0.50,0.70 0.035 fill #ffffff 0.9
circle 0.50,0.70 0.035 stroke #c0d0e0
props.pearl-obelisk:
name: Pearl Obelisk
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.2
placement: corner
room_types: elemental-water-node, aquatic-shrine, sunken-temple, merfolk-grotto
typical_count: few
clusters_with: marid-pavilion, pearl-cluster, water-node-core, coral-pillar
notes: Translucent pearl obelisk — top-down view shows the pedestal base plus the four-sided pyramidion meeting at the glowing apex
lights: [{"preset":"silvery","x":1,"y":1,"radius":10,"intensity":0.8,"color":"#e0f0ff"}]
---
# Hitbox: shaft cross-section blocks light
hitbox rect 0.45,0.45 1.1,1.1 z 0-2.2
# Halo around the apex (slightly larger than the pedestal)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.85 gradient-radial #e0f0ff #103060 0.35
# Base pedestal — pearl marble square platform
rect 0.25,0.25 1.5,1.5 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.80
rect 0.25,0.25 1.5,1.5 stroke #6090b0 width 2
# Pedestal edge highlights (northwest quadrant catches light)
line 0.25,0.25 1.75,0.25 stroke #f8fcff width 1
line 0.25,0.25 0.25,1.75 stroke #f8fcff width 1
# Inner pedestal trim
rect 0.38,0.38 1.24,1.24 fill #d0e0f0 0.45
rect 0.38,0.38 1.24,1.24 stroke #80a0c0 width 1
# Shaft cross-section — main obelisk column (square)
rect 0.45,0.45 1.10,1.10 fill #e8f4ff 0.85
rect 0.45,0.45 1.10,1.10 stroke #6090b0 width 2
# Embedded pearl studs on the shaft faces (one per side)
circle 1.0,0.52 0.05 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 1.0,0.52 0.05 stroke #a0c0e0
circle 1.48,1.0 0.05 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 1.48,1.0 0.05 stroke #a0c0e0
circle 1.0,1.48 0.05 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 1.0,1.48 0.05 stroke #a0c0e0
circle 0.52,1.0 0.05 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 0.52,1.0 0.05 stroke #a0c0e0
# === Pyramidion (tip) — four triangular facets meeting at the apex center ===
# North facet — brightest (sun-facing)
poly 0.45,0.45 1.55,0.45 1.0,1.0 fill #f8fcff 0.8
# East facet — medium-light
poly 1.55,0.45 1.55,1.55 1.0,1.0 fill #d8eaf8 0.7
# South facet — medium (shadow side)
poly 1.55,1.55 0.45,1.55 1.0,1.0 fill #b0c8e0 0.6
# West facet — medium-light
poly 0.45,1.55 0.45,0.45 1.0,1.0 fill #d8eaf8 0.7
# Pyramidion outline
poly 0.45,0.45 1.55,0.45 1.55,1.55 0.45,1.55 stroke #6090b0 width 1
# Edge ridges from each corner to the apex
line 0.45,0.45 1.0,1.0 stroke #ffffff width 1
line 1.55,0.45 1.0,1.0 stroke #e0f0ff width 1
line 0.45,1.55 1.0,1.0 stroke #a0c0e0 width 1
line 1.55,1.55 1.0,1.0 stroke #a0c0e0 width 1
# Apex glow core (captive starlight at the point)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 stroke #c0d8f0
circle 1.0,1.0 0.06 fill #e0f8ff 1.0
circle 1.0,1.0 0.03 fill #ffffff 1.0
# Tiny sparkle points around the apex
circle 0.80,0.80 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.85
circle 1.20,0.80 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.85
circle 1.20,1.20 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.85
circle 0.80,1.20 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.85

circle 0.48,0.60 0.037 stroke #8b7355
circle 0.47,0.59 0.015 fill #ffffff 0.95

circle 0.56,0.63 0.036 stroke #8b7355
circle 0.55,0.62 0.014 fill #ffffff 0.9

circle 0.64,0.64 0.036 fill #f4ecd8 0.95
circle 0.64,0.64 0.036 stroke #8b7355
circle 0.63,0.63 0.014 fill #ffffff 0.9

circle 0.72,0.62 0.035 fill #f8f0dc 0.95
circle 0.72,0.62 0.035 stroke #8b7355
circle 0.71,0.61 0.013 fill #ffffff 0.9

circle 0.79,0.57 0.034 fill #f4ecd8 0.95
circle 0.79,0.57 0.034 stroke #8b7355
circle 0.78,0.56 0.013 fill #ffffff 0.9

circle 0.85,0.52 0.033 fill #f4ecd8 0.95
circle 0.85,0.52 0.033 stroke #8b7355
circle 0.84,0.51 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.9

# Clasp at the end (small gold fitting)

rect 0.13,0.37 0.04,0.03 stroke #5a3a00
rect 0.85,0.50 0.04,0.03 fill #daa520 0.95
rect 0.85,0.50 0.04,0.03 stroke #5a3a00

# Tiny hook detail on one clasp

circle 0.56,0.63 0.016 fill #ffffff 0.5
props.pebble-suspended:
name: Suspended Pebbles
category: Magical

circle 0.7,0.58 0.07 fill #888888 0.4
circle 0.7,0.58 0.07 stroke #444444 width 2
circle 0.68,0.56 0.025 fill #a8a8a8 0.55

circle 0.5,0.75 0.015 fill #e0e8ff 0.5
props.pedestal:
name: Pedestal
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 3
placement: center
room_types: treasure-vault, vault, reliquary, gallery, temple-nave, shrine, wizard-sanctum
typical_count: few
clusters_with: crown-on-cushion, gem-cluster, bust-on-pedestal, crystal-ball, offering-bowl
notes: Tall empty display pedestal for holding artifacts. Place in centers of display halls. Top has a flat surface awaiting an item.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.32 z 0-3

# === Square base plinth (wide) ===
rect 0.14,0.14 0.72,0.72 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
rect 0.14,0.14 0.72,0.72 fill #8a8078 0.35
rect 0.14,0.14 0.72,0.72 stroke #333333 width 2

# Base bevel hints
line 0.14,0.14 0.22,0.22 stroke #aaaaaa 0.6 width 1
line 0.86,0.14 0.78,0.22 stroke #aaaaaa 0.6 width 1
line 0.14,0.86 0.22,0.78 stroke #444444 0.7 width 1
line 0.86,0.86 0.78,0.78 stroke #444444 0.7 width 1

# === Middle column (narrower square, recessed) ===
rect 0.26,0.26 0.48,0.48 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 0.26,0.26 0.48,0.48 fill #999999 0.4
rect 0.26,0.26 0.48,0.48 stroke #444444 width 2

# Shaft fluting (vertical lines)
line 0.32,0.28 0.32,0.72 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1
line 0.40,0.28 0.40,0.72 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1
line 0.48,0.28 0.48,0.72 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1
line 0.56,0.28 0.56,0.72 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1
line 0.64,0.28 0.64,0.72 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1

# === Top capital (circular display surface — wider than column) ===
circle 0.5,0.50 0.26 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.92
circle 0.5,0.50 0.26 fill #d0c8c0 0.4
circle 0.5,0.50 0.26 stroke #444444 width 2

# Capital decorative ring
circle 0.5,0.50 0.23 stroke #777777 0.8 width 1

# Top flat display surface (slightly recessed)
circle 0.5,0.50 0.18 fill #c0b8b0 0.85
circle 0.5,0.50 0.18 stroke #555555

# Faint center ring (where item would sit)
circle 0.5,0.50 0.10 stroke #888888 0.4 width 1

# Marble sheen highlight
arc 0.5,0.50 0.24 200 250 stroke #ffffff 0.8 width 1
arc 0.5,0.50 0.24 300 340 stroke #ffffff 0.5 width 1

# Age cracks
line 0.30,0.78 0.38,0.84 stroke #444444 0.5 width 1
line 0.60,0.20 0.66,0.26 stroke #444444 0.4 width 1
props.pedestal-stone:
name: Stone Pedestal
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: center
room_types: mansion-grand-hall, reliquary, temple-nave, shrine, gallery
typical_count: few
clusters_with: bust-on-pedestal, gem-loose, crystal-ball, offering-bowl, altar
notes: Empty stone display pedestal — grey marble column for holding artifacts
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.30 z 0-2.5

# Base plinth (widest at bottom)
rect 0.16,0.68 0.68,0.16 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.9
rect 0.16,0.68 0.68,0.16 fill #8a8078 0.4
rect 0.16,0.68 0.68,0.16 stroke #333333
# Plinth top lip
line 0.16,0.72 0.84,0.72 stroke #555555 width 1
# Column shaft (circular, narrow)
circle 0.5,0.50 0.22 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.92
circle 0.5,0.50 0.22 fill #d0c8c0 0.3
circle 0.5,0.50 0.22 stroke #555555
# Column fluting (vertical ridges)
line 0.32,0.34 0.32,0.64 stroke #888888 0.7
line 0.38,0.30 0.38,0.66 stroke #888888 0.7
line 0.44,0.28 0.44,0.68 stroke #888888 0.7
line 0.50,0.28 0.50,0.68 stroke #888888 0.7
line 0.56,0.28 0.56,0.68 stroke #888888 0.7
line 0.62,0.30 0.62,0.66 stroke #888888 0.7
line 0.68,0.34 0.68,0.64 stroke #888888 0.7
# Column top (capital — slightly wider)
circle 0.5,0.30 0.26 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.92
circle 0.5,0.30 0.26 fill #e0d8d0 0.4
circle 0.5,0.30 0.26 stroke #555555
# Capital decorative ring
circle 0.5,0.30 0.24 stroke #888888 0.7 width 1
circle 0.5,0.30 0.20 stroke #888888 0.6 width 1
# Top flat surface (where item would go — slightly recessed)
circle 0.5,0.30 0.16 fill #c0b8b0 0.8
circle 0.5,0.30 0.16 stroke #666666
# Marks where something used to sit (faint ring)
circle 0.5,0.30 0.09 stroke #888888 0.35 width 1
# Carved ornamental border at top edge
arc 0.5,0.30 0.24 20 80 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1
arc 0.5,0.30 0.24 100 170 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1
arc 0.5,0.30 0.24 200 260 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1

category: Furniture

---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.04,0.04 1.92,1.92 z 0-4

# footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2
# Piano cabinet body (dark polished wood — most of footprint)

rect 0.04,0.04 1.92,1.92 stroke #000000 width 2

rect 0.00,0.00 2.00,0.18 stroke #000000 width 2

# Molding detail line
line 0.04,0.16 1.96,0.16 stroke #daa520 0.5 width 1
line 0.04,0.20 1.96,0.20 stroke #daa520 0.35 width 1

# Top surface sheen (polished lacquer highlight — subtle radial)
arc 1.00,1.00 0.80 200 260 stroke #4a2828 0.4 width 2

# Gold inlay emblem centered on top
ellipse 1.00,0.60 0.24,0.08 fill #daa520 0.65
ellipse 1.00,0.60 0.24,0.08 stroke #5a3a00 width 1
# Emblem inner detail
line 0.82,0.60 1.18,0.60 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 1

circle 1.06,0.60 0.02 fill #5a3a00 0.85
