rect 0.10,1.38 1.80,0.08 stroke #000000 width 1
# Brass candle holders on ledge (two)
circle 0.30,1.42 0.04 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.30,1.42 0.04 stroke #5a3a00 width 1
circle 1.70,1.42 0.04 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 1.70,1.42 0.04 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

# Fallboard / key cover strip (closed or just above the keys)
rect 0.06,1.50 1.88,0.12 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.95
rect 0.06,1.50 1.88,0.12 fill #000000 0.35
rect 0.06,1.50 1.88,0.12 stroke #000000 width 1

# Ivory keyboard band at south edge (facing the player)
rect 0.08,1.66 1.84,0.20 fill #e8dcc8 0.98
rect 0.08,1.66 1.84,0.20 stroke #1a0a00 width 2

# White key dividers (vertical lines)

line 0.92,1.66 0.92,1.86 stroke #1a0a00 0.85 width 1
line 1.06,1.66 1.06,1.86 stroke #1a0a00 0.85 width 1
line 1.20,1.66 1.20,1.86 stroke #1a0a00 0.85 width 1
line 1.34,1.66 1.34,1.86 stroke #1a0a00 0.85 width 1
line 1.48,1.66 1.48,1.86 stroke #1a0a00 0.85 width 1
line 1.62,1.66 1.62,1.86 stroke #1a0a00 0.85 width 1
line 1.76,1.66 1.76,1.86 stroke #1a0a00 0.85 width 1

notes: Wooden pushcart with top tray of whole pies and cut slices, checkered cloth draped; vendor cart
---
# footprint 1x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-1
# Top-down: elongated cart viewed from above — top tray south (customer side), handle north

# === HITBOX ===

# === Cart base (rectangular wood chassis) ===

# Plank grooves
line 0.10,0.42 1.90,0.42 stroke #2a1400 width 1
line 0.10,0.64 1.90,0.64 stroke #2a1400 width 1

# === Checkered cloth draped over one end ===
# Base cloth (white)

rect 0.12,0.70 0.50,0.22 stroke #8b7355
# Red check squares
rect 0.16,0.72 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85
rect 0.28,0.72 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85
rect 0.40,0.72 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85
rect 0.52,0.72 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85
rect 0.22,0.80 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85
rect 0.34,0.80 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85
rect 0.46,0.80 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85
rect 0.16,0.86 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85
rect 0.28,0.86 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85
rect 0.40,0.86 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85
rect 0.52,0.86 0.06,0.06 fill #c82020 0.85

# === Pies (on top of cart tray) ===
# Pie 1 (whole apple pie, west)
circle 0.32,0.40 0.14 fill #c4a882 0.95
circle 0.32,0.40 0.14 stroke #5c3a1e
# Lattice top
line 0.22,0.38 0.42,0.42 stroke #8b6914 width 2
line 0.22,0.42 0.42,0.38 stroke #8b6914 width 2
line 0.24,0.32 0.40,0.48 stroke #8b6914 width 2
line 0.40,0.32 0.24,0.48 stroke #8b6914 width 2
# Pie crust edge detail (scalloped)
arc 0.32,0.40 0.14 0 360 stroke #3a2a18 width 1

# Pie 2 (berry pie, center)
circle 0.72,0.42 0.14 fill #c4a882 0.95
circle 0.72,0.42 0.14 stroke #5c3a1e
# Open top showing berries
circle 0.72,0.42 0.10 fill #4a0a28 0.9
circle 0.72,0.42 0.10 stroke #2a0414
# Berry highlights
circle 0.68,0.40 0.018 fill #8b1040 0.9
circle 0.74,0.40 0.018 fill #8b1040 0.9
circle 0.76,0.45 0.018 fill #8b1040 0.9
circle 0.70,0.45 0.018 fill #8b1040 0.9

# Pie 3 (cream pie, east)
circle 1.12,0.42 0.14 fill #f8e8c0 0.95
circle 1.12,0.42 0.14 stroke #5c3a1e
# Swirl of cream
bezier 1.04,0.42 1.08,0.36 1.16,0.40 1.20,0.44 stroke #8b6914 width 2
bezier 1.20,0.44 1.14,0.46 1.10,0.42 1.08,0.46 stroke #8b6914 width 2

# Pie 4 (cut pie showing slices removed, east)
arc 1.52,0.42 0.14 30 330 fill #c4a882 0.95
arc 1.52,0.42 0.14 30 330 stroke #5c3a1e
# Cut face (filling visible)
poly 1.52,0.42 1.64,0.35 1.64,0.49 fill #8b5020 0.9
poly 1.52,0.42 1.64,0.35 1.64,0.49 stroke #3a2a18
# Pie tin outer rim
arc 1.52,0.42 0.14 0 360 stroke #3a2a18 width 1

# === Individual slice on a plate ===
circle 1.76,0.28 0.08 fill #e8dcc8 0.9
circle 1.76,0.28 0.08 stroke #8b7355
# The slice (wedge)
poly 1.76,0.28 1.82,0.22 1.82,0.34 fill #c4a882 0.95
poly 1.76,0.28 1.82,0.22 1.82,0.34 stroke #5c3a1e

# === Push handle (north side, small bar) ===
rect 0.40,0.08 1.20,0.06 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.40,0.08 1.20,0.06 stroke #1a0a04

# === Wheels (visible at cart corners) ===
circle 0.20,0.86 0.08 fill #3a2418 0.9
circle 0.20,0.86 0.08 stroke #1a0a04
circle 0.20,0.86 0.04 stroke #1a0a04 width 2
circle 1.80,0.86 0.08 fill #3a2418 0.9
circle 1.80,0.86 0.08 stroke #1a0a04
circle 1.80,0.86 0.04 stroke #1a0a04 width 2

# Chalkboard sign/menu (small rect on cart)
rect 1.70,0.22 0.12,0.10 fill #1a1408 0.9

props.pillar:

---

line 0.5,0.88 0.5,0.80 stroke #666666
line 0.26,0.84 0.31,0.77 stroke #666666
line 0.12,0.64 0.20,0.62 stroke #666666
line 0.12,0.36 0.20,0.38 stroke #666666
line 0.26,0.16 0.31,0.23 stroke #666666
line 0.69,0.23 0.64,0.28 stroke #666666
line 0.31,0.23 0.36,0.28 stroke #666666
# Column core (center detail)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.06 fill #888888 0.5
circle 0.5,0.5 0.06 stroke #666666

props.pillar-crystal:
name: Crystal Pillar
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 4
lights: [{"preset":"arcane-blue","x":0.5,"y":0.5,"color":"#88ddff","intensity":0.7,"radius":6}]
placement: corner
room_types: crystal-grotto, wizard-sanctum, elemental-earth-node, demiplane-laboratory, underdark-outpost, astral-anchor
typical_count: few
clusters_with: crystal-cluster, crystal-shard, pillar, pillar-marble
notes: Tall crystal column pillar — top-down cross-section (NOT a vertical shaft). Radial facets emanate from a bright center. Place at room corners or flanking a path.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.38 z 0-4

# Outer cyan halo (presence in the air)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.48 gradient-radial #66bbdd #0a1828 0.4
# Soft glow ring
circle 0.5,0.5 0.42 fill #5599cc 0.22

# === Outer shaft cross-section (hexagonal crystal column seen from above) ===
poly 0.50,0.12 0.83,0.30 0.83,0.70 0.50,0.88 0.17,0.70 0.17,0.30 fill #4488bb 0.75
poly 0.50,0.12 0.83,0.30 0.83,0.70 0.50,0.88 0.17,0.70 0.17,0.30 stroke #224466 width 2

# === Radial facets (six triangular wedges meeting at the apex) ===
# NE facet (lit — catches sky light)
poly 0.50,0.12 0.83,0.30 0.50,0.50 fill #88ccee 0.7
# E facet
poly 0.83,0.30 0.83,0.70 0.50,0.50 fill #66aadd 0.65
# SE facet (darkest)
poly 0.83,0.70 0.50,0.88 0.50,0.50 fill #3366aa 0.55
# SW facet
poly 0.50,0.88 0.17,0.70 0.50,0.50 fill #4477bb 0.55
# W facet
poly 0.17,0.70 0.17,0.30 0.50,0.50 fill #5588bb 0.6
# NW facet (lit)
poly 0.17,0.30 0.50,0.12 0.50,0.50 fill #77bbdd 0.7

# === Facet ridge lines (sharp edges from each outer vertex to apex) ===
line 0.50,0.12 0.50,0.50 stroke #bbddff width 2
line 0.83,0.30 0.50,0.50 stroke #aaccee width 1
line 0.83,0.70 0.50,0.50 stroke #335577 width 1
line 0.50,0.88 0.50,0.50 stroke #224466 width 1
line 0.17,0.70 0.50,0.50 stroke #446688 width 1
line 0.17,0.30 0.50,0.50 stroke #aaccee width 1

# === Inner rune etchings on the shaft (subtle) ===
line 0.44,0.28 0.56,0.28 stroke #bbddff 0.6 width 1
line 0.70,0.48 0.78,0.52 stroke #bbddff 0.5 width 1
line 0.22,0.50 0.30,0.46 stroke #bbddff 0.5 width 1
line 0.44,0.72 0.56,0.72 stroke #bbddff 0.45 width 1

# === Apex highlight — hottest point (the tip catching light) ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.08 fill #ccefff 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.05 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 0.50,0.50 0.02 fill #ffffff 1.0

# Prismatic glints radiating from apex
line 0.50,0.50 0.56,0.44 stroke #ccffcc 0.6 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.44,0.56 stroke #ffccff 0.6 width 1
props.pillar-floating:

category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: no

---

hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.36 z 0-2.0
# Drifting mist halo beneath the hovering pillar
circle 0.5,0.5 0.46 gradient-radial #c0a0ff #1a1028 0.25

circle 0.5,0.5 0.28 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
# Fluting marks (6 radial grooves)
line 0.50,0.22 0.50,0.32 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
line 0.50,0.68 0.50,0.78 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
line 0.72,0.38 0.64,0.42 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
line 0.28,0.38 0.36,0.42 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
line 0.72,0.62 0.64,0.58 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
line 0.28,0.62 0.36,0.58 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
# Jagged crack — the pillar is broken across its length
bezier 0.28,0.52 0.38,0.46 0.58,0.54 0.72,0.48 stroke #2a2038 width 2
line 0.44,0.50 0.46,0.54 stroke #2a2038 width 1
line 0.56,0.51 0.54,0.47 stroke #2a2038 width 1

circle 0.14,0.28 0.04 stroke #4a3a60
circle 0.86,0.74 0.03 fill #8070a0 0.75
circle 0.86,0.74 0.03 stroke #4a3a60
circle 0.86,0.22 0.025 fill #8070a0 0.70
# Dust motes
circle 0.20,0.72 0.012 fill #e0e0ff 0.7
circle 0.78,0.30 0.012 fill #e0e0ff 0.7
# Center highlight (polished marble)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.08 fill #f8f0ff 0.5

arc 1.45,0.52 0.1 0 180 stroke #4a2800 width 2

category: Magical
footprint: 1x1
facing: no

notes: Fragment of a shattered arcane seal — a broken engraved disc, split in half. A residual mana trail spirals from its fractured edge.
lights: [{"preset":"astral","x":0.5,"y":0.5,"radius":6,"intensity":0.5,"color":"#a080ff"}]
---

poly 0.12,0.5 0.14,0.32 0.22,0.2 0.36,0.14 0.48,0.14 0.44,0.24 0.48,0.32 0.4,0.42 0.46,0.5 0.42,0.58 0.5,0.66 0.46,0.76 0.48,0.86 0.36,0.86 0.22,0.8 0.14,0.68 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85

# Disc inner ring (half visible)
arc 0.5,0.5 0.28 90 270 stroke #8060d0 width 1

# Engraved runes on the disc face
line 0.26,0.4 0.32,0.4 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.26,0.5 0.34,0.5 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.26,0.6 0.32,0.6 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
circle 0.28,0.3 0.025 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
circle 0.28,0.7 0.025 stroke #e0e0ff width 1

# Small detached fragment (the other broken piece)

poly 0.66,0.3 0.74,0.28 0.8,0.36 0.78,0.44 0.7,0.44 0.64,0.38 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.7,0.34 0.74,0.38 stroke #c0a0ff width 1

# Mana trail spiraling from the fracture (violet residue)

bezier 0.48,0.7 0.58,0.72 0.64,0.66 0.7,0.58 stroke #a080ff width 2
bezier 0.5,0.5 0.62,0.52 0.72,0.5 0.82,0.56 stroke #c0a0ff width 1

# Sparkling residue motes along the trail

circle 0.68,0.52 0.016 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 0.76,0.62 0.014 fill #e0e0ff 0.8
circle 0.84,0.5 0.012 fill #c0a0ff 0.7

---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.18,0.22 0.64,0.56

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: crumpled cloth with oily dark patches and metal-polish grey streaks

# === Subtle oil halo spread ===
ellipse 0.50,0.52 0.36,0.30 fill #2a1810 0.3

# === Main rag body (crumpled irregular cloth) ===
poly 0.18,0.38 0.28,0.24 0.44,0.22 0.58,0.24 0.72,0.28 0.82,0.40 0.80,0.58 0.70,0.72 0.54,0.78 0.38,0.76 0.26,0.68 0.20,0.56 fill #8b7355 0.85

# === Cloth fold creases ===
bezier 0.24,0.44 0.34,0.40 0.48,0.46 0.60,0.42 stroke #5c3a1e 0.7 width 2
bezier 0.28,0.58 0.40,0.62 0.56,0.60 0.68,0.56 stroke #5c3a1e 0.65 width 2
line 0.36,0.30 0.42,0.48 stroke #5c3a1e 0.55 width 1
line 0.58,0.34 0.54,0.54 stroke #5c3a1e 0.55 width 1

# === Oil stains (dark patches with sheen) ===
# Large oil splotch
ellipse 0.40,0.48 0.14,0.10 fill #1a1208 0.85
ellipse 0.40,0.48 0.14,0.10 stroke #0a0604 0.6
# Oil sheen highlight
ellipse 0.38,0.46 0.08,0.05 fill #3a2a1a 0.7
ellipse 0.36,0.44 0.04,0.025 fill #8b7355 0.6

# Smaller oil patch
ellipse 0.62,0.58 0.10,0.07 fill #1a1208 0.8
ellipse 0.62,0.58 0.10,0.07 stroke #0a0604 0.55
ellipse 0.60,0.56 0.05,0.03 fill #3a2a1a 0.65

# Tiny spot
ellipse 0.52,0.36 0.05,0.03 fill #1a1208 0.75

# === Metal polish residue (grey-silver streaks) ===
bezier 0.28,0.56 0.36,0.52 0.48,0.58 0.54,0.54 stroke #666666 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.48,0.68 0.56,0.64 0.62,0.66 0.68,0.62 stroke #777777 0.45 width 2
line 0.34,0.42 0.44,0.40 stroke #888888 0.45 width 1

# === Damp sheen along high points (oil-catching light) ===
bezier 0.32,0.32 0.42,0.30 0.54,0.32 0.62,0.30 stroke #aa9078 0.5 width 2
arc 0.50,0.40 0.08 200 260 stroke #aa9078 0.45 width 1

# === Faint stain ring soaking into the cloth ===
ellipse 0.40,0.48 0.18,0.13 stroke #3a2010 0.55 width 1

# === Tiny metallic fleck in the polish residue ===
poly 0.46,0.44 0.48,0.42 0.50,0.44 0.48,0.46 fill #8899aa 0.7

# === Frayed cloth edge ===
line 0.18,0.40 0.15,0.38 stroke #5c3a1e 0.7 width 1
line 0.18,0.46 0.14,0.48 stroke #5c3a1e 0.6 width 1
line 0.82,0.44 0.86,0.46 stroke #5c3a1e 0.6 width 1
line 0.80,0.58 0.84,0.60 stroke #5c3a1e 0.6 width 1

props.poppet:

# === HITBOX ===
selection ellipse 0.5,0.5 0.22,0.34

# Ground contact shadow

circle 0.50,0.24 0.10 fill #b89870 0.35
circle 0.50,0.24 0.10 stroke #4a3820 width 1

line 0.44,0.34 0.56,0.34 stroke #1a0804 width 1

line 0.48,0.20 0.46,0.24 stroke #1a0804 width 1
# Right eye — X

line 0.52,0.20 0.54,0.24 stroke #1a0804 width 1

line 0.47,0.28 0.47,0.30 stroke #1a0804 width 1
line 0.49,0.28 0.49,0.30 stroke #1a0804 width 1
line 0.51,0.28 0.51,0.30 stroke #1a0804 width 1
line 0.53,0.28 0.53,0.30 stroke #1a0804 width 1

# === Arms (stubby cloth limbs, spread at sides) ===
poly 0.34,0.40 0.22,0.44 0.18,0.52 0.24,0.54 0.34,0.48 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.82
poly 0.34,0.40 0.22,0.44 0.18,0.52 0.24,0.54 0.34,0.48 stroke #4a3820 width 1

poly 0.66,0.40 0.78,0.44 0.82,0.52 0.76,0.54 0.66,0.48 stroke #4a3820 width 1

line 0.49,0.40 0.51,0.42 stroke #3a2818 0.7 width 1
line 0.49,0.46 0.51,0.48 stroke #3a2818 0.7 width 1
line 0.49,0.52 0.51,0.54 stroke #3a2818 0.7 width 1
line 0.49,0.58 0.51,0.60 stroke #3a2818 0.7 width 1

circle 0.56,0.36 0.02 fill #cc3322 0.95
circle 0.56,0.36 0.02 stroke #660000
# Pin 2 — in arm

circle 0.20,0.42 0.02 fill #cc3322 0.95
circle 0.20,0.42 0.02 stroke #660000

circle 0.40,0.80 0.018 fill #1a1a1a 0.95
circle 0.40,0.80 0.018 stroke #000000
# Pin 4 — in head

props.portal-stela:
name: Portal Stela
category: Magical
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.4
placement: center
room_types: astral-anchor, astral-sea, planar-nexus, arcane

clusters_with: obelisk-astral, silver-cord-pylon, astral-anchor-stone
notes: Silver-framed portal stela — top-down view of the arched stone frame with the swirling violet portal visible through the opening on the floor
lights: [{"preset":"astral","x":1,"y":1,"radius":14,"intensity":1,"color":"#b080ff"}]
---
# Hitbox — the stone frame blocks light (not the open portal in the center)
hitbox rect 0.30,0.22 1.40,0.35 z 0-2.4
hitbox rect 0.30,1.42 1.40,0.35 z 0-2.4
hitbox rect 0.22,0.30 0.35,1.40 z 0-2.4
hitbox rect 1.42,0.30 0.35,1.40 z 0-2.4
# Violet portal glow bleeding past the frame
circle 1.0,1.0 0.90 gradient-radial #b080ff #1a0828 0.35
# === Stone frame (arched doorway top-down) ===
# North face of the frame
rect 0.22,0.22 1.56,0.35 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 0.22,0.22 1.56,0.35 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# South face
rect 0.22,1.42 1.56,0.35 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 0.22,1.42 1.56,0.35 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# West jamb
rect 0.22,0.22 0.35,1.56 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 0.22,0.22 0.35,1.56 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# East jamb
rect 1.42,0.22 0.35,1.56 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 1.42,0.22 0.35,1.56 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# Arched corners (curved inner edges)
arc 0.58,0.58 0.18 180 270 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
arc 1.42,0.58 0.18 270 360 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
arc 1.42,1.42 0.18 0 90 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
arc 0.58,1.42 0.18 90 180 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# Silver rune engravings on the frame faces
line 0.60,0.38 0.90,0.38 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.10,0.38 1.40,0.38 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.60,1.62 0.90,1.62 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.10,1.62 1.40,1.62 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.38,0.60 0.38,0.90 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.38,1.10 0.38,1.40 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.62,0.60 1.62,0.90 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.62,1.10 1.62,1.40 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
# === Portal surface (swirling violet plane visible through the opening) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.42 fill #4a2080 0.9
circle 1.0,1.0 0.42 stroke #c0a0ff width 2
# Swirl spiral
bezier 1.0,0.62 1.30,0.70 1.35,1.10 1.12,1.30 stroke #a080ff width 2
bezier 1.12,1.30 0.88,1.35 0.68,1.10 0.78,0.82 stroke #a080ff width 2
bezier 0.78,0.82 0.95,0.72 1.10,0.82 1.05,0.98 stroke #c0a0ff width 2
# Bright inner core of the vortex
circle 1.0,1.0 0.16 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 1.0,1.0 0.08 fill #ffffff 0.95
# Small orbiting sparks around the portal
circle 0.70,0.66 0.022 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
circle 1.32,0.74 0.020 fill #e0e0ff 0.85
circle 1.30,1.28 0.022 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
circle 0.68,1.30 0.020 fill #e0e0ff 0.85
# Finial caps at each outer corner of the frame
circle 0.30,0.30 0.08 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 0.30,0.30 0.08 stroke #4a3a80
circle 1.70,0.30 0.08 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 1.70,0.30 0.08 stroke #4a3a80
circle 1.70,1.70 0.08 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 1.70,1.70 0.08 stroke #4a3a80
circle 0.30,1.70 0.08 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 0.30,1.70 0.08 stroke #4a3a80

circle 1.28,0.43 0.035 stroke #333333

circle 1.46,0.43 0.035 stroke #333333
circle 1.64,0.43 0.035 fill #555555 0.85
circle 1.64,0.43 0.035 stroke #333333

circle 0.82,0.82 0.015 fill #777777 0.85

props.prayer-stone:
name: Prayer Stone
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.4
placement: floor
room_types: druid-grove, shrine-roadside, burial-mound, standing-stones-circle, hermit-cell
typical_count: few
clusters_with: cairn-sacred, shrine-stone, coin-offering, feather-bundle, ribbon-tied, prayer-stone
notes: Small smooth oval stone worn by generations of kneeling supplicants; carved with a single blessing rune
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection ellipse 0.5,0.52 0.26,0.20

# Main stone body (smoothed oval — low domed river rock)
ellipse 0.50,0.54 0.26,0.20 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
ellipse 0.50,0.54 0.26,0.20 fill #6a6058 0.35
ellipse 0.50,0.54 0.26,0.20 stroke #2a2420
# Darker underside / ground contact line
arc 0.50,0.54 0.26 30 150 stroke #1a1410 0.7 width 1
# Weathering crack (old hairline fracture)
bezier 0.34,0.56 0.44,0.52 0.56,0.58 0.66,0.54 stroke #1a1410 0.6 width 1
# Secondary shorter crack
line 0.46,0.64 0.52,0.68 stroke #1a1410 0.5 width 1
# Polished highlight (worn-smooth catch of light)
ellipse 0.46,0.48 0.10,0.04 fill #a89e8e 0.35
ellipse 0.46,0.48 0.06,0.02 fill #c8bea8 0.45
# Carved blessing rune — simple spiral in center

arc 0.50,0.54 0.035 60 330 stroke #2a1800 0.85 width 1
circle 0.50,0.54 0.012 fill #2a1800 0.9
# Small parallel tally scratches beside rune
line 0.36,0.52 0.40,0.50 stroke #2a1800 0.75 width 1
line 0.36,0.56 0.40,0.54 stroke #2a1800 0.7 width 1
# Tiny moss fleck at base (north edge, shaded)
ellipse 0.38,0.40 0.04,0.02 fill #4a5a2a 0.7
ellipse 0.62,0.42 0.03,0.015 fill #3a4a22 0.6
# Warm lichen dot
circle 0.64,0.62 0.018 fill #8a7a20 0.55

props.printing-press:
name: Printing Press
category: Furniture
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 6
placement: center
room_types: scriptorium-mundane, guildhall, workshop, publisher-shop
typical_count: single
clusters_with: type-case, ledger-stack, ink-stone, sand-shaker
notes: Wooden hand-press with central platen, lead-screw lever arm, and type bed below; centerpiece of a print shop
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 z 0-6

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down view: large wooden frame with central platen, type bed at south, screw mechanism above, lever extending east

# === Main press frame (heavy oak body) ===
rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 stroke #1a0e00 width 2

# Inner frame bevel
rect 0.24,0.24 1.52,1.52 stroke #3a1f00 0.6 width 1

# === Corner uprights (posts — thicker dark squares at corners) ===
rect 0.18,0.18 0.22,0.22 fill #2a1400 0.85
rect 0.18,0.18 0.22,0.22 stroke #1a0e00
rect 1.60,0.18 0.22,0.22 fill #2a1400 0.85
rect 1.60,0.18 0.22,0.22 stroke #1a0e00
rect 0.18,1.60 0.22,0.22 fill #2a1400 0.85
rect 0.18,1.60 0.22,0.22 stroke #1a0e00
rect 1.60,1.60 0.22,0.22 fill #2a1400 0.85
rect 1.60,1.60 0.22,0.22 stroke #1a0e00

# === Top cross-beam (spans between uprights — holds the screw) ===
rect 0.40,0.30 1.20,0.20 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.40,0.30 1.20,0.20 stroke #1a0e00 width 2

# === Central screw / platen assembly (brass threaded column seen from above) ===
circle 1.00,1.00 0.32 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 1.00,1.00 0.32 stroke #5a3a00 width 2
# Screw threads (concentric rings)
circle 1.00,1.00 0.28 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 1
circle 1.00,1.00 0.24 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 1
circle 1.00,1.00 0.20 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 1
circle 1.00,1.00 0.16 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 1
# Central screw shaft (dark iron core)
circle 1.00,1.00 0.10 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.00,1.00 0.10 stroke #1a1a1a width 2
# Screw head cross-slot
line 0.92,1.00 1.08,1.00 stroke #1a1a1a width 2
line 1.00,0.92 1.00,1.08 stroke #1a1a1a width 2

# === Lever arm (extends from the screw toward east — the operator pulls this) ===
rect 1.00,0.98 0.78,0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 1.00,0.98 0.78,0.08 stroke #1a0e00
# Lever handle wrap (leather grip)
rect 1.60,0.96 0.16,0.12 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.85
rect 1.60,0.96 0.16,0.12 stroke #3a1f00
# Handle end-cap
circle 1.76,1.02 0.035 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 1.76,1.02 0.035 stroke #5a3a00

# Rail highlight (polished top edge at y=0.36)

circle 0.70,0.63 0.018 fill #333333 0.95

props.raven-perch:
name: Raven Perch
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1.8
placement: floor
room_types: cabin-witch, bog-witch-hut, wizard-sanctum, hermit-cell, study, cultist-shrine
typical_count: single
clusters_with: bone-pile-small, skull-small, cabinet, bookshelf, cauldron-large
notes: Wooden T-perch with a black raven sitting on top. Raven faces south (high Y). Top-down, you see the raven from above — black silhouette with wings folded.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.40,0.12 0.20,0.76

# Ground contact shadow (at base of perch)
ellipse 0.50,0.84 0.20,0.05 fill #1a1008 0.4

# === Wooden perch base (circular foot) ===
circle 0.50,0.82 0.18 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
circle 0.50,0.82 0.18 stroke #2a1400 width 2
# Base grain
line 0.36,0.82 0.64,0.82 stroke #3a1f00 0.5 width 1
line 0.38,0.78 0.62,0.78 stroke #3a1f00 0.4 width 1

# === Vertical post (seen from above — narrow rectangle running N-S since viewer sees the top) ===
rect 0.47,0.25 0.06,0.55 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.47,0.25 0.06,0.55 stroke #2a1400 width 1

# === Cross-arm of the T perch (where the raven sits) ===
rect 0.30,0.32 0.40,0.06 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.30,0.32 0.40,0.06 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# End caps of cross-arm
circle 0.30,0.35 0.035 fill #3a1f00 0.85
circle 0.30,0.35 0.035 stroke #1a0800
circle 0.70,0.35 0.035 fill #3a1f00 0.85
circle 0.70,0.35 0.035 stroke #1a0800

# === Raven (top-down view — black silhouette perched on the cross-arm) ===
# Main body mass (raven body + folded wings seen from above)
poly 0.50,0.20 0.44,0.24 0.38,0.32 0.36,0.42 0.40,0.52 0.48,0.56 0.52,0.56 0.60,0.52 0.64,0.42 0.62,0.32 0.56,0.24 fill #0a0a0a 0.95
poly 0.50,0.20 0.44,0.24 0.38,0.32 0.36,0.42 0.40,0.52 0.48,0.56 0.52,0.56 0.60,0.52 0.64,0.42 0.62,0.32 0.56,0.24 stroke #050505 width 1

# Folded wing demarcation lines (suggests feathers layered over body)
bezier 0.40,0.30 0.38,0.36 0.40,0.46 0.46,0.52 stroke #1a1a1a width 1
bezier 0.60,0.30 0.62,0.36 0.60,0.46 0.54,0.52 stroke #1a1a1a width 1

# Shoulder ridge (where wings meet body)
qbezier 0.42,0.30 0.50,0.28 0.58,0.30 stroke #1a1a1a 0.8 width 1

# Feather lines on folded wings
line 0.42,0.38 0.38,0.46 stroke #1a1a1a 0.7 width 1
line 0.44,0.42 0.40,0.50 stroke #1a1a1a 0.6 width 1
line 0.58,0.38 0.62,0.46 stroke #1a1a1a 0.7 width 1
line 0.56,0.42 0.60,0.50 stroke #1a1a1a 0.6 width 1

# === Head (small dome at top — north of body) ===
circle 0.50,0.22 0.06 fill #0a0a0a 0.95
circle 0.50,0.22 0.06 stroke #050505

# Beak (pointing south, but since raven faces south, beak is at south of head)
poly 0.48,0.26 0.52,0.26 0.50,0.30 fill #1a1a1a 0.95
poly 0.48,0.26 0.52,0.26 0.50,0.30 stroke #050505

# Eye (tiny bright point — glint)
circle 0.48,0.21 0.012 fill #ffcc00 0.85
circle 0.48,0.21 0.006 fill #ffffff 0.95

# === Tail feathers (pointing south, splayed below body) ===
poly 0.46,0.54 0.54,0.54 0.56,0.64 0.50,0.66 0.44,0.64 fill #0a0a0a 0.9
poly 0.46,0.54 0.54,0.54 0.56,0.64 0.50,0.66 0.44,0.64 stroke #050505
# Tail feather lines
line 0.48,0.54 0.46,0.64 stroke #1a1a1a 0.7 width 1
line 0.50,0.54 0.50,0.66 stroke #1a1a1a 0.7 width 1
line 0.52,0.54 0.54,0.64 stroke #1a1a1a 0.7 width 1

# Feet / claws gripping the perch (small dark prongs at front of body)
line 0.46,0.54 0.44,0.58 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 0.54,0.54 0.56,0.58 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

# Subtle iridescent sheen on wing (dark blue-purple tint)
ellipse 0.44,0.40 0.04,0.08 fill #1a1a2a 0.5
ellipse 0.56,0.40 0.04,0.08 fill #1a1a2a 0.5

# Droppings on the perch (tiny white speck)
circle 0.72,0.36 0.012 fill #ccccaa 0.7

category: Library & Study

# === HITBOX === (small — glasses barely occlude)
selection rect 0.22,0.40 0.56,0.20

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

qbezier 0.435,0.50 0.50,0.47 0.565,0.50 stroke #8b6914 width 1

footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes

height: 1.5

ellipse 0.68,0.60 0.04,0.025 fill #e8dcc8 0.55

ellipse 0.42,0.70 0.03,0.02 fill #e8dcc8 0.5

# Outer wax layer (with dripping texture around rim)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.14 fill #f0e4d0 0.92
circle 0.50,0.50 0.14 stroke #a89870 width 2

# Wax drip tongues down the sides (top-down they appear as bulges on the rim)

circle 0.38,0.52 0.04 stroke #a89870
circle 0.62,0.48 0.035 fill #e8dcc8 0.85
circle 0.62,0.48 0.035 stroke #a89870

circle 0.54,0.62 0.035 stroke #a89870

# Inner wax cavity (melted center — pool where wick sits)

circle 0.50,0.50 0.08 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

# === Wick (char tip) ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.02 fill #1a1008 0.95

# === Flame (concentric glow layers) ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.10 fill #cc3300 0.25
circle 0.50,0.48 0.07 fill #e85500 0.4
poly 0.46,0.50 0.50,0.40 0.54,0.50 fill #ff8800 0.6
poly 0.47,0.50 0.50,0.42 0.53,0.50 fill #ffaa00 0.7
poly 0.48,0.50 0.50,0.44 0.52,0.50 fill #ffcc66 0.8
poly 0.49,0.49 0.50,0.46 0.51,0.49 fill #ffe8aa 0.9

props.ritual-circle:
name: Ritual Circle
category: Religious
footprint: 4x4
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
lights: [{"preset":"infernal-flame","x":1.5,"y":1.5}]
placement: center
room_types: wizard-sanctum, ritual-chamber, dark-temple, summoning-room

notes: Dark ritual area; place at room center. Similar to magic-circle but sinister
---
# Outer containment ring — thick band with dark crimson glow
circle 2,2 1.95 fill #2a0000 0.2
ring 2,2 1.95 1.7 fill #4a0000 0.4
ring 2,2 1.95 1.7 stroke #8b0000 width 2
# Blood drip marks extending outward from outer ring

line 3.65,2.95 3.85,3.1 stroke #8b0000 0.6 width 2

line 2.95,3.65 3.08,3.85 stroke #8b0000 0.55 width 2
line 0.2,1.3 0.05,1.15 stroke #8b0000 0.5 width 2
# Decorative arc segments between outer and inner rings (blood wards)
arc 2,2 1.8 0 30 stroke #aa2020 0.5 width 2
arc 2,2 1.8 60 90 stroke #aa2020 0.5 width 2
arc 2,2 1.8 120 150 stroke #aa2020 0.5 width 2
arc 2,2 1.8 180 210 stroke #aa2020 0.5 width 2
arc 2,2 1.8 240 270 stroke #aa2020 0.5 width 2
arc 2,2 1.8 300 330 stroke #aa2020 0.5 width 2
# Inner ritual circle
circle 2,2 1.5 stroke #8b0000 width 2
# Rune tick marks radiating outward at 30-degree intervals
line 2,0.1 2,0.35 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 3.65,1.05 3.428,1.177 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 3.65,2.95 3.428,2.823 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 2,3.9 2,3.65 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 0.35,2.95 0.572,2.823 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 0.35,1.05 0.572,1.177 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 2.95,0.35 2.823,0.572 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 3.9,2 3.65,2 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 2.95,3.65 2.823,3.428 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 1.05,3.65 1.177,3.428 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 0.1,2 0.35,2 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
line 1.05,0.35 1.177,0.572 stroke #aa2020 0.6 width 2
# Inner pentagon fill (subtle dark glow) — inverted, point south
poly 2.882,0.786 3.427,2.464 2,3.5 0.573,2.464 1.118,0.786 fill #4a0000 0.12
# Inverted pentagram star lines — point facing SOUTH (down)
line 2,3.5 1.118,0.786 stroke #8b0000 width 3
line 2,3.5 2.882,0.786 stroke #8b0000 width 3
line 0.573,2.464 2.882,0.786 stroke #8b0000 width 3
line 3.427,2.464 1.118,0.786 stroke #8b0000 width 3
line 0.573,2.464 3.427,2.464 stroke #8b0000 width 3
# Vertex rune stones — dark fill + bright stroke + inner glow
circle 2,3.5 0.16 fill #2a0000 0.7
circle 2,3.5 0.16 stroke #cc3333 width 2
circle 2,3.5 0.09 fill #ff4444 0.6
circle 0.573,2.464 0.16 fill #2a0000 0.7
circle 0.573,2.464 0.16 stroke #cc3333 width 2
circle 0.573,2.464 0.09 fill #ff4444 0.6
circle 3.427,2.464 0.16 fill #2a0000 0.7
circle 3.427,2.464 0.16 stroke #cc3333 width 2
circle 3.427,2.464 0.09 fill #ff4444 0.6
circle 1.118,0.786 0.16 fill #2a0000 0.7
circle 1.118,0.786 0.16 stroke #cc3333 width 2
circle 1.118,0.786 0.09 fill #ff4444 0.6
circle 2.882,0.786 0.16 fill #2a0000 0.7
circle 2.882,0.786 0.16 stroke #cc3333 width 2
circle 2.882,0.786 0.09 fill #ff4444 0.6
# Center focal point — concentric glow layers (dark to bright)
circle 2,2 0.5 fill #2a0000 0.2
circle 2,2 0.38 fill #4a0000 0.25
circle 2,2 0.26 fill #8b0000 0.3
circle 2,2 0.16 fill #cc3333 0.45
circle 2,2 0.08 fill #ff4444 0.6

rect 0.46,0.20 1.08,0.44 stroke #2a1400

line 1.40,0.22 1.40,0.62 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

rect 0.44,0.16 1.12,0.08 stroke #2a1400

rect 1.52,0.56 0.10,0.18 stroke #2a1400

ellipse 1.57,0.58 0.08,0.05 fill #5c3a1e 0.9

props.rocking-horse:
name: Rocking Horse
category: Furniture
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.8
placement: floor
room_types: nursery, mansion-bedroom-master
typical_count: single
clusters_with: wooden-toy, dollhouse, blocks-pile, cradle, child-bed
notes: Carved wooden rocking horse viewed from above; curved rockers extend east and west beneath the body
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.20,0.10 1.60,0.80

# Curved rocker rails (visible as arcs extending beyond body on east/west sides)
bezier 0.14,0.28 0.08,0.50 0.08,0.50 0.14,0.72 stroke #3a1f00 width 4
bezier 1.86,0.28 1.92,0.50 1.92,0.50 1.86,0.72 stroke #3a1f00 width 4
bezier 0.14,0.28 0.08,0.50 0.08,0.50 0.14,0.72 stroke #6b4e2e 0.5 width 2
bezier 1.86,0.28 1.92,0.50 1.92,0.50 1.86,0.72 stroke #6b4e2e 0.5 width 2
# Horse body — elongated oval spanning east-west
ellipse 1.00,0.50 0.64,0.22 texfill polyhaven/brown_planks_09 0.85
ellipse 1.00,0.50 0.64,0.22 fill #a08058 0.45
ellipse 1.00,0.50 0.64,0.22 stroke #3a1f00
# Horse head — rounded ellipse at west (head faces west; rotation will place north as front)
# Actually per spec: head at north with pointy ears, tail at south. But this is 1x2 (wide). Head at WEST end (low x), tail at EAST.
# Re-reading: "head with pointy ears at north, a tail at south" — with facing:yes at 0° front=south.
# For 1x2 (wide horse), head goes at one end. Place head at WEST for now (consistent with rocker direction).
# Head oval at west end
ellipse 0.28,0.50 0.16,0.14 texfill polyhaven/brown_planks_09 0.85
ellipse 0.28,0.50 0.16,0.14 fill #a08058 0.55
ellipse 0.28,0.50 0.16,0.14 stroke #3a1f00
# Pointy ears (two small triangles at head)
poly 0.22,0.36 0.28,0.30 0.30,0.40 fill #8a6838 0.9
poly 0.22,0.36 0.28,0.30 0.30,0.40 stroke #3a1f00
poly 0.22,0.64 0.28,0.70 0.30,0.60 fill #8a6838 0.9
poly 0.22,0.64 0.28,0.70 0.30,0.60 stroke #3a1f00
# Muzzle — white painted spot at very west
ellipse 0.18,0.50 0.06,0.05 fill #e8dcc0 0.9
ellipse 0.18,0.50 0.06,0.05 stroke #5c3a1e
# Painted eye
circle 0.24,0.44 0.02 fill #1a0a04 0.95
# Painted red bridle strap across muzzle
line 0.16,0.46 0.28,0.44 stroke #8a2020 width 2
line 0.16,0.54 0.28,0.56 stroke #8a2020 width 2
# Neck connecting head to body
poly 0.36,0.40 0.48,0.38 0.48,0.62 0.36,0.60 fill #a08058 0.88
poly 0.36,0.40 0.48,0.38 0.48,0.62 0.36,0.60 stroke #3a1f00
# Painted dark mane stripe running along neck and back
bezier 0.32,0.36 0.60,0.32 1.20,0.32 1.50,0.38 stroke #4a2810 width 3
# Mane tuft detail strokes
line 0.40,0.34 0.42,0.30 stroke #4a2810 width 1
line 0.60,0.32 0.62,0.28 stroke #4a2810 width 1
line 0.90,0.32 0.92,0.28 stroke #4a2810 width 1
# Front legs (attached under body, west side)
rect 0.44,0.22 0.10,0.14 fill #8a6838 0.88
rect 0.44,0.22 0.10,0.14 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.44,0.64 0.10,0.14 fill #8a6838 0.88
rect 0.44,0.64 0.10,0.14 stroke #3a1f00
# Rear legs (east side)
rect 1.46,0.22 0.10,0.14 fill #8a6838 0.88
rect 1.46,0.22 0.10,0.14 stroke #3a1f00
rect 1.46,0.64 0.10,0.14 fill #8a6838 0.88
rect 1.46,0.64 0.10,0.14 stroke #3a1f00
# Tail — flowing dark strokes at east end
bezier 1.64,0.44 1.78,0.42 1.84,0.40 1.88,0.34 stroke #4a2810 width 2
bezier 1.64,0.50 1.80,0.50 1.86,0.50 1.90,0.48 stroke #4a2810 width 2
bezier 1.64,0.56 1.78,0.58 1.84,0.60 1.88,0.66 stroke #4a2810 width 2
# Saddle — small red painted saddle on back
ellipse 1.00,0.50 0.18,0.10 fill #8a2020 0.85
ellipse 1.00,0.50 0.18,0.10 stroke #4a1010
props.rolled-blanket:
name: Rolled Blanket
category: Clutter
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.4
placement: floor
room_types: house-small, campsite-traveler, barracks, hermit-cell, peasant-hovel, cabin-abandoned

notes: A rolled-up woolen blanket, tied with twine. Top-down shows a stubby cylinder with end spirals visible and a cord cinch across the middle.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.16,0.30 0.68,0.44

# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1
# Top-down: cylindrical roll lying east-west, end caps showing the spiral wrap, twine cord across middle

# === Shadow beneath the roll ===
ellipse 0.50,0.58 0.36,0.10 fill #000000 0.22

# === Main cylinder body (the blanket roll) ===
rect 0.16,0.30 0.68,0.44 fill #8a7858 0.92
rect 0.16,0.30 0.68,0.44 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.55
rect 0.16,0.30 0.68,0.44 stroke #4a3828

# === End caps (west and east) — showing spiral wrap ===
# West end
ellipse 0.16,0.52 0.06,0.22 fill #6a5a3a 0.95
ellipse 0.16,0.52 0.06,0.22 stroke #3a2810
# Spiral rings on west end
ellipse 0.16,0.52 0.045,0.17 stroke #4a3828 0.7 width 1
ellipse 0.16,0.52 0.030,0.12 stroke #4a3828 0.6 width 1
ellipse 0.16,0.52 0.015,0.06 stroke #4a3828 0.6 width 1

# East end
ellipse 0.84,0.52 0.06,0.22 fill #6a5a3a 0.95
ellipse 0.84,0.52 0.06,0.22 stroke #3a2810
# Spiral rings on east end
ellipse 0.84,0.52 0.045,0.17 stroke #4a3828 0.7 width 1
ellipse 0.84,0.52 0.030,0.12 stroke #4a3828 0.6 width 1
ellipse 0.84,0.52 0.015,0.06 stroke #4a3828 0.6 width 1

# === Fabric texture lines along length ===
line 0.22,0.38 0.78,0.38 stroke #5a4830 0.5 width 1
line 0.22,0.48 0.78,0.48 stroke #5a4830 0.5 width 1
line 0.22,0.58 0.78,0.58 stroke #5a4830 0.5 width 1
line 0.22,0.68 0.78,0.68 stroke #5a4830 0.5 width 1

# === Twine cord wrap across the middle ===
rect 0.46,0.28 0.08,0.48 fill #3a2810 0.9
rect 0.46,0.28 0.08,0.48 stroke #1a0f00

# Cord knot (small loop on top)
circle 0.50,0.34 0.035 fill #3a2810 0.95
circle 0.50,0.34 0.035 stroke #1a0f00
# Knot tails
bezier 0.48,0.36 0.44,0.42 0.42,0.48 0.40,0.52 stroke #3a2810 width 1
bezier 0.52,0.36 0.56,0.42 0.58,0.48 0.60,0.52 stroke #3a2810 width 1

# === Subtle highlight along top ===
arc 0.50,0.52 0.34 200 340 stroke #a89878 0.4 width 1

ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.65,0.55 fill #1a0f00 0.15

# Central thickest root mass (knotted cluster)

circle 1.00,0.95 0.18 fill #3a1f00 0.45
circle 1.00,0.95 0.18 stroke #1a1008 width 2
circle 1.00,0.95 0.12 fill #4a2800 0.85
circle 1.00,0.95 0.06 fill #6b4e2e 0.7

# Major thick roots draping across cell (thick bezier tendrils)

bezier 1.00,0.95 0.72,0.66 0.44,0.38 0.20,0.16 stroke #1a1008 width 2

bezier 1.00,0.95 0.72,1.20 0.48,1.46 0.22,1.72 stroke #1a1008 width 2
bezier 1.00,0.95 1.28,1.20 1.52,1.46 1.78,1.72 stroke #5c3a1e width 8
bezier 1.00,0.95 1.28,1.20 1.52,1.46 1.78,1.72 stroke #1a1008 width 2

# Mid-thickness roots
bezier 1.00,0.95 0.62,1.00 0.30,1.05 0.06,1.02 stroke #4a2800 width 5
bezier 1.00,0.95 0.62,1.00 0.30,1.05 0.06,1.02 stroke #1a1008 width 1
bezier 1.00,0.95 1.38,1.00 1.70,1.05 1.94,1.02 stroke #4a2800 width 5
bezier 1.00,0.95 1.38,1.00 1.70,1.05 1.94,1.02 stroke #1a1008 width 1
bezier 1.00,0.95 0.96,0.62 0.92,0.32 0.98,0.06 stroke #5c3a1e width 5
bezier 1.00,0.95 0.96,0.62 0.92,0.32 0.98,0.06 stroke #1a1008 width 1
bezier 1.00,0.95 1.04,1.28 1.06,1.58 1.02,1.90 stroke #5c3a1e width 5
bezier 1.00,0.95 1.04,1.28 1.06,1.58 1.02,1.90 stroke #1a1008 width 1

# Crossing secondary roots (weaving through)
bezier 0.30,0.50 0.60,0.55 0.85,0.70 1.15,0.80 stroke #3a1f00 width 4
bezier 1.70,0.50 1.40,0.55 1.15,0.70 0.85,0.80 stroke #3a1f00 width 4
bezier 0.30,1.50 0.60,1.40 0.85,1.25 1.15,1.18 stroke #3a1f00 width 4
bezier 1.70,1.50 1.40,1.40 1.15,1.25 0.85,1.18 stroke #3a1f00 width 4

# Fine tertiary root hairs
bezier 0.50,0.30 0.40,0.20 0.30,0.14 0.18,0.08 stroke #6b4e2e width 2
bezier 1.50,0.30 1.60,0.20 1.70,0.14 1.82,0.08 stroke #6b4e2e width 2
bezier 0.40,0.70 0.28,0.66 0.18,0.62 0.06,0.58 stroke #6b4e2e width 2
bezier 1.60,0.70 1.72,0.66 1.82,0.62 1.94,0.58 stroke #6b4e2e width 2
bezier 0.50,1.30 0.38,1.38 0.28,1.44 0.16,1.50 stroke #6b4e2e width 2
bezier 1.50,1.30 1.62,1.38 1.72,1.44 1.84,1.50 stroke #6b4e2e width 2
bezier 0.40,1.10 0.28,1.14 0.18,1.16 0.06,1.20 stroke #6b4e2e width 2
bezier 1.60,1.10 1.72,1.14 1.82,1.16 1.94,1.20 stroke #6b4e2e width 2

# Dangling tendril tips (small fine roots trailing down)
line 0.20,0.16 0.14,0.22 stroke #4a2800 width 2

line 0.22,1.72 0.16,1.78 stroke #4a2800 width 2
line 1.78,1.72 1.84,1.78 stroke #4a2800 width 2
line 0.98,0.06 0.94,0.02 stroke #5c3a1e width 2
line 1.02,1.90 1.06,1.96 stroke #5c3a1e width 2

circle 0.72,0.66 0.035 stroke #1a1008
circle 1.28,0.66 0.035 fill #3a1f00 0.85

circle 1.56,0.38 0.028 fill #3a1f00 0.8

# Highlight on central knot (wetness / sap)

circle 0.50,0.50 0.11 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.75

line 0.70,0.25 0.30,0.75 stroke #5c3a1e width 3

line 0.08,0.12 0.00,0.18 stroke #5c3a1e width 2

line 0.04,0.55 0.00,0.65 stroke #6b4e2e width 2

line 0.95,0.50 0.99,0.58 stroke #4a2800 width 2

line 0.12,0.92 0.08,0.85 stroke #6b4e2e width 2

line 0.88,0.88 0.92,0.80 stroke #4a2800 width 2

line 0.50,0.95 0.58,0.99 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

props.rope-bridge:
name: Rope Bridge
category: Structure
footprint: 1x4
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.3
placement: floor
room_types: chasm-crossing, ravine, jungle, forest, wilderness, cave-entrance, dockside, swamp
typical_count: single
clusters_with: anchor-post, broken-bridge-stub, winch-platform, bridge-wood, rope-coil, fence-post, fence-rope
notes: Rickety rope bridge with plank treads — runs east-west across a gap. Pair with anchor-posts at the ends; place over a pit or chasm fill.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.04,0.20 3.92,0.60

# Outer rope rails (north and south long ropes, drawn first)
line 0.04,0.24 3.96,0.24 stroke #8b7355 width 3
line 0.04,0.76 3.96,0.76 stroke #8b7355 width 3

# Rope strand highlights
line 0.04,0.22 3.96,0.22 stroke #a89070 0.7 width 1
line 0.04,0.78 3.96,0.78 stroke #a89070 0.7 width 1

# Wooden plank treads (regular spacing, slightly irregular widths for rustic feel)
rect 0.10,0.30 0.38,0.44 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.10,0.30 0.38,0.44 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.56,0.32 0.40,0.40 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.56,0.32 0.40,0.40 stroke #3a1f00
rect 1.04,0.30 0.38,0.44 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 1.04,0.30 0.38,0.44 stroke #3a1f00
rect 1.50,0.32 0.38,0.42 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 1.50,0.32 0.38,0.42 stroke #3a1f00
rect 1.96,0.30 0.40,0.44 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 1.96,0.30 0.40,0.44 stroke #3a1f00
rect 2.44,0.32 0.38,0.42 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 2.44,0.32 0.38,0.42 stroke #3a1f00
rect 2.90,0.30 0.38,0.44 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 2.90,0.30 0.38,0.44 stroke #3a1f00
rect 3.36,0.32 0.40,0.42 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 3.36,0.32 0.40,0.42 stroke #3a1f00

# Rope tie-offs binding each plank to the rails (small knot markers)
circle 0.12,0.24 0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 0.46,0.24 0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 0.58,0.24 0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 1.06,0.24 0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 1.52,0.24 0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 1.98,0.24 0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 2.46,0.24 0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 2.92,0.24 0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 3.38,0.24 0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 3.76,0.24 0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.9

# Subtle sag in the rail lines (quadratic bezier mid-bridge)
qbezier 1.80,0.22 2.00,0.27 2.20,0.22 stroke #7a6345 0.55 width 1
qbezier 1.80,0.78 2.00,0.74 2.20,0.78 stroke #7a6345 0.55 width 1
props.rope-coil:
name: Rope Coil
category: Nautical
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: dock, ship, warehouse
typical_count: few
clusters_with: dock-cleat, anchor
notes: Place near dock cleats or on ship decks
---
# Ground shadow
circle 0.50,0.50 0.42 fill #3a2a1a 0.12

# Coil loops — each ring is one wrap of rope with visible thickness
# Outermost coil
ring 0.50,0.50 0.42 0.36 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.6
ring 0.50,0.50 0.42 0.36 stroke #5c4a32
# Second coil
ring 0.50,0.50 0.34 0.28 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.6
ring 0.50,0.50 0.34 0.28 stroke #5c4a32
# Third coil
ring 0.50,0.50 0.26 0.20 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.6
ring 0.50,0.50 0.26 0.20 stroke #5c4a32
# Inner coil
ring 0.50,0.50 0.18 0.12 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.6
ring 0.50,0.50 0.18 0.12 stroke #5c4a32

# Center hole
circle 0.50,0.50 0.10 fill #2a2a2a 0.25

# Highlight along top of each coil (rope catching light)
arc 0.50,0.50 0.39 200 320 stroke #9a8868 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.31 210 310 stroke #9a8868 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.23 220 300 stroke #9a8868 width 2

# Shadow between coils (depth)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.36 stroke #3a2a1a 0.3
circle 0.50,0.50 0.28 stroke #3a2a1a 0.3
circle 0.50,0.50 0.20 stroke #3a2a1a 0.3

# Trailing rope end
line 0.86,0.55 0.90,0.64 stroke #7a6a4a width 5
line 0.90,0.64 0.87,0.74 stroke #7a6a4a width 4
line 0.87,0.74 0.82,0.80 stroke #7a6a4a width 3
# Rope end outline
line 0.86,0.55 0.90,0.64 stroke #5c4a32 width 2
line 0.90,0.64 0.87,0.74 stroke #5c4a32 width 2

circle 1.50,0.66 0.02 fill #daa520 0.8

props.round-table:
name: Round Meeting Table
category: Furniture
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: center
room_types: sanctum-order, council-chamber, war-room, meeting-room, knightly-hall, guild-hall
typical_count: single
clusters_with: chair, chair-upholstered, candelabra, scroll, map
notes: Large ceremonial round meeting table with an engraved circular pattern at center; place seats around it. Arthurian style.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 1.0,1.0 0.90 z 0-2.5

# footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2. Center (1.0, 1.0).

# === Base shadow under table ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.94 fill #1a0f00 0.3

# === Outer rim band (darker wood) ===

category: Nautical

# Criss-cross straps

line 0.78,0.42 0.58,0.52 stroke #5a3a18 width 2

props.sarcophagus:
name: Sarcophagus
category: Containers
footprint: 3x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 3
placement: center
room_types: crypt, tomb, burial-chamber
typical_count: few
clusters_with: candle-cluster, grave-marker, burial-urn
notes: Stone coffin; single for boss tomb, rows for mass burial. Place prominently
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.04,0.04 1.92,2.92 z 0-3

# Footprint 3x2: x 0-2, y 0-3. Front south.

# === Stone base (outermost layer) ===
rect 0.04,0.04 1.92,2.92 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.75
rect 0.04,0.04 1.92,2.92 stroke #444444

# === Beveled step 1 — first raised ledge ===
# Diagonal bevel lines from base corners to step 1 corners (depth illusion)
line 0.04,0.04 0.16,0.16 stroke #666666
line 1.96,0.04 1.84,0.16 stroke #666666
line 0.04,2.96 0.16,2.84 stroke #666666
line 1.96,2.96 1.84,2.84 stroke #666666
# Step 1 surface
rect 0.16,0.16 1.68,2.68 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.8
rect 0.16,0.16 1.68,2.68 stroke #555555

# === Beveled step 2 — second raised ledge ===
line 0.16,0.16 0.28,0.28 stroke #777777
line 1.84,0.16 1.72,0.28 stroke #777777
line 0.16,2.84 0.28,2.72 stroke #777777
line 1.84,2.84 1.72,2.72 stroke #777777
# Step 2 surface
rect 0.28,0.28 1.44,2.44 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.8
rect 0.28,0.28 1.44,2.44 stroke #666666

# === Lid surface (topmost, raised) ===
# Bevel lines from step 2 to lid
line 0.28,0.28 0.38,0.38 stroke #999999
line 1.72,0.28 1.62,0.38 stroke #999999
line 0.28,2.72 0.38,2.62 stroke #999999
line 1.72,2.72 1.62,2.62 stroke #999999
# Lid slab
rect 0.38,0.38 1.24,2.24 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
rect 0.38,0.38 1.24,2.24 stroke #888888

# === Lid edge highlights (light catches the raised edges) ===
# Top and left edges = lighter (facing light)
line 0.38,0.38 1.62,0.38 stroke #aaaaaa width 2
line 0.38,0.38 0.38,2.62 stroke #aaaaaa width 2
# Bottom and right edges = darker (shadow side)
line 0.38,2.62 1.62,2.62 stroke #555555 width 2
line 1.62,0.38 1.62,2.62 stroke #555555 width 2

# === Decorative trim on lid ===
rect 0.46,0.46 1.08,2.08 stroke #666666

# === Carved cross (centered on lid) ===
# Vertical beam
rect 0.88,0.65 0.24,1.70 fill #555555 0.2
rect 0.88,0.65 0.24,1.70 stroke #555555
# Horizontal beam
rect 0.55,1.10 0.90,0.24 fill #555555 0.2
rect 0.55,1.10 0.90,0.24 stroke #555555
# Inner cross detail (thinner, slightly lighter)
rect 0.93,0.72 0.14,1.56 fill #777777 0.15
rect 0.60,1.15 0.80,0.14 fill #777777 0.15

# === Corner rosettes ===
circle 0.46,0.46 0.06 stroke #666666
circle 0.46,0.46 0.03 fill #777777 0.5
circle 1.54,0.46 0.06 stroke #666666
circle 1.54,0.46 0.03 fill #777777 0.5
circle 0.46,2.54 0.06 stroke #666666
circle 0.46,2.54 0.03 fill #777777 0.5
circle 1.54,2.54 0.06 stroke #666666
circle 1.54,2.54 0.03 fill #777777 0.5
props.sarcophagus-shadow:

category: Containers
footprint: 2x1

---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.15,0.10 0.70,1.80 z 0-2

# footprint 2x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-2. Front faces south.

# === Stone base (outermost layer) — dark weathered stone ===
rect 0.04,0.04 0.92,1.92 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.65
rect 0.04,0.04 0.92,1.92 stroke #333333

# === Beveled step — raised ledge ===
line 0.04,0.04 0.12,0.12 stroke #444444
line 0.96,0.04 0.88,0.12 stroke #444444
line 0.04,1.96 0.12,1.88 stroke #444444
line 0.96,1.96 0.88,1.88 stroke #444444
rect 0.12,0.12 0.76,1.76 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.7
rect 0.12,0.12 0.76,1.76 stroke #3a3a3a

# === Lid surface (topmost) ===
line 0.12,0.12 0.20,0.20 stroke #555555
line 0.88,0.12 0.80,0.20 stroke #555555
line 0.12,1.88 0.20,1.80 stroke #555555
line 0.88,1.88 0.80,1.80 stroke #555555
rect 0.20,0.20 0.60,1.60 fill #222222 0.7
rect 0.20,0.20 0.60,1.60 stroke #444444

# === Lid edge highlights ===
line 0.20,0.20 0.80,0.20 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.20,0.20 0.20,1.80 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.20,1.80 0.80,1.80 stroke #333333 width 1
line 0.80,0.20 0.80,1.80 stroke #333333 width 1

# === Decorative trim on lid ===
rect 0.26,0.28 0.48,1.44 stroke #3a3a3a

# === Grief-mask carving (centered on lid) ===
# Face oval
ellipse 0.50,0.80 0.14,0.20 fill #333333 0.4
ellipse 0.50,0.80 0.14,0.20 stroke #444444
# Closed eyes (mourning expression) — downturned arcs
qbezier 0.38,0.72 0.43,0.68 0.48,0.72 stroke #555555 width 1
qbezier 0.52,0.72 0.57,0.68 0.62,0.72 stroke #555555 width 1
# Nose
line 0.50,0.75 0.50,0.82 stroke #444444 width 1
# Downturned mouth (grief)
qbezier 0.42,0.88 0.50,0.92 0.58,0.88 stroke #444444 width 1
# Teardrop under left eye
poly 0.43,0.74 0.44,0.78 0.42,0.78 fill #555555 0.4

# === Weathering cracks ===
line 0.30,0.35 0.38,0.42 stroke #1a1a1a 0.3 width 1
line 0.65,1.50 0.72,1.58 stroke #1a1a1a 0.3 width 1
line 0.25,1.30 0.32,1.38 stroke #1a1a1a 0.25 width 1

notes: Burned blackened floor decal covering most of a cell — large fire or blast damage with ash scatter. Tileable for wide damage areas.

# Flat floor decal

# === Outer char haze (fills most of cell — faded perimeter) ===
rect 0.02,0.02 0.96,0.96 fill #2a1810 0.35

# === Main burn blob (large irregular shape covering most of cell) ===

# === Deep char (near-black core) ===
poly 0.18,0.38 0.22,0.22 0.34,0.14 0.50,0.12 0.66,0.16 0.78,0.28 0.84,0.44 0.84,0.60 0.76,0.74 0.60,0.82 0.44,0.84 0.28,0.78 0.18,0.66 0.14,0.52 fill #0a0502 0.92

# === Deepest burn (black hole at center) ===
poly 0.32,0.44 0.38,0.32 0.48,0.28 0.60,0.30 0.68,0.40 0.70,0.54 0.64,0.66 0.52,0.72 0.40,0.68 0.32,0.58 fill #050201 0.95

# === Surface cracks (radiating from center) ===
line 0.50,0.50 0.28,0.22 stroke #1a0804 0.7 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.74,0.20 stroke #1a0804 0.7 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.80,0.64 stroke #1a0804 0.7 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.62,0.86 stroke #1a0804 0.7 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.28,0.80 stroke #1a0804 0.7 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.16,0.50 stroke #1a0804 0.7 width 1

# Secondary cracks
bezier 0.30,0.32 0.34,0.40 0.30,0.48 0.26,0.54 stroke #1a0804 0.6 width 1
bezier 0.68,0.32 0.64,0.42 0.70,0.52 0.74,0.60 stroke #1a0804 0.6 width 1

# === Peeling ash flakes (raised dark scabs) ===
poly 0.38,0.40 0.42,0.38 0.44,0.44 0.40,0.46 fill #4a3828 0.7
poly 0.56,0.44 0.60,0.42 0.62,0.48 0.58,0.50 fill #4a3828 0.7
poly 0.48,0.60 0.52,0.58 0.54,0.64 0.50,0.66 fill #4a3828 0.65

# === Tiny residual embers (still faintly glowing) ===

circle 0.52,0.46 0.012 fill #e85500 0.65
circle 0.56,0.56 0.014 fill #cc3300 0.6
circle 0.40,0.48 0.01 fill #e85500 0.55

# === Ash scatter around edges (grey dust) ===
circle 0.14,0.22 0.025 fill #6a6058 0.5
circle 0.86,0.28 0.024 fill #6a6058 0.5
circle 0.80,0.76 0.022 fill #6a6058 0.5
circle 0.18,0.78 0.023 fill #6a6058 0.5

circle 0.50,0.92 0.02 fill #6a6058 0.45
circle 0.06,0.50 0.018 fill #6a6058 0.45
circle 0.94,0.50 0.018 fill #6a6058 0.45

# Tiny ash specks (finer)

circle 0.72,0.84 0.012 fill #8a8078 0.5
circle 0.22,0.68 0.01 fill #8a8078 0.45
circle 0.78,0.34 0.01 fill #8a8078 0.45

# === Radial blast streaks (indicating origin of burst) ===
line 0.50,0.50 0.10,0.14 stroke #050201 0.6 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.90,0.12 stroke #050201 0.6 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.92,0.88 stroke #050201 0.6 width 1

# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.20,0.10 0.60,1.80

# Main wooden beam body (tall rectangle, slightly rounded via inset corners)
rect 0.22,0.10 0.56,1.80 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.9

rect 0.22,0.10 0.56,0.10 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9

rect 0.22,1.80 0.56,0.10 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.22,1.80 0.56,0.10 stroke #1a0a00

line 0.30,0.24 0.30,1.76 stroke #3a1f08 0.5
line 0.70,0.24 0.70,1.76 stroke #3a1f08 0.5
# Nicks and scrape marks from tool wear
line 0.36,0.40 0.44,0.44 stroke #1a0a00 0.7
line 0.58,0.60 0.66,0.58 stroke #1a0a00 0.7
line 0.40,0.90 0.50,0.88 stroke #1a0a00 0.6
# Draped hide over south end (curving over the beam toward the worker)

poly 0.16,1.10 0.84,1.08 0.88,1.40 0.86,1.76 0.80,1.94 0.20,1.94 0.14,1.76 0.12,1.40 fill #5c3a1e 0.35

# Hide fold/drape crease lines
bezier 0.20,1.20 0.36,1.40 0.64,1.40 0.80,1.20 stroke #2a1400 0.55 width 1
bezier 0.24,1.60 0.40,1.72 0.60,1.72 0.76,1.60 stroke #2a1400 0.5 width 1

rect 0.34,0.20 0.32,0.06 stroke #222222

line 0.66,0.08 0.74,0.26 stroke #7a6858 0.6 width 2
line 0.72,0.06 0.80,0.25 stroke #8a7868 0.65 width 1

line 0.98,0.08 0.96,0.26 stroke #9a8878 0.7 width 2

line 1.40,0.06 1.46,0.24 stroke #8a7868 0.6 width 2
line 1.48,0.08 1.54,0.26 stroke #7a6858 0.6 width 1
# Crossed/X marks
line 1.60,0.08 1.72,0.24 stroke #8a7868 0.7 width 2
line 1.72,0.08 1.60,0.24 stroke #8a7868 0.6 width 1
# Trailing off scratches
line 1.78,0.10 1.82,0.22 stroke #7a6858 0.5 width 1
line 1.84,0.08 1.88,0.20 stroke #7a6858 0.5 width 1

# === Dark stain / dried blood smear ===

circle 1.66,0.25 0.010 fill #d4c4a8 0.6

circle 0.15,1.84 0.06 stroke #5a3a00 width 1
arc 0.15,1.84 0.04 0 270 stroke #5a3a00 0.85 width 1

# Right armrest (east — mirror)
rect 0.78,0.12 0.14,1.78 fill #4a0a10 0.95

rect 0.78,0.12 0.14,1.78 stroke #2a0000 width 2

circle 0.85,1.84 0.06 stroke #5a3a00 width 1
arc 0.85,1.84 0.04 270 180 stroke #5a3a00 0.85 width 1

# Seat cushions — two cushions (north seat + south seat)
rect 0.24,0.34 0.52,0.76 fill #6a1018 0.95
rect 0.24,0.34 0.52,0.76 texfill polyhaven/velour_velvet 0.6
rect 0.24,0.34 0.52,0.76 stroke #2a0000 width 2

rect 0.24,1.12 0.52,0.76 fill #6a1018 0.95
rect 0.24,1.12 0.52,0.76 texfill polyhaven/velour_velvet 0.6
rect 0.24,1.12 0.52,0.76 stroke #2a0000 width 2

# Cushion seam lines

line 0.28,1.82 0.72,1.82 stroke #2a0000 0.7 width 1

# Button tufts on cushions

circle 0.62,0.72 0.025 fill #3a0000 0.9
circle 0.38,1.50 0.025 fill #3a0000 0.9
circle 0.62,1.50 0.025 fill #3a0000 0.9

# Gold braid piping around each cushion

rect 0.26,1.14 0.48,0.72 stroke #daa520 0.65 width 1

# Leg shadows at corners
circle 0.14,1.92 0.04 fill #1a0a00 0.55
circle 0.86,1.92 0.04 fill #1a0a00 0.55
props.severed-limb:

facing: no

notes: Detached arm or leg with torn fabric and blood trail; grim battlefield debris

# Top-down: severed arm with hand — fabric scraps at stump, blood pool/trail

# Blood pool under stump

ellipse 0.22,0.36 0.14,0.10 stroke #2a0000 0.6

circle 0.76,0.82 0.02 fill #2a0000 0.7
circle 0.82,0.70 0.018 fill #4a0000 0.65

# === The arm itself (lying diagonally from NW to SE) ===
# Shoulder/stump end (NW) - torn flesh, bone visible

poly 0.16,0.30 0.30,0.24 0.36,0.38 0.22,0.46 stroke #3a2018

poly 0.22,0.40 0.38,0.32 0.50,0.48 0.36,0.56 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.4
poly 0.22,0.40 0.38,0.32 0.50,0.48 0.36,0.56 stroke #1a1008
# Torn fabric edges (fraying)

line 0.20,0.44 0.16,0.48 stroke #1a1008 width 1
line 0.32,0.28 0.30,0.22 stroke #1a1008 width 1

# Elbow (slight bend)
circle 0.44,0.52 0.06 fill #c4a882 0.85
circle 0.44,0.52 0.06 stroke #3a2018

# Forearm (skin tone, past sleeve)
poly 0.40,0.50 0.52,0.46 0.68,0.62 0.56,0.66 fill #c4a882 0.85
poly 0.40,0.50 0.52,0.46 0.68,0.62 0.56,0.66 stroke #3a2018

# Wrist

circle 0.64,0.60 0.05 stroke #3a2018

# Hand (clenched / partially open)

poly 0.60,0.58 0.76,0.56 0.82,0.68 0.74,0.74 0.64,0.70 stroke #3a2018
# Finger details

line 0.76,0.64 0.82,0.62 stroke #3a2018 width 1

props.sewage-channel:
name: Sewage Channel
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x3
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: wall
room_types: sewer-junction, sewer, undercity
typical_count: few
clusters_with: bridge-wood, grate-floor, scummy-water-pool
notes: Straight concrete channel of flowing brown sewage; streaks suggest current. Run along walls or through rooms.
---
# footprint 1x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-1
# Channel runs east-west; flow direction south (high y)

# Stone channel edges (north and south lips)
rect 0.00,0.08 3.00,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.00,0.08 3.00,0.12 stroke #2a2820
rect 0.00,0.80 3.00,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.00,0.80 3.00,0.12 stroke #2a2820

# Channel interior (brown sewage)
rect 0.00,0.20 3.00,0.60 fill #3a2a18 0.95
rect 0.00,0.20 3.00,0.60 stroke #1a1208

# Flow streaks (east-west direction)
bezier 0.05,0.32 0.75,0.28 1.50,0.36 2.95,0.30 stroke #5a4028 0.6 width 2
bezier 0.05,0.45 0.80,0.50 1.60,0.42 2.95,0.48 stroke #5a4028 0.55 width 2
bezier 0.05,0.58 0.70,0.55 1.40,0.62 2.95,0.58 stroke #5a4028 0.6 width 2
bezier 0.05,0.70 0.85,0.68 1.70,0.72 2.95,0.68 stroke #4a3020 0.5 width 2

# Scum patches floating
ellipse 0.45,0.38 0.15,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.5
ellipse 1.20,0.62 0.18,0.06 fill #4a6040 0.55
ellipse 2.20,0.42 0.16,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.5
ellipse 2.70,0.66 0.12,0.04 fill #4a6040 0.5

# Bubbles (suggesting current)
circle 0.80,0.50 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.7
circle 1.60,0.48 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.7
circle 2.40,0.52 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.7

# Lip highlight (moisture on stone)
line 0.00,0.20 3.00,0.20 stroke #6a8060 0.3 width 1
line 0.00,0.80 3.00,0.80 stroke #6a8060 0.3 width 1
props.sewage-channel-end:
name: Sewage Channel End
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: sewer-junction, sewer, undercity
typical_count: few
clusters_with: sewage-channel, sewage-channel-short, sewage-channel-turn, sewage-channel-t, sewage-channel-x, grate-floor
notes: Closed terminus for the sewage channel network — at facing 0 the channel enters from the west edge and dead-ends at the east wall. Edge geometry matches the straight piece at x=0 so it tiles cleanly.
---
# West edge matches the straight piece:
#   open floor 0.00-0.08 and 0.92-1.00 (y)
#   stone lips 0.08-0.20 and 0.80-0.92 (y)
#   fluid 0.20-0.80 (y)

# North stone lip (matches straight piece on the west edge, curves around to form the end wall)
poly 0.00,0.08 1.00,0.08 1.00,0.92 0.90,0.92 0.90,0.18 0.00,0.20 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
poly 0.00,0.08 1.00,0.08 1.00,0.92 0.90,0.92 0.90,0.18 0.00,0.20 stroke #2a2820

# South stone lip (mirror of north)
poly 0.00,0.80 0.90,0.82 0.90,0.92 0.00,0.92 fill #00000000 0
# (The above is structurally inside the big poly — drawing it separately to give seam between north and south lips)

# Arched end-cap detail — curved inner stone lip at east side (closes the channel)
arc 0.72,0.50 0.24 270 90 stroke #2a2820 width 2

# Channel fluid — partial region, leaves the east wall closed
poly 0.00,0.20 0.88,0.22 0.88,0.36 0.88,0.64 0.88,0.78 0.00,0.80 fill #3a2a18 0.95
poly 0.00,0.20 0.88,0.22 0.88,0.36 0.88,0.64 0.88,0.78 0.00,0.80 stroke #1a1208 width 1

# Flow streaks feeding toward the dead-end wall (bunch up near the end)
bezier 0.00,0.32 0.30,0.30 0.60,0.34 0.86,0.38 stroke #5a4028 0.55 width 2
bezier 0.00,0.48 0.35,0.50 0.65,0.50 0.86,0.50 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.00,0.66 0.30,0.68 0.60,0.64 0.86,0.60 stroke #4a3020 0.55 width 2

# Scum building up at the dead-end (accumulates here)
ellipse 0.75,0.36 0.10,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.65
ellipse 0.78,0.60 0.10,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.65
ellipse 0.82,0.50 0.06,0.06 fill #4a6040 0.55

# Bubbles rising where flow hits the wall
circle 0.84,0.32 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.75
circle 0.84,0.68 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.75
circle 0.80,0.46 0.018 fill #8aa070 0.7

# Lip highlight (moisture)
line 0.00,0.20 0.88,0.22 stroke #6a8060 0.3 width 1
line 0.00,0.80 0.88,0.78 stroke #6a8060 0.3 width 1

props.sewage-channel-t:
name: Sewage Channel T-Junction
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: sewer-junction, sewer, undercity
typical_count: many
clusters_with: sewage-channel, sewage-channel-turn, sewage-channel-x, grate-floor
notes: T-junction for the sewage channel network — at facing 0 the straight run connects W↔E and a branch drops south. Lips 0.12 thick so sections tile flush with the straight piece.
---
# === Stone lips around the fluid T-shape ===
# North lip — runs the full width above the horizontal fluid
rect 0.00,0.08 1.00,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.00,0.08 1.00,0.12 stroke #2a2820
# South lip, western segment (west of the south branch)
rect 0.00,0.80 0.20,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.00,0.80 0.20,0.12 stroke #2a2820
# South lip, eastern segment (east of the south branch)
rect 0.80,0.80 0.20,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.80,0.80 0.20,0.12 stroke #2a2820
# South branch — W-side lip (running from the south lip down to the cell edge)
rect 0.08,0.80 0.12,0.20 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.08,0.80 0.12,0.20 stroke #2a2820
# South branch — E-side lip
rect 0.80,0.80 0.12,0.20 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.80,0.80 0.12,0.20 stroke #2a2820
# === Fluid T-shape as a single polygon ===
poly 0.00,0.20 1.00,0.20 1.00,0.80 0.80,0.80 0.80,1.00 0.20,1.00 0.20,0.80 0.00,0.80 fill #3a2a18 0.95
poly 0.00,0.20 1.00,0.20 1.00,0.80 0.80,0.80 0.80,1.00 0.20,1.00 0.20,0.80 0.00,0.80 stroke #1a1208 width 1
# Flow streaks on the horizontal run
bezier 0.05,0.34 0.35,0.32 0.65,0.36 0.95,0.32 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.05,0.68 0.35,0.70 0.65,0.66 0.95,0.68 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2
# Flow streaks on the south branch (converging from the junction)
line 0.34,0.82 0.34,0.98 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
line 0.66,0.82 0.66,0.98 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2
# Scum patches
ellipse 0.25,0.40 0.12,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.5
ellipse 0.70,0.60 0.12,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.5
ellipse 0.50,0.90 0.08,0.04 fill #4a6040 0.5
# Bubbles
circle 0.40,0.38 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.7
circle 0.60,0.62 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.7

props.sewage-channel-x:
name: Sewage Channel Crossing
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no

blocks_light: no
placement: floor

# Horizontal arm — N lip pieces (flanking the vertical arm)

rect 0.80,0.08 0.20,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85

rect 0.00,0.80 0.20,0.12 stroke #2a2820
rect 0.80,0.80 0.20,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.80,0.80 0.20,0.12 stroke #2a2820
# Vertical arm — W lip pieces
rect 0.08,0.00 0.12,0.20 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.08,0.00 0.12,0.20 stroke #2a2820
rect 0.08,0.80 0.12,0.20 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.08,0.80 0.12,0.20 stroke #2a2820

# Flow streaks on horizontal and vertical arms (outside the central junction)
bezier 0.05,0.34 0.22,0.36 0.35,0.38 0.44,0.42 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.56,0.42 0.65,0.38 0.78,0.36 0.95,0.34 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.05,0.68 0.22,0.66 0.35,0.64 0.44,0.60 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2
bezier 0.56,0.60 0.65,0.64 0.78,0.66 0.95,0.68 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2
bezier 0.34,0.05 0.36,0.22 0.38,0.35 0.42,0.44 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.42,0.56 0.38,0.65 0.36,0.78 0.34,0.95 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.68,0.05 0.66,0.22 0.64,0.35 0.60,0.44 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2
bezier 0.60,0.56 0.64,0.65 0.66,0.78 0.68,0.95 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2

ellipse 0.88,0.55 0.05,0.04 fill #4a6040 0.5
ellipse 0.45,0.12 0.04,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.5
ellipse 0.55,0.88 0.04,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.5

circle 0.44,0.56 0.016 fill #8aa070 0.6
circle 0.56,0.44 0.016 fill #8aa070 0.6
props.sewing-basket:
name: Sewing Basket
category: Containers
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 0.6
placement: floor
room_types: house-medium-family, house-small, noble-solar, textile-loomhouse, nursery
typical_count: single
clusters_with: spinning-wheel, yarn-basket, rocking-chair, thread-spool, pin-cushion
notes: Open wicker basket with spools, threads, and fabric scraps spilling over
---
# === HITBOX ===

props.shattered-shield:
name: Shattered Shield
category: Combat
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.08
placement: floor
room_types: boss-chamber, battlefield-recent, ruin, dungeon, corrupted-temple, ancient-tomb

notes: Wooden shield splintered apart, with a major crack running through. Splinters scattered around the main body. More destroyed than shield-broken.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.10,0.10 0.80,0.80

# Faint dust halo
ellipse 0.50,0.60 0.34,0.10 fill #1a1008 0.2

# === Main shield body — shattered into two halves ===
# Upper half (intact fragment)
poly 0.15,0.20 0.48,0.20 0.52,0.28 0.46,0.42 0.38,0.48 0.22,0.42 0.12,0.32 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.9

poly 0.15,0.20 0.48,0.20 0.52,0.28 0.46,0.42 0.38,0.48 0.22,0.42 0.12,0.32 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# Lower half (more broken)
poly 0.52,0.28 0.68,0.22 0.82,0.32 0.86,0.48 0.76,0.62 0.58,0.66 0.44,0.58 0.40,0.48 0.46,0.42 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.9

poly 0.52,0.28 0.68,0.22 0.82,0.32 0.86,0.48 0.76,0.62 0.58,0.66 0.44,0.58 0.40,0.48 0.46,0.42 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# === Major crack / gap between halves (dark line showing floor below) ===
poly 0.46,0.42 0.52,0.28 0.44,0.38 0.38,0.48 0.40,0.48 fill #0a0604 0.9
poly 0.46,0.42 0.52,0.28 0.44,0.38 0.38,0.48 0.40,0.48 stroke #000000 width 1

# === Shield face paint (faded heraldry fragments) ===
# Remaining red cross on upper half
rect 0.24,0.22 0.18,0.06 fill #8b2030 0.5
rect 0.24,0.22 0.18,0.06 stroke #400810 0.6
# Remaining blue field on lower half
poly 0.56,0.32 0.78,0.34 0.80,0.48 0.72,0.58 0.58,0.56 fill #1848a0 0.35

# === Shield rim — partially intact ===
bezier 0.15,0.20 0.32,0.16 0.48,0.18 0.48,0.20 stroke #444444 width 2
bezier 0.52,0.28 0.58,0.22 0.68,0.20 0.68,0.22 stroke #444444 width 2
bezier 0.82,0.32 0.86,0.40 0.84,0.48 0.82,0.50 stroke #444444 width 2

# === Shield boss (central metal dome — cracked) ===
circle 0.45,0.38 0.07 fill #666666 0.6
circle 0.45,0.38 0.07 stroke #333333 width 1
# Boss split
line 0.42,0.34 0.48,0.44 stroke #0a0604 width 2
circle 0.45,0.38 0.025 fill #222222 0.8

# === Splintered wood pieces scattered around ===
# Splinter NW
poly 0.14,0.12 0.22,0.10 0.20,0.14 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
poly 0.14,0.12 0.22,0.10 0.20,0.14 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# Splinter N
poly 0.48,0.08 0.52,0.06 0.54,0.12 0.50,0.14 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
poly 0.48,0.08 0.52,0.06 0.54,0.12 0.50,0.14 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# Splinter NE
poly 0.78,0.14 0.86,0.12 0.84,0.18 0.80,0.20 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
poly 0.78,0.14 0.86,0.12 0.84,0.18 0.80,0.20 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# Splinter SW
poly 0.14,0.62 0.20,0.60 0.22,0.68 0.16,0.70 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
poly 0.14,0.62 0.20,0.60 0.22,0.68 0.16,0.70 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# Splinter S
poly 0.46,0.76 0.54,0.74 0.52,0.82 0.48,0.84 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
poly 0.46,0.76 0.54,0.74 0.52,0.82 0.48,0.84 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# Splinter SE
poly 0.72,0.74 0.82,0.72 0.78,0.80 0.74,0.82 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
poly 0.72,0.74 0.82,0.72 0.78,0.80 0.74,0.82 stroke #2a1400 width 1

# Long splinter
line 0.30,0.70 0.14,0.80 stroke #6b4e2e width 3
line 0.30,0.70 0.14,0.80 stroke #3a2010 width 1

# === Rivets scattered (some popped loose) ===
circle 0.20,0.24 0.015 fill #888888 0.7
circle 0.40,0.22 0.015 fill #888888 0.7
circle 0.70,0.26 0.015 fill #888888 0.7
circle 0.80,0.50 0.015 fill #888888 0.6
# Loose rivet (away from shield)

circle 0.10,0.50 0.015 stroke #444444
circle 0.88,0.68 0.015 fill #888888 0.8
circle 0.88,0.68 0.015 stroke #444444

# Cracks running through surface

line 0.60,0.30 0.72,0.50 stroke #0a0604 0.7 width 2
line 0.56,0.44 0.72,0.58 stroke #0a0604 0.6 width 1

# Battle dents

ellipse 0.68,0.42 0.03,0.025 fill #444444 0.3

# Rust staining

ellipse 0.24,0.38 0.05,0.03 fill #5a3a1a 0.2

line 0.26,0.42 0.78,0.42 stroke #3a1f00 0.8 width 1

line 0.26,0.66 0.78,0.66 stroke #3a1f00 0.75 width 1
line 0.26,0.70 0.78,0.70 stroke #3a1f00 0.75 width 1

circle 0.46,0.44 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.9
circle 0.54,0.40 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.9
circle 0.62,0.46 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.9

circle 0.66,0.66 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.85

line 0.60,0.34 0.60,0.50 stroke #1a0804 0.6 width 1

props.shepherds-crook:
name: Shepherd's Crook
category: Tools
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1.5
placement: wall
room_types: shepherds-shelter, peasant-hovel, druid-grove, stable, croft
typical_count: single
clusters_with: carved-stick, sheep-dung, fire-ring, prayer-stone
notes: Wooden staff with a curved hook at the top — for catching sheep by the neck. Leaning against a wall — shaft runs east-west with hook at east.
---
# footprint 1x2: x 0-2, y 0-1
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.14,0.46 1.60,0.10
selection circle 1.72,0.44 0.16

# Shadow beneath shaft
ellipse 1.00,0.60 0.80,0.04 fill #1a0a00 0.3
ellipse 1.72,0.52 0.16,0.04 fill #1a0a00 0.25

# === Main shaft (long wooden staff) ===
rect 0.14,0.46 1.60,0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.14,0.46 1.60,0.08 fill #4a2800 0.4
rect 0.14,0.46 1.60,0.08 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# Wood grain stripe
line 0.18,0.50 1.72,0.50 stroke #6a4828 0.3 width 1

# === Western tip (ground end, slightly worn) ===
circle 0.16,0.50 0.05 fill #3a1f00 0.9
circle 0.16,0.50 0.05 stroke #1a0a00

# === Hook at east end — curved shepherd's crook ===
# Main curve of the hook (bezier forming a J/question-mark)
bezier 1.72,0.50 1.88,0.42 1.92,0.28 1.80,0.20 stroke #4a2800 width 8
bezier 1.72,0.50 1.88,0.42 1.92,0.28 1.80,0.20 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# Inner curve (the notch opening)
bezier 1.72,0.46 1.84,0.40 1.86,0.30 1.78,0.24 stroke #6a4828 0.6 width 3
# Hook tip (rounded end)
circle 1.80,0.20 0.045 fill #4a2800 0.95
circle 1.80,0.20 0.045 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# Tip highlight
arc 1.80,0.20 0.035 200 300 stroke #8a6040 0.6 width 1

# === Leather binding where hook meets shaft ===
rect 1.68,0.44 0.10,0.12 fill #5c3a1e 0.95
rect 1.68,0.44 0.10,0.12 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.5
rect 1.68,0.44 0.10,0.12 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# Leather wrap crosshatch
line 1.70,0.44 1.68,0.56 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 1.73,0.44 1.71,0.56 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 1.76,0.44 1.74,0.56 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1

# === Grip section on shaft (worn patch, leather-wrapped middle) ===
rect 0.70,0.44 0.30,0.12 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
rect 0.70,0.44 0.30,0.12 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.4
rect 0.70,0.44 0.30,0.12 stroke #2a1400 width 1
line 0.74,0.44 0.72,0.56 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1

rect 0.90,0.38 0.06,0.24 stroke #2a1400

rect 1.08,0.38 0.06,0.24 stroke #2a1400

footprint: 3x3

notes: Smashed catapult or trebuchet; splintered frame, broken throwing arm, spilled stones, tangled rope
---
# footprint 3x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-3

# === HITBOX ===

line 0.48,1.60 2.58,1.45 stroke #1a0a04 width 2

# === Massive throwing arm (broken, lying diagonal NW to SE) ===

poly 1.30,1.25 1.55,1.30 1.50,1.40 1.35,1.38 stroke #5a3a00

line 1.42,1.38 1.54,1.36 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

# Counterweight box at west end (broken open)
rect 0.20,0.05 0.45,0.35 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.20,0.05 0.45,0.35 stroke #1a0a04
# Shattered plank
poly 0.55,0.08 0.70,0.04 0.68,0.14 0.54,0.18 fill #5c3a1e 0.85

circle 0.52,0.48 0.07 stroke #444444
circle 0.16,0.30 0.06 fill #666666 0.8
circle 0.16,0.30 0.06 stroke #333333

# === Tangled rope (rigging spilled across ground) ===
bezier 0.50,1.00 0.90,1.30 1.20,1.80 0.80,2.10 stroke #8b7355 width 3
bezier 0.80,2.10 1.30,2.30 1.80,2.20 2.10,2.55 stroke #8b7355 width 3
bezier 2.10,2.55 2.40,2.35 2.50,2.10 2.70,2.30 stroke #8b7355 width 3
# Rope coils (loops on ground)

ring 1.10,1.95 0.10,0.06 stroke #5c3a1e
ring 2.20,2.40 0.09 0.055 fill #8b7355 0.8

# === Iron fittings / hardware scattered ===

rect 1.40,0.85 0.25,0.12 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.5
rect 1.40,0.85 0.25,0.12 stroke #333333
# Bolts

circle 1.58,0.91 0.025 fill #333333 0.95
# Bent iron bracket

poly 2.10,1.20 2.30,1.22 2.35,1.36 2.20,1.40 2.15,1.30 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.5
poly 2.10,1.20 2.30,1.22 2.35,1.36 2.20,1.40 2.15,1.30 stroke #333333

# === Large throwing stone (spilled from sling, north) ===

circle 1.50,0.30 0.18 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.5

# Wheel (broken, south)

# Broken spoke fragment

# Scorch marks / impact burns

ellipse 2.20,1.80 0.12,0.08 fill #1a0800 0.7

# Splinters scattered

line 2.40,1.70 2.48,1.64 stroke #5c3a1e width 2
line 0.65,1.60 0.72,1.54 stroke #5c3a1e width 2
props.signal-bell:
name: Signal Bell
category: Features
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 2
placement: floor
room_types: ferry-house, dock, watchtower, temple-entry
typical_count: single
clusters_with: lantern-post, anchor-post, dock-cleat
notes: Brass signal bell mounted on a short wooden post. Top-down shows the circular rim of the bell with clapper visible at center, post cross-section beneath.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection circle 0.5,0.5 0.30

# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1

# Post base shadow (wider than the bell)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.38 fill #1a0800 0.2

# Wooden post cross-section (visible at ground level, outside bell ring)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.36 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.7
circle 0.5,0.5 0.36 stroke #2a1400 0.6

# Brass bell outer rim (largest concentric ring — the bell flaring down around the post)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.30 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
circle 0.5,0.5 0.30 fill #daa520 0.5
circle 0.5,0.5 0.30 stroke #5a3a00 width 2

# Secondary bell band (shoulder of the bell)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.24 stroke #8b6914 0.6 width 1
circle 0.5,0.5 0.24 fill #c89518 0.3

# Decorative engraved ring
circle 0.5,0.5 0.20 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 1

# Crown dome (top of bell)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.14 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.8
circle 0.5,0.5 0.14 fill #daa520 0.55
circle 0.5,0.5 0.14 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

# Lift loop (small ring on top of crown, seen edge-on as thin ellipse)
ellipse 0.5,0.46 0.05,0.02 stroke #5a3a00 width 2
ellipse 0.5,0.46 0.05,0.02 fill #daa520 0.7

# Clapper visible through the crown opening (dark)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.06 fill #2a1400 0.9
circle 0.5,0.5 0.06 stroke #1a0800 width 1
# Clapper ball
circle 0.5,0.52 0.03 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 0.5,0.52 0.03 stroke #5a3a00

# Brass sheen highlight on bell rim
arc 0.5,0.5 0.28 200 280 stroke #ffee88 0.6 width 1
arc 0.5,0.5 0.22 210 270 stroke #ffee88 0.4 width 1

# Rope pull hanging from lift loop (thin line)
line 0.50,0.46 0.52,0.12 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 0.50,0.46 0.52,0.12 stroke #5c3a1e 0.6 width 1
# Rope tassel at end
circle 0.52,0.12 0.018 fill #6b4e2e 0.85

# Tarnish specks
circle 0.42,0.38 0.012 fill #5a3a00 0.5
circle 0.60,0.56 0.012 fill #5a3a00 0.5

props.signal-gong:
name: Signal Gong
category: Features
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 2
placement: wall
room_types: underdark-outpost, guard-post, temple-entry, watchtower
typical_count: single
clusters_with: watchfire-pit, signal-bell, weapon-rack
notes: Round metal gong suspended in a wooden A-frame, viewed top-down — you see the circular gong face (flat horizontal disc) with concentric hammered rings and the frame posts on either side.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.06,0.12 0.88,0.70

# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1
# Top-down: gong hangs vertically in frame. From above you see the thin top EDGE of the disc as a narrow ellipse, two crossbar frame posts, and the base feet.
# Wait — actually the note says "Concentric gong rings" so it's shown as the flat face visible from above (gong lying on a stand facing up).

# Wooden base platform (rectangular floor stand)
rect 0.06,0.70 0.88,0.22 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.06,0.70 0.88,0.22 fill #3a1f00 0.2
rect 0.06,0.70 0.88,0.22 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# Base plank seams
line 0.06,0.80 0.94,0.80 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1

# Upright posts (two wooden uprights supporting the gong — seen as thick rectangles from above)
rect 0.08,0.12 0.10,0.62 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.08,0.12 0.10,0.62 fill #2a1400 0.3
rect 0.08,0.12 0.10,0.62 stroke #2a1400 width 2

rect 0.82,0.12 0.10,0.62 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.82,0.12 0.10,0.62 fill #2a1400 0.3
rect 0.82,0.12 0.10,0.62 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# Post caps (finial on top of each upright)
circle 0.13,0.14 0.05 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 0.13,0.14 0.05 stroke #2a1400
circle 0.87,0.14 0.05 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 0.87,0.14 0.05 stroke #2a1400

# === Gong disc (between posts, viewed from above) ===
# Outer rim
circle 0.5,0.42 0.32 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.8
circle 0.5,0.42 0.32 fill #8b6914 0.35
circle 0.5,0.42 0.32 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

# Outermost hammered ring
circle 0.5,0.42 0.28 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 1

# Mid ring
circle 0.5,0.42 0.22 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 1

# Inner ring
circle 0.5,0.42 0.16 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 1

# Central boss (raised dome hit-point)
circle 0.5,0.42 0.08 fill #daa520 0.85
circle 0.5,0.42 0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.4
circle 0.5,0.42 0.08 stroke #5a3a00 width 2

# Central hit-point highlight (where mallet strikes)
circle 0.5,0.42 0.04 fill #ffee88 0.55
circle 0.5,0.42 0.02 fill #ffffcc 0.7

# Brass sheen arcs (top-right quadrant highlight)
arc 0.5,0.42 0.30 200 280 stroke #ffee88 0.5 width 1
arc 0.5,0.42 0.24 210 270 stroke #ffee88 0.4 width 1

# Chain/cord suspending the gong (from top of each post to the gong rim)
line 0.13,0.16 0.22,0.24 stroke #555555 width 2
line 0.87,0.16 0.78,0.24 stroke #555555 width 2

# Tarnish splotches
circle 0.36,0.36 0.015 fill #5a3a00 0.5
circle 0.62,0.50 0.015 fill #5a3a00 0.5
circle 0.44,0.54 0.012 fill #5a3a00 0.4

# Mallet resting on base
rect 0.44,0.82 0.30,0.04 fill #3a1f00 0.85
rect 0.44,0.82 0.30,0.04 stroke #2a1400
circle 0.44,0.84 0.04 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 0.44,0.84 0.04 stroke #2a1400

line 0.14,1.30 0.86,1.30 stroke #8b7a5a 0.5 width 1

line 0.85,0.5 0.92,0.5 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.85,0.5 0.92,0.56 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
line 0.85,0.5 0.88,0.42 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.85,0.5 0.88,0.58 stroke #c0a0ff width 1

# Severed end — bright burst

circle 0.88,0.5 0.025 fill #ffffff 0.9

circle 0.94,0.44 0.014 fill #e0e0ff 0.85
circle 0.96,0.52 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.8
circle 0.92,0.6 0.012 fill #c0a0ff 0.75

# Violet backdrop taint at severance

# Twisted cord strands (detail)
line 0.25,0.32 0.3,0.4 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.42,0.5 0.48,0.58 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.65,0.66 0.72,0.62 stroke #c0a0ff width 1

shadow: no

line 1.86,0.10 1.70,0.50 stroke #e8dcc8 0.55 width 1
line 0.50,0.12 0.60,0.50 stroke #e8dcc8 0.45 width 1
line 1.50,0.12 1.40,0.50 stroke #e8dcc8 0.45 width 1
line 1.00,0.14 1.00,0.52 stroke #e8dcc8 0.5 width 1

line 1.40,0.50 1.42,0.66 stroke #d4c4a8 0.55 width 1

ellipse 1.00,0.40 0.10,0.14 stroke #6a5040

line 0.92,0.40 1.08,0.40 stroke #e8dcc8 0.8 width 1

line 0.48,0.38 0.60,0.38 stroke #e8dcc8 0.7 width 1

props.spike-pit-hidden:

category: Traps
footprint: 1x1
facing: no

# === HITBOX ===

line 0.20,0.50 0.50,0.42 stroke #5c3a1e 0.8 width 2

line 0.18,0.72 0.40,0.70 stroke #5c3a1e 0.8 width 2
line 0.14,0.30 0.20,0.40 stroke #4a2800 0.75 width 1
line 0.28,0.24 0.32,0.42 stroke #5c3a1e 0.8 width 1

# Leaves (small polygons — green-brown)
poly 0.20,0.30 0.26,0.28 0.28,0.34 0.22,0.36 fill #4a5020 0.85
poly 0.20,0.30 0.26,0.28 0.28,0.34 0.22,0.36 stroke #2a2810 0.7
poly 0.34,0.44 0.40,0.42 0.42,0.48 0.36,0.50 fill #5a5028 0.85
poly 0.34,0.44 0.40,0.42 0.42,0.48 0.36,0.50 stroke #2a2810 0.7
poly 0.22,0.64 0.28,0.62 0.30,0.68 0.24,0.70 fill #4a5020 0.85
poly 0.22,0.64 0.28,0.62 0.30,0.68 0.24,0.70 stroke #2a2810 0.7

# Broken-away section (east side — spikes visible)
# Jagged edge where cover gave way
poly 0.50,0.18 0.52,0.30 0.48,0.42 0.54,0.56 0.50,0.70 0.56,0.82 fill #0a0604 0.95
poly 0.50,0.18 0.52,0.30 0.48,0.42 0.54,0.56 0.50,0.70 0.56,0.82 stroke #1a1008 0.8

# Wooden spikes visible at bottom of pit (east half — points up, foreshortened as triangles)
poly 0.58,0.70 0.62,0.56 0.66,0.70 fill #7a5020 0.95
poly 0.58,0.70 0.62,0.56 0.66,0.70 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.5
poly 0.58,0.70 0.62,0.56 0.66,0.70 stroke #2a1400

poly 0.68,0.74 0.72,0.58 0.76,0.74 fill #7a5020 0.95
poly 0.68,0.74 0.72,0.58 0.76,0.74 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.5
poly 0.68,0.74 0.72,0.58 0.76,0.74 stroke #2a1400

poly 0.60,0.46 0.64,0.32 0.68,0.46 fill #6a4818 0.95
poly 0.60,0.46 0.64,0.32 0.68,0.46 stroke #2a1400

poly 0.72,0.50 0.76,0.36 0.80,0.50 fill #7a5020 0.95
poly 0.72,0.50 0.76,0.36 0.80,0.50 stroke #2a1400

# Spike tips highlight
line 0.62,0.56 0.62,0.60 stroke #a07840 0.7 width 1
line 0.72,0.58 0.72,0.62 stroke #a07840 0.7 width 1
line 0.64,0.32 0.64,0.36 stroke #a07840 0.6 width 1

# Dried blood on one spike
line 0.72,0.38 0.74,0.44 stroke #4a0000 0.8 width 2

circle 0.52,0.44 0.018 stroke #c8ffd0 width 1
