ellipse 0.76,0.38 0.10,0.06 stroke #3a8a44

props.spinning-wheel:
name: Spinning Wheel
category: Furniture
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2
placement: floor
room_types: cabin-witch, farmhouse-common, general-workshop, house-medium-family, noble-solar, textile-loomhouse
typical_count: single
clusters_with: yarn-basket, rocking-chair, sewing-basket, thread-spool
notes: Classic wooden spinning wheel viewed top-down — drive wheel on east, spindle on west, treadle along south
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.15,0.40 1.70,1.20 z 0-2

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: long base plank east-west. Drive wheel is VERTICAL so from above
# appears as a thin edge-on disc. Spindle/bobbin at opposite end.

# === Base plank (the long board the wheel is mounted on) ===
rect 0.20,0.88 1.60,0.22 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.20,0.88 1.60,0.22 stroke #2a1400
# Wood grain
line 0.20,0.96 1.80,0.96 stroke #5c3a1e 0.4
line 0.20,1.04 1.80,1.04 stroke #5c3a1e 0.4

# === Treadle (foot pedal hanging south of base) ===
rect 0.36,1.12 1.00,0.30 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.36,1.12 1.00,0.30 stroke #2a1400
# Treadle grain
line 0.36,1.24 1.36,1.24 stroke #3a1f00 0.4
line 0.36,1.34 1.36,1.34 stroke #3a1f00 0.4
# Treadle pivot rod (south edge hinge)
line 0.36,1.42 1.36,1.42 stroke #444444 width 2
# Pitman rod (linking treadle to wheel crank)
line 1.30,1.14 1.54,0.60 stroke #3a2010 width 2
line 1.30,1.14 1.54,0.60 stroke #5c3a1e 0.6 width 1

# === Drive wheel (EAST end, vertical orientation — seen edge-on from above) ===
# Shadow of wheel on base
ellipse 1.60,0.98 0.34,0.05 fill #000000 0.25
# Wheel rim (thin horizontal ellipse — long in x = diameter, narrow in y = thickness)
ellipse 1.60,0.58 0.38,0.04 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
ellipse 1.60,0.58 0.38,0.04 stroke #2a1400
# Wheel rim subtle inner ring (outer band of rim)
ellipse 1.60,0.58 0.35,0.025 stroke #3a1f00 0.7
# Wheel top highlight (polish/wear)
line 1.30,0.57 1.90,0.57 stroke #8b6914 0.4 width 1
# Hub (seen dead-center — small dark circle, axle end)
circle 1.60,0.58 0.04 fill #3a1f00 0.95
circle 1.60,0.58 0.04 stroke #1a0f00
# Spoke stubs peeking near rim ends (just the tops visible)
line 1.24,0.58 1.22,0.62 stroke #2a1400 width 2
line 1.96,0.58 1.98,0.62 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# === Upright posts holding wheel axle (two small posts flanking wheel) ===
rect 1.16,0.54 0.10,0.38 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 1.16,0.54 0.10,0.38 stroke #2a1400
rect 1.90,0.54 0.10,0.38 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 1.90,0.54 0.10,0.38 stroke #2a1400
# Post caps
ellipse 1.21,0.54 0.05,0.02 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
ellipse 1.95,0.54 0.05,0.02 fill #5c3a1e 0.9

# === Spindle assembly (WEST end — mother-of-all with bobbin) ===
# Mother-of-all base (small wooden block mounted on the plank)
rect 0.18,0.74 0.34,0.20 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.18,0.74 0.34,0.20 stroke #2a1400
# Maiden posts (two tiny uprights)
rect 0.22,0.58 0.05,0.20 fill #3a1f00 0.9
rect 0.46,0.58 0.05,0.20 fill #3a1f00 0.9
# Post tops
circle 0.245,0.58 0.025 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 0.485,0.58 0.025 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
# Bobbin (horizontal between the maidens — ellipse running east-west)
ellipse 0.36,0.68 0.14,0.05 fill #daa858 0.92
ellipse 0.36,0.68 0.14,0.05 stroke #6a4810
# Bobbin thread wraps (horizontal bands)
line 0.24,0.66 0.48,0.66 stroke #6a4810 0.6
line 0.24,0.68 0.48,0.68 stroke #6a4810 0.6
line 0.24,0.70 0.48,0.70 stroke #6a4810 0.6
# Flyer arms (U-shape around bobbin, just the top visible — two small arcs)
bezier 0.24,0.62 0.20,0.64 0.20,0.72 0.24,0.74 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
bezier 0.48,0.62 0.52,0.64 0.52,0.72 0.48,0.74 stroke #3a1f00 width 1

# === Drive band (thin cord linking wheel to bobbin across plank) ===
bezier 0.48,0.66 0.90,0.62 1.30,0.60 1.26,0.58 stroke #6b4e2e 0.85 width 1
bezier 0.48,0.72 0.90,0.68 1.30,0.64 1.26,0.60 stroke #6b4e2e 0.7 width 1

# === Wool fiber tuft staged by spindle ===
ellipse 0.32,0.40 0.10,0.06 fill #e8e0d0 0.9
ellipse 0.32,0.40 0.10,0.06 stroke #8b7355
circle 0.28,0.38 0.02 fill #f0e8d8 0.7
circle 0.36,0.42 0.02 fill #f0e8d8 0.7
# Fiber wisp drifting to bobbin
bezier 0.32,0.44 0.34,0.52 0.38,0.60 0.36,0.66 stroke #e8e0d0 0.6 width 1

# Brighter center core

ellipse 1.00,1.00 0.24,0.18 fill #bb77ff 0.75
ellipse 1.00,1.00 0.14,0.10 fill #e0c0ff 0.8

# Settled spore motes on the surface

circle 0.70,0.62 0.022 fill #e0c0ff 0.8
circle 1.28,0.72 0.025 fill #e0c0ff 0.85

circle 0.85,0.95 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.85
circle 1.15,1.08 0.016 fill #ffffff 0.8

# Ripples on the surface

arc 1.00,1.00 0.54 220 320 stroke #bb88ff 0.4 width 1
arc 1.00,1.00 0.64 160 200 stroke #aa77ff 0.3 width 1

# Spore wisps drifting above surface

bezier 1.30,1.50 1.40,1.62 1.48,1.72 1.42,1.82 stroke #bb88ff 0.35 width 1

# Spore motes rising from the puff (denser near base, sparser up top)

circle 0.54,0.48 0.020 fill #d0c0a8 0.8
circle 0.62,0.42 0.018 fill #d0c0a8 0.75
circle 0.44,0.40 0.020 fill #d0c0a8 0.75
circle 0.50,0.34 0.016 fill #d0c0a8 0.7
circle 0.58,0.30 0.015 fill #d0c0a8 0.65
circle 0.36,0.28 0.014 fill #d0c0a8 0.6
circle 0.48,0.22 0.013 fill #d0c0a8 0.55
circle 0.62,0.24 0.012 fill #d0c0a8 0.5
circle 0.42,0.18 0.010 fill #d0c0a8 0.45
circle 0.56,0.16 0.010 fill #d0c0a8 0.4
circle 0.30,0.38 0.012 fill #d0c0a8 0.6

# Wisps trailing upward (puff motion)

bezier 0.58,0.68 0.62,0.50 0.66,0.36 0.72,0.22 stroke #a89880 0.40 width 1

rect 0.44,0.50 0.22,0.08 stroke #5a3a00

rect 0.22,0.51 0.22,0.06 stroke #5a3a00
# Front ring
line 0.22,0.51 0.22,0.57 stroke #5a3a00 width 2

# Leather grip wrapping (around middle segment)

rect 0.50,0.50 0.10,0.08 stroke #2a1400
# Leather wrap lines
line 0.50,0.52 0.60,0.52 stroke #3a2010 0.7
line 0.50,0.54 0.60,0.54 stroke #3a2010 0.7
line 0.50,0.56 0.60,0.56 stroke #3a2010 0.7
# Engraved decorative band on eyepiece section

line 0.80,0.50 0.80,0.58 stroke #8b6914 0.7

# Brass tarnish spots
circle 0.56,0.52 0.012 fill #5a3a00 0.4
circle 0.72,0.56 0.01 fill #5a3a00 0.4
props.spyglass-tripod:
name: Spyglass Tripod
category: Tools
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 2
placement: floor
room_types: scouts-blind, watchtower, lighthouse-keepers-room, command-room, ship-captains-cabin
typical_count: single
clusters_with: brush-blind, map-pinned, log-book, chart-rolled
notes: Spyglass mounted on a wooden tripod — top-down view shows three legs splaying outward from a central mount, with the spyglass pointing south (the sighting end) and eyepiece cup at north.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection circle 0.5,0.5 0.18

# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1

# Ground shadow
ellipse 0.5,0.56 0.30,0.06 fill #1a0800 0.25

# === Three splayed tripod legs (120° apart — north, SW, SE) ===
# Leg pointing north-west
rect 0.38,0.10 0.05,0.42 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.38,0.10 0.05,0.42 fill #2a1400 0.35
rect 0.38,0.10 0.05,0.42 stroke #2a1400 width 1 rotate 20

# Leg pointing north-east
rect 0.57,0.10 0.05,0.42 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.57,0.10 0.05,0.42 fill #2a1400 0.35
rect 0.57,0.10 0.05,0.42 stroke #2a1400 width 1 rotate -20

# Leg pointing south (visible splay, toward viewer)
rect 0.48,0.50 0.05,0.38 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.48,0.50 0.05,0.38 fill #2a1400 0.35
rect 0.48,0.50 0.05,0.38 stroke #2a1400 width 1

# Leg foot caps (at ends of each leg)
circle 0.32,0.12 0.035 fill #2a1400 0.85
circle 0.32,0.12 0.035 stroke #1a0800
circle 0.68,0.12 0.035 fill #2a1400 0.85
circle 0.68,0.12 0.035 stroke #1a0800
circle 0.50,0.88 0.035 fill #2a1400 0.85
circle 0.50,0.88 0.035 stroke #1a0800

# Central hub (where legs meet and spyglass mounts)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.10 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
circle 0.5,0.5 0.10 fill #5c3a1e 0.5
circle 0.5,0.5 0.10 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# Brass locking knob on hub
circle 0.5,0.5 0.04 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.5,0.5 0.04 stroke #5a3a00

# === Spyglass barrel mounted on top (oriented north-south, pointing north) ===
# Widest segment (eyepiece end — south, closer to viewer)
rect 0.44,0.50 0.12,0.18 fill #daa520 0.95
rect 0.44,0.50 0.12,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.5
rect 0.44,0.50 0.12,0.18 stroke #5a3a00 width 1
# Eyepiece cup (south end — dark lens cup)
circle 0.50,0.68 0.06 fill #1a0f00 0.95
circle 0.50,0.68 0.06 stroke #3a2000
circle 0.50,0.68 0.04 fill #2a3a48 0.7
arc 0.50,0.68 0.04 210 270 stroke #6080a0 0.7 width 1

# Middle segment (slightly narrower)
rect 0.46,0.36 0.08,0.14 fill #c89518 0.95
rect 0.46,0.36 0.08,0.14 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.5
rect 0.46,0.36 0.08,0.14 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

# Front segment (narrowest — objective end, pointing north)
rect 0.47,0.22 0.06,0.14 fill #b08415 0.95
rect 0.47,0.22 0.06,0.14 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

# Objective lens (north end)
circle 0.50,0.20 0.045 fill #1a0f00 0.95
circle 0.50,0.20 0.045 stroke #3a2000
circle 0.50,0.20 0.030 fill #2a3a48 0.7
arc 0.50,0.20 0.030 210 270 stroke #6080a0 0.7 width 1

# Section rings between segments
line 0.46,0.36 0.54,0.36 stroke #5a3a00 width 2
line 0.47,0.50 0.53,0.50 stroke #5a3a00 width 2

# Brass sheen highlight
line 0.46,0.28 0.46,0.34 stroke #ffee88 0.6 width 1
line 0.46,0.40 0.46,0.48 stroke #ffee88 0.6 width 1
line 0.46,0.54 0.46,0.66 stroke #ffee88 0.7 width 1

# Pivot/tilt joint between hub and spyglass
circle 0.50,0.50 0.025 fill #2a1400 0.8
props.stage-large:
name: Large Stage
category: Structure
footprint: 3x3
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.5
placement: wall
room_types: bardic-hall, music-hall, theater, bards-college, tavern-stage, great-hall

# footprint 3x3: x 0-3, y 0-3

# === HITBOX ===

# === Main stage platform (wide plank-top deck) ===

line 0.10,0.72 2.90,0.72 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 0.10,0.98 2.90,0.98 stroke #2a1400 0.75 width 1
line 0.10,1.24 2.90,1.24 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 0.10,1.50 2.90,1.50 stroke #2a1400 0.75 width 1
line 0.10,1.76 2.90,1.76 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 0.10,2.02 2.90,2.02 stroke #2a1400 0.75 width 1
line 0.10,2.28 2.90,2.28 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1

# Plank seam nails/ends (small dark circles at plank joints)

circle 1.50,0.72 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.75
circle 2.60,0.98 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.75
circle 0.80,1.24 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.75
circle 2.20,1.50 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.75
circle 0.40,1.76 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.75
circle 1.80,2.02 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.75
circle 2.70,2.28 0.015 fill #1a0804 0.75

# === Riser step on south (front) edge — stepped down to floor ===
# Step 1 (upper step)

rect 0.20,2.66 2.60,0.12 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
# Step 2 (lower step)
rect 0.30,2.78 2.40,0.12 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.78

# Step edge shadows

line 0.30,2.78 2.70,2.78 stroke #1a0804 width 1

# Stage edge highlight (north edge of each step catches light)

line 0.30,2.79 2.70,2.79 stroke #8a7060 0.5 width 1

# Corner post caps on the stage corners (small dark squares)
rect 0.10,0.10 0.14,0.14 fill #2a1400 0.85
rect 0.10,0.10 0.14,0.14 stroke #1a0804
rect 2.76,0.10 0.14,0.14 fill #2a1400 0.85
rect 2.76,0.10 0.14,0.14 stroke #1a0804
rect 0.10,2.52 0.14,0.14 fill #2a1400 0.8
rect 0.10,2.52 0.14,0.14 stroke #1a0804
rect 2.76,2.52 0.14,0.14 fill #2a1400 0.8
rect 2.76,2.52 0.14,0.14 stroke #1a0804

# Subtle stage spotlight wear (central bright patch)
ellipse 1.50,1.30 0.80,0.60 fill #8a7060 0.12

---
# footprint 3x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-3

# === HITBOX ===

line 0.56,0.44 0.62,0.36 stroke #1a0800 0.85 width 1

line 0.40,0.62 0.46,0.62 stroke #1a0800 0.6 width 1
line 0.56,0.62 0.62,0.62 stroke #1a0800 0.6 width 1

line 0.78,0.80 0.80,0.74 stroke #4a6028 0.7

rect 0.40,0.40 1.20,1.20 stroke #777777

# Pedestal edge highlights (light top-left, shadow bottom-right)
line 0.30,0.30 1.70,0.30 stroke #999999 width 1.5
line 0.30,0.30 0.30,1.70 stroke #999999 width 1.5
line 0.30,1.70 1.70,1.70 stroke #444444 width 1.5
line 1.70,0.30 1.70,1.70 stroke #444444 width 1.5

# Decorative trim line around pedestal edge
rect 0.24,0.24 1.52,1.52 stroke #555555

# === SHADOW — statue shadow on pedestal (southeast cast) ===
ellipse 1.12,1.12 0.42,0.36 fill #000000 0.08
ellipse 1.10,1.10 0.36,0.30 fill #000000 0.06

# === FIGURE — Robed figure seen from above ===

# Robe draping — subtle radiating lines suggesting flowing fabric from above
# Front drape lines
line 1.00,0.62 0.94,0.50 stroke #888888 0.5
line 1.00,0.62 1.06,0.50 stroke #888888 0.5
# Back drape lines (longer, trailing robes)
line 1.00,1.18 0.88,1.42 stroke #888888 0.45
line 1.00,1.18 1.00,1.44 stroke #888888 0.45
line 1.00,1.18 1.12,1.42 stroke #888888 0.45
# Side drape — left
line 0.72,0.96 0.56,1.06 stroke #888888 0.4
line 0.72,1.00 0.54,1.14 stroke #888888 0.4
# Side drape — right
line 1.28,0.96 1.44,1.06 stroke #888888 0.4
line 1.28,1.00 1.46,1.14 stroke #888888 0.4

# Torso/shoulders — wide oval (marble texture, seen from above)
ellipse 1.00,0.98 0.30,0.22 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
ellipse 1.00,0.98 0.30,0.22 stroke #666666

# Shoulder highlight (light catches the top)
ellipse 1.00,0.94 0.24,0.10 fill #ffffff 0.08

# Left arm — extends from torso, resting at side
rect 0.62,0.88 0.12,0.32 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.8
rect 0.62,0.88 0.12,0.32 stroke #777777
# Left hand
ellipse 0.68,1.20 0.06,0.05 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
ellipse 0.68,1.20 0.06,0.05 stroke #777777

# Right arm — raised, holding a staff
rect 1.26,0.78 0.12,0.28 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.8
rect 1.26,0.78 0.12,0.28 stroke #777777
# Right hand (gripping staff)
ellipse 1.32,0.76 0.06,0.05 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
ellipse 1.32,0.76 0.06,0.05 stroke #777777

# === HELD OBJECT — Staff (thin line with orb on top) ===
line 1.32,0.76 1.32,0.48 stroke #666666 width 2
# Staff orb
circle 1.32,0.46 0.05 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.9
circle 1.32,0.46 0.05 stroke #666666
# Orb gleam highlight
circle 1.31,0.45 0.02 fill #ffffff 0.25

# === HEAD — circle above the torso ===
circle 1.00,0.78 0.13 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.9
circle 1.00,0.78 0.13 stroke #666666
# Face shadow (subtle depth)
ellipse 1.00,0.80 0.08,0.06 fill #000000 0.06
# Hair/crown detail — small arc lines on top of head
line 0.92,0.70 0.96,0.66 stroke #888888 0.5
line 0.96,0.66 1.04,0.66 stroke #888888 0.5
line 1.04,0.66 1.08,0.70 stroke #888888 0.5

# === HITBOX ZONES — z-height shadow projection ===
# Pedestal base (wide stepped stone, 0-3ft)
hitbox rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 z 0-3
# Figure body — polygon tracing torso, arms, and robe (3-5ft)
#   left arm top → left shoulder → right shoulder → right arm top →
#   right arm bottom → right hip → left hip → left hand bottom
hitbox poly 0.62,0.88 0.70,0.76 1.30,0.76 1.38,0.78 1.38,1.06 1.30,1.20 0.70,1.20 0.62,1.25 z 3-5
# Head (5-6ft)
hitbox circle 1.00,0.78 0.13 z 5-6
props.statue-classical:
name: Classical Statue
category: Features
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: corner
room_types: mansion-ballroom, mansion-grand-hall, noble-estate, temple-nave
typical_count: few
clusters_with: statue, pillar, pedestal-stone, potted-palm
notes: Pale marble figure on a round plinth. From above only the head, shoulders, and suggestion of drapery are visible. Place as a flanking pair or at the end of a sight line.
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.36 z 0-0.8
hitbox circle 0.5,0.55 0.20 z 0.8-2.0
hitbox circle 0.5,0.42 0.10 z 2.0-2.5

# === Plinth base (round marble) ===
circle 0.5,0.55 0.36 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.75
circle 0.5,0.55 0.36 stroke #666666 width 2
# Plinth top ring (stepped)
circle 0.5,0.55 0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
circle 0.5,0.55 0.30 stroke #777777
# Plinth edge highlight
arc 0.5,0.55 0.36 180 360 stroke #aaaaaa 0.5 width 1
arc 0.5,0.55 0.36 0 180 stroke #444444 0.6 width 1

# === Drapery (curving lines radiating from shoulders around figure) ===

bezier 0.68,0.50 0.70,0.60 0.64,0.70 0.60,0.76 stroke #888888 width 2

bezier 0.62,0.46 0.66,0.55 0.66,0.64 0.62,0.72 stroke #999999 0.7

line 0.50,0.58 0.54,0.74 stroke #888888 0.8

# === Shoulders (wide oval marble mass) ===
ellipse 0.50,0.52 0.20,0.14 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.9
ellipse 0.50,0.52 0.20,0.14 stroke #666666 width 2
# Shoulder highlight (top catches light)
ellipse 0.50,0.48 0.16,0.06 fill #ffffff 0.12

# === Head (circular, centered on shoulders, slightly north) ===
circle 0.50,0.42 0.11 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.92
circle 0.50,0.42 0.11 stroke #666666 width 2

arc 0.50,0.42 0.09 200 340 stroke #888888 0.7
# Subtle face shadow

circle 0.50,0.38 0.04 fill #ffffff 0.15
props.statue-dark-god:
name: Statue (Dark God)
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 5
placement: center
room_types: dark-temple, cultist-shrine, fiend-lair, boss-chamber, hell-gate, corrupted-temple

clusters_with: altar, brazier, tapestry-dark, skull-offering, candle-cluster, ritual-candle
notes: Menacing dark deity statue — clawed/horned silhouette seen from above. Broad shoulders, folded clawed wings, horned head disc at apex. Not a side profile.
---
# footprint 2x2 — center of shoulders at (1.0,1.0)

# Hitbox — shaft cross-section blocks light
hitbox rect 0.40,0.40 1.20,1.20 z 0-5

# Ground shadow cast by tall statue
ellipse 1.20,1.22 0.82,0.80 fill #000000 0.18
ellipse 1.24,1.26 0.72,0.70 fill #000000 0.2

# === Base pedestal (dark stone, with spikes at corners) ===
rect 0.20,0.25 1.60,1.55 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.55
rect 0.20,0.25 1.60,1.55 fill #1a0a1a 0.5
rect 0.20,0.25 1.60,1.55 stroke #2a1020 width 2

# Pedestal carved edges (dark groove lines)
line 0.30,0.35 0.30,1.70 stroke #0a0510 0.7 width 1
line 1.70,0.35 1.70,1.70 stroke #0a0510 0.7 width 1
line 0.30,0.35 1.70,0.35 stroke #0a0510 0.6 width 1
line 0.30,1.70 1.70,1.70 stroke #0a0510 0.6 width 1

# Corner spikes projecting from pedestal (small triangular points)
poly 0.22,0.28 0.14,0.20 0.30,0.24 fill #1a0a1a 0.9
poly 0.22,0.28 0.14,0.20 0.30,0.24 stroke #0a0510
poly 1.78,0.28 1.86,0.20 1.70,0.24 fill #1a0a1a 0.9
poly 1.78,0.28 1.86,0.20 1.70,0.24 stroke #0a0510
poly 0.22,1.72 0.14,1.80 0.30,1.76 fill #1a0a1a 0.9
poly 0.22,1.72 0.14,1.80 0.30,1.76 stroke #0a0510
poly 1.78,1.72 1.86,1.80 1.70,1.76 fill #1a0a1a 0.9
poly 1.78,1.72 1.86,1.80 1.70,1.76 stroke #0a0510

# === Main body silhouette (broad shoulders + folded wings, seen from above) ===
poly 0.70,0.42 1.30,0.42 1.62,0.55 1.80,0.80 1.88,1.15 1.82,1.55 1.60,1.74 1.30,1.78 0.70,1.78 0.40,1.74 0.18,1.55 0.12,1.15 0.20,0.80 0.38,0.55 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.5
poly 0.70,0.42 1.30,0.42 1.62,0.55 1.80,0.80 1.88,1.15 1.82,1.55 1.60,1.74 1.30,1.78 0.70,1.78 0.40,1.74 0.18,1.55 0.12,1.15 0.20,0.80 0.38,0.55 fill #1a0a1a 0.6
poly 0.70,0.42 1.30,0.42 1.62,0.55 1.80,0.80 1.88,1.15 1.82,1.55 1.60,1.74 1.30,1.78 0.70,1.78 0.40,1.74 0.18,1.55 0.12,1.15 0.20,0.80 0.38,0.55 stroke #0a0510 width 2

# === Clawed wing fold lines (left and right) ===
# Left wing — curved fold with claw spikes projecting outward
qbezier 0.38,0.58 0.18,0.90 0.30,1.50 stroke #2a1828 0.6 width 2
qbezier 0.45,0.68 0.28,0.95 0.36,1.42 stroke #3a2838 0.5 width 1
# Left wing claw-tips (small spikes poking out from wing edge)
poly 0.14,0.90 0.06,0.85 0.16,0.98 fill #0a0510 0.9
poly 0.16,1.25 0.06,1.28 0.20,1.35 fill #0a0510 0.9
# Right wing — curved fold with claw spikes
qbezier 1.62,0.58 1.82,0.90 1.70,1.50 stroke #2a1828 0.6 width 2
qbezier 1.55,0.68 1.72,0.95 1.64,1.42 stroke #3a2838 0.5 width 1
# Right wing claw-tips
poly 1.86,0.90 1.94,0.85 1.84,0.98 fill #0a0510 0.9
poly 1.84,1.25 1.94,1.28 1.80,1.35 fill #0a0510 0.9

# === Shoulder ridge (across top where neck meets shoulders) ===
qbezier 0.45,0.58 1.00,0.48 1.55,0.58 stroke #2a1828 0.7 width 2

# === Clawed arms wrapped across body (two claws meeting at chest) ===
bezier 0.48,0.72 0.68,0.92 0.82,1.08 0.98,1.12 stroke #0a0510 width 2
bezier 1.52,0.72 1.32,0.92 1.18,1.08 1.02,1.12 stroke #0a0510 width 2
# Claw tips (at chest center)
poly 0.96,1.08 1.04,1.08 1.00,1.20 fill #3a2838 0.9
poly 0.96,1.08 1.04,1.08 1.00,1.20 stroke #0a0510

# === Head disc at apex (looking down on top of head) ===
circle 1.00,0.52 0.19 fill #1a0a1a 0.9
circle 1.00,0.52 0.19 stroke #0a0510 width 2
# Head detail wash
circle 1.00,0.52 0.19 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.35

# === Horns (four curving horns projecting outward from head) ===
# Main left horn
poly 0.84,0.42 0.72,0.24 0.76,0.22 0.88,0.40 fill #2a1828 0.95
poly 0.84,0.42 0.72,0.24 0.76,0.22 0.88,0.40 stroke #0a0510
# Main right horn
poly 1.16,0.42 1.28,0.24 1.24,0.22 1.12,0.40 fill #2a1828 0.95
poly 1.16,0.42 1.28,0.24 1.24,0.22 1.12,0.40 stroke #0a0510
# Secondary left horn (smaller)
poly 0.90,0.46 0.82,0.30 0.86,0.30 0.94,0.44 fill #3a2838 0.85
poly 0.90,0.46 0.82,0.30 0.86,0.30 0.94,0.44 stroke #0a0510
# Secondary right horn
poly 1.10,0.46 1.18,0.30 1.14,0.30 1.06,0.44 fill #3a2838 0.85
poly 1.10,0.46 1.18,0.30 1.14,0.30 1.06,0.44 stroke #0a0510

# === Face features (sunken eye hollows glowing red) ===
circle 0.94,0.50 0.03 fill #1a0000 0.9
circle 1.06,0.50 0.03 fill #1a0000 0.9
# Red eye glow
circle 0.94,0.50 0.018 fill #cc3322 0.85
circle 1.06,0.50 0.018 fill #cc3322 0.85
circle 0.94,0.50 0.008 fill #ff6633 0.95
circle 1.06,0.50 0.008 fill #ff6633 0.95

# Third eye / brand on forehead
poly 0.97,0.40 1.03,0.40 1.00,0.44 fill #4a0000 0.8
poly 0.97,0.40 1.03,0.40 1.00,0.44 stroke #2a0000

# === Weathering and cracks on the stone ===
line 0.55,1.30 0.62,1.42 stroke #0a0510 0.6 width 1
line 1.40,1.10 1.50,1.22 stroke #0a0510 0.6 width 1
line 0.80,1.58 0.90,1.66 stroke #0a0510 0.5 width 1
line 1.20,0.80 1.28,0.92 stroke #0a0510 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.40,1.20 0.44,1.28 0.48,1.36 0.52,1.42 stroke #0a0510 0.5 width 1

# Dark aura stain around base
ellipse 1.00,1.80 0.80,0.08 fill #0a0510 0.5
props.statue-deity:

# footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2

# === HITBOX — layered z-column ===
hitbox rect 0.14,0.14 1.72,1.72 z 0-0.6

hitbox circle 1.0,0.76 0.16 z 2.2-3.0

line 1.86,1.86 1.74,1.74 stroke #888888 width 1

# Plinth edge light/shadow

line 0.26,1.74 1.74,1.74 stroke #444444 width 1

# === Outspread arms (wide robed span) ===

rect 0.38,0.94 0.40,0.16 stroke #666666 width 1

ellipse 0.38,1.02 0.07,0.08 stroke #666666

rect 1.22,0.94 0.40,0.16 stroke #666666 width 1
# Right hand (open palm)
ellipse 1.62,1.02 0.07,0.08 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.9
ellipse 1.62,1.02 0.07,0.08 stroke #666666

# === Robed torso (wide oval) ===

ellipse 1.0,1.10 0.34,0.30 stroke #666666 width 2

# Shoulder highlight

# Robe drape lines (radiating south from torso)

line 1.0,1.28 0.94,1.62 stroke #888888 0.6 width 1
line 1.0,1.28 1.06,1.62 stroke #888888 0.6 width 1
line 1.0,1.28 1.16,1.58 stroke #888888 0.65 width 1
# Side drapery
bezier 0.68,1.10 0.58,1.30 0.62,1.50 0.74,1.62 stroke #888888 0.55 width 1
bezier 1.32,1.10 1.42,1.30 1.38,1.50 1.26,1.62 stroke #888888 0.55 width 1

# Front sash/belt detail
line 0.86,1.18 1.14,1.18 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 1

# === Head (slightly north of shoulders) ===
circle 1.0,0.78 0.14 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.95
circle 1.0,0.78 0.14 stroke #666666 width 2

arc 1.0,0.78 0.20 190 350 stroke #daa520 0.8 width 2

props.statue-devil:
name: Statue (Devil)
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 6
placement: center
room_types: infernal-court, temple, fiend-lair, throne-room, hell-gate
typical_count: few
clusters_with: brazier, banner-infernal, pillar, soul-coin-pile
notes: Stone statue of a horned infernal figure with folded wings; top-down shows broad shoulder/wing silhouette with head disc at apex
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.40 z 0-6

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: statue from directly above — broad shoulders + folded wings as silhouette,
# head disc at the apex (north). NOT a side profile.

# === Base pedestal ===
rect 0.20,0.25 1.60,1.55 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.65
rect 0.20,0.25 1.60,1.55 stroke #444444

# Pedestal edge highlights
line 0.20,0.25 1.80,0.25 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.20,0.25 0.20,1.80 stroke #555555 width 1

# === Wing + shoulder silhouette (broad shape seen from above) ===
# Main body mass — torso and folded wings as one large shape
poly 0.70,0.40 1.30,0.40 1.65,0.65 1.80,1.10 1.75,1.60 1.55,1.75 0.45,1.75 0.25,1.60 0.20,1.10 0.35,0.65 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.75
poly 0.70,0.40 1.30,0.40 1.65,0.65 1.80,1.10 1.75,1.60 1.55,1.75 0.45,1.75 0.25,1.60 0.20,1.10 0.35,0.65 stroke #333333

# === Wing fold lines (sculpted detail on top surface) ===
# Left wing fold
qbezier 0.35,0.68 0.32,1.10 0.45,1.65 stroke #444444 0.5 width 2
qbezier 0.42,0.75 0.40,1.15 0.50,1.55 stroke #555555 0.35 width 1
# Right wing fold
qbezier 1.65,0.68 1.68,1.10 1.55,1.65 stroke #444444 0.5 width 2
qbezier 1.58,0.75 1.60,1.15 1.50,1.55 stroke #555555 0.35 width 1

# === Shoulder ridge ===
qbezier 0.40,0.60 1.00,0.50 1.60,0.60 stroke #555555 0.4 width 2

# === Head disc at the apex (looking straight down on the top of the head) ===
circle 1.00,0.50 0.18 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.8
circle 1.00,0.50 0.18 stroke #333333

# === Horn stubs (projecting outward from head, foreshortened from above) ===
# Left horn — short wedge
poly 0.78,0.42 0.72,0.32 0.76,0.30 0.84,0.40 fill #444444 0.8
poly 0.78,0.42 0.72,0.32 0.76,0.30 0.84,0.40 stroke #333333
# Right horn — short wedge
poly 1.22,0.42 1.28,0.32 1.24,0.30 1.16,0.40 fill #444444 0.8
poly 1.22,0.42 1.28,0.32 1.24,0.30 1.16,0.40 stroke #333333

# === Subtle face features (carved into top of head, barely visible from above) ===
circle 0.96,0.48 0.02 fill #222222 0.4
circle 1.04,0.48 0.02 fill #222222 0.4

# === Weathering/erosion details ===
line 0.55,1.20 0.62,1.28 stroke #222222 0.25 width 1
line 1.40,0.90 1.48,0.98 stroke #222222 0.25 width 1
line 0.80,1.50 0.88,1.55 stroke #222222 0.2 width 1
props.statue-noble:
name: Noble Bust Statue
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.5
placement: corner
room_types: mansion-grand-hall, mansion-ballroom, gallery, noble-villa, reception-hall, estate, memorial
typical_count: few
clusters_with: decorative-urn, coat-rack-ornate, painting-large, banner-heraldic
notes: Marble bust of a noble on a round column plinth, laurel wreath on the head. Place flanking entrances or in corners.
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.50,0.50 0.32 z 0-1.2
hitbox circle 0.50,0.50 0.18 z 1.2-1.5

# Round column plinth (wide outer base)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.88
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 stroke #666666 width 2

# Plinth step ring (slightly raised inner)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.29 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.92
circle 0.50,0.50 0.29 stroke #777777

# Plinth top surface
circle 0.50,0.50 0.25 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.95
circle 0.50,0.50 0.25 stroke #888888

# Plinth upper highlight
arc 0.50,0.50 0.25 200 260 stroke #ffffff 0.35 width 1

# Shoulders ellipse (top of bust — wider than head)
ellipse 0.50,0.54 0.18,0.12 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.93
ellipse 0.50,0.54 0.18,0.12 stroke #666666 width 2

# Drape/toga fold lines over shoulders
line 0.38,0.60 0.44,0.64 stroke #888888 0.6
line 0.56,0.64 0.62,0.60 stroke #888888 0.6
line 0.50,0.52 0.50,0.64 stroke #888888 0.5

# Head (round, slightly above shoulders)
circle 0.50,0.42 0.13 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.96
circle 0.50,0.42 0.13 stroke #666666 width 2

# Laurel wreath around head (subtle ring of leaf hints)
arc 0.50,0.42 0.15 180 360 stroke #2a6a20 0.7 width 2
# Laurel leaves as small ticks

props.stave-horse:
name: Stave Horse
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes

notes: Cooper's workhorse bench with foot-lever hold-down at south end and shaving clamp at north; for shaping barrel staves. Front (south) faces the cooper.
---
# footprint 2x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-2
# Top-down: long plank + foot-lever bump at south (high Y) + shaving clamp at north (low Y)

# Four legs (visible as small dark squares at corners)
circle 0.22,0.20 0.05 fill #3a1f00 0.45
circle 0.78,0.20 0.05 fill #3a1f00 0.45
circle 0.22,1.80 0.05 fill #3a1f00 0.45
circle 0.78,1.80 0.05 fill #3a1f00 0.45

# Main bench plank (long narrow board running north-south)
rect 0.25,0.14 0.50,1.72 texfill polyhaven/wood_table 0.85
rect 0.25,0.14 0.50,1.72 stroke #3a1f00

# Plank grain lines (running along the length)
line 0.38,0.18 0.38,1.82 stroke #5c3a1e 0.2
line 0.50,0.16 0.50,1.84 stroke #5c3a1e 0.2
line 0.62,0.18 0.62,1.82 stroke #5c3a1e 0.2

# Shaving clamp at north end (two small jaw blocks)
rect 0.30,0.16 0.16,0.14 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.8
rect 0.30,0.16 0.16,0.14 stroke #2a1400
rect 0.54,0.16 0.16,0.14 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.8
rect 0.54,0.16 0.16,0.14 stroke #2a1400

circle 0.50,0.22 0.025 stroke #444444

# Cross-brace support (mid bench)
rect 0.20,0.90 0.60,0.08 fill #5c3a1e 0.5
rect 0.20,0.90 0.60,0.08 stroke #3a1f00 0.5

# Foot-lever mechanism at south end
# Lever pivot bar (runs east-west under south end)
rect 0.18,1.68 0.64,0.06 fill #555555 0.6
rect 0.18,1.68 0.64,0.06 stroke #333333
# Foot pedal (small rectangle extending south from bench)
rect 0.36,1.76 0.28,0.18 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.75
rect 0.36,1.76 0.28,0.18 stroke #2a1400
# Pivot pin
circle 0.50,1.70 0.025 fill #666666 0.7
circle 0.50,1.70 0.025 stroke #444444

# Hold-down arm (connects foot lever to clamp — thin iron rod along bench)

line 2.50,0.16 2.50,0.78 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

rect 1.04,0.20 0.42,0.16 fill #aaccee 0.12

rect 2.04,0.20 0.42,0.16 fill #aaccee 0.12
rect 2.54,0.20 0.26,0.16 fill #99bbdd 0.10

# Light spill on floor (south of window)
rect 0.30,0.80 2.40,0.14 fill #aaccee 0.06

# Window sill (bottom frame bar)
rect 0.08,0.76 2.84,0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.8
rect 0.08,0.76 2.84,0.08 stroke #3a1f00

props.stone-arch-natural:
name: Stone Arch (Natural)
category: Terrain
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: chasm, cave, canyon, underground-river, wilderness
typical_count: single
clusters_with: boulder, anchor-post, stalagmite
notes: Natural stone arch bridging a chasm. Top-down shows the arch's keystone top — a solid oval of stone with cracks. blocks_light:no because it's an arch over a gap.
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: the arch top is a solid oval/circle of stone with cracked texture

# === Outer rim of the arch (where it meets the chasm walls) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.92,0.82 fill #4a4238 0.25
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.92,0.82 stroke #333333 0.3

# === Main arch keystone top (solid stone oval) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.78,0.68 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.85
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.78,0.68 stroke #444444

# === Lighter highlight on the crown (top of the arch catches light) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.50,0.42 fill #888888 0.12

# === Crack lines across the keystone ===
line 0.40,0.65 0.85,1.10 stroke #333333 0.45
line 0.85,1.10 1.30,0.80 stroke #333333 0.40
line 1.20,1.20 1.60,1.45 stroke #333333 0.40
line 0.55,1.30 0.90,1.50 stroke #333333 0.35
line 1.10,0.55 1.50,0.70 stroke #333333 0.35

# === Smaller surface cracks (finer detail) ===
line 0.70,0.80 0.90,0.90 stroke #444444 0.30
line 1.30,1.00 1.50,1.15 stroke #444444 0.30
line 0.80,1.30 1.00,1.20 stroke #444444 0.25

# === Edge weathering (darker at the rim where water erodes) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.78,0.68 stroke #333333 0.2 width 3

# === Small loose stones on the arch surface ===
circle 0.52,0.82 0.04 fill #5a5248 0.6
circle 0.52,0.82 0.04 stroke #3a3228
circle 1.55,1.28 0.035 fill #5a5248 0.55
circle 1.55,1.28 0.035 stroke #3a3228
circle 1.10,0.65 0.03 fill #4a4238 0.5
props.stone-column:
name: Column (Stone)
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 10
placement: corner
room_types: any
typical_count: few
notes: Heavier structural pillar; place at room corners or symmetrically
---
# Hitbox: shaft blocks light (not the ground-level base)
hitbox circle 1,1 0.62 z 0-10

# Large circular base (wider than the shaft)
circle 1,1 0.82 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.7
circle 1,1 0.82 stroke #666666

# Main shaft — stone_wall textured circle
circle 1,1 0.62 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
circle 1,1 0.62 stroke #666666

# Capital (top piece) — slightly wider than shaft, granite_tile textured
ring 1,1 0.50 0.36 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.80
ring 1,1 0.50 0.36 stroke #666666

# Fluting marks (12 radial lines at 30-degree intervals, from outer shaft to capital ring)
# 0°
line 1.0,0.18 1.0,0.32 stroke #666666
# 30°
line 1.31,0.24 1.25,0.36 stroke #666666
# 60°
line 1.54,0.49 1.44,0.52 stroke #666666
# 90°
line 1.62,0.82 1.50,0.82 stroke #666666
# 120° (using symmetry: mirror of 60°)
line 1.54,1.51 1.44,1.48 stroke #666666
# 150°
line 1.31,1.76 1.25,1.64 stroke #666666
# 180°
line 1.0,1.82 1.0,1.68 stroke #666666
# 210°
line 0.69,1.76 0.75,1.64 stroke #666666
# 240°
line 0.46,1.51 0.56,1.48 stroke #666666
# 270°
line 0.38,0.82 0.50,0.82 stroke #666666
# 300°
line 0.46,0.49 0.56,0.52 stroke #666666
# 330°
line 0.69,0.24 0.75,0.36 stroke #666666

# Column core (center detail)
circle 1,1 0.10 fill #888888 0.5
circle 1,1 0.10 stroke #666666

props.strigil:
name: Strigil
category: Tools
footprint: 1x1
facing: no

notes: Curved bronze body-scraper tool — hooked scoop blade with short grip. Lying on surface.
---
# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1
# Top-down: curved crescent scoop blade, short wrapped handle at one end.

# Shadow beneath
ellipse 0.5,0.54 0.40,0.08 fill #1a0800 0.2

# === GRIP / HANDLE (east end) ===
# Handle core
rect 0.68,0.46 0.24,0.10 fill #8b6914 0.9
rect 0.68,0.46 0.24,0.10 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.4
rect 0.68,0.46 0.24,0.10 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

# Leather wrap around handle
line 0.70,0.48 0.70,0.54 stroke #3a2010 width 2
line 0.74,0.48 0.74,0.54 stroke #3a2010 width 2
line 0.78,0.48 0.78,0.54 stroke #3a2010 width 2
line 0.82,0.48 0.82,0.54 stroke #3a2010 width 2
line 0.86,0.48 0.86,0.54 stroke #3a2010 width 2

# Handle pommel cap (east end)
circle 0.92,0.51 0.04 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.92,0.51 0.04 stroke #5a3a00

# Socket/ferrule where handle meets blade
rect 0.64,0.44 0.06,0.14 fill #8b6914 0.9
rect 0.64,0.44 0.06,0.14 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

# === CURVED SCOOP BLADE (west, curving around) ===
# Outer blade edge (large curve)
bezier 0.64,0.44 0.40,0.30 0.16,0.36 0.08,0.52 stroke #daa520 width 4
bezier 0.64,0.44 0.40,0.30 0.16,0.36 0.08,0.52 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 2

# Inner blade edge (forms the scoop channel)
bezier 0.64,0.56 0.44,0.52 0.24,0.58 0.16,0.64 stroke #c89518 width 3
bezier 0.64,0.56 0.44,0.52 0.24,0.58 0.16,0.64 stroke #5a3a00 0.7 width 1

# Blade body (filled polygon between the two curves)
poly 0.64,0.44 0.40,0.30 0.16,0.36 0.08,0.52 0.12,0.56 0.16,0.64 0.24,0.58 0.44,0.52 0.64,0.56 fill #daa520 0.7
poly 0.64,0.44 0.40,0.30 0.16,0.36 0.08,0.52 0.12,0.56 0.16,0.64 0.24,0.58 0.44,0.52 0.64,0.56 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.3
poly 0.64,0.44 0.40,0.30 0.16,0.36 0.08,0.52 0.12,0.56 0.16,0.64 0.24,0.58 0.44,0.52 0.64,0.56 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

# Inner blade polished sheen (bright bronze highlight)
bezier 0.56,0.42 0.38,0.36 0.22,0.42 0.14,0.54 stroke #ffee88 0.6 width 1

# Blade tip (west point)
circle 0.08,0.52 0.022 fill #5a3a00 0.8

# Tarnish spots
circle 0.40,0.40 0.012 fill #5a3a00 0.5
circle 0.30,0.50 0.010 fill #5a3a00 0.5
circle 0.76,0.50 0.010 fill #5a3a00 0.4

# Oil residue smudge inside the scoop
ellipse 0.40,0.46 0.10,0.03 fill #8b6914 0.4

room_types: boss-chamber, dark-temple, ritual-chamber-dark, summoning-circle
typical_count: single
clusters_with: magic-circle, altar-sacrificial, candle-dipped, ritual-knife, bloodstain, brazier
lights: [{"preset":"astral","x":1,"y":1,"radius":16,"intensity":0.9,"color":"#8822cc"}]
notes: Large circular ritual pool with carved stone rim, dark fluid surface, infernal glow. Place at room center.
---
# Hitbox is the stone rim
selection circle 1.0,1.0 0.88

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: circular pool with rune-carved stone rim, dark glowing liquid

# === Stone rim (outer ring) ===
ring 1.0,1.0 0.92 0.72 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.88
ring 1.0,1.0 0.92 0.72 stroke #1a1a1a width 2

# Mortar/joint lines radiating across the rim
line 1.00,0.08 1.00,0.28 stroke #2a2a2a 0.5
line 1.00,1.72 1.00,1.92 stroke #2a2a2a 0.5
line 0.08,1.00 0.28,1.00 stroke #2a2a2a 0.5
line 1.72,1.00 1.92,1.00 stroke #2a2a2a 0.5
line 0.35,0.35 0.49,0.49 stroke #2a2a2a 0.4
line 1.65,0.35 1.51,0.49 stroke #2a2a2a 0.4
line 0.35,1.65 0.49,1.51 stroke #2a2a2a 0.4
line 1.65,1.65 1.51,1.51 stroke #2a2a2a 0.4

# === Carved runes around the rim (faint purple etchings) ===
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 10 35 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 55 80 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 100 125 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 145 170 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 190 215 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 235 260 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 280 305 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 325 350 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
# Rune tick marks
line 1.00,0.20 1.00,0.28 stroke #8822cc 0.6 width 2
line 1.00,1.72 1.00,1.80 stroke #8822cc 0.6 width 2
line 0.20,1.00 0.28,1.00 stroke #8822cc 0.6 width 2
line 1.72,1.00 1.80,1.00 stroke #8822cc 0.6 width 2

# === Blood/sigil stains on the rim ===
ellipse 0.30,0.60 0.08,0.05 fill #3a0808 0.65
ellipse 1.70,1.35 0.07,0.04 fill #3a0808 0.65
ellipse 0.65,1.75 0.06,0.04 fill #2a0606 0.7

# === Pool interior — dark fluid with radial glow ===
# Base fluid (blood-black purple)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.72 fill #1a0818 0.92
circle 1.0,1.0 0.72 stroke #0a0408

# Radial glow gradient from inner glow to edge darkness
circle 1.0,1.0 0.66 gradient-radial #8822cc #2a0030 0.55

# Inner hot core
circle 1.0,1.0 0.28 fill #8822cc 0.5
circle 1.0,1.0 0.18 fill #aa44ee 0.6
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 fill #ccaaff 0.7

# === Swirling energy / ripple bezier arcs on the surface ===
bezier 0.40,1.00 0.65,0.70 1.35,1.30 1.60,1.00 stroke #aa44ee 0.5 width 2
bezier 1.00,0.40 0.70,0.65 1.30,1.35 1.00,1.60 stroke #aa44ee 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.50,0.50 0.90,0.80 1.10,1.20 1.50,1.50 stroke #7722aa 0.4 width 2
bezier 1.50,0.50 1.10,0.80 0.90,1.20 0.50,1.50 stroke #7722aa 0.4 width 2

# Ripple rings
circle 1.0,1.0 0.50 stroke #6622aa 0.45 width 1
circle 1.0,1.0 0.40 stroke #8822cc 0.4 width 1
props.summoning-pool-glow:
name: Summoning Pool (Glowing)
category: Magical
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.1
lights: [{"preset":"infernal-flame","x":1.0,"y":1.0,"color":"#ff4400","intensity":0.9,"radius":8}]
placement: center
room_types: boss-chamber, ritual-chamber-dark, hell-gate, dark-temple, fiend-lair, corrupted-temple
typical_count: single
clusters_with: ritual-circle, magic-sigil-floor, altar, bone-pile, skull-offering, statue-dark-god
notes: Glowing ritual pool — molten magma-red surface radiating infernal heat. Place at boss room center or as summoning focus.
---
# Flat fluid pool — no shadow, no blocking

# === Outer radiant heat halo ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.98 gradient-radial #ff4400 #1a0000 0.5
# Mid heat glow
circle 1.0,1.0 0.84 fill #cc2200 0.25
circle 1.0,1.0 0.74 fill #ff4400 0.3

# === Dark stone rim (containing the pool) ===
ring 1.0,1.0 0.94 0.82 fill #1a0a08 0.88
ring 1.0,1.0 0.94 0.82 stroke #0a0404 width 2

# Rim char marks (burned blackened stone)
arc 1.0,1.0 0.88 15 45 stroke #0a0000 0.8 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.88 75 105 stroke #0a0000 0.8 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.88 135 165 stroke #0a0000 0.8 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.88 195 225 stroke #0a0000 0.8 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.88 255 285 stroke #0a0000 0.8 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.88 315 345 stroke #0a0000 0.8 width 2

# === Molten pool surface (layered hot concentric rings) ===
# Outer molten surface (darker red)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.80 fill #4a0000 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.80 stroke #2a0000 width 1

# Mid layer (fiery red)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.66 fill #8b1010 0.85
# Cracked crust pattern (darker veins between layers)
bezier 0.50,0.80 0.68,0.88 0.84,0.72 0.90,0.60 stroke #2a0000 0.8 width 2
bezier 1.50,0.80 1.32,0.88 1.16,0.72 1.10,0.60 stroke #2a0000 0.7 width 2
bezier 0.50,1.20 0.68,1.12 0.84,1.28 0.90,1.40 stroke #2a0000 0.7 width 2
bezier 1.50,1.20 1.32,1.12 1.16,1.28 1.10,1.40 stroke #2a0000 0.7 width 2

# Bright molten (orange-red)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.54 fill #cc2200 0.85
# Hotter (orange)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.40 fill #ff4400 0.85
# Even hotter (bright orange)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.28 fill #ff7700 0.9
# Yellow-hot
circle 1.0,1.0 0.18 fill #ffaa00 0.92
# White-hot core
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 fill #ffdd66 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.05 fill #ffffcc 1.0

# === Runic sigils inscribed on the rim (glowing red) ===
line 1.00,0.10 1.00,0.22 stroke #ff6633 0.9 width 2
line 0.96,0.14 1.04,0.14 stroke #ff6633 0.8 width 2

line 1.90,1.00 1.78,1.00 stroke #ff6633 0.9 width 2
line 1.86,0.96 1.86,1.04 stroke #ff6633 0.8 width 2

line 1.00,1.90 1.00,1.78 stroke #ff6633 0.9 width 2
line 0.96,1.86 1.04,1.86 stroke #ff6633 0.8 width 2

line 0.10,1.00 0.22,1.00 stroke #ff6633 0.9 width 2
line 0.14,0.96 0.14,1.04 stroke #ff6633 0.8 width 2

# === Rising steam / heat wisps (curling vapor) ===
bezier 0.70,0.70 0.62,0.56 0.64,0.44 0.58,0.32 stroke #ff8844 0.4 width 2
bezier 1.30,0.70 1.38,0.56 1.36,0.44 1.42,0.32 stroke #ff8844 0.4 width 2
bezier 0.72,1.30 0.64,1.44 0.62,1.56 0.56,1.68 stroke #ff8844 0.35 width 2
bezier 1.28,1.30 1.36,1.44 1.38,1.56 1.44,1.68 stroke #ff8844 0.35 width 2

# === Floating embers / sparks above the pool ===
circle 0.64,0.44 0.02 fill #ffdd66 0.85
circle 1.36,0.46 0.018 fill #ffdd66 0.8
circle 0.58,1.56 0.02 fill #ffdd66 0.85
circle 1.42,1.58 0.018 fill #ffdd66 0.8
circle 0.42,0.72 0.015 fill #ffaa44 0.75
circle 1.58,1.30 0.014 fill #ffaa44 0.7
circle 0.50,1.40 0.013 fill #ffaa44 0.7
circle 1.50,0.60 0.013 fill #ffaa44 0.7

# === Tiny infernal glyphs floating in the surface ===
line 0.80,0.90 0.84,0.94 stroke #1a0000 width 1
line 1.20,0.88 1.16,0.92 stroke #1a0000 width 1
line 0.82,1.12 0.88,1.08 stroke #1a0000 width 1
line 1.18,1.14 1.14,1.10 stroke #1a0000 width 1

# Hottest glint at the very center (white-hot portal eye)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.03 fill #ffffff 1.0

line 1.18,0.68 1.24,0.74 stroke #daa520 width 1

notes: Flat floor decal of warm sunlight spilling through a window onto the floor. Placed against a wall — the light beam fans south away from the wall. Emits a faint warm ambient light.
---
# Flat decal — no hitbox needed, but provide a nominal one
selection rect 0.04,0.04 1.92,0.92

# footprint 1x2: x 0-2, y 0-1
# Window frame hint (narrow strip along north wall)
rect 0.20,0.02 1.60,0.06 fill #3a2810 0.7
rect 0.20,0.02 1.60,0.06 stroke #1a0a00 width 1

# Three muntins (window panes divided into 3 sections)
line 0.73,0.02 0.73,0.08 stroke #1a0a00 0.85 width 1
line 1.27,0.02 1.27,0.08 stroke #1a0a00 0.85 width 1

# Glass gleam on frame
line 0.24,0.04 1.76,0.04 stroke #ffeaa0 0.6 width 1

# Main light spill — fans outward (trapezoid from window)
poly 0.30,0.08 1.70,0.08 1.90,0.94 0.10,0.94 fill #ffeaa0 0.35
poly 0.30,0.08 1.70,0.08 1.90,0.94 0.10,0.94 fill #ffd860 0.25

# Brighter inner beam
poly 0.45,0.08 1.55,0.08 1.70,0.78 0.30,0.78 fill #ffeaa0 0.45

# Hottest center (near window)
poly 0.60,0.08 1.40,0.08 1.50,0.50 0.50,0.50 fill #fff0b8 0.55

# Muntin shadow bars within the spill (window frame shadows)
poly 0.70,0.08 0.76,0.08 0.80,0.94 0.70,0.94 fill #5a4a2a 0.3
poly 1.24,0.08 1.30,0.08 1.30,0.94 1.20,0.94 fill #5a4a2a 0.3

# Subtle dust motes / specks (tiny warm dots inside the beam)
circle 0.55,0.30 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.55
circle 0.80,0.50 0.010 fill #ffffff 0.5
circle 1.20,0.40 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.55
circle 1.45,0.65 0.010 fill #ffffff 0.45
circle 0.95,0.70 0.008 fill #ffffff 0.4

# Soft feathered edges (fading outward)
line 0.10,0.94 0.30,0.08 stroke #ffeaa0 0.25 width 2
line 1.90,0.94 1.70,0.08 stroke #ffeaa0 0.25 width 2

poly 0.46,0.56 0.50,0.54 0.52,0.60 0.48,0.62 fill #f0e4d0 0.88
poly 0.46,0.56 0.50,0.54 0.52,0.60 0.48,0.62 stroke #8a7a6a

props.torch-sconce:
name: Torch Sconce
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 1
lights: [{"preset":"torch","x":0.5,"y":0.5}]
placement: wall
room_types: any
typical_count: many
notes: Wall-mounted light; place at regular intervals along walls. Use fillWallWithProps with gap:2-3
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.25,0.02 0.50,0.42 z 0-1

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1. Facing south, mounted on north wall.

# === Wall mounting bracket (metal plate flush against north edge) ===
rect 0.25,0.02 0.50,0.12 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.85
rect 0.25,0.02 0.50,0.12 stroke #3a3a3a
# Rivet top-left
circle 0.32,0.06 0.02 fill #666666 0.8
# Rivet top-right
circle 0.68,0.06 0.02 fill #666666 0.8
# Rivet bottom-left
circle 0.32,0.11 0.02 fill #666666 0.8
# Rivet bottom-right
circle 0.68,0.11 0.02 fill #666666 0.8

# === Subtle shadow of arm on wall ===
rect 0.44,0.10 0.16,0.28 fill #000000 0.08
ellipse 0.50,0.52 0.14,0.10 fill #000000 0.06

# === Iron arm extending south from bracket ===
rect 0.44,0.12 0.12,0.26 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.75
rect 0.44,0.12 0.12,0.26 stroke #444444

# === Torch holder ring (circular cradle at end of arm) ===
circle 0.50,0.42 0.09 fill #555555 0.6
circle 0.50,0.42 0.09 stroke #3a3a3a

# === Torch head (top-down: round wooden shaft wrapped in pitch) ===
circle 0.50,0.42 0.06 fill #4a3020 0.9
circle 0.50,0.42 0.06 stroke #2a1a10

# === Flame glow (layered outward: soft warm light) ===
circle 0.50,0.44 0.22 fill #ff6600 0.10
circle 0.50,0.44 0.16 fill #ff8800 0.18
circle 0.50,0.44 0.11 fill #ffaa00 0.30
circle 0.50,0.44 0.07 fill #ffcc00 0.50
# Bright flame core
circle 0.50,0.44 0.035 fill #ffee88 0.85
props.torch-totem:
name: Torch Totem
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: corner
room_types: goblin-warren-entrance, orc-war-camp, cave-bandit-camp, cave-goblin-warren
typical_count: few
clusters_with: hide-tarp, bone-pile, totem-post, campfire, torch-wall
notes: Vertical post topped with burning brazier-cage and adorned with skulls, feathers, and bone trophies. Marks tribal territory.
lights: [{"preset":"bonfire","x":0.5,"y":0.5,"radius":14,"intensity":1,"color":"#ff9040"}]
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.22 z 0-2.5

# Adornment arms extending out (bone cross-pieces lashed to post)
# Feather hanging SW
poly 0.30,0.70 0.18,0.82 0.16,0.90 0.22,0.88 0.28,0.80 fill #4a2a18 0.85
poly 0.30,0.70 0.18,0.82 0.16,0.90 0.22,0.88 0.28,0.80 stroke #1a0a00
line 0.20,0.86 0.28,0.74 stroke #8a6040 0.7 width 1

# Feather hanging SE
poly 0.70,0.70 0.82,0.82 0.86,0.88 0.80,0.88 0.74,0.82 fill #3a2010 0.85
poly 0.70,0.70 0.82,0.82 0.86,0.88 0.80,0.88 0.74,0.82 stroke #1a0a00
line 0.82,0.84 0.74,0.74 stroke #8a6040 0.7 width 1

# Bone trophy dangling NW (small skull/bone)
ellipse 0.22,0.22 0.06,0.05 fill #d4c4a8 0.95
ellipse 0.22,0.22 0.06,0.05 stroke #8a7a58
circle 0.20,0.22 0.012 fill #1a0a00 0.9
circle 0.24,0.22 0.012 fill #1a0a00 0.9
# Bone tie-cord to post
line 0.28,0.26 0.44,0.42 stroke #8a6040 0.7 width 1

# Bone trophy dangling NE (finger-bone cluster)
line 0.80,0.16 0.82,0.28 stroke #d4c4a8 width 2
line 0.76,0.18 0.78,0.28 stroke #d4c4a8 width 2
line 0.84,0.18 0.86,0.28 stroke #d4c4a8 width 2
line 0.72,0.22 0.80,0.20 stroke #8a6040 0.7 width 1

# Wooden post cross-section (dark wood, square-ish)
rect 0.40,0.40 0.20,0.20 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.40,0.40 0.20,0.20 stroke #1a0a00
# Post grain cross marks
line 0.40,0.50 0.60,0.50 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 0.50,0.40 0.50,0.60 stroke #2a1400 0.5 width 1

# Crude lashings/rope wrap around top of post (holds brazier cage)
arc 0.50,0.50 0.15 0 360 stroke #8a6040 0.9 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.17 30 150 stroke #6a4028 0.8 width 1
arc 0.50,0.50 0.17 210 330 stroke #6a4028 0.8 width 1

# Iron brazier-cage ring (sits atop post — holds fuel)
ring 0.50,0.50 0.26 0.18 fill #3a2a1a 0.8
ring 0.50,0.50 0.26 0.18 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.55
ring 0.50,0.50 0.26 0.18 stroke #1a0a00

# Cage bars crossing over the fire (4 radial bars visible from above)
line 0.50,0.24 0.50,0.76 stroke #3a2a1a width 2
line 0.24,0.50 0.76,0.50 stroke #3a2a1a width 2
line 0.32,0.32 0.68,0.68 stroke #2a1810 0.7 width 1
line 0.68,0.32 0.32,0.68 stroke #2a1810 0.7 width 1

# Charred base (inside cage — burnt fuel)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.16 fill #1a0800 0.85

# Layered fire glow inside cage
circle 0.50,0.50 0.16 fill #e85500 0.35
circle 0.50,0.50 0.12 fill #ff6600 0.5
circle 0.50,0.50 0.08 fill #ffaa00 0.7
circle 0.50,0.50 0.05 fill #ffcc00 0.85
# Hot white core
circle 0.50,0.50 0.025 fill #ffee88 0.95

# Tiny embers spitting out between cage bars
circle 0.38,0.46 0.012 fill #ff8800 0.75
circle 0.62,0.54 0.01 fill #ffaa00 0.7
circle 0.54,0.38 0.012 fill #ff6600 0.7
circle 0.46,0.62 0.01 fill #ffaa00 0.65
props.torch-wall:
name: Wall Torch
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 1
lights: [{"preset":"torch","x":0.5,"y":0.5}]
placement: wall
room_types: cave-bandit-camp, cave-goblin-warren, chasm-crossing, dungeon, cave, corridor, any
typical_count: many
clusters_with: torch-sconce, torch-totem, brazier
notes: Rougher cave-style torch mounted on a wall; simpler than torch-sconce
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.30,0.02 0.40,0.44 z 0-1

# Wall bracket — simple iron spike driven into wall (small rectangle at north)
rect 0.38,0.04 0.24,0.08 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.85
rect 0.38,0.04 0.24,0.08 stroke #3a3020
# Iron arm extending south
rect 0.46,0.10 0.08,0.18 fill #4a3020 0.85
rect 0.46,0.10 0.08,0.18 stroke #2a1810
# Arm binding ring
line 0.44,0.18 0.56,0.18 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1
# Torch wood shaft (top of wooden stake, brown)
circle 0.50,0.32 0.09 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
circle 0.50,0.32 0.09 stroke #2a1400
# Pitch/oil wrap (darker layer on top)
circle 0.50,0.32 0.07 fill #2a1810 0.85
# Pitch wrap binding (rope/cloth twists)
arc 0.50,0.32 0.08 0 90 stroke #5a3a1e 0.7 width 1
arc 0.50,0.32 0.08 120 210 stroke #5a3a1e 0.7 width 1
# Flame glow (layered — warm light radiating out)
circle 0.50,0.36 0.26 fill #ff6600 0.1
circle 0.50,0.36 0.20 fill #ff8800 0.18
circle 0.50,0.36 0.14 fill #ffaa00 0.3
circle 0.50,0.36 0.09 fill #ffcc00 0.5
# Bright flame core
circle 0.50,0.36 0.05 fill #ffee88 0.85
# Tiny embers flaring
circle 0.40,0.40 0.012 fill #ff8800 0.7
circle 0.60,0.38 0.01 fill #ffaa00 0.6
circle 0.46,0.44 0.01 fill #ff8800 0.5
props.torn-banner:
name: Torn Banner
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 3
placement: wall
room_types: corrupted-temple, orc-war-camp, ruined-watchtower, boss-chamber, cave-bandit-camp
typical_count: few
clusters_with: tapestry, banner, weapon-rack-crude, skull-small, blood-smear
notes: Battle-torn banner hanging sideways — ripped fabric with emblem faintly visible (top-down: rod + damaged fabric edge)
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.10,0.04 1.80,0.30

# Dark wooden pole (mounting rod, damaged)
rect 0.06,0.04 1.88,0.06 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.06,0.04 1.88,0.06 stroke #2a1400
# Pole broken at one end (splintered east)
poly 1.94,0.04 1.96,0.02 1.98,0.06 1.94,0.10 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
poly 1.94,0.04 1.96,0.02 1.98,0.06 1.94,0.10 stroke #2a1400
line 1.94,0.06 2.00,0.04 stroke #5c3a1e 0.7 width 1
# Finial cap at west end (still intact)
circle 0.06,0.08 0.05 fill #5a3a00 0.9
circle 0.06,0.08 0.05 stroke #2a1400
# Fabric top edge visible (ragged, not straight)
poly 0.14,0.10 0.30,0.12 0.48,0.10 0.68,0.14 0.88,0.10 1.10,0.12 1.30,0.10 1.52,0.14 1.74,0.12 1.88,0.14 1.86,0.24 1.66,0.20 1.48,0.24 1.30,0.22 1.08,0.26 0.88,0.22 0.68,0.26 0.50,0.22 0.30,0.24 0.14,0.22 fill #3a1018 0.92
poly 0.14,0.10 0.30,0.12 0.48,0.10 0.68,0.14 0.88,0.10 1.10,0.12 1.30,0.10 1.52,0.14 1.74,0.12 1.88,0.14 1.86,0.24 1.66,0.20 1.48,0.24 1.30,0.22 1.08,0.26 0.88,0.22 0.68,0.26 0.50,0.22 0.30,0.24 0.14,0.22 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.4
poly 0.14,0.10 0.30,0.12 0.48,0.10 0.68,0.14 0.88,0.10 1.10,0.12 1.30,0.10 1.52,0.14 1.74,0.12 1.88,0.14 1.86,0.24 1.66,0.20 1.48,0.24 1.30,0.22 1.08,0.26 0.88,0.22 0.68,0.26 0.50,0.22 0.30,0.24 0.14,0.22 stroke #1a0808
# Large rip gash (diagonal tear)
line 0.56,0.12 0.74,0.28 stroke #1a0408 width 3
line 0.58,0.12 0.76,0.28 stroke #000000 width 1
# Second tear (smaller)
line 1.20,0.14 1.34,0.26 stroke #1a0408 width 3
line 1.22,0.14 1.36,0.26 stroke #000000 width 1
# Emblem (faded skull/crest)
poly 0.40,0.14 0.46,0.16 0.48,0.22 0.42,0.24 0.36,0.22 0.38,0.16 fill #aaaaaa 0.5
circle 0.40,0.18 0.008 fill #000000 0.8
circle 0.44,0.18 0.008 fill #000000 0.8
# Faded gold trim along top
line 0.14,0.12 1.86,0.12 stroke #daa520 0.4
# Blood/grime staining
ellipse 0.96,0.20 0.20,0.06 fill #3a0808 0.5
ellipse 1.60,0.18 0.14,0.05 fill #3a0808 0.4
# Frayed bottom edge strips (threads dangling)
line 0.20,0.24 0.18,0.30 stroke #2a0808 width 1
line 0.30,0.24 0.32,0.30 stroke #2a0808 width 1
line 0.50,0.22 0.48,0.28 stroke #2a0808 width 1
line 1.00,0.26 0.98,0.32 stroke #2a0808 width 1
line 1.20,0.24 1.22,0.30 stroke #2a0808 width 1
line 1.50,0.24 1.48,0.30 stroke #2a0808 width 1
line 1.70,0.20 1.72,0.26 stroke #2a0808 width 1
props.torn-cloak:
name: Torn Cloak
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.05
placement: floor
room_types: monster-lair-small, cave, dungeon, crypt, ruin, battlefield-recent
typical_count: few
clusters_with: half-eaten-carcass, blood-smear, blood-stain, torch-wall, residual-torch-from-victims, bone-pile
notes: Bloodied tattered cloak discarded on the floor — ragged muddy fabric with a blood stain and a metallic clasp at one end.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.10,0.14 0.82,0.76

# Ground shadow/wet stain beneath cloak (very subtle)
ellipse 0.50,0.54 0.42,0.30 fill #1a1408 0.3

# Main cloak body (irregular crumpled fabric — muddy green-brown)
poly 0.14,0.28 0.26,0.20 0.40,0.18 0.56,0.22 0.70,0.20 0.82,0.26 0.88,0.38 0.86,0.54 0.82,0.68 0.72,0.80 0.58,0.86 0.42,0.84 0.28,0.78 0.18,0.66 0.12,0.50 0.10,0.38 fill #3a3820 0.92
poly 0.14,0.28 0.26,0.20 0.40,0.18 0.56,0.22 0.70,0.20 0.82,0.26 0.88,0.38 0.86,0.54 0.82,0.68 0.72,0.80 0.58,0.86 0.42,0.84 0.28,0.78 0.18,0.66 0.12,0.50 0.10,0.38 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.5
poly 0.14,0.28 0.26,0.20 0.40,0.18 0.56,0.22 0.70,0.20 0.82,0.26 0.88,0.38 0.86,0.54 0.82,0.68 0.72,0.80 0.58,0.86 0.42,0.84 0.28,0.78 0.18,0.66 0.12,0.50 0.10,0.38 stroke #1a1808

# Fold/crease ridges (darker creases suggesting crumple)
bezier 0.22,0.32 0.36,0.38 0.52,0.42 0.70,0.38 stroke #1a1808 0.7 width 1
bezier 0.20,0.58 0.36,0.56 0.54,0.60 0.74,0.56 stroke #1a1808 0.6 width 1
bezier 0.30,0.72 0.44,0.70 0.58,0.74 0.72,0.72 stroke #1a1808 0.55 width 1

# Secondary fabric section (lifted corner — slightly lighter wash)
poly 0.16,0.36 0.28,0.30 0.42,0.36 0.44,0.48 0.34,0.54 0.22,0.52 0.14,0.46 fill #4a4828 0.8

# Dark blood stain soaking into the fabric (one section)
poly 0.54,0.40 0.68,0.36 0.80,0.42 0.84,0.56 0.76,0.66 0.62,0.68 0.52,0.60 0.48,0.48 fill #3a0808 0.85
poly 0.54,0.40 0.68,0.36 0.80,0.42 0.84,0.56 0.76,0.66 0.62,0.68 0.52,0.60 0.48,0.48 stroke #1a0000 0.6

# Darker wet center of blood stain
ellipse 0.66,0.54 0.11,0.08 fill #1a0202 0.8

# Small blood splatter droplets on nearby fabric
circle 0.42,0.30 0.015 fill #3a0808 0.8
circle 0.36,0.72 0.018 fill #3a0808 0.75
circle 0.78,0.74 0.014 fill #3a0808 0.7

# Ragged tears at the edges (notches cut into the outline)
poly 0.14,0.36 0.06,0.38 0.14,0.42 fill #3a3820 0.9
poly 0.14,0.36 0.06,0.38 0.14,0.42 stroke #1a1808
poly 0.88,0.46 0.96,0.50 0.88,0.54 fill #3a3820 0.9
poly 0.88,0.46 0.96,0.50 0.88,0.54 stroke #1a1808
poly 0.42,0.84 0.40,0.92 0.48,0.88 fill #3a3820 0.85
poly 0.42,0.84 0.40,0.92 0.48,0.88 stroke #1a1808
poly 0.36,0.18 0.32,0.10 0.42,0.14 fill #3a3820 0.85
poly 0.36,0.18 0.32,0.10 0.42,0.14 stroke #1a1808

# Frayed edge threads sticking out
line 0.10,0.38 0.04,0.36 stroke #1a1808 width 1
line 0.12,0.50 0.06,0.52 stroke #1a1808 width 1
line 0.88,0.38 0.94,0.36 stroke #1a1808 width 1
line 0.72,0.82 0.76,0.90 stroke #1a1808 width 1

# Metallic clasp at one end (tarnished brass)
circle 0.24,0.26 0.055 fill #8b6914 0.92
circle 0.24,0.26 0.055 stroke #3a2a00
# Clasp inner pin / detail
circle 0.24,0.26 0.025 fill #5a3a00 0.9
circle 0.24,0.26 0.012 fill #daa520 0.85

# Mud smear on fabric
ellipse 0.32,0.58 0.10,0.04 fill #2a1808 0.6

# Dirt/mud streaks

line 0.52,0.60 0.62,0.66 stroke #2a1410 0.5
# Fold creases

line 0.10,0.72 0.06,0.70 stroke #5a3028 0.7
props.torn-notice:
name: Torn Notice
category: Misc
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: wall
room_types: roadside-gallows, gibbet-square, tavern, guard-post, market, courthouse-chamber
typical_count: few
clusters_with: gallows, gallows-triple, notice-board, tombstone
notes: Weathered torn paper nailed to a post or wall. Partial lettering, ripped edge at bottom. Wall strip along north.
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1. Wall-mounted along north edge.

# === Paper body (irregular yellowed sheet with ragged edges) ===
poly 0.22,0.08 0.76,0.06 0.78,0.12 0.80,0.22 0.76,0.32 0.66,0.38 0.52,0.34 0.40,0.40 0.28,0.36 0.22,0.28 0.18,0.18 fill #e8dcb8 0.92
poly 0.22,0.08 0.76,0.06 0.78,0.12 0.80,0.22 0.76,0.32 0.66,0.38 0.52,0.34 0.40,0.40 0.28,0.36 0.22,0.28 0.18,0.18 stroke #8a7848 width 1

# === Paper aged/stained wash ===
poly 0.22,0.08 0.76,0.06 0.78,0.12 0.80,0.22 0.76,0.32 0.66,0.38 0.52,0.34 0.40,0.40 0.28,0.36 0.22,0.28 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.25

# === Watermarks / stains ===
ellipse 0.35,0.22 0.08,0.05 fill #6a4828 0.30
ellipse 0.62,0.16 0.06,0.04 fill #6a4828 0.25

# === Header text (thick bold letters — "WANTED" or "DECREE") ===
rect 0.26,0.11 0.04,0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.85
rect 0.32,0.11 0.04,0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.85
rect 0.38,0.11 0.04,0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.85
rect 0.44,0.11 0.04,0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.85
rect 0.50,0.11 0.04,0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.85
rect 0.56,0.11 0.04,0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.85
rect 0.62,0.11 0.04,0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.85
rect 0.68,0.11 0.04,0.05 fill #1a0a00 0.85

# === Body text lines (thin hand-inked strokes) ===
line 0.24,0.20 0.72,0.20 stroke #2a1808 0.75 width 1
line 0.24,0.23 0.60,0.23 stroke #2a1808 0.7 width 1
line 0.24,0.26 0.70,0.26 stroke #2a1808 0.7 width 1
line 0.24,0.29 0.54,0.29 stroke #2a1808 0.65 width 1
# Line interrupted by tear
line 0.30,0.32 0.40,0.32 stroke #2a1808 0.55 width 1
line 0.56,0.33 0.64,0.33 stroke #2a1808 0.55 width 1

# === Iron nail at top-center (holding paper to post) ===
circle 0.50,0.09 0.025 fill #444444 0.95
circle 0.50,0.09 0.025 stroke #222222
circle 0.50,0.09 0.010 fill #888888 0.8

# === Nail rust stain radiating from nail ===

line 0.48,0.61 0.62,0.60 stroke #1a1008 0.65 width 1

category: Prison

---

rect 0.38,0.36 0.14,0.04 stroke #1a1008

rect 0.43,0.36 0.04,0.20 stroke #222222

poly 0.36,0.28 0.54,0.28 0.50,0.36 0.40,0.36 stroke #222222
# Wing nut hole highlight

# === Awl / spike (east side, laid diagonally) ===
# Wooden handle
poly 0.68,0.36 0.76,0.34 0.78,0.46 0.70,0.48 fill #4a2800 0.92
poly 0.68,0.36 0.76,0.34 0.78,0.46 0.70,0.48 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.7

line 0.70,0.46 0.52,0.68 stroke #333333 width 2

props.victim-pinned:

category: Misc

facing: yes

notes: A recent kill — mining-gear-clad body pinned against a wall by the beast. Still has flesh, still has clothing. Place against a wall where a beast would drag prey for storage. Fresh horror — reads distinctly from the older scattered skeletons.
---
# footprint 1x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-1
# Top-down: body pinned against north wall (low y), head east, feet west
# Back against wall, body sprawled south

# === Wall smear above body (beast dragged it up the wall) ===

poly 0.55,0.05 0.70,0.02 0.80,0.08 0.65,0.10 fill #2a0000 0.5

ellipse 0.85,0.72 0.18,0.08 fill #4a0000 0.45
circle 0.60,0.78 0.04 fill #4a0000 0.7
circle 1.38,0.74 0.035 fill #4a0000 0.7
circle 1.50,0.82 0.025 fill #4a0000 0.6
circle 0.45,0.68 0.025 fill #4a0000 0.6

rect 0.55,0.10 0.90,0.40 fill #3a2418 0.95
rect 0.55,0.10 0.90,0.40 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.55
rect 0.55,0.10 0.90,0.40 stroke #1a0a04

# Broken pickaxe handle wedged across torso
rect 0.60,0.28 0.70,0.05 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85 rotate 20
rect 0.60,0.28 0.70,0.05 stroke #1a0a04 rotate 20

ellipse 1.05,0.32 0.22,0.05 stroke #1a0000 width 1

line 0.85,0.18 1.05,0.42 stroke #2a0000 width 2
line 0.95,0.20 1.15,0.44 stroke #2a0000 width 2

# Broken bone poking through jerkin

# === Head at east end, lolled sideways ===
circle 1.55,0.28 0.09 fill #d4a574 0.9
circle 1.55,0.28 0.09 stroke #5c3a1e width 1

circle 1.52,0.26 0.012 fill #0a0604 0.9
circle 1.58,0.26 0.012 fill #0a0604 0.9

arc 1.55,0.24 0.10 180 360 stroke #222222 width 1

line 1.50,0.20 1.58,0.16 stroke #1a0a04 width 2

rect 1.53,0.15 0.04,0.04 stroke #1a1a1a width 1

# === Right arm bent across chest, hand near pocket ===

poly 1.25,0.30 1.40,0.42 1.32,0.50 1.18,0.42 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.5

line 1.23,0.35 1.26,0.38 stroke #8b7355 width 1

# === Left arm splayed south/southwest ===

poly 0.65,0.30 0.50,0.50 0.42,0.60 0.55,0.45 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.5

rect 1.20,0.78 0.18,0.08 fill #1a0a04 0.95

circle 0.20,0.52 0.03 fill #444444 0.8

props.wagon:
name: Wagon
category: Transport
footprint: 2x3
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.8
placement: floor
room_types: lumberyard, stable, yard, street, market-square, farm-exterior, dock-warehouse
typical_count: single
clusters_with: horse, barrel, crate, sack, sack-pile, hay-bale
notes: Four-wheeled cargo wagon with wooden bed. Top-down — large rectangular bed, 4 wheel ovals at corners, draw bar extending north. NOT a side view.
---
# footprint 2x3: x 0-3, y 0-2
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.15,0.20 2.70,1.60 z 0-1.8

# === Draw bar / tongue (extends north/front from bed) ===
rect 0.05,0.92 0.60,0.16 fill #4a2800 0.8
rect 0.05,0.92 0.60,0.16 stroke #2a1400 width 2
# Tongue tip (iron fitting)
rect 0.00,0.96 0.08,0.08 fill #444444 0.9
rect 0.00,0.96 0.08,0.08 stroke #222222 width 1
# Tongue wood grain
line 0.10,1.00 0.60,1.00 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1

# === Wagon bed (main rectangular platform) ===
rect 0.60,0.30 1.80,1.40 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.9
rect 0.60,0.30 1.80,1.40 fill #3a2010 0.3
rect 0.60,0.30 1.80,1.40 stroke #1a1008 width 2

# Bed plank seams (lengthwise)
line 0.62,0.60 2.38,0.60 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 0.62,0.90 2.38,0.90 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 0.62,1.10 2.38,1.10 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
line 0.62,1.40 2.38,1.40 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1

# Cross brace (center)
rect 1.40,0.30 0.12,1.40 fill #3a2010 0.6
rect 1.40,0.30 0.12,1.40 stroke #1a1008 width 1

# === Side rails (raised edges of the bed) ===
# North rail
rect 0.60,0.30 1.80,0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.60,0.30 1.80,0.08 fill #2a1400 0.5
rect 0.60,0.30 1.80,0.08 stroke #1a1008 width 1
# South rail
rect 0.60,1.62 1.80,0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.60,1.62 1.80,0.08 fill #2a1400 0.5
rect 0.60,1.62 1.80,0.08 stroke #1a1008 width 1
# West rail (front)
rect 0.60,0.30 0.08,1.40 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.60,0.30 0.08,1.40 fill #2a1400 0.5
rect 0.60,0.30 0.08,1.40 stroke #1a1008 width 1
# East rail (back/tailgate)
rect 2.32,0.30 0.08,1.40 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 2.32,0.30 0.08,1.40 fill #2a1400 0.5
rect 2.32,0.30 0.08,1.40 stroke #1a1008 width 1

# Rail iron reinforcements (corner brackets)
rect 0.60,0.30 0.10,0.10 fill #444444 0.7
rect 0.60,0.30 0.10,0.10 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 2.30,0.30 0.10,0.10 fill #444444 0.7
rect 2.30,0.30 0.10,0.10 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 0.60,1.60 0.10,0.10 fill #444444 0.7
rect 0.60,1.60 0.10,0.10 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 2.30,1.60 0.10,0.10 fill #444444 0.7
rect 2.30,1.60 0.10,0.10 stroke #222222 width 1

# === Wheels (4 large wheels at corners — long ovals edge-on from above) ===
# Front-left wheel (NW)
ellipse 0.88,0.18 0.26,0.10 fill #3a1f00 0.9
ellipse 0.88,0.18 0.26,0.10 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.6
ellipse 0.88,0.18 0.26,0.10 stroke #1a1008 width 2
# Wheel rim (outer iron band)
ellipse 0.88,0.18 0.26,0.10 stroke #444444 0.8 width 1
# Wheel hub
ellipse 0.88,0.18 0.08,0.04 fill #444444 0.9
ellipse 0.88,0.18 0.08,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
circle 0.88,0.18 0.015 fill #222222 0.95
# Wheel spokes (narrow lines)
line 0.68,0.18 1.08,0.18 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 0.88,0.10 0.88,0.26 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1

# Front-right wheel (NE of bed — but wait, facing north: 2x3 has high X at east, so front=north=low Y means front wheels are at low Y)
# Rear-left wheel (SW)
ellipse 0.88,1.82 0.26,0.10 fill #3a1f00 0.9
ellipse 0.88,1.82 0.26,0.10 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.6
ellipse 0.88,1.82 0.26,0.10 stroke #1a1008 width 2
ellipse 0.88,1.82 0.26,0.10 stroke #444444 0.8 width 1
ellipse 0.88,1.82 0.08,0.04 fill #444444 0.9
ellipse 0.88,1.82 0.08,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
circle 0.88,1.82 0.015 fill #222222 0.95
line 0.68,1.82 1.08,1.82 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 0.88,1.74 0.88,1.90 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1

# Front-right wheel (NE)
ellipse 2.12,0.18 0.26,0.10 fill #3a1f00 0.9
ellipse 2.12,0.18 0.26,0.10 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.6
ellipse 2.12,0.18 0.26,0.10 stroke #1a1008 width 2
ellipse 2.12,0.18 0.26,0.10 stroke #444444 0.8 width 1
ellipse 2.12,0.18 0.08,0.04 fill #444444 0.9
ellipse 2.12,0.18 0.08,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
circle 2.12,0.18 0.015 fill #222222 0.95
line 1.92,0.18 2.32,0.18 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 2.12,0.10 2.12,0.26 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1

# Rear-right wheel (SE)
ellipse 2.12,1.82 0.26,0.10 fill #3a1f00 0.9
ellipse 2.12,1.82 0.26,0.10 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.6
ellipse 2.12,1.82 0.26,0.10 stroke #1a1008 width 2
ellipse 2.12,1.82 0.26,0.10 stroke #444444 0.8 width 1
ellipse 2.12,1.82 0.08,0.04 fill #444444 0.9
ellipse 2.12,1.82 0.08,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
circle 2.12,1.82 0.015 fill #222222 0.95
line 1.92,1.82 2.32,1.82 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1
line 2.12,1.74 2.12,1.90 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1

# === Axles (connecting left-right wheels) ===
rect 0.88,0.22 1.24,0.04 fill #444444 0.7
rect 0.88,0.22 1.24,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 0.88,1.74 1.24,0.04 fill #444444 0.7
rect 0.88,1.74 1.24,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1

# === Driver's seat (raised plank at front of bed) ===
rect 0.74,0.80 0.30,0.40 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.74,0.80 0.30,0.40 fill #3a1f00 0.4
rect 0.74,0.80 0.30,0.40 stroke #1a1008 width 2
# Seat edge trim
line 0.74,0.80 1.04,0.80 stroke #daa520 0.5 width 1

# Reins / ropes coiled on seat
circle 0.88,1.00 0.04 fill #5c3a1e 0.8
circle 0.88,1.00 0.04 stroke #2a1400
arc 0.88,1.00 0.03 0 360 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 1

# Highlights on bed
arc 1.50,1.00 0.60 200 250 stroke #8b6914 0.25 width 1
props.walking-stick:
name: Walking Stick
category: Misc
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 4
placement: wall
room_types: inn-common-room, inn-room, hermit-cell, shepherds-shelter, cabin-hunters, ranger-camp, wayside-chapel
typical_count: few
clusters_with: travel-pack, bedroll, cloak-peg, walking-stick
notes: Long wooden walking stick leaning against a wall. Top-down: thin diagonal wooden shaft with a worn grip wrap, metal ferrule at tip, rounded knob at top.
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.36,0.06 0.28,0.86

# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1. Stick leans from north (wall) to south (floor) — diagonal.

# === Faint ground shadow where tip rests ===
ellipse 0.58,0.88 0.08,0.04 fill #000000 0.3

# === Main staff shaft (long wooden stick, diagonal NW-to-SE) ===
# Shaft as a rotated rectangle
rect 0.40,0.08 0.20,0.80 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9 rotate 10
rect 0.40,0.08 0.20,0.80 stroke #1a0800 width 1 rotate 10

# === Shaft grain detail (lengthwise along the shaft) ===
line 0.44,0.14 0.60,0.88 stroke #2a1400 0.5 width 1
line 0.48,0.10 0.64,0.84 stroke #2a1400 0.4 width 1
line 0.52,0.12 0.68,0.86 stroke #2a1400 0.4 width 1

# === Knots in the wood ===
circle 0.50,0.34 0.025 stroke #2a1400 width 1
circle 0.50,0.34 0.012 fill #1a0800 0.7
circle 0.56,0.58 0.022 stroke #2a1400 width 1
circle 0.56,0.58 0.010 fill #1a0800 0.7

# === Top knob (rounded grip end at north, where the hand rests) ===
circle 0.44,0.12 0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
circle 0.44,0.12 0.08 fill #3a1f00 0.4
circle 0.44,0.12 0.08 stroke #1a0800 width 1

# Top knob highlight
arc 0.44,0.12 0.07 200 260 stroke #8b6914 0.6 width 1

# === Grip wrapping (leather strap wound around the shaft below the knob) ===
rect 0.42,0.18 0.18,0.14 fill #3a2010 0.85 rotate 10
rect 0.42,0.18 0.18,0.14 stroke #1a0800 rotate 10

# Wrap lashing lines
line 0.42,0.20 0.60,0.22 stroke #2a1400 width 1
line 0.42,0.23 0.60,0.25 stroke #2a1400 width 1
line 0.42,0.26 0.60,0.28 stroke #2a1400 width 1
line 0.42,0.29 0.60,0.31 stroke #2a1400 width 1

# Small leather strap/loop at the grip end
bezier 0.40,0.18 0.34,0.20 0.32,0.26 0.36,0.30 stroke #3a2010 width 2

# === Metal ferrule at tip (iron cap, bottom of stick) ===
circle 0.60,0.88 0.06 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
circle 0.60,0.88 0.06 fill #333333 0.5
circle 0.60,0.88 0.06 stroke #1a1a1a width 1

# Ferrule tip (sharper point sticking out)
poly 0.56,0.88 0.64,0.88 0.62,0.95 0.58,0.95 fill #555555 0.9
poly 0.56,0.88 0.64,0.88 0.62,0.95 0.58,0.95 stroke #222222

# === Subtle wear/polish along the shaft (worn by use) ===
arc 0.52,0.50 0.08 200 260 stroke #8b6914 0.3 width 1

# === Small carved notch near the grip (traveler's mark) ===
line 0.50,0.40 0.54,0.42 stroke #1a0800 width 1
line 0.49,0.42 0.53,0.44 stroke #1a0800 width 1

# Pommel
circle 1.20,0.16 0.07 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.20,0.16 0.07 stroke #000000

# === Weapon 5: Twin-blade / forked dagger (small) ===
# Shaft
line 1.50,0.24 1.52,0.70 stroke #555555 width 2
# Forked blade tip
poly 1.46,0.66 1.52,0.70 1.58,0.66 1.55,0.60 1.52,0.64 1.49,0.60 fill #222222 0.95

# === Weapon 6: Short curved scimitar ===
# Curved blade
bezier 1.72,0.24 1.68,0.40 1.78,0.60 1.70,0.78 stroke #222222 width 4
bezier 1.72,0.24 1.68,0.40 1.78,0.60 1.70,0.78 stroke #555555 width 2

# === Heat glow bleeding from the rack (faint) ===

rect 0.12,0.44 1.76,0.03 fill #000000 0.25

props.web-cluster:
name: Dense Web Cluster
category: Effects
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 2.5
placement: corner
room_types: monster-lair-small, spider-lair, cave-drow-outpost, cabin-abandoned, crypt, ruined-watchtower
typical_count: single
clusters_with: cobweb-cluster, web-strand, spider-egg-cluster, egg-sac
notes: Dense thick cobweb cluster filling a corner — radial web spanning two cells with wrapped prey bundles. The hub is at the NW corner (0.04, 0.04); rotate to face any corner.
---
# Faint web shading across corner (establishes presence)
poly 0.02,0.02 1.60,0.02 1.20,0.40 0.80,0.80 0.40,1.20 0.02,1.60 fill #e8e4d8 0.15

# Primary radial spokes from NW corner hub
line 0.04,0.04 1.96,0.04 stroke #e8e4d8 0.65 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 1.80,0.40 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 1.60,0.80 stroke #e8e4d8 0.65 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 1.30,1.20 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.96,1.60 stroke #e8e4d8 0.65 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.60,1.80 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.04,1.96 stroke #e8e4d8 0.65 width 1

# Secondary thinner spokes (intermediate rays)
line 0.04,0.04 1.92,0.20 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 1.50,0.58 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 1.10,0.94 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.78,1.36 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.40,1.70 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.20,1.92 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1

# Concentric arc strands (silk rings) drawn as quadratic beziers from +x axis to +y axis
# Inner ring r≈0.40
qbezier 0.44,0.04 0.44,0.44 0.04,0.44 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1
# Ring r≈0.70
qbezier 0.74,0.04 0.74,0.74 0.04,0.74 stroke #e8e4d8 0.55 width 1
# Ring r≈1.00
qbezier 1.04,0.04 1.04,1.04 0.04,1.04 stroke #e8e4d8 0.55 width 1
# Ring r≈1.30
qbezier 1.34,0.04 1.34,1.34 0.04,1.34 stroke #d8d4c8 0.5 width 1
# Ring r≈1.60
qbezier 1.64,0.04 1.64,1.64 0.04,1.64 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
# Partial outer ring r≈1.90 (torn, only partial sweep from near +x axis to mid)
qbezier 1.90,0.20 1.60,0.80 1.00,1.30 stroke #d8d4c8 0.4 width 1

# Partial outer arc (short torn fragment)
qbezier 1.70,0.30 1.50,0.60 1.10,0.90 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1

# Sag droop between spokes (irregular curves)
bezier 0.80,0.10 0.76,0.28 0.86,0.42 0.72,0.58 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1

line 0.08,1.35 1.92,1.40 stroke #e0d8c8 0.42 width 1
line 0.10,1.60 1.90,1.65 stroke #d8d0b8 0.38 width 1
line 0.05,1.85 1.95,1.80 stroke #e0d8c8 0.4 width 1

# Vertical-ish strands
line 0.25,0.05 0.30,1.95 stroke #e0d8c8 0.42 width 1
line 0.55,0.08 0.50,1.92 stroke #d8d0b8 0.38 width 1
line 0.80,0.05 0.85,1.95 stroke #e0d8c8 0.4 width 1
line 1.10,0.08 1.05,1.92 stroke #d8d0b8 0.38 width 1

line 1.70,0.08 1.65,1.92 stroke #d8d0b8 0.38 width 1

line 1.90,0.10 0.10,1.90 stroke #d8d0b8 0.3 width 1
line 0.10,0.60 1.40,1.90 stroke #d0c8b0 0.28 width 1
line 0.60,0.10 1.90,1.40 stroke #d0c8b0 0.28 width 1
line 1.90,0.60 0.60,1.90 stroke #d0c8b0 0.25 width 1
line 1.40,0.10 0.10,1.40 stroke #d0c8b0 0.25 width 1

# === Denser knot areas (where strands overlap more thickly) ===

ellipse 1.50,0.60 0.18,0.15 fill #d8d0b8 0.18
ellipse 0.80,1.40 0.22,0.18 fill #d8d0b8 0.2
ellipse 1.60,1.50 0.20,0.16 fill #d8d0b8 0.18

circle 1.30,1.20 0.015 fill #3a2a18 0.45

props.web-funnel:
name: Web Funnel
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: spider-lair, monster-lair-small, cave-drow-outpost, underdark-outpost, beast-den
typical_count: few
clusters_with: cobweb-heavy, cobweb-cluster, web-floor, fang-scatter, spider-egg-cluster
notes: A conical funnel web with a dark opening at the apex — the spider retreats into this burrow. Concentric silk rings narrow to a dark center hole. Place in corners or against walls.
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

# === Outermost silk ring (faint, wide) ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.46 stroke #d8d0b0 0.3 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.44 fill #d8d0b8 0.08

# === Radiating structural strands (from center outward) ===
line 0.50,0.50 0.50,0.04 stroke #d8d0b0 0.4 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.92,0.18 stroke #d8d0b0 0.38 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.96,0.50 stroke #d8d0b0 0.4 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.92,0.82 stroke #d8d0b0 0.38 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.50,0.96 stroke #d8d0b0 0.4 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.08,0.82 stroke #d8d0b0 0.38 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.04,0.50 stroke #d8d0b0 0.4 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.08,0.18 stroke #d8d0b0 0.38 width 1

# === Concentric silk rings (narrowing inward) ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.38 stroke #d0c8b0 0.35 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.30 stroke #c8c0a8 0.4 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.22 stroke #c0b898 0.45 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.15 stroke #b8b088 0.5 width 1

# === Dense silk fill between inner rings ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.22 fill #d0c8b0 0.2
circle 0.50,0.50 0.15 fill #c8c0a8 0.25

# === Dark funnel opening at center ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.10 fill #1a1208 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.10 stroke #0a0804
# Depth gradient
circle 0.50,0.50 0.08 fill #0a0804 0.9
# Tiny highlight on rim (silk catching light)
arc 0.50,0.50 0.10 200 280 stroke #d8d0b0 0.5 width 1

props.well:

category: Features
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes

placement: center

line 0.18,1.0 0.42,1.0 stroke #3a3a3a 0.4

line 1.58,0.42 1.42,0.58 stroke #3a3a3a 0.35

line 1.58,1.58 1.42,1.42 stroke #3a3a3a 0.35

line 1.74,0.68 1.56,0.62 stroke #3a3a3a 0.3
line 0.26,1.32 0.44,1.38 stroke #3a3a3a 0.3
line 1.74,1.32 1.56,1.38 stroke #3a3a3a 0.3
# --- Dark water (layered depth) ---

# Middle water — darker
circle 1.0,1.0 0.42 fill #2a4455 0.7
# Deep center — darkest
circle 1.0,1.0 0.28 fill #1a2a33 0.8
# Subtle water reflection
ellipse 0.88,0.88 0.14,0.08 fill #5588aa 0.2
# --- Roof support posts (two small square posts on east and west) ---
# West post
rect 0.12,0.88 0.16,0.24 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.12,0.88 0.16,0.24 stroke #3a1f00
# East post
rect 1.72,0.88 0.16,0.24 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 1.72,0.88 0.16,0.24 stroke #3a1f00
# --- Crossbar connecting posts ---
rect 0.22,0.94 1.56,0.12 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.8
rect 0.22,0.94 1.56,0.12 stroke #3a1f00
# --- Rope from crossbar down to water ---
line 1.0,1.0 0.82,1.24 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 0.82,1.24 0.78,1.40 stroke #8b7355 width 2
# Rope wrapping on crossbar
circle 1.0,1.0 0.04 fill #8b7355 0.6
# --- Bucket at water surface ---
# Bucket body (small rect)
rect 0.72,1.34 0.14,0.12 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.75
rect 0.72,1.34 0.14,0.12 stroke #3a1f00
# Bucket handle arc
arc 0.79,1.34 0.06 180 360 stroke #666666 width 2
# Bucket metal band
line 0.72,1.38 0.86,1.38 stroke #555555 width 2
