props.willow-tree:
name: Willow Tree
category: Terrain
footprint: 3x3
padding: 0.15
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 12
placement: floor
room_types: garden, swamp, riverside, courtyard, fey-grove
typical_count: single
clusters_with: fountain, mushroom
notes: Weeping willow with drooping branches; place near water features or as garden centerpiece
---
# Hitbox: trunk only, drooping branches don't block at ground level
hitbox circle 1.5,1.5 0.22 z 0-12

# Outer fringe — dense curtain of drooping branch tips touching the ground
# This is the densest ring, creating the distinctive willow silhouette
circle 1.5,1.5 1.40 fill #4a8a30 0.18
circle 1.5,1.5 1.30 fill #4a8a30 0.15
# Radial fringe lobes — overlapping ellipses around the perimeter
# North
ellipse 1.5,0.30 0.55,0.40 fill #4a8a30 0.25
ellipse 1.5,0.25 0.40,0.30 fill #5a9a40 0.20
# NE
ellipse 2.30,0.50 0.45,0.40 fill #4a8a30 0.25
ellipse 2.35,0.55 0.35,0.30 fill #5a9a40 0.18
# East
ellipse 2.70,1.5 0.40,0.55 fill #4a8a30 0.25
ellipse 2.75,1.5 0.30,0.40 fill #5a9a40 0.20
# SE
ellipse 2.30,2.50 0.45,0.40 fill #4a8a30 0.25
ellipse 2.35,2.45 0.35,0.30 fill #5a9a40 0.18
# South
ellipse 1.5,2.70 0.55,0.40 fill #4a8a30 0.25
ellipse 1.5,2.75 0.40,0.30 fill #5a9a40 0.20
# SW
ellipse 0.70,2.50 0.45,0.40 fill #4a8a30 0.25
ellipse 0.65,2.45 0.35,0.30 fill #5a9a40 0.18
# West
ellipse 0.30,1.5 0.40,0.55 fill #4a8a30 0.25
ellipse 0.25,1.5 0.30,0.40 fill #5a9a40 0.20
# NW
ellipse 0.70,0.50 0.45,0.40 fill #4a8a30 0.25
ellipse 0.65,0.55 0.35,0.30 fill #5a9a40 0.18
# Mid canopy mass — the main drooping foliage body
circle 1.5,1.5 1.10 fill #5a9a40 0.20
circle 1.5,1.5 1.00 fill #6aaa50 0.18
# Secondary canopy lobes — layered curtain effect mid-radius
ellipse 1.5,0.65 0.50,0.35 fill #6aaa50 0.20
ellipse 2.35,1.5 0.35,0.50 fill #6aaa50 0.20
ellipse 1.5,2.35 0.50,0.35 fill #6aaa50 0.20
ellipse 0.65,1.5 0.35,0.50 fill #6aaa50 0.20
ellipse 2.10,0.75 0.40,0.35 fill #5a9a40 0.18
ellipse 2.10,2.25 0.40,0.35 fill #5a9a40 0.18
ellipse 0.90,2.25 0.40,0.35 fill #5a9a40 0.18
ellipse 0.90,0.75 0.40,0.35 fill #5a9a40 0.18
# Inner gap — lighter area near trunk where branches arch before drooping
circle 1.5,1.5 0.55 fill #7aba60 0.15
circle 1.5,1.5 0.45 fill #8aca70 0.12
# Trunk — bark textured circle at center
circle 1.5,1.5 0.22 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.85
circle 1.5,1.5 0.22 stroke #3a1f00
# Trunk texture detail — visible bark lines
circle 1.5,1.5 0.18 stroke #3a1f00 0.25
circle 1.5,1.5 0.13 stroke #3a1f00 0.15
# Canopy highlight wisps — bright tips catching light
ellipse 1.80,0.70 0.20,0.12 fill #8aca70 0.18
ellipse 2.20,1.20 0.12,0.20 fill #8aca70 0.18
ellipse 1.20,2.30 0.20,0.12 fill #8aca70 0.18
ellipse 0.80,1.10 0.12,0.20 fill #8aca70 0.18
# Outer edge definition — subtle dark ring at canopy boundary
circle 1.5,1.5 1.35 stroke #3a7a28 0.12
props.winch-block:
name: Winch Block
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: dock-warehouse, warehouse, loading-bay, barn-loft, mine-shaft-entrance, ship
typical_count: few
clusters_with: cargo-scale, crate-stack, rope-coil, winch-large, winch-mechanism
notes: Overhead rope pulley hanging from a ceiling beam — seen from directly below. Pulley wheel cross-section visible with rope threaded through and dangling down.
---
# footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1. Overhead pulley — shadow: no (suspended).

# Faint drop-shadow hint on floor (diffuse)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.30 fill #1a0a00 0.10

# Beam cross-section (wooden overhead beam, running east-west, top-down it's a horizontal strip)
rect 0.10,0.40 0.80,0.20 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.10,0.40 0.80,0.20 stroke #2a1400
# Beam iron strap (where pulley mounts)
rect 0.38,0.40 0.24,0.20 fill #444444 0.8
rect 0.38,0.40 0.24,0.20 stroke #222222

# Pulley housing cheek plates (circle from below)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.22 fill #5c3a1e 0.95
circle 0.50,0.50 0.22 stroke #2a1400 width 2
# Inner groove
circle 0.50,0.50 0.18 fill #4a2800 0.9
circle 0.50,0.50 0.18 stroke #2a1400

# Pulley wheel rim (dark metal visible through housing gap)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.14 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.50,0.50 0.14 stroke #1a1a1a

# Axle pin (center)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.04 fill #666666 0.95
circle 0.50,0.50 0.04 stroke #222222

# Mounting hook (iron hook threading into beam from above)
rect 0.47,0.30 0.06,0.12 fill #555555 0.9
rect 0.47,0.30 0.06,0.12 stroke #222222

# Rope entering the pulley from the north (from beam)
line 0.50,0.28 0.50,0.42 stroke #8b7355 width 3
line 0.50,0.28 0.50,0.42 stroke #5c4a32 0.7 width 1

# Rope exiting south, dangling down
line 0.44,0.58 0.38,0.82 stroke #8b7355 width 3
line 0.44,0.58 0.38,0.82 stroke #5c4a32 0.7 width 1
line 0.56,0.58 0.58,0.82 stroke #8b7355 width 3
line 0.56,0.58 0.58,0.82 stroke #5c4a32 0.7 width 1

# Rope end knot / grip at bottom
circle 0.38,0.84 0.04 fill #8b7355 0.95
circle 0.38,0.84 0.04 stroke #3a2010
circle 0.58,0.84 0.04 fill #8b7355 0.95
circle 0.58,0.84 0.04 stroke #3a2010

# Small iron hook dangling from one rope end (cargo hook)
poly 0.36,0.88 0.40,0.92 0.38,0.94 0.34,0.92 fill #555555 0.9
poly 0.36,0.88 0.40,0.92 0.38,0.94 0.34,0.92 stroke #222222
props.winch-large:
name: Large Winch
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1.2
placement: corner
room_types: mine-shaft-entrance, mining-camp, deep-mine, dock, well
typical_count: few
clusters_with: mine-shaft, headframe, cart-track, sorting-table
notes: Large wooden winch with iron drum and coiled rope, crank handle — place beside a shaft or well to haul loads
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection rect 0.06,0.20 0.88,0.60

# North support post base (left upright)
rect 0.06,0.22 0.12,0.56 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.06,0.22 0.12,0.56 stroke #2a1400
# South support post base (right upright)
rect 0.82,0.22 0.12,0.56 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.82,0.22 0.12,0.56 stroke #2a1400
# Iron brackets on posts (where axle mounts)
rect 0.06,0.44 0.12,0.14 fill #333333 0.95
rect 0.06,0.44 0.12,0.14 stroke #222222
rect 0.82,0.44 0.12,0.14 fill #333333 0.95
rect 0.82,0.44 0.12,0.14 stroke #222222
# Wooden drum body (thick horizontal cylinder between posts — seen edge-on as a thin ellipse vertically)
rect 0.18,0.36 0.64,0.30 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.18,0.36 0.64,0.30 stroke #2a1400
# Iron drum bands
line 0.18,0.42 0.82,0.42 stroke #222222 width 2
line 0.18,0.60 0.82,0.60 stroke #222222 width 2
# Rope coiled on the drum (horizontal stripes)
line 0.20,0.46 0.80,0.46 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 0.20,0.50 0.80,0.50 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 0.20,0.54 0.80,0.54 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 0.20,0.58 0.80,0.58 stroke #8b7355 width 2
# Rope highlight (top strand)
line 0.22,0.45 0.78,0.45 stroke #a08560 0.7 width 1
# Rope tail dangling off the drum (south)
bezier 0.50,0.66 0.50,0.74 0.44,0.82 0.42,0.92 stroke #8b7355 width 3
# Crank handle (protruding east from the drum end)
# Crank arm
rect 0.82,0.48 0.14,0.06 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9 rotate 20
rect 0.82,0.48 0.14,0.06 stroke #2a1400 rotate 20
# Crank grip (small knob)
circle 0.94,0.60 0.05 fill #4a2800 0.9
circle 0.94,0.60 0.05 stroke #2a1400
# Axle end caps
circle 0.12,0.50 0.04 fill #444444 0.95
circle 0.12,0.50 0.04 stroke #222222
circle 0.88,0.50 0.04 fill #444444 0.95
circle 0.88,0.50 0.04 stroke #222222
props.winch-mechanism:
name: Winch Mechanism
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.8
placement: center
room_types: gatehouse-inner, gatehouse, portcullis-room, keep, castle-chamber, dungeon-entrance
typical_count: single
clusters_with: murder-hole-grate, arrow-slit-wall, chain-pile, lantern, guard-post
notes: Large iron winch and geared drum for raising a portcullis — heavy industrial mechanism with gear wheel, ratchet, drum, and capstan bars. Occupies a center cell.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.20,0.20 1.60,1.60 z 0-1.8

# footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2

# Base platform (stone pad the mechanism sits on)
rect 0.15,0.15 1.70,1.70 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85

circle 0.14,0.86 0.02 fill #666666 0.5

props.witch-hut:
name: Witch Hut
category: Structure
footprint: 3x3
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes

placement: center

notes: A tiny round wooden hut with thatched roof at map scale. Top-down: outer round thatch-roof disc with layered arc detail, a smoke hole at center, and a small porch/deck at the south edge. 3x3 centerpiece for outdoor encounter maps.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 z 0-8

# footprint 3x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-3

# === Porch / deck at south edge (drawn first, roof overlaps it) ===
rect 0.80,2.30 1.40,0.55 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.8
rect 0.80,2.30 1.40,0.55 stroke #3a1f00
# Plank lines
line 0.80,2.45 2.20,2.45 stroke #2a1400 0.5 width 1
line 0.80,2.60 2.20,2.60 stroke #2a1400 0.5 width 1
line 0.80,2.75 2.20,2.75 stroke #2a1400 0.45 width 1
# Porch step (southernmost edge)
rect 0.95,2.82 1.10,0.12 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.75
rect 0.95,2.82 1.10,0.12 stroke #3a1f00

# === Outer thatch roof (large round disc) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 fill #7a6a3a 0.9
circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.4
circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 stroke #3a2a10

# === Concentric thatch arc layers (rings of bundled straw) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 1.10 stroke #5a4a28 0.6 width 1
circle 1.50,1.40 0.92 stroke #5a4a28 0.55 width 1
circle 1.50,1.40 0.74 stroke #5a4a28 0.5 width 1
circle 1.50,1.40 0.56 stroke #5a4a28 0.45 width 1

# === Thatch texture detail (radial straw lines between rings) ===
line 1.50,0.18 1.50,0.56 stroke #6a5a30 0.4 width 1
line 0.55,0.70 0.85,0.92 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 2.45,0.70 2.15,0.92 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 0.28,1.40 0.60,1.40 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 2.72,1.40 2.40,1.40 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 0.55,2.10 0.85,1.88 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 2.45,2.10 2.15,1.88 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 1.50,2.62 1.50,2.30 stroke #6a5a30 0.3 width 1

# === Ridge cap (top of the conical roof — a raised ring) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 0.38 fill #8a7a48 0.7
circle 1.50,1.40 0.38 stroke #4a3a18

# === Smoke hole at center (dark opening) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 0.16 fill #1a1208 0.8
circle 1.50,1.40 0.16 stroke #2a1a08
# Faint smoke wisps curling out
bezier 1.50,1.28 1.45,1.18 1.48,1.10 1.42,1.02 stroke #666666 0.25 width 1
bezier 1.50,1.28 1.55,1.20 1.52,1.12 1.58,1.04 stroke #666666 0.2 width 1

# === Thatch eave overhang shadow (darker ring at base) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 stroke #2a1a08 0.4 width 3

# === Doorway opening visible on south (dark gap under eave) ===
arc 1.50,2.30 0.18 0 180 fill #1a1208 0.7
arc 1.50,2.30 0.18 0 180 stroke #2a1a08

circle 1.50,1.40 0.56 stroke #5a4a28 0.45 width 1

line 0.55,2.10 0.85,1.88 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 2.45,2.10 2.15,1.88 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1

props.wood-shavings:
name: Wood Shavings
category: Clutter
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.08
placement: floor
room_types: general-workshop, carpentry, cooperage, mill-lumber, shop-weaponsmith, house-medium-artisan, workshop-artificer
typical_count: few
clusters_with: workbench, adze, wood-chip-pile, tool-scatter, saw
notes: Pile of curly wood shavings from planing or lathe work — pale yellow, distinct coil shapes. Visually different from wood-chip-pile (flat angular chips).
---
# === HITBOX ===
selection circle 0.5,0.52 0.36

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: heap of curly shavings with visible spiraled coils

# === Pale dust halo (sawdust spread around pile) ===
ellipse 0.50,0.54 0.44,0.36 fill #d4b880 0.35
ellipse 0.50,0.54 0.34,0.28 fill #c4a870 0.4

# === Base pile mound (dense mass of curls) ===
poly 0.20,0.54 0.26,0.40 0.38,0.32 0.52,0.30 0.66,0.32 0.76,0.40 0.82,0.54 0.80,0.66 0.72,0.76 0.58,0.80 0.42,0.80 0.28,0.74 0.22,0.66 fill #c4a870 0.82
poly 0.20,0.54 0.26,0.40 0.38,0.32 0.52,0.30 0.66,0.32 0.76,0.40 0.82,0.54 0.80,0.66 0.72,0.76 0.58,0.80 0.42,0.80 0.28,0.74 0.22,0.66 stroke #8b7355 0.55

# === Individual curly shavings (spirals and ringlets) ===
# Spiral coil 1 (tight curl)
bezier 0.30,0.42 0.34,0.38 0.40,0.40 0.42,0.44 stroke #e8d4a0 width 3
bezier 0.42,0.44 0.40,0.50 0.34,0.48 0.30,0.44 stroke #e8d4a0 width 3
bezier 0.30,0.44 0.32,0.46 0.36,0.46 0.38,0.44 stroke #d4b880 width 2

# Spiral coil 2
bezier 0.52,0.38 0.58,0.36 0.62,0.40 0.60,0.44 stroke #e8d4a0 width 3
bezier 0.60,0.44 0.56,0.46 0.52,0.44 0.52,0.40 stroke #e8d4a0 width 2

# Long curl 3 (S-curve)
bezier 0.36,0.58 0.44,0.52 0.54,0.60 0.62,0.54 stroke #d4b880 width 3
bezier 0.36,0.58 0.40,0.62 0.48,0.64 0.54,0.62 stroke #c4a870 width 2

# Long curl 4
bezier 0.28,0.64 0.36,0.70 0.48,0.70 0.56,0.74 stroke #e8d4a0 width 3
bezier 0.56,0.74 0.64,0.72 0.70,0.66 0.72,0.60 stroke #d4b880 width 3

# Short coil 5
bezier 0.62,0.48 0.68,0.44 0.74,0.50 0.72,0.56 stroke #e8d4a0 width 3

# Short coil 6
bezier 0.42,0.72 0.46,0.76 0.54,0.78 0.56,0.74 stroke #d4b880 width 2

# === Bright highlight curls on top ===
bezier 0.40,0.48 0.48,0.44 0.54,0.48 0.50,0.52 stroke #f4e4b8 0.9 width 2
bezier 0.56,0.62 0.62,0.58 0.66,0.62 0.62,0.66 stroke #f4e4b8 0.85 width 2

# === Scattered stray curls at edges ===
bezier 0.16,0.48 0.20,0.44 0.26,0.48 0.22,0.52 stroke #d4b880 0.8 width 2
bezier 0.82,0.60 0.84,0.56 0.88,0.60 0.84,0.64 stroke #d4b880 0.8 width 2
bezier 0.46,0.86 0.50,0.88 0.56,0.86 0.54,0.84 stroke #c4a870 0.75 width 2

# === Grain lines on visible shavings ===
line 0.40,0.44 0.44,0.42 stroke #8b7355 0.45 width 1
line 0.55,0.42 0.58,0.40 stroke #8b7355 0.45 width 1
line 0.44,0.62 0.52,0.60 stroke #8b7355 0.4 width 1

# === Tiny sawdust specks scattered ===

circle 0.86,0.42 0.008 fill #c4a870 0.7
circle 0.22,0.78 0.008 fill #c4a870 0.6
circle 0.78,0.80 0.008 fill #c4a870 0.6
